chapters.title: Chapter 1801
chapters.body:
Chapter 1801

Chapter 1801

C.1801

“Haven’t you traced the source?” Xu missed pointing to the cloud at the top of his finger.

The female disciple smiled bitterly and said, “the top is an unknown place. We can’t explore it. In fact… We don’t even know how the holy water spring appeared. We only know that the holy water born from this place is of great use to monks, so we have collected it all the time.”

“I see. In other words, you just found this place, but it’s not clear how it came from and why it disappeared.” Xu que touched his chin and observed around the cliff, “then why did you bring the poor monk here?”

“Because this is the place where the temple began to dry up.” The female disciple said honestly, “we’ve explored it many times, but we didn’t get anything in the end.”

Xu Wei looked around and didn’t find any strange signs. When he was about to ask the female disciple to take him to other places, he suddenly raised his eyebrows and stopped.

In a secret corner of the stone platform, there is a small claw print.

The location of this claw print is very hidden, hidden by the shadow of vines, and from a perspective, it looks like a gesture to dig through the mountain wall.

Two dogs have been here?

“Well, Amitabha, as the poor monk expected, er Gouzi and Duan Jiude once broke into this place?” Xu que is serious with his hands folded.

The female disciple was surprised and nodded: “master, you can even see this… Indeed, er Gouzi and Duan Jiude came to visit our holy Moon Temple in the name of communication. They were very interested in the holy water spring at that time. Later, they sneaked into the holy water spring at night and were found by senior brother Murong, After a while of investigation, we found that they actually stole the treasure house of the holy moon hall, so we began to want them. ”

If you like something, you must get it. If you can’t get it, you must steal it. The last way is to rob it.

If you can’t even grab it, at least leave a mark and collect it later.

Any treasure is seen by Er Gouzi… No, it has been regarded as its own when it hears rumors.

However, it was another name that attracted Xu’s attention.

“Senior brother Murong? Are you talking about Murong Yunhai? ” Xu lacks a wonderful way.

“Yes, elder martial brother Murong was visiting the holy moon hall at that time. He should have discussed with elder martial sister about taking part in the Tianmen competition.” The female disciple recalled.

Tianmen competition?

What’s that?

Xu que didn’t ask in a hurry, but picked up some unimportant words and set them out in a circle.

It turns out that Tianmen is not without competition. Tianmen competition will be held every 100 years. It is said that the winners will enter the central Tianmen for retreat.

Losers can choose to go to the power of Tianmen to become the helmsman, or continue to practice under the Immortal Emperor as disciples.

“So, did the nishang fairy fail?” Xu Wei was surprised.

The woman’s strength is not as delicate as it seems. At least if she doesn’t use the positive Qi seal magic Sutra, it’s estimated to be a 50-50 situation.

“That’s not…” the female disciple seemed a little embarrassed. Most of these messages were blocked inside the holy moon hall. “I don’t know very well, but it seems that there was something wrong with the elder martial sister, so I didn’t participate. Later, his Majesty the Immortal Emperor sent a message to let the elder martial sister take charge of the holy moon hall, and then the elder martial sister came.”

Seeing that the gossip failed to dig out any strong material, Xu kupo sighed with regret.

“Have you ever explored here?” Xu que asked a key question.

If the other party has explored, he may have found something wrong here. If he makes a rash move, he can easily be found.

The female disciple nodded and Xu’s heart sank.

But then, the female disciple said, “we carefully explored this cliff at that time, but we didn’t find anything. The holy water spring seemed to come out of thin air and suddenly disappeared.”

Xu Xu was relieved.

It’s not that there’s nothing in it, but that you didn’t find it.

Xu Wei believes in Er Gouzi’s ability to explore treasures. This guy is accurate in finding treasures and smelling shit.

I’m afraid this is species talent.

“Although this place has dried up, I think it should still leave a lot of clues.” Xu Kushen said in a deep voice, “I don’t know if I can let the poor monk stay here for a moment. Maybe I can find the traces of Er Gouzi and Duan Jiude. The strange things in the holy moon hall may be related to them.”

Quietly, a black pot was buckled on these two goods. Xu lacked no psychological burden.

Good brother, it should be sold.

When the female disciple heard the speech, she was filled with righteous indignation and said, “these two guys are too bad. They have to do damage if they steal from us. That’s hard, master Tang. I’ll wait for you outside.”

As a disciple of the holy moon hall, although his cultivation is not high, he still has some knowledge.

The monk obviously wants to use some secret skills and doesn’t want to be seen by outsiders. Because of the order of the nishang fairy, the female disciple had no doubt about Xu Ke’s mind. After all, they had explored inside and outside for a long time and didn’t even find a hair Thank you very much, benefactor. I have time to make an appointment. ” Xu que put his hands together. The female disciple was slightly stunned: “master Tang, this appointment is…” “Oh, it is a kind of practice secret method of our Buddhism. Through in-depth exploration with each other, we can understand our original heart, so as to achieve the effect of improving cultivation.” Xu que said with a smile, “I think the benefactor has great potential in this regard, so I have this statement.” The female disciple suddenly realized and said gratefully, “thank you, master Tang. If master Tang has time, you can make an appointment at any time.” Watching the female disciple go away, Xu que nodded with satisfaction. It seems that the female disciples of the holy moon hall are of high quality. I hope to have time to explore deeply. At this time, only Xu is left in the holy water spring. He sat cross legged in front of the cliff, closed his eyes, and a golden awn flashed across his eyebrows. The little golden body of the integrated spirit suddenly poured out a huge force and explored towards the mountain wall. Now his cultivation is on the verge of xianzun. The exploration area is many times larger than before. I’m afraid the ordinary xianzun exploration is less than one tenth of his. Therefore, the environment seen in Xu’s perception is different from that of other people. In the depths of this cliff, I don’t know how deep, there is a hidden existence. The heaven and earth aura of the whole holy moon hall is slowly absorbed by it. Even anger is being absorbed. Xu que subconsciously poked the thing with the spirit, and a violent wave suddenly came. He was surprised. This thing is still alive

chapters.title: Chapter 1802
chapters.body:
Chapter 1802

Chapter 1802

C.1802

In his eyes, the existence hidden in the cliff was like a black hole.

Countless vitality and aura are sucked away by this existence. Where the naked eye can’t see, these auras are like streams flowing into the black hole.

Not surprisingly, in another year at most, the aura of the whole holy moon hall will be completely absorbed.

At that time, it will be a wasteland without any grass.

Although it can recover slowly over time, it will take at least 30 to 50 years.

After all, destruction is easier than construction, and repair is more difficult.

“Hey, hey, even if Er Gouzi is as cunning as a ghost, you have to drink my foot washing water.” Xu Duan’s mouth was raised and he directly took out the holy water he had obtained before.

The holy water of life contains powerful spirit of life. In those years, even the flat peach trees could be easily saved.

At this time, as soon as I took it out, I was immediately perceived by the existence in the mountain wall, and my strong desire gushed out.

“Hey, hey, if you want it, come out and take it.” Xu que smiled and poured out a whole bottle of holy water for living creatures. He condensed it in the palm of his hand with Xianyuan and pressed it on the mountain wall.

The existence seemed to have no intention. It rushed out of the depths of the cliff at a fast speed and came straight to the bottle of holy water.

Xu Ke counted the time, just when the other party just rushed out,

Bang!

A bright light suddenly rushed out of the mountain wall.

Without saying a word, Xu que put away the holy water of the living creatures with his backhand, and quickly set a ban around to prevent the other party from running away.

What I learned most when I was with ER Gouzi was the means to imprison the treasure.

People can go, but treasures must stay.

This group of Hui mang was also a little confused for a moment.

It really felt the strong breath of life, so it rushed out of the cliff.

But as soon as it rushed out, the breath disappeared, which made it very confused.

What about a breath of life?

Where have you been?

This group of light has appeared, and then it emits a strong Xianyuan flavor. The dazzling brilliance is like the scorching sun, illuminating the whole cliff.

At the same time, there is a strong force, which is slowly recovering.

“Sleeping trough! What is this? ”

At the moment of feeling this power, Xu que was surprised. He didn’t even care to check what it was, so he threw it into the storage space of the system with his backhand.

The storage function of the system is first-class. So far, Xu que has never seen anything that can’t be installed, and he can cover up everything.

“Master Tang, what’s the matter?”

Just the second after he put away the light, a beautiful figure hurried in, impressively the female disciple who had just left.

She was just outside, but she suddenly felt a strong surge of power and ran back quickly.

If something happens to master Tang here, the last person to carry the pot is himself!

However, during the time she ran in, Xu que had put Hui mang away, and naturally she couldn’t find anything.

“Amitabha, I just felt the holy water spring, so I suddenly realized something and made a breakthrough in the realm.” Xu que put his hands together and said with a smile.

The female disciple was stunned, thinking that the powerful breath just now had not even appeared on the eldest martial sister. What did the monk find that there was such a big movement?

“I haven’t found anything here. Now I’ll go back and sort out my epiphany. I’ll go to find the nishang fairy later.” Xu que casually fooled the female disciple, turned and left.

Hurried back to the room, Xu Xu didn’t hurry to take out the things, but carefully laid a full 30 prohibitions in the room.

Not only to prevent that thing from running out, but also to avoid being spied by the people in the holy Moon Temple.

After all this, Xu Kui took a deep breath and took out the Hui mang.

In an instant, endless light splashed around, and I saw that it was about to penetrate the room.

At this time, layers of prohibitions emerged around the room, stubbornly blocking these lights.

“Click!”

A slight sound of breaking came, and a large number of cracks appeared on the prohibition.

“Woge!”

Xu Wei was surprised at that time.

I can’t even stop for a few seconds!

“System, find a way to suppress this thing!” Without hesitation, he immediately asked for help from the system.

“Ding, you need to consume 50 points per second to suppress this object.”

“Fucking profiteer!”

Xu Ke scolded and asked the system to turn on the suppression.

“Hey, hey, let Ben force the saint to see which immortal you are.” When the brilliance was completely suppressed, Xu que finally saw the real face of this thing in front of him and was stunned It’s so special… Why does it look familiar? ” The existence of unparalleled light just now is just a stone? And Xu Ke always felt that he had seen this kind of stone somewhere. He reached out his hand and touched the stone. Suddenly, a mysterious character appeared on the surface of the stone Grass! It’s you! ” At the moment of seeing the characters, Xu que immediately recalled where he had seen it. God stone! In the memory world, this thing was used by the heavenly palace as a divine stone to test Tao Yun! Later, Xu que also made a special investigation. Later, because the stone could not be mined, it could only fall from the sky, so it was gradually scarce. Later generations also gradually abandoned this method of evaluating only by Tao Yun, so the divine stone gradually disappeared in Tianzhou. Unexpectedly, I saw this thing again in xianyunzhou It’s true that you didn’t meet each other in life. You dared to scold me at that time. ” Xu que smiled grimly twice, held the stone in his hand and laughed almost like a small man’s ambition. He didn’t forget that in the memory world, the God stone used as a test actually abused himself crazily with God text. When did Ben Pusheng suffer such humiliation? But cleaning up this thing is not a top priority. Anyway, I can’t communicate with the other party. Even if the other party scolds me, I don’t know System, how long does it take to crack this guy’s text? ” He thought the system would give a long and unreasonable time again. Unexpectedly, this time, he was silent for a long time. Suddenly, a voice sounded: “Ding, it doesn’t take time to crack the divine text.” Oh, I knew… Wait, what did you just say? ” Xu que suddenly widened his eyes, unbelievable The system has updated the Shenwen thesaurus and can be used immediately. ”

chapters.title: Chapter 1803
chapters.body:
Chapter 1803

Chapter 1803

C.1803

Xu Ke was stunned and suddenly changed his face.

“Well done!”

A flurry of praise gushed out and spilled over.

As for where the divine script library was updated, looking at so many places I have traveled, only one place has seen divine script.

The dreamland when crossing the love robbery, Tiangong academy tens of thousands of years ago!

In addition, Xu Xu didn’t expect to see it in other places.

At the same time, a large number of mysterious lines emerged on the divine stone.

Xu lacked heroic spirit and dry cloud. With a big hand, “system, interpret the divine text for me!”

“Ding, the lowest consumption of a single divine script is 500 pack force.”

“Why do you rob money!”

Xu Wei was shocked.

To interpret a divine script, you need to install 500 force values. That sentence “lying in the slot” can’t be 1500?

“Ding, the current system level is too low. If you need to reduce consumption, please increase the level.”

Gan!

I knew it wasn’t that good!

Xu lacks anger and claps the table. He decides to die with the evil forces.

“Wait… I should be able to understand divine literature!” Xu Ke suddenly realized a key problem.

In the dreamland, I smashed a test stone, that is, the divine stone.

At the moment when the trail stone was broken, the system detected a substance called “Shinto grain”. After absorption, it achieved a progress of 1, and also got a new language, Shinto.

Thinking of this, Xu que immediately began to carefully identify the divine text that appeared on the divine stone.

“Hey… This word seems to read you…”

Xu que looked at it for a while and was surprised to find that he could understand the lines on the God stone.

Originally, the mysterious divine text, when I saw it in my eyes, I could understand some meaning inexplicably.

Although I can’t understand it completely, most of the words can be understood.

After looking at it carefully for a while, Xu Xu’s face suddenly darkened.

“Draft, humble maggot!”

“Don’t touch the sacred body of this stone, or God will punish you!”

“Return Ben Shi’s food quickly!”

“You cursed mole ant will be killed by the God Town sooner or later!”

The whole article is full of such words.

Xu que suddenly felt a fire in his heart.

Nima’s, this God stone is too arrogant!

Dare to point at this forced Saint… Oh, it has no hands, but the guy who scolds this forced saint can’t find the second one in the whole xianyunzhou!

It’s bold!

“NIMA’s, you think you’re a god stone?” Xu que slapped directly on the God stone.

The God stone suddenly trembled, and a large piece of God text gushed out of the stone: “humble maggots, mole ants, dare to beat this God stone? I think you don’t want to live. The God stone will destroy you! ”

“Oh, I want you to see how you make me fly away.” Xu Wei was also angry and laughed. He asked the system to seal up the divine stone.

“Ding, sealing the forbidden stone needs to consume 200000 loading force value.”

“Seal, seal! This son of a bitch is too arrogant. I must let him feel the roar of justice! ”

Xu que was scolded by a stone for the first time. No, strictly speaking, it was the second time. It was the same kind of stone. Now he is angry.

At the moment of the completion of the transaction with the system, a strong force appeared in the room, like a big net, shrinking slowly and binding all the scattered lights in it.

Finally, with a “Bo” sound, all the brilliance was pressed back into the divine stone, and all the powerful prohibition arrays under Xu Que’s cloth were sealed back into the divine stone.

At this time, the divine stone is an ordinary stone from the outside, except for the divine text that has been emerging crazily.

However, the Tiangong academy has been broken for so many years, and the elders who mastered the divine script have long died with no bones left.

Looking at the whole xianyunzhou, no one can recognize it except himself!

Therefore, when Xu Wei appeared in front of the people with this divine stone, the disciples of the holy moon hall were a little confused.

Why did master Tang hold a stone in his hand?

In the middle of his life, the friar who studied cause and effect came forward and said curiously, “master Tang, what treasure is the stone you are holding in your hand?”

“Amitabha.” Xu missed the Buddha’s name and said with a smile, “this is my Buddhist wooden fish. You can calm down when you carry it with you. It has a miraculous effect on the study of destiny.”

He frowned and asked, “really? Why have I never heard of this form of wooden fish in Buddhism before? ”

“That’s because they don’t have enough accomplishments.” Xu Que’s face remained unchanged and said casually, “you can see how I use this wooden fish.”

He raised his hand and knocked on the stone. Suddenly, countless mysterious lines appeared. At first glance, it made people’s spirits a little turbulent. Ping was stunned for half his life. With his level, he can naturally see that these lines are not simple. But what’s more, the monk named Tang Sanzang was just a knock. He could show such magical lines! I’m afraid his research in this field is not shallow Master, your accomplishments are really profound! ” Ping Bansheng exclaimed, and then another sincere tone stared at Xu Xu, “I don’t know if master Tang can borrow it for the next time?” Without any hesitation, Xu Wei directly handed it over: “why not? Brother Ping wants to see it and take it.” Ping was overjoyed for half his life. When he was about to take it over, he saw Xu que suddenly show a serious and sincere tone: “brother Ping, but this thing can only be used with my hand for the time being, otherwise the reaction will be less sensitive, and even if I use it, it will consume a lot.” Ping took out a storage ring and handed it to Xu Wei: “master Tang, although you consume it, don’t be polite to me.” Alas, brother Ping, why? But since brother Ping insists on it, the poor monk won’t shirk it any more. ” Xu que accepted the storage ring and slapped it on the God stone. Suddenly, a large number of insulting divine texts gushed out, and even the person who didn’t understand for the rest of his life vaguely felt that something was wrong Master Tang, this divine stone seems a little different… “Xu Ke glanced at it and said casually,” Oh, it’s all right. It’s a normal performance of meeting a person with excellent talent. It seems that brother Ping has an extraordinary talent in the way of destiny. ” I don’t know if he was really gifted in the rest of his life. Anyway, he looked at it and suddenly looked up and shouted, “I understand!” After saying that, he turned directly and flew away to the distance, shouting “I understand!” Xu Xu trembled and scolded in a low voice Beast, what have you learned? ”

chapters.title: Chapter 1804
chapters.body:
Chapter 1804

Chapter 1804

C.1804

With the precedent of Ping Bansheng, the others came to Xu Xu and asked him to use this divine stone.

Xu Wei, of course, accepted all comers.

“My Buddha’s compassion can make the majority of monks deeply understand the truth. Even if the poor monk’s body can’t bear it, it will definitely let you understand the truth.”

When Xu Ke said these words, he forced Xianyuan to hedge in his body and made himself look seriously injured.

The monks of the holy Moon Temple around were moved.

This is the real Buddhist disciple!

Benevolence, friendship, selflessness, helping others, all noble and beautiful words seem to be applicable to him!

When the nishang fairy saw this scene, she felt a little trance and wondered if she had come to the wrong place.

A group of monks dressed in the disciples’ clothes of the holy moon hall are surrounded by a bald monk with a look of respect on his face, as if the monk was preaching Dharma to them.

“What are you doing?” She whispered.

Hearing the voice of the nishang fairy, a group of friars immediately dispersed and talked about him.

“Well, we are exchanging feelings with master Tang.”

“Ha ha, yes, yes, it’s a nice day today.”

“Master Tang, we have the opportunity to continue to exchange feelings. Ha, let’s go.”

The crowd dispersed in a crowd and dared not stay here.

After all, after Xu lacked left yesterday, these guys were severely reprimanded by the nishang fairy.

They say they don’t want to make progress. They don’t even know whether the other party is an enemy or a friend. They dare to find someone to tell their fortune. It’s like they don’t know whether to live or die!

People are dismissive of this.

This is the holy moon hall!

If there were any enemy who could come in with dignity, it would be at least Immortal Emperor.

They never thought that there was a traitor who swaggered in under their eyes.

“Amitabha, what’s the matter with the fairy looking for the poor monk?” Xu que put away the divine stone with his backhand and closed his hands.

Others can deceive themselves, but this neon fairy is a former disciple of the Immortal Emperor. I’m sure no one has heard of it.

Although up to now, Xu que doesn’t know what use this divine stone is except scolding his mother and testing Tao Yun, it’s better not to let this guy see it just in case.

“Tang Daoyou, I have something to discuss with you. Please follow me.”

They came to a magnificent hall, where several monks were sitting on the left and right sides.

As soon as Xu Weigang entered the hall, he heard a frightened voice.

“Sleeping trough! Why are you a bald donkey! ”

Xu Weishun looked in the direction of the voice and was an old acquaintance.

“Oh, long Aotian Taoist friend, I didn’t expect you to be here. It’s true that you don’t meet anywhere in life. It seems that my Buddha is destined for you.” Xu que looked around with a smile and found that not only long Aotian, but also Murong Yunhai and others were also in the hall.

At that time, the Tianmen participants competing for the Immortal Emperor’s heritage basically came.

“Strange, why did these guys suddenly come here?” Xu Xu is a little puzzled, but on the surface, he still looks serious.

After all, he took the Immortal Emperor’s legacy directly and ran away. These guys wouldn’t know about it.

Seeing the angry look on long Aotian’s face, the nishang fairy’s eyes swam back and forth between Xu Que and long Aotian. Without asking any more questions, she turned back to the first seat.

Strictly speaking, everyone here is her younger martial brother, and it’s not a big problem for her to sit first.

Murong Yunhai looked at Xu Kuan Shi ran and sat down. His eyes were a little complicated.

“Senior brother… It’s Tang Sanzang……” Duanmu Lei whispered.

“I know,” Murong Yunhai waved his hand and motioned his three younger martial brothers not to say more.

After returning from the Taigu secret place, they thought more and more that something was wrong, so they resumed the whole exploration.

Finally, they came to a conclusion.

It seems that Tang Sanzang has been pitching them from the beginning.

But they don’t have any evidence. After all, from the performance point of view, Tang Sanzang has been protecting them. Except Chen Mo and long Aotian, who took the initiative to provoke them, others have not been hurt.

This is also the most tangled place of Murong Yunhai’s mentality towards Xu Ke.

The master of Tang Sanzang doesn’t seem to be a real decent good man, but he doesn’t seem to be that kind of bad man.

At this time, Murong Yunhai suddenly met. For a moment, he didn’t know what mentality to use to face the monk who was rumored to have taken away all the Immortal Emperor’s heritage.

Just as Xu Wei sat down, the female disciple on one side said impatiently, “master Tang, you did the holy water spring!”

Xu que suddenly jumped in his heart and said something bad.

Shit, these guys have such poisonous eyes? As soon as Lao Tzu put the sacred stone away, they found the existence of the sacred stone. Although it is said that the garbage God stone is useless, how can you hand over the things you have. If it doesn’t exist, you can’t admit it. Therefore, Xu lacked a strong waist, smiled and said with a straight face: “Taoist friend, I have indeed been to the holy water spring, but I just went to look for the clue of Er Gouzi, and nothing else happened.” The female disciple was the one who treated Xu que to enter the holy water spring yesterday. At this time, hearing Xu que say so, she was immediately worried: “master Tang, you were the only one who entered the holy water spring yesterday, and no one else went in!” Seeing that the other party was in a hurry, Xu que strengthened his idea of not exposing himself: “no, I just realized it for a moment and left.” At this time, the nishang fairy suddenly said, “don’t misunderstand Taoist friends of Tang. It’s not an accident in the holy water spring, but today we found that the holy water spring began to condense the holy water again.” Xu Kuan was slightly stunned, then sighed and said, “well, in fact… It was really done by the poor monk. Yesterday, the poor monk spent 300 years of his life, exercised his secret method and finally repaired the holy water spring in your hall. However, you don’t have to take it seriously. I’m not the kind of blackmail, Just because I helped you fix the holy water spring, I want you to give hundreds of immortal tools. ” There was a silence. You have said your thoughts. It’s good to say that you’re not that kind of person. However, the nishang fairy looked at Xu Ke’s eyes and became more and more curious. I don’t know why, she always felt that the temperament of Tang Sanzang was familiar and similar to that of a little guy she had met. Can it be said that this is the uniqueness cultivated by the fried heaven Gang

chapters.title: Chapter 1805
chapters.body:
Chapter 1805

Chapter 1805

C.1805

Xu Duan’s hands were folded and his face was full of compassion. He sighed deeply: “Amitabha, to tell you the truth, I didn’t want to be exposed. Before I converted to Buddhism, I made a poisonous oath in front of the Buddha. I will never show my talent in my life. After all, my family was broken and people died because of my talent. I didn’t expect to convert to Buddhism now, But all the martial brothers are still dead. Is this the punishment of God for hiding my edge? ”

Set yourself as a loner in advance to prevent someone from investigating yourself behind the scenes.

This is Xu Ke’s experience in changing his identity over the years.

Everyone thought it was strange, but they couldn’t say anything strange.

But what Xu Ke said is true. After all, he was the only one who went into the holy water spring yesterday. Today, the holy water spring will be fine.

There is no one but him.

“Bullshit!”

Suddenly, a disdainful scold sounded.

Long Aotian scoffed with a look of “I’ve seen through everything” and looked at Xu Xu: “you were lying just now!”

The crowd was stunned.

Although long Aotian is a second Leng in their hearts, he is also a disciple of the Immortal Emperor. His behavior of slandering others out of thin air is somewhat forced.

Xu Ke was also shocked by long Aotian. He wondered if it was difficult. Is this guy a fool?

It looks silly on the surface, but it’s really smart?

However, the saint didn’t lie. In a sense, it is because he took out the divine stone that the spirit of life lost in the holy moon hall will begin to recover, so the holy water spring can gush out again.

Does this guy have found out who I really am?

“Amitabha, I don’t understand what benefactor said.” Xu lacked a kind expression on the surface, but he had already been vigilant in his heart.

As long as long Aotian makes any action against himself, he is ready to run away at any time.

Long Aotian’s eyes were like a torch. He stood tall with his hands on his back. He said in righteous words: “you said that all your martial brothers died, but you obviously have a martial brother, Fa Hui! So there is only one truth! ”

He raised his right hand, waved it violently and pointed at Xu que: “your younger martial brother fahui is in danger and can’t help him with your strength. That’s why you came to help the holy Moon Palace solve the problems here. The purpose is to help you in the holy Moon Palace!”

Xu que stood in place and remained silent for dozens of seconds. Then he sighed and said with emotion: “Taoist friend long is worthy of being the Wolong in the holy moon hall. I even guessed the thoughts so deep hidden by the poor monk. I admire him.”

The ox forced the dragon to boil the sky!

I’m worried. How can I get my reasons for doing this later? I didn’t expect you to make them up for me!

I forced saint to blame you before. From now on, you will be my good brother of Tang Sanzang!

Seeing that Xu Wei actually admitted his idea, the nishang fairy slowly let go of her jade hand.

In fact, when she told long Aotian that Xu lacked a younger martial brother, she vaguely guessed that it was the master of Tang Sanzang who wanted to ask the holy moon hall for help.

But at this time, seeing that long Aotian said it so bluntly, he was also worried that Tang Sanzang could not keep his face.

Now it seems that this Taoist friend of Tang is a Buddhist practitioner after all, with a broad mind.

I want to hide the situation. I’m just worried that we won’t help.

“To be honest, I was able to help younger martial brother before, but on the way, I was attacked by the hateful two dogs and Duan Jiude, so I was seriously injured and it was difficult to give full play to my strength. I had to come to the holy moon hall for help.” Xu que covered his chest and coughed twice. His face became pale and weak.

The nishang fairy suddenly realized that it was no wonder that he looked depressed after seeing this man use fatalism. He had been hurt for a long time.

He was seriously injured. In order to help younger martial brother, he didn’t hesitate to come to the holy moon hall and expend energy to use fatalism to prove his identity, which made the injury worse.

Such a virtuous man, we suspect he has other thoughts!

What’s more, they helped us repair the holy water spring!

For a time, everyone felt guilty.

The nishang fairy coughed softly and said in a deep voice, “since everything has been said, I might as well say it directly. Next, Taoist friends can rest in my holy moon hall. As long as we can help repair the holy moon hall, we will try our best to help Taoist friends of fahui.”

At this time, to say such words in public means that she has recognized Xu Xu’s identity.

Xu Weigang was about to get up and speak, when he heard another harsh voice suddenly ring out: “hum, it’s not sure whether he repaired it or not! What if the bald donkey is a liar? ”

Hey, Xu Ke was surprised.

In this scene, there are still people who dare to find fault in front of long Aotian and nishang fairy? What origin! I saw a young man in purple with a proud look and disdain in his eyes. It seemed that he didn’t even pay attention to the Dragon boil sky and the neon fairy Who is this Taoist friend? ” Xu que asked with a smile I’m the first disciple under the magic cloud Immortal Emperor, Dongwu Qi! ” The young man smiled proudly and said condescending, “obviously he has the ability to help the holy moon hall, but he has to hide it. Even for his younger martial brother, I think the monk has ulterior motives, not to mention maybe he didn’t repair the holy water spring at all.” Special, who is this boy? Xu que couldn’t help but turn his eyes to Murong Yunhai. Only this guy is most familiar here. Murong Yunhai looked up, just in touch with Xu Ke’s eyes, hesitated for a moment, and said: “master Tang, this man has been in love with the nishang fairy for a long time. The holy water spring is located in the nishang fairy’s residence, and ordinary people are not allowed to enter. I think it should be that you stayed in it yesterday and were told by him, so he came to trouble you at this time.” Oh, I see. Another old licking dog. Xu Xu’s expression remained unchanged, and his heart sneered again and again. Dog day licks the dog. If you don’t do well, you still want to be on the top? I told you to lick the dog and become a dead dog today Amitabha, since the benefactor needs proof, I am willing to prove it to you. ” Xu Wei put his hands together and looked sad. “But now I’m seriously injured. Ordinary treasures can’t work. Only one secret method can have some effect.” Bald donkey, you can say that I can satisfy you, but if you can’t prove it… “Dongwu sneered,” then don’t blame me for being merciless! ” Xu nodded and said solemnly, “this secret method needs the fairy in neon to sleep with me.”

chapters.title: Chapter 1806
chapters.body:
Chapter 1806

Chapter 1806

C.1806

Sleep together?

When everyone heard the word, they couldn’t react at the first time.

Seeing that the reaction of the people was different from what he expected, Xu que immediately changed his words: “that is, the nishang fairy needs to sleep with me before he can continue to repair the holy water spring.”

“Bastard!” Dongwu directly patted the table and said angrily, “bald donkey, you’re just presumptuous!”

He stepped forward and tried to make a move.

As a disciple of the Immortal Emperor, who dares not to give face as long as this name comes out on weekdays?

“Stop!”

The nishang fairy suddenly changed her face and whispered to stop Dongwu from taking the next step.

She looked at Dongwu coldly and said in a deep voice, “my friend, this is my distinguished guest of the holy moon hall. I hope you don’t be so rude.”

With that, the nishang fairy’s eyes fell on Xu Wei again, full of apologies and said, “sorry, Tang Daoyou, it’s my poor reception in the holy moon hall. Please forgive me.”

She knew that Tang Sanzang must be the one who cured the holy water spring. If Dongwuqi really killed him, or because Dongwuqi offended Tang Sanzang.

When this person leaves, will the holy Moon Temple never rise!

There are four halls under the seat of the Immortal Emperor. Each hall has its own particularity. The holy water spring is the support for the holy moon hall to walk alone in xianyunzhou.

If you lose the holy water spring, the status of the holy moon hall will plummet. In the end, I’m afraid it will become the end of the four halls!

“It doesn’t matter. I’m a Buddhist monk. I can’t break the anger precepts. How can I argue with the East benefactor?” Xu que showed a kind smile and waved his hand.

Shit, Dongwuqi, right?

I remember you!

The first one to clean up is you, boy!

Xu que said as he looked at the disciple under the magic cloud Immortal Emperor.

The four immortal emperors must be different, which can be seen from the performance of the disciples below.

However, this disciple of the magic cloud Immortal Emperor… Seems to have a bad mind.

“Nishang…” at this time, Dongwu’s face was as black as the bottom of the pot.

He wanted to expose Xu Que’s mask in public and show himself in front of the nishang fairy so that the holy moon hall would not be deceived, but he didn’t expect the nishang fairy to trust the monk so much.

Especially when looking at the compassionate look on the dead bald donkey’s face, Dongwu Qi felt as disgusted as eating shit.

This monk is definitely not that simple!

He knows something about the holy Moon Temple, which is not a problem that ordinary people can solve at all.

The spirit of life continues to pass and dissipate, basically because of the terrain problems. There is no other way except to move the holy moon hall.

Even if the Immortal Emperor comes, he can only do so!

What’s more, the monk has only the initial state of xianzun. Where can he get such a big skill to solve the problem that even the Immortal Emperor can’t solve?

“Since you can solve the problem of holy water spring, why not solve it with other places? Think you have other ideas besides asking the holy moon hall to help your younger martial brother? ” Dongwu pressed down his anger and said in a deep voice, “it’s really worrying to be so classy. What’s your intention?”

“Dongwu, you’ve gone too far…” a touch of anger flashed across the nishang fairy’s face.

Even if Tang Sanzang had other ideas, it was true that he took the initiative to help the holy moon hall, and he didn’t even take it as a threat. He only admitted it after he was exposed.

A master with such noble moral character, Dongwuqi is even aggressive!

This made her feel extremely unhappy!

Even the nishang fairy herself didn’t notice that the balance in her heart was leaning to the side of Xu deficiency.

“Ha ha… The host is right. In fact, I came here mainly to see the disciples of the Immortal Emperor.” Xu Kuang covered his mouth and coughed twice. “I’m not long dead, but I’ve been seeking Tao all my life. Naturally, I hope to go to Tianmen with you to have a competition and watch your style!”

It’s no secret that the Tianmen competition is in xianyunzhou, that is, Xu que is a newcomer and hasn’t heard of it.

At this time, hearing Xu Que’s request, the people were slightly stunned and then respected the Tang Sanzang master.

Tianmen is simpler than it sounds, but it is actually a very difficult and dangerous battle.

Every time the disciples who take part in the Tianmen competition, they will basically be seriously injured and may even die. Only the best people can become the final winner.

And before taking part in the Tianmen competition, I don’t know what the competition will be like.

Although each disciple participating in the competition said that he could lead two defenders into it, many monks would choose to shirk because they were afraid of the danger of the Tianmen competition.

In fact, people gathered here today to discuss where to find these defenders.

In Xianyun Island, monks who have the courage to participate in the Tianmen competition can count them by breaking their fingers Master Tang, it’s really admirable! ” It’s really a model of our generation to take the initiative to participate in the Tianmen competition! ” Yeah! Master Tang, this is the real seeker! ” Yes, we will learn from master Tang in the future and strive to help the eldest martial sister become the winner of the Tianmen competition. ” Then why don’t you offer? ” Well, my accomplishments are still shallow. Let master Tang give full play to his light and heat this time. When I practice for hundreds of years, I will accompany the eldest martial sister. ” Hearing the discussion, Xu was a little puzzled for a while. What is the situation of the gate competition this day? It seems very dangerous to listen to these guys… Isn’t it OK to fight? The nishang fairy looked at Xu Ke and was full of admiration. She pondered for a moment and slowly said, “since master Tang said so, it’s not good for me to brush the master’s will. This time, master Tang will become my protector.” This…… “Dongwu’s teeth are almost broken. How could this happen? What’s the magic of this dead bald donkey? I want to make a fool of each other again and again, but I let this guy pretend every time! Are you blind? This is, Xu Xu coughed hard again and said slowly, “since the nishang fairy promised the poor monk, the poor monk will go to solve the problem of the holy moon hall now.” Speaking of this, Xu lacked a little meal, and then continued: “nishang fairy, come and go to bed with the poor monk.” When the voice fell, Xu que glanced at Dongwu and found that the other party’s face was green and sneered in his heart. Smelly brother, you still love fairies? Let’s fart behind Ben

chapters.title: Chapter 1807
chapters.body:
Chapter 1807

Chapter 1807

C.1807

In the face of Xu Xu’s request, Rao is the nishang fairy who urgently wants to restore the holy moon hall to its original state, which is also difficult to accept for a time.

I’m the eldest martial sister of the holy moon hall. It’s psychologically unacceptable to sleep with a man in such a public place!

“Well… Master Tang, do you think there are other ways?” The nishang fairy has something to do with it.

Dongwuqi stares at Xu que with an iron face.

As long as this guy dares to say “no”, he will immediately kill the bald donkey on the spot!

Xu que thought for a while and felt that he could not force himself too hard. After all, we should continue to cooperate in the future.

“In fact, there is another way that can be used.” Xu que spoke slowly.

Hoo!

Hearing that there was another way, everyone breathed a sigh of relief.

After all, if the nishang fairy agrees, I’m afraid the holy moon hall will lose its reputation in the future.

But if you don’t sleep, you can’t. at that time, the holy Moon Temple will collapse and your reputation will be ruined.

It would be better if there were other solutions to this dilemma.

“Master Tang is really humorous. Since there are other ways, speak out quickly.” Murong Yunhai said, “no matter what needs, we can meet them here.”

Xu Wei straightened up, carried his hands, and said mysteriously: “do you know why the holy moon hall has become like this?”

When they saw that Xu lacked seemed to be telling something important, their faces became serious.

Hearing the question, Qi Qi shook his head.

If they really knew the problem, they would have solved it long ago. Why should they delay until now? We need to let Xu vacancy, an alien monk, solve it.

Xu Xu’s eyes flashed on everyone’s faces one by one, and everyone he saw subconsciously shrank back.

After seeing everyone, Xu que lowered his voice and said, “because there is an evil invasion in the holy Moon Temple!”

Evil?

The people were confused and forced. As for Dongwu Qi, his face was so black that he couldn’t be any darker. His eyes were full of resentment. He wanted to kill Xu deficiency on the spot now.

But he can’t do that!

If Xu que is really killed, nishang fairy is afraid that she will turn against him on the spot. This is not the result he wants.

At this time, hearing Xu Que’s remark about the invasion of evil spirits, he sneered and said, “joke, the holy moon hall is the holy land under the seat of Yongzhen Immortal Emperor. How can evil spirits invade?”

What can be called evil in xianyunzhou… Is it the Tianmo hall?

At the thought of this, the nishang fairy was angry.

Before, because Qiuzi left the woman and stole holy water from her house, she chased her all the way to Tianzhou and was even scared away by a younger generation.

Of course, up to now, she already knows that is the famous leader of the fried heaven Gang, Xu que.

If, according to master Sanzang of Tang Dynasty, evil spirits invade here, the only possibility that nishang fairy can think of is that the Tianmo hall secretly tampered with the holy moon hall.

“How should this be solved?” The nishang fairy pondered for a moment and asked.

At this time, it is not necessary to investigate who caused the problem. The top priority is to find a way to solve the dilemma of the holy Moon Temple.

“I have a secret method that can gather the power of evil spirits here with my supreme Buddha power, and then expel the evil spirits through seven or forty-nine days of chanting.” Xu que explained it solemnly.

When they heard the speech, they felt that Xu lacked’s method seemed to be reliable.

Although they do not understand the specific details of Buddhism in this regard, they have encountered similar situations. Most of them rely on opposing forces to consume another force for a long time, and finally achieve the effect of healing.

Since the holy Moon Temple is now affected by the evil spirit, it is reasonable and flawless to use the power of Buddhism to hedge!

The nishang fairy nodded and said, “I see. What should I do?”

The principle is clear, but the problem is how to operate?

Listening to this operation method should have involved the level of transportation. None of you here is proficient in this way.

On second thought, even in the ordinary half of his life, these people who are proficient in this way are like young children in front of Xu Ke.

“Master Tang, since you have a way, try it quickly. No matter what you need, please don’t hesitate to speak.” Murong Yunhai said in a deep voice, “we can all find it at the fastest speed.”

Xu que glanced around the crowd, suddenly shook his head with regret and said, “no, the things you need are too precious. I’m afraid you won’t find them for a while and a half.”

Dongwuqi sneered again with disdain: “joke, how does the holy Moon Temple exist? There are thousands of treasures in the treasure house. How can you not find what you need! ”

Xu Wei shook his head and said, “this method requires a Taoist friend who looks almost as handsome as the poor monk, but looking around here, let alone as handsome as the poor monk, there are not even Taoist friends who can reach half the handsome of the poor monk.” “…” Are you kidding us? What method will need a handsome man? Where on earth do you get confidence? People could not help shaking their heads. It seems that people are not perfect after all. Even though the master of Tang Sanzang was kind and benevolent, had noble moral character and Buddhist spirit, he still had the defect of being blind in the end. As soon as Dongwuqi heard Xu Ke’s words, he smiled proudly and walked out of the crowd: “monk, what do you think of me?” As a disciple of the Immortal Emperor, he is first-class in both cultivation and appearance! Dongwuqi has full confidence in himself! Xu que glanced at him, folded his hands and said, “Amitabha, Lord Dongshi, you are very gentle.” What? ” Dongwu didn’t react for a while. Xu Wei explained, “although you are ugly, you are gentle, so you are unqualified.” Dry! ” Dongwu suddenly froze and said angrily, “smelly monk, you’re aiming at me, aren’t you! What’s wrong with my face? ” Nishang fairy sighed. To be fair, Dongwuqi looks good, but he is less peaceful and close than Tang Sanzang. But now the situation is urgent and there is not so much time to screen Master Tang, if you don’t have much influence, I wonder if you can let Dongwuqi Taoist friends try it first? ” The fairy asked. Xu que looked up and down at Dongwu and showed a embarrassed expression: “this… Ah, in that case, I’ll try it reluctantly, but I’m afraid the effect is only 10% of the previous one.” Dongwu’s face was as black as the bottom of the pot. That means I’m not as handsome as you

chapters.title: Chapter 1808
chapters.body:
Chapter 1808

Chapter 1808

C.1808

Hearing that Xu que asked Dongwu to help, long Aotian immediately showed an unconvinced look on his face and subconsciously wanted to recommend himself.

Murong Yunhai’s face suddenly changed and hurriedly grabbed long Aotian.

“What are you pulling me for?” Long Aotian said discontentedly, “in terms of appearance, I should be the most handsome in the audience!”

Murong Yunhai had the idea of whether it was right or wrong to join Tianmen for the first time in his life.

This fool can’t see. Is Tang Sanzang setting a trap for Dongwu?

How did this IQ become a disciple of the Immortal Emperor?

“Listen to my advice and don’t get involved.” Murong Yunhai lowered his voice and said solemnly.

Murong Yunhai didn’t want to take care of this guy if it wasn’t for the fact that everyone had experienced things together in the Taigu secret place.

“Why?” Long Aotian looked puzzled. “Aren’t I more handsome than him?”

Murong Yunhai sighed: “do you remember Chen Mo?”

“Ah… The big disciple of the demon sect? I heard that after he came out of the Taigu secret place, he was depressed and looked like dying. I don’t know what happened in it. ”

Before he finished speaking, seeing that Dongwuqi had stood in front of Xu Xu, he stopped and made a gesture to continue to see.

“Can you do it?” Dongwu looked at Xu Ke disdainfully and said coldly.

“Amitabha, are you ready?” Xu Duan put his hands together, with a more compassionate look, and asked with concern.

“Don’t talk so much nonsense, hurry up!” Dongwu said impatiently.

Xu nodded and bowed to Dongwu. Suddenly, a strong Buddha light surged up on his body. Then he opened his arms and shouted: “the Buddha light shines! Lead the devil! ”

In an instant, the rich Buddha light spread around, and everyone felt a warm feeling.

“Next, the evil will be induced by the poor monk and enter the host friends!” Xu Kuyi said, “then the poor monk will perform the exorcism!”

Dongwu sneered and disdained: “where are the demons? Where is it? Why didn’t I see it! ”

However, everyone looked at Dongwuqi with surprised eyes, because on him, we could see the trace of black gas swimming.

“What is this?” Dongwu frowned and looked at Xu que, wondering if there was really any evil in this ghost place.

However, before he could speak, a slap was constantly enlarged in front of him.

Pop!

With a crisp sound, Xu Ke slapped Dongwuqi’s face.

His eyes were round, his hair was in a rage, and he shouted, “well, the evil is in force. Today, I will subdue the evil and eliminate the evil. I am incompatible with sin!”

With that, Xu que waved his hands again, and directed at Dongwu, it was a set of 18 dragon subduing palms!

Pop! Pop! Pop!

The crisp palms sounded one after another, forming a wonderful music.

Dongwuqi was directly beaten and couldn’t even open his mouth.

The disciples around were stunned and thought to themselves, is the Buddhist magic removal so simple and rough now?

Many monks even took out video jade and recorded this scene. After all, it was rare for the disciples of the Immortal Emperor to be slapped in the face.

Being slapped, Dongwuqi suddenly reacted.

I’ve never been possessed by any evil devil at all. It’s clear that the dead bald donkey is deliberately punishing me!

“Son of a bitch, you play with me!”

Dongwu gave a loud roar and raised his hand to bomb Xu que.

Bang!

The huge roar exploded, and Xu que immediately flew upside down and spewed blood. A parabola passed through the air and fell under the neon fairy. His face was pale and dying.

“Master Tang!”

The nishang fairy screamed, hurriedly got down and reached out to help Xu deficient up.

The Tang Sanzang master was already seriously injured, and now he was slapped by the Immortal Emperor disciple from Dongwu. What should they do in the holy moon hall in case something happens?

At that time, the whole holy Moon Temple will undoubtedly cause a lot of losses if it finds a way to move away.

After this slap, Dongwu was stunned.

He had already regretted when he hit out just now. Finally, he fell in front of his palm and collected his strength crazily. In fact, the strength falling on Xu Ke was less than one tenth.

According to Dongwuqi’s idea, this palm will cause him a little slight injury at most. It’s impossible to be like this. It’s like burping fart in the next second!

Dongwuqi tried again on himself, and felt more and more firmly that the dead bald donkey must have been pretended!

“Don’t pretend, bald donkey! I didn’t use that palm! ” Dongwu looked gloomy and said coldly.

But Xu Ke ignored him at all. He just lay in the arms of the nishang fairy and breathed hurriedly. I’m kidding. The saint is now in the arms of beauty. So many sisters and sisters in the holy Moon Temple all come to care about me. If trade starts rashly, won’t their concern come to naught? The holy heart is kind, warm and generous. I absolutely can’t bear to make these lovely and beautiful girls sad Cough… I’m afraid I can’t. ” Xu que lay in the arms of the fairy, groaning weakly. Dongwu got angry and said, “bald donkey, don’t pretend here!” Then he raised his hand and grabbed Xu que, trying to prove to the public that he was all right. Before Dongwuqi met him, Xu que immediately let out a cry and shrunk into the arms of nishang fairy: “I’m already like this… Why should East benefactor hurt others…” hearing Xu Que’s words, everyone immediately glared at Dongwuqi Master Tang has been seriously injured. You have to fight him! ” Dongwu, don’t think you are the first disciple of the magic cloud Immortal Emperor, so you can be unscrupulous in the holy moon hall! ” Yes, we are not vegetarian under the Immortal Emperor forever! ” Although the relationship between the four immortal emperors is fairly good, there are contradictions among the disciples of the immortal region. Many people have long been dissatisfied with Dongwuqi’s arrogance. Now they use the topic to criticize Dongwuqi. fuck! Dongwuqi feels that he can’t speak clearly now. This bastard is like a hedgehog now. Catching himself is a fierce stab All right, I’ll stop talking, all right. ” Dongwu stepped back two steps and stood in the original tunnel, “have you finished expelling demons?” Xu que got up tremblingly, put his hands together, and said solemnly, “Amitabha, there is one last blow, which should completely dispel the evil spirit.” After that, before Dongwu reacts, he blows his fist hard on his chest

chapters.title: Chapter 1809
chapters.body:
Chapter 1809

Chapter 1809

C.1809

“Poof!”

Dongwu was caught off guard and was directly shot with an old blood. The whole man crossed an arc in the air and fell behind the crowd.

Everyone’s eyes moved and fell straight to the rear.

“Hoo, in this way, the evil spirit here has disappeared. Don’t worry about what will happen in a short time.” Xu que said relieved.

After cleaning up this guy, he felt much more comfortable. At this time, he was leaning against the side of the nishang fairy, looking weak.

Seeing Xu Ke’s weak appearance, they thought that master Sanzang of Tang Dynasty was really worthy of being a Buddhist disciple. In order to eliminate evil spirits, they did not hesitate to do so!

It’s really a model of our generation!

“Tang Daoyou, stay here and help you back to rest.” Nishang fairy was relieved to hear Xu Ke say so and was ready to send him back.

Not far away, Dongwuqi finally got up. Seeing this scene, he immediately felt extremely bent and depressed in his chest and abdomen.

This son of a bitch, who overcame himself, is still so close to the nishang fairy?

What a bastard!

“Since the nishang fairy has such a good intention, the poor monk doesn’t respect it.” Without hesitation, Xu que put on the shoulder of the nishang fairy. With a very difficult expression, he said powerlessly, “but I’m afraid only one time is not enough. Later, it may take several more times to expel the evil spirit here.”

With that, he looked at Dongwu again and said sincerely, “I’m afraid it will be much more troublesome for the host friends at that time.”

When Dongwu heard this, he had to be beaten several more times. Suddenly, he was angry and spewed out a mouthful of old blood again.

“Host, what’s the matter with you?”

“Come on, my host fainted!”

“Carry it down quickly for treatment!”

A group of monks from the magic cloud immortal region were in a panic and hurriedly carried Dongwu down.

The hearts of the people were shocked, and the eyes looking at Xu Xu also became strange.

The ability to make a immortal friar faint is really beyond the ability of ordinary people

“How many times can you expel all the evil spirits here?” The nishang fairy asked. She urgently wanted to restore the holy Moon Temple to its original state.

Xu Wei estimated in his heart and said, “it will take about ten more times… The evil spirit here can be expelled, and the holy moon hall can be restored at that time.”

When they heard the speech, they subconsciously looked at the direction of Dongwuqi’s departure, and their eyes were full of sympathy.

If the man knew that he would be beaten ten times, he would faint again.

After Xu Que and nishang fairy left, Nuo Da’s conference hall was deserted again.

On the other side, Dongwu fainted just because he was angry and attacked his heart. He soon recovered.

After hearing that he would be beaten ten more times, his face turned red and roared, “this dead bald donkey deceives people too much! I must kill him! ”

Several friars nearby hurriedly stopped and earnestly advised.

“Elder martial brother Dong, don’t! This is the territory of the holy moon hall. If you start here, you’ll be breaking ground on the Immortal Emperor Yongzhen!!”

“You can’t be afraid of a fairy, but we can’t afford to offend the Immortal Emperor forever!”

“Yes, even his Majesty the magic cloud immortal once said, let’s come to the holy moon hall and try not to offend the monks here.”

Together with the monks in his domain, their character is becoming more and more arrogant, and they always have an attitude of fighting.

It happened that Yongzhen Immortal Emperor protected his weaknesses. In the early years, one of his disciples was bullied. Yongzhen Immortal Emperor directly went to the door without saying a word to find a place for his disciples.

It’s nothing that Dongwuqi killed Xu que, but he can’t kill now.

Nishang fairy now attaches great importance to Xu que for the holy moon hall. If Xu que has any accident, it is found that Dong Wuqi did it. I’m afraid there will be a riot in Xianyun island again.

Listening to the persuasion, Dongwu took a deep breath, and his heart gradually calmed down.

After counting the rest time, Dongwu called several monks and said in a deep voice, “are you sure if you want to kill Tang Sanzang?”

Several monks changed their faces when they heard the speech.

My eldest martial brother can’t swallow his breath and vows to kill the monk.

“Elder martial brother, this…”

“Don’t say so much, just say whether you have confidence.” Dongwu interrupts impatiently.

Several people looked at each other, and finally bowed their hands and said in unison: “yes!”

“Well, when the holy Moon Palace is solved, you will find a chance to solve Tang Sanzang for me!” Dongwu looked gloomy.

Dare to let his illusory cloud Immortal Emperor’s first disciple suffer this great humiliation. This revenge must be repaid!

“By the way, don’t spread today!” At the end, Dongwu sternly warned everyone. It’s only enough to pass it on in the Yongzhen immortal realm. If it’s returned to the magic cloud immortal realm, will his face, the first disciple of the Immortal Emperor, come back Understand! ” The crowd nodded yes and left one after another. That night, a monk of the holy Moon Temple went out and came to a tavern. Although here are all monks with profound cultivation, under the base of large population, ordinary monks also live like mortals and have a variety of rich entertainment life. This friar is the one who served in the Council hall today. He met with his friends at night. After three rounds of wine, he spoke freely Tell me, we have a big man in the holy Moon Temple today! ” The friar said mysteriously Who? ” The first disciple of magic cloud Immortal Emperor, Dongwuqi! And ah… He was beaten today! ” Really? The first disciple of the Immortal Emperor was beaten? Who is so bold? ” It seems that Tang Sanzang, a contemporary Buddhist, was beaten miserably. Dongwu was beaten to death. ” Ha ha ha! Good fight. It must be that Dongwuqi was arrogant and domineering in the holy moon hall, so he was beaten! ” Ha ha, that’s what I said. Come and have a drink! ” The next day, there was a big news in the whole Nantianmen city. The first disciple of the Immortal Emperor from the magic cloud immortal domain, Dongwu Qi, was beaten violently. The beater is the contemporary Buddhist monk Tang Sanzang. Even, the video crystal stone beaten by Dongwuqi was circulated in the market. In less than a day, all the friars of Nantianmen City knew about it what the fuck! Tang Sanzang is so fierce! ” What kind of accomplishments does this guy have? I can actually press the first disciple on the ground! ” It’s so soothing. I can’t bear to see those people in the magic cloud fairy region! ” This news even spread to the magic cloud fairy realm, which immediately caused an uproar

chapters.title: Chapter 1810
chapters.body:
Chapter 1810

Chapter 1810

C.1810

Ordinary people may not know the relationship between the four immortal emperors. However, the four immortal regions under you are always in a fierce competitive relationship, and everyone wants to put pressure on each other.

Although Dongwuqi is unpopular with Yongzhen immortal, he is the first disciple of the magic cloud Immortal Emperor, so he has great prestige in the magic cloud immortal domain.

The news spread to the magic cloud immortal region and immediately caused an uproar.

“Who is so bold to beat our people?”

“The Buddha named Tang Sanzang is too arrogant. He is basically beating our magic cloud fairy domain in the face!”

“Brothers, let’s go to Yongzhen immortal region and support our disciples!”

Magic cloud immortal region, East Tianmen City.

“Is the news true?” A young man in black looked gloomy at the video crystal in his hand.

The younger martial brother trembled and said, “if there is no accident… It should be true.”

The young man in black took a deep breath and exerted himself. The video crystal “snapped” and was crushed.

“Follow me to Yongzhen immortal region!”

For a time, a large number of friars set out from the magic cloud immortal region, crossed the vast expanse between the immortal regions, and went to the Yongzhen immortal region.

As for the other two immortal regions, they went one after another with the mentality of watching the excitement.

Of course, Dongwuqi, who is still in Yongzhen immortal region and is ready to retaliate at any time, naturally knows nothing about it.

After a night’s rest, Xu Wei said that he had almost recovered and could continue to expel evil spirits for the holy moon hall.

However, under the eaves, facing the pressure of almost all the monks in the holy moon hall, Dongwuqi can only accept it if he is unwilling.

“Monk, I warn you, be gentle when you fight…”

Bang!

“I told you to be gentle…”

Bang bang!

“NIMA, deceive people too much!”

Bang bang!

In the next few days, such exchanges will appear in the holy Moon Palace almost every other hour.

And the location is different.

After all, there are many places in the holy Moon Palace where the spirit of life has dried up.

In the words of master Sanzang of Tang Dynasty, it means that if you use this method in the place where the evil spirit invades, you will get better results.

So the monks of the holy Moon Temple had another Entertainment – watching the disciples under the magic cloud Immortal Emperor beaten.

Even some good people marked the place where the spirit of life dried up in the holy moon hall next to each other.

Calculate the time every day and follow the above route to observe.

When he hit the back, Dongwu was numb.

The fist fell on the body without the slightest feeling.

But his heart was broken.

I am the magic cloud immortal realm, the elder martial brother of the disciples of the Immortal Emperor!

It’s an insult to be beaten up like this and countless people come to watch!

But so what?

There is an old saying that when you are what life is, if you can’t resist, you’d better choose to enjoy it.

Under the influence of this mentality, Dongwu began not to feel uncomfortable, and even felt a little comfortable.

Just call. It doesn’t matter. You should give yourself a massage.

On this day, Dongwuqi lay in the room, looking at the ceiling with empty eyes.

After looking at the sky, he got up mechanically, put on his clothes and walked to an area of the holy Moon Temple.

Today, it’s time to be beaten up again. He has formed a habit and came by himself.

When we got there, there was no one.

The nun in charge of this place looked at Dongwuqi strangely and kindly reminded him, “master Tang said that yesterday was the last time, and the evil spirit in the holy moon hall has been expelled.”

Oh… Is the expulsion over?

Dongwu was stunned, nodded, turned and left.

Walking, he suddenly woke up.

what the fuck!

The expulsion is over!

Doesn’t that mean you don’t need to be beaten?

In an instant, countless heartache and grievances poured into his heart. Dongwuqi only felt the blur in front of him, and the big tears rolled down.

“Oh my God… It’s finally over!”

On this day, the cry of Dongwu spread all over the holy moon hall.

Others know this clearly, but it is not good to comfort the past.

After all, this thing itself is not very visible. You can’t comfort me by saying that you, your host, sacrificed your life for justice and didn’t hesitate to let yourself be beaten up for a few days in order to help the holy moon hall. It’s really high moral integrity, which we admire?

When you say this, you simply lack great virtue.

Xu Wei doesn’t care about these things, because he is lying in the garden of the holy water spring. He has got a recliner, basking in the sun and eating melon seeds. How happy is he.

He told these people that although the evil spirit was expelled, if they want to restore the holy moon hall, they still need their disciples with profound Buddhist theory to pray for the holy moon hall with Buddhist scriptures. It doesn’t take long. It’s enough to pray for seven or eight days. Now he has won the trust of all the people in the holy Moon Temple. All the monks in the temple will be honored as master Tang. So when he said this method, even if some people had doubts, he didn’t say it. Taking this opportunity, Xu Xu searched around the holy Moon Palace and found many marks left by Er Gouzi. Through these marks, he found the hidden treasures everywhere with great success. Most of these treasures are hidden by the monks in the holy Moon Temple, or they are natural and earth treasures that already exist, but they have not been discovered. Er Gouzi found it with his keen intuition, but unfortunately he was wanted by the holy moon hall before he could dig it away. Well, it’s all cheap Alas, er Gouzi is really the lucky star of our fried heaven gang. I must reward him well when I see him in the future. ” Xu que sighed that his mind sank into the body and detected the magic Qi in the body. The main reason why he had to wait so long was to buy time for balancing the evil Qi. Under his gaze, the progress bar of the system jumped from 99% to 100%. Click! As if some barrier had been broken, Xu que felt a powerful force pouring out of his body, sweeping the meridians. This power is different, including Xianyuan, Buddha power, and even magic Qi. Under the system balance, these three forces seem to be integrated into one, forming a new force Wonderful, I didn’t expect that three in one still has this effect! ” Xu Kuxi smiled. Now that the cultivation has successfully reached the middle stage of xianzun, coupled with the new three in one power in the body and the Zhengqi seal magic Sutra, I think it should be enough to resist the Immortal Emperor. He got up and left the holy water spring, filled with ambition. Rou’er, wait for me. Your brother will save you right away! Halfway through, he was suddenly stopped by Dongwuqi. I saw the other party standing in place and twisting for a while, like mosquitoes and flies, and said, “master Tang… I think there is evil spirit here, and it has not been expelled completely.” Xu Kuan was stunned and suddenly turned pale with surprise. what the fuck! Isn’t this guy shaking m

chapters.title: Chapter 1811
chapters.body:
Chapter 1811

Chapter 1811

C.1811

Rao Shixu was stunned by Dongwuqi’s performance when he had seen big winds and waves.

Finally, under his kind words, he finally persuaded Dongwuqi back.

Before leaving, Dongwuqi was still a little embarrassed and told Xu que not to tell about it.

Xu que looked righteous: “Amitabha, I’m a disciple of Buddhism. Isn’t I the kind of person with a big mouth? Don’t worry, my host, I’m the most strict. If you don’t believe it, you can. I can use the lives of my martial brothers as a guarantee! ”

With Xu Ke’s assurance, Dongwuqi left at ease.

Halfway through, he suddenly felt something was wrong.

Didn’t Tang Sanzang say that his martial brothers were dead?

Xu que sent Dong Wuqi away. He was quite moved: “there were frequent metamorphosis in the door this day. I have to pick rou’er back quickly.”

So he went directly to nishang fairy’s residence and asked when the Tianmen competition would begin.

Nishang fairy is in the room watching the information from all parties. Xiumei is weak and can’t understand it.

“Elder martial sister, why are you so worried?” Seeing this, the nun asked with concern.

The nishang fairy waved the information on the table and whispered, “I don’t know why the other three friars of Tianmen have rushed to Yongzhen immortal region together recently. Is there any action?”

The four heavenly gates have always had a bad relationship. Nishang fairy couldn’t help worrying.

If these people attack Nantianmen city together, I’m afraid they can’t stop it even if they are in the city.

“Forget it, you order to go down and let the disciples of the holy moon hall keep an eye on those foreign monks. If there is any change, you must report it in time.” The nishang fairy said.

“Yes.”

The nun turned and left, walked with her front foot, and then came to the door with her rear foot missing.

“Amitabha, I’ve seen the fairy in neon.” His hands clasped, with a sacred and dignified expression.

Seeing Xu que, the nishang fairy immediately thought of her experience that night, and her cheeks couldn’t help floating a touch of crimson.

Xu que was stunned when he saw this.

What happened?

How did the woman look like a girl in spring when she saw Ben Pusheng?

Can it be said that Ben forced saint to become handsome again recently, and he has reached the point where he will move his heart with a glance?

Alas, it’s a sin, sin

“I don’t know if master Tang is looking for me, but what’s the matter?” The fairy pressed down her mind and asked.

Xu Fuqing cleared his throat and asked, “Amitabha, I want to know when the Tianmen competition started?”

Nishang fairy looked stunned: “master, do you want to participate?”

She thought that Tang Sanzang was just looking for trouble for ER Gouzi and Duan Jiude.

“Didn’t I say?” Xu lacked a subconscious way, turned to a solemn look and said seriously, “to tell you the truth, the poor monk has received news recently that the two dogs and Duan Jiude seem to have sneaked into the friars and tried to destroy the Tianmen competition. The poor monk thought how to let the conspiracy of these two shameless people succeed, so I have this question!”

Nishang fairy suddenly changed her face and thought of the gathering of the three Tianmen friars.

No wonder… It turned out that these two guys were behind the scenes!

From nishang fairy’s point of view, it is impossible for others to instigate the monks of the other three Tianmen to come, except for two deceptive demons whose eloquence is better than cultivation, er Gouzi and Duan Jiude.

In this way, everything is clear.

Xu Xu is a little confused.

What did I remind you?

I just came to ask when the Tianmen competition will start!

But of course he wouldn’t reveal his ignorance. Instead, he said, “since the fairy understands, the poor monk won’t say more. I will try my best to participate in the Tianmen competition at that time.”

“Thank you, master. The Tianmen competition will begin in three days. At that time, some disciples in the hall will inform you.”

Before leaving, Xu que suddenly remembered something and turned back to remind him.

“Fairy, it seems that the host friend has a strange disease recently. Please remind the monks in the hall not to be affected by it.” Xu Xu lowered his voice and said, “he seems to be a shaking M.”

“What is shaking m?” The nishang fairy didn’t understand.

Xu que thought for a moment and explained, “well… It’s a physiological disease with strong infectivity. It’s said that this disease can only occur if you mess with the relationship between men and women.”

Nishang fairy turns pale when she hears the words. Even friars will be infected with the disease. How terrible it must be!

Therefore, rumors about Dongwuqi’s disorderly relationship with men and women spread vigorously in the four heavenly gates.

“Have you heard that Dongwu has an infectious disease that monks will be infected with!”

“I heard that Dongwuqi got an infectious disease because of his promiscuous relationship with men and women!” Let me tell you, I heard that Dongwu has withered! ” what? Dongwuqi is gone! ” Three days later, when Dongwuqi reappeared in front of the crowd, countless sympathetic eyes greeted him A friar belonging to the magic cloud immortal domain came forward, patted him on the shoulder and said comfortingly: “elder martial brother Dong, don’t be depressed. Even if you can’t find a Taoist partner in the future, you are still the best elder martial brother Dong in our heart!” Yes, elder martial brother Dong, men shouldn’t stick to these little things. ” The pursuit of the avenue is the lifelong pursuit of our friars! ” Elder martial brother Dong, you must cheer up! ” Dongwu looked confused and didn’t know what these people were talking about. When he found out the beginning and end of the matter, he only felt a burst of blood rolling in his body and chest tightness Tang Sanzang! I don’t agree with you from Dongwu! ” With that, a mouthful of old blood gushed out, his eyes were black, and he fainted directly to the ground Ah! Elder martial brother Dong fainted again! ” Come on, come on, come on! Carry it down for treatment! ” This dizziness further confirmed the fact that Dongwuqi was very sad because he lost his masculine style, resulting in physical weakness. Soon, there was nothing to do. Dongwu got the nickname and spread the four heavenly gates. As for Xu que, because sleeping everywhere in the holy Moon Temple makes the vitality of these places flourish, which also leads to rumors Have you heard that you can improve your accomplishments by sleeping with the Buddhist monk Tang Sanzang. ” Really? What I heard is that Tang Sanzang can absorb other people’s accomplishments by sleeping. ” Wait, Dongwuqi can’t do it. Can you say… “Lying trough! This is really possible! ” The so-called three people become tigers, countless rumors will eventually become beyond recognition after word of mouth. When Xu Ke stepped out of the room that day, the latest rumor he learned has evolved into “Dongwuqi was sucked away by men because he slept with Tang Sanzang!” Xu Ke gushed out his old blood directly. Shit! Which bastard spread the rumor

chapters.title: Chapter 1812
chapters.body:
Chapter 1812

Chapter 1812

C.1812

Xu Wei sat up from the holy water spring, stretched his waist and groaned comfortably.

“Bastard! Quickly pick up the God stone and bathe! ”

“You humble mole ant, how dare you humiliate the God stone!”

“The gods will punish you! You will die sooner or later! ”

The divine stone, which has been padded under the ass, is flashing crazy divine text at this time, with a high frequency like a barrage of bullets.

Xu Ke slapped it up, which immediately caused more divine texts to emerge.

He looked around suspiciously and found that the breath that had been following him recently had all disappeared.

“It’s interesting… The friar of the magic cloud immortal domain wants to kill me, but he doesn’t have the courage to do it here. Can he give up now?” Xu que said to himself. He shook his head again and stopped thinking about these things.

Now I have balanced the evil Qi, the system has returned to normal, and my cultivation has been promoted to the middle stage of xianzun, which has gained a new power.

Don’t say it’s just a fairy monk. Even a semi imperial strong man has to weigh his weight if he wants to do handwriting!

At the same time, Xu que gave his new power a name – chakra!

He has already thought about it. Before fighting in the future, put two poses first, and then shout, “release chakra!”

I think it’s very compelling!

After leaving the holy water spring, the female disciples of the holy moon hall were waiting. Seeing Xu vacancy coming out, they took the initiative to meet him and took him to the conference hall.

During this time in the holy moon hall, Xu que has become a worthy guest of the holy moon hall because of the repair of the major areas lacking the power of life!

Unfortunately, this place is still a little closed. Even distinguished guests can’t bathe with these nuns. It’s a pity.

All of them have reached the immortal statue. Why hold on to those old ideas?

This is backward, backward will be beaten!

Xu sighed and thought that this kind of thing was still urgent. He had to find a way to enlighten the female disciples of the holy moon hall when he came back again in the future.

It’s so fast for people who are practitioners to take a bath with open mind and talk about the Tao!

“Alas, there is a long way to go…”

Xu Ke sighed all the way. Seeing this, the nun couldn’t help worrying and said, “what’s the trouble with master Tang?”

“I’m worried that I can’t take a bath together…”

“Huh?”

“Well, there are still some differences in the holy Moon Temple. I regret that I can’t throw away the disguise with your disciples and sit down and talk about it. It’s true.

When the female disciple heard the speech, her eyes were full of moved look.

This is an eminent monk!

He not only helped the holy moon hall to restore its original state, but also wanted to talk with the disciples of the holy moon hall and lift the shackles of the soul.

“If master Tang doesn’t dislike it, the younger generation can sit down and talk with the master after the equal trial.” The female disciple said seriously.

Xu que suddenly looked happy: “what you said, you can’t go back!”

After that, he excitedly went to the conference hall and urged from time to time: “hurry, let’s go to the competition and come back to discuss the Tao.”

When I came to the Council hall, I found that the nishang fairy had already been waiting.

“Fairy, are we going to have a Tianmen competition?” Xu asked angrily.
