The nishang fairy nodded and said, “yes, but this time the Tianmen competition changed the rules. Instead of fighting as before, she asked to enter the secret place and decide the final winner according to the number of the final treasure.”

Xu lacked eyebrows and said, “why did you suddenly change to this rule?”

The nishang fairy sighed: “to tell you the truth, because too many monks from other regions have entered here recently, and the number of monks participating in the Tianmen competition has soared, so we have to take this competition.”

Xu que was ashamed. Although he was closed in the holy moon Hall these days, he still received a lot of news about the outside world.

The reason why these friars came to Yongzhen immortal region was to help Dongwu occupy the venue, on the other hand, to watch the excitement.

These two things have something to do with yourself.

“Well… From what I can see, if I’m going to search for treasures, maybe Er Gouzi and Duan Jiude will also go. I’m duty bound to catch them.” In order to prevent the nishang fairy from going, Xu que hurriedly found a reason.

Unexpectedly, the nishang fairy looked at him strangely: “how does Master Tang know that Er Gouzi and Duan Jiude have gone to the place where we want to compete?”

“What? Really? The dead dog lying in the trough… Cough, these two people are really unprofitable and can’t get up early. ” Xu que was shocked.

Shit, I just fooled myself. I really guessed right.

But think about it, it’s strange that two dogs and Duan Jiude don’t find them where there are treasures.

“Yes, the place where we participate in the competition this time is the place where the legendary gods try.” The nishang fairy said in a deep voice, “in ancient times, there were gods in Xianyun island. Although it is said that the gods fell because of fighting with each other, according to our continuous investigation, we found that the truth is not the case, but we have not investigated the specific reasons for this. This is the place where the gods were tested, This is a place related to gods that we have recently discovered. ” Oh, isn’t it dangerous here? ” In fact, strictly speaking, the degree of danger is not high. It mainly depends on what kind of place this place is for the trial of gods, and we have to be careful whether there is any residual consciousness of gods here. ” The gods still have residual consciousness? ” Xu Xu was surprised and said, “doesn’t it mean that the gods are dead?” In fact, it is not. Generally speaking, this place of trial will preserve a touch of divine knowledge of the gods, which is convenient for future generations to open here. Therefore, if we enter it, we must not offend this divine knowledge, otherwise it may be very difficult. ” The nishang fairy told me solemnly. After that, she paused and said in a deep voice, “moreover, I heard that the chosen one will also appear here. I don’t know what she is looking for.” Xu Ke was stunned and suddenly turned pale with surprise. what the fuck! Xuanyuan Wanrong is coming too! At the thought of his previous experience with Xuanyuan Wanrong in the dreamland, Xu Ke felt a burst of embarrassment. However, Xuanyuan Wanrong’s coming here doesn’t mean that it can eliminate the existence of Taiyi Tianshu here Nishang fairy, it’s not too late. Let’s hurry! ” Xu que said seriously, “Er Gouzi and Duan Jiude, two scum who deceive the world and steal fame, I can’t wait to catch them and take them back to the fried heaven gang for execution! I have nothing to do with sin! ”

chapters.title: Chapter 1813
chapters.body:
Chapter 1813

Chapter 1813

C.1813

Because he was already ready to take part in the Tianmen competition, the holy moon hall had already prepared everything, gathered people and horses and set out directly.

This group of horses is extremely powerful. Led by the nishang fairy, there are three friars at the peak of xianzun, as well as four friars at the later stage of xianzun. In addition, Xu que is in the middle stage of xianzun, but the actual combat power has surpassed the friars at the peak of xianzun.

This lineup, if placed in Tianzhou, can run rampant.

Because this place for the trial of the gods is specially set by the gods for the trial of future generations, there is no limit in the realm, but only in the number of people.

No more than seven people are allowed to enter each party.

Each side has twelve disciples, so there are only seven contestants in the Tianmen competition.

As for the other disciples, they either didn’t want to participate or there were not enough places, so they had to wait outside.

About a day later, they arrived at the place of God’s trial.

The place of trial is located at the boundary of Yongzhen immortal domain, and also at the boundary of the other three immortal domains, which is called the sea of chaos.

It was originally located at the common junction of the four immortal regions, so it was not under the jurisdiction of the four immortal regions.

A large number of evil friars, or the notorious generation in the immortal domain, all gather here.

There are no rules here, only the rule of respecting strength.

However, due to the emergence of the place of God’s trial, all parties gathered here. Those free friars suddenly felt miserable.

Even though their accomplishments are not low, they are all top figures from all sides. If they choose one at random, they can hang themselves up and fight.

Forced by helplessness, he had to escape from the other side and resent unceasingly in his heart.

When Xu Wei and his party arrived, the other three friars in the immortal domain had been waiting here. Only when the friars in Yongzhen immortal domain arrived, they were ready to open the entrance to the sea of chaos.

The monks present were clearly divided into four camps. Xu que didn’t feel the breath of Er Gouzi and Duan Jiude among these people. He contacted Er Gouzi with communication jade and didn’t respond.

Although the sea of chaos has the word “sea”, it is not the sea. It is most appropriate to describe it with chaos and emptiness.

The power of space here is extremely violent. It is difficult for even xianzun to walk in it.

In these void, there are huge stones floating from nowhere, enough for thousands of monks to live in them.

The monks once lived on these stones.

Under the leadership of the nishang fairy, the people fell on one of the stones. Looking around, it was deserted. Only in the furthest distance, there was a huge black vortex.

Outside this vortex, there are friars in the four immortal regions, located on all sides, waiting for the Tianmen competition to open.

“Shit, who has news about Er Gouzi and Duan Jiude? I charge a high price!” A strong man suddenly shouted, “I was almost killed by these two goods on my way!”

This remark immediately aroused the response of everyone.

“I’ll take it too!”

“Stop talking. This is our teleportation array. When you meet these two people, you will summon us immediately! I swear to tear them to pieces! ”

“Taoist friend, take me one. These two goods deceive people too much! What organization is the fried heaven Gang? How can there be such shameless members? ”

Xu que recited the Buddha’s name and silently stood behind the nishang fairy.

Mom, this is so embattled

Xu Wusi had no doubt that if he revealed that he was a member of the fried heaven sect at this time, he was afraid that he would be torn to pieces by these angry friars.

What did Er Gouzi and Duan Jiude do to these people

Out of curiosity, Xu que asked the friar of the holy Moon Temple to inquire for himself.

The news I got was amazing.

Not only steal people’s treasure house, but also kidnap other people’s disciples for extortion.

At the same time, they also sold fake treasure maps, which made many people cry for their parents.

“Master Tang, these two dogs and Duan Jiude are abominable.” A female nun was indignant and said, “compared with master Tang, they are the difference between bright moon and firefly!”

“Amitabha, benefactor, I’m flattered. I just have a sense of justice in my heart.”

Xu Ke’s mouth was turned away in his heart. What’s the cultural level? According to what you say, those two goods are pit force. Don’t you say that he is a bigger pit force?

The crowd came to the black vortex and was immediately greeted by friars.

After all, the holy moon hall is also a major force in the Yongzhen immortal domain. In addition, the nishang fairy is a famous immortal Yunzhou. Even if the friars participating in the Tianmen competition are arrogant, they still have to take the initiative to visit.

However, many friars were surprised that the nishang fairy was present.

After all, in those years, nishang fairy voluntarily gave up her qualification to participate in the Tianmen competition and chose to become the eldest martial sister of the holy moon hall. On weekdays, he lived in seclusion and went out of the hall. He was also a disciple of the Immortal Emperor. Many people had never seen the nishang fairy. The nishang fairy also brightened the eyes of these monks, with extraordinary temperament and beautiful appearance. Both cultivation and appearance belong to the best of the disciples I didn’t expect that this time it was the fairy of nishang who came to see me. It’s really our honor. ” It is said that the master sister of the holy moon hall has excellent cultivation and extraordinary appearance. She is really the object of our generation. ” I heard that all the female practitioners in the holy moon hall are gorgeous. When I saw them today, they really deserve their reputation. ” Wait, why is there a bald head in the holy Moon Temple? Is that a monk? ” It seems that… When did the holy Moon Temple recruit monks? ” Didn’t it say that the holy moon hall didn’t accept male disciples since a few years ago? It turns out that you can join as a monk. Damn it, I didn’t think of it. ” Everyone was still complimenting the fairy, but soon they were attracted by the shiny bald head. The key is that the monk seems to have a high status and is surrounded by several nuns of the holy Moon Temple. It’s enviable What happened? ” What is the origin of the monk? ” Wait, it’s said that a Buddhist son visited the holy Moon Temple recently. Is that him? ” Are you talking about the Buddha who slept all over the holy Moon Temple? ” Where did you get the news? What I heard was that the Buddha and Dongwu got up and slept. They fell in love with each other for a long time and have formed a Taoist couple. ” what the fuck! Your news is even more unreliable, okay! ” I… “listening to the comments of the people, Xu que vaguely felt something was wrong. Shit, listen to the outrageous degree of this rumor, how do you feel like the style of Er Gouzi

chapters.title: Chapter 1814
chapters.body:
Chapter 1814

Chapter 1814

C.1814

“Nishang fairy came all the way. It’s hard.” A monk in black came forward and smiled.

When the nishang fairy saw the man, her face suddenly sank: “Xu Dingcheng, are you here too?”

“The disciples of the Immortal Emperor can participate in the Tianmen competition. Why can’t I come?” The friar, known as Xu Dingcheng, had a smile on his face and said, “it’s the nishang fairy. You chose to quit that year. Why did you choose to participate this time?”

“What does it matter to you whether we participate or not?”

After saying that, the nishang fairy brushed away.

Xu que looked at the communication between them and asked in a low voice, “does nishang fairy have a grudge against benefactor Xu?”

The nun looked around and whispered, “in fact, there is a rumor in our holy moon hall. It is said that the eldest martial sister didn’t quit the Tianmen competition, but gave up the competition because she was attacked by someone on the way to the competition… Later, it was speculated that it was Xu Dingcheng who sent someone to attack the eldest martial sister.”

I see. Feelings are personal enemies.

Xu que looked ahead, and a disturbing breath was faintly revealed in the rotating black vortex.

“I’m afraid I don’t know here.” Xu que couldn’t help but say that now his divine soul power has far exceeded the realm of xianzun, and he subconsciously felt a sense of uneasiness.

When the nishang fairy heard the speech, she also looked forward and nodded for a long time: “indeed, I also feel an unusual power. Master Tang, do you really want to join us? This place is called the place of trial. I’m afraid it’s very dangerous. I’m afraid it’s difficult to survive safely with your cultivation, master Tang. ”

Although Xu Ke has recovered his strength, he still suppresses his cultivation in the early stage of xianzun, so as not to attract people’s attention.

The meaning of nishang fairy’s words is very obvious. It probably means that if you want to go in, the holy moon hall may not protect you at that time.

Xu Kuang folded his hands and said sincerely, “Amitabha, I’m here to catch the traitor of the fried heaven gang. I’m willing to sacrifice myself in the name of our fried heaven gang.”

When he said this, his face was full of compassion, and his whole body was filled with an atmosphere of justice, which made people admire from the bottom of his heart.

“It seems that the fried tianbang was indeed discredited by Er Gouzi and Duan Jiude. Now I see Master Tang and want to come to the fried tianbang. They should be just people like master Tang.” The neon fairy sighed with emotion.

They all came from the same gang. Why is there such a big gap between people?

Look at master Tang, looking at Duan Jiude and two dogs, there is no doubt that the world is uneven!

Before they came to the vortex, less than 50 people could stand under the vortex. They were all elites from the four immortal regions.

Xu que glanced and found many acquaintances, including Murong Yunhai, long Aotian and others he had seen before.

As the host, nishang fairy naturally shouldered the task of Hosting: “fellow Taoist friends, I think we have received the message from the Immortal Emperor. This Tianmen competition will be arranged in this place where gods are tested. This place has not been developed before. We also shoulder the task of developing this place while conducting the competition.”

Xu Ke’s heart is full of stomach Fei. The Immortal Emperor is really stingy. He has to take the competition to the place of development and trial.

At this time, a monk suddenly came out of the crowd and said in a deep voice: “nishang fairy, as far as I know, there seems to be people from the fried heaven gang in your team?”

As soon as he said this, the monks of the other three immortal regions changed their faces and looked for them in the team of Yongzhen immortal region.

Nowadays, the notoriety of Er Gouzi and Duan Jiude has spread all over xianyunzhou, and the fried heaven Gang is notorious.

In their mind, the fried heaven Gang is simply a synonym for despicable and shameless. As long as they can get benefits, no matter how many tricks they use, they can use them.

Tianmen competition is an extremely important opportunity for these contestants. The winner can enter the central Tianmen and meet the Immortal Emperor!

If you are lucky and can get the guidance of the Immortal Emperor, maybe you can become the next Immortal Emperor!

Before the nishang fairy could speak, Xu que came out directly from the crowd, his hands folded and said, “Amitabha, I’m the right Dharma protector of the fried heaven sect, Tang Sanzang. I’m here to bring the scum Er Gouzi and Duan Jiude of the fried heaven sect to justice. You Taoist friends don’t have to worry that the poor monk will do something wrong.”

Tang Sanzang?

The people were stunned at the news and couldn’t help thinking of the rumors they had heard before.

“Is your Excellency the reincarnation of the real Buddha, Tang Sanzang?” The monk obviously had a good impression of the Buddha region. Hearing Xu Que’s identity, he immediately softened his face. “I’ve heard that the children of the Buddha region are righteous and benevolent.”

But except him, the rest of the monks are still eyeing.

Are you kidding? You want us to believe you in a word?

“What evidence do you have? We won’t let you in unless you can prove that you are really a Buddha. ” Xu Dingcheng said sadly.

The nishang fairy smiled slightly: “Xu Dingcheng, don’t mess around here.” Nishang fairy, I’m thinking about everyone’s safety. If anyone who doesn’t know the details goes in, in case something happens inside, aren’t we elite of Tianmen in great danger? ” Xu Dingcheng set out his chariots and horses to target the Yongzhen immortal domain, “not to mention, I heard that Er Gouzi and Duan Jiude had already sneaked into the place of God trial.” what? These two goods have slipped in? Xu que was in a hurry. Damn, these two pit goods went first. Didn’t all the benefits inside be fished out? Xu Dingcheng stared at Xu que with a gloomy face. His purpose was to weaken Yongzhen Xianyu’s power to participate in the competition. The other two monks in the immortal region knew it well, so they didn’t speak out at this time. Nishang fairy sighed. Although she was the host, she was not easy to make public anger Master Tang, why don’t you wait outside… “Before she finished, she heard someone yelling at her Who dares to slander me, Buddha and son! ” All the people looked up and found that an old monk suddenly appeared from the void, his eyes were burning, and the Buddha light was all over the sky behind him This is… The handed down master of the Buddha region! ” It is said that this handed down master is a direct descendant of the true Buddha. His main duty is to find the reincarnated True Buddha! ” How did he come here? ” Then, in full view of the public, the famous old monk knelt down directly at Xu que Poor monk fakong, join the Buddha! ”

chapters.title: Chapter 1815
chapters.body:
Chapter 1815

Chapter 1815

C.1815

Among Buddhists, there are handed down masters with unfathomable cultivation and incomparable status.

Even the master of the contemporary Buddhist domain can only kowtow and shout an elder when he sees the handed down master.

Because the handed down master is an existence inherited from the disciples of the true Buddha in those years.

Its main duty is to look for Buddhists of each generation.

The handed down master of this generation is an eminent monk named fakong. Naturally, people in the four immortal regions have known this master for a long time.

However, they saw that the eminent monk who had to salute himself fell at the feet of Tang Sanzang!

For a moment, people only felt the thunder rolling in their hearts, and their world outlook had a faint tendency to collapse.

Is this guy really a Buddha?

Xu que was also stunned by the old monk’s roar. He looked carefully for a long time before he recognized who this guy was.

On that day, when fighting against foreign demons, an old monk tried to challenge foreign demons alone with the momentum of contemporary Buddha.

The old monk is the man in front of him!

At this time, fakong was already full of tears, and his voice trembled and said, “I think the Buddha has been killed by foreign demons. I didn’t expect to see him here today. It’s really a great blessing of my Buddhism!”

At that time, he was beaten away by foreign demons. Later, he searched for Xu Ke for a long time and didn’t find him. He thought the Buddha had finished the calf directly.

This time, I heard that the two dogs and Duan Jiude were here to fight against foreign demons. They were also there. Maybe we can find some news.

“Unexpectedly, it’s a great honor for our generation to be able to find the Buddha directly!” Fakong was very excited.

For many years, there has been no Buddha in the Buddhist domain. Now it is difficult to find the Buddha, which means that the real leader of Buddhism is about to appear!

Buddhism is booming, right in front of you!

“I beg Buddha to return to Buddhism with fakong quickly and command thousands of Buddhists!” Fakong sincerely asked.

When they heard the speech, they suddenly changed their faces.

Although the Buddha domain is only a small part of the Yongzhen immortal domain, the number of Buddhist disciples from the Buddha domain is surprisingly large.

According to incomplete statistics, about one-third of the monks in Xianyun Island belong to the Buddhist domain.

This is mainly due to the almost brainwashing teaching method of Buddhism. Unless the mind is firm, as long as there are flaws in the mind, it will be brainwashed by Buddhism.

“If this guy returns to Buddhism, with his relationship with the nishang fairy, we’ll have a hard time in the future.” A friar in the magic cloud fairy realm whispered.

Xu Dingcheng’s face was uncertain, and he hesitated to do something about Tang Sanzang.

The four immortal regions criticize each other, but they are always consuming each other’s strength while maintaining superficial peace. Now there is a Buddha in Yongzhen immortal region, which is undoubtedly a great threat to the other three immortal regions.

Fakong was stunned: “but… As a Buddha, it’s the responsibility of the Buddha to lead the Buddha domain and achieve the supreme Buddha realm…”

“Amitabha, the leader of the fried heaven sect has a great kindness to me. I won’t leave the fried heaven sect until I repay it.”

Xu wants to go away quickly, old monk. Don’t delay me here to enter the place of God trial.

If you go in and play, you can’t get any benefits!

Listening to Xu Que’s rejection of fakong, although their expressions had not changed, they all breathed a sigh of relief.

Fakong meditated for a long time and suddenly said, “in that case, please allow fakong to join the fried heaven Gang?”

Huh?

“Since the Buddha is in the fried heaven sect, as a handed down master, I naturally want to be in the fried heaven sect.” Fakong said solemnly.

Xu Ke’s heart is in full bloom.

Good guy, I didn’t expect to receive a xianzun peak combat power directly!

It seems that the strength of the millions of bombers of the tianbang sect will go up again.

“Amitabha, since master fakong has this idea, the poor monk naturally agrees.” Xu que said faintly, suppressing his inner ecstasy.

Fakong folded his hands and recited the Buddha’s name: “Amitabha, in that case, the poor monk is here waiting for the Buddha to return.”

After that, he stepped back, sat down cross legged, closed his eyes and recited the Buddhist scriptures.

FA Kong testified that Xu Que’s identity as a Buddha was no longer questioned by anyone.

Even Xu Dingcheng, who shouted the loudest, had nothing to say at this time.

The handed down masters of Buddhism have come out. If they are blind here again, it will undoubtedly be a vicious dog barking, incompetent and furious.

“In that case, if you are ready, go straight in.” Xu Dingcheng said coldly, his face a little bad.

The nishang fairy looked at Xu Que and took the lead in leading the people to fly into the air: “friar of the holy Moon Temple, follow this seat into the place of trial!”

Streamers rose against the sky and flew into the vortex. Xu Xu followed and stepped into the great darkness. As soon as he stepped into the vortex, he immediately felt his head become a little dizzy and a flower in front of him. The next second, the scene has changed greatly. In front of us was a dense forest, towering shrubs towering into the clouds, and in the distance were rolling mountains. We could vaguely hear the terrible roar of animals, which made people tremble This is… The forest of chaos! ” A surprised voice came from his side. Xu que looked around and found that nishang fairy was standing beside him, but there was no one else. Seeing Xu Ke’s puzzled face, the nishang fairy explained: “after entering the vortex, everyone will be separated randomly, and the specific landing position cannot be determined.” Amitabha, how can we find them? ” Xu que asked. Nishang fairy took out a jade plate: “this jade plate is exclusive to my holy moon hall. Those who have it will resonate with each other. If master Tang wears it on him, you can naturally find others and prevent separation.” Xu Que’s jade card, thinking about her feelings, the woman was still defending herself before she came in, and only now did she give the jade card to herself. Scheming… Is the trust between people so fragile But where is this forest of chaos? ” Xu que wondered. The nishang fairy shook her head and said, “I don’t know. I just saw some records in ancient books. The specific situation needs to be explored and summarized.” When they were ready to start, Xu que suddenly felt that the divine stone trembled wildly. Take it out and see that there are crazy gods on it This is the testing place of the God of fire! ” Ha ha ha, you humble mole ant, you’re dead this time! ” The eyes of the God of fire have already fallen on you. If you enter the place of trial, you will die undoubtedly! ”

chapters.title: Chapter 1816
chapters.body:
Chapter 1816

Chapter 1816

C.1816

The testing place of Vulcan?

Since he killed the fire emperor, he was cursed by the God of fire.

He thought that with the passage of time and the improvement of his cultivation, this thing would disappear naturally.

But I never thought that I was only one step away from the Immortal Emperor, and the damn God of fire curse still haunted me, always following me.

Really? I’ve seen a ghost. I’m a God. Why are you so careful?

Just then, a powerful voice sounded in the air.

“Disciples participating in the Tianmen competition, your goal is to collect the Tao grain stones here and strive to refuel.”

Xu Ke said strangely, “who is this?”

Nishang fairy gave him a deep look: “this is the empty voice of his majesty Yongzhen Immortal Emperor.”

Xu Kuang was stunned. He folded his hands and said, “Amitabha, your Majesty the Immortal Emperor is really invincible. We are amazed.”

He had a new understanding of the power of the Immortal Emperor.

This is known as the place for the trial of gods. The Immortal Emperor can directly send a voice in.

You know, since I came here, I couldn’t feel the outside world. The huge black vortex seemed to isolate everything.

“The testing place of the God of fire, is there anything strange here?” Xu que patted the God stone and asked in a low voice.

“Hum, humble mole ant, do you know how to be afraid now?” God stone is very proud, “as long as you kneel down, kowtow to this God stone and sincerely repent your sins, this God stone can tell you the mystery of this place.”

Seeing this, Xu Wei looked at the nishang fairy: “fairy, do you know where animals gather here?”

“Well… According to our current environment, there should be animals gathering not far away.” Nishang fairy wondered, “did master Tang find anything?”

“Oh, I have a divine stone here. It is said that there will be strange changes when it is put into animal feces, so I want to try.” Xu que said with a smile.

The divine stone immediately trembled more violently.

“Damn it! You mole ant, despicable! ”

“Cheap! You will be punished by the gods! ”

“Maggot like guy, if you dare to humiliate the God stone like this, the God stone will cut you thousands of times!”

Without saying anything, Xu que came directly to a pile of animal feces and said with a smile: “Amitabha, I’ll try it now and see what changes have taken place.”

“Well, the God stone house is kind-hearted and forgives you.” The God wenton on the God stone changes from time to time.

Xu que tilted his mouth and kept moving his hands.

Your uncle’s, a broken stone can pull like 250000.

You can’t help it, can you?

“Sleeping trough! The God stone forgives you. Stop! ”

The divine stone saw Xu’s lack of movement and trembled madly again.

“Amitabha, I just want to know what’s strange here.” Xu que said with a smile.

Previously, he found that he didn’t need to speak at all to communicate with the divine stone. He could communicate directly with the divine soul.

In this way, even if you communicate with the divine stone in front of the nishang fairy, you will not be found.

Xu que fell into meditation when he heard the speech.

If so, isn’t time basically stopped flowing at the position closest to the Tao Wen stone?

Then collect a fart!

“System, is there any way to handle it?” Without saying a word, Xu que began to seek system help.

“Ding, to crack space-time, you need to upgrade the system to version 15.0…”

“You have to stop talking nonsense and shut up.”

Xu sighed. The system is really not in charge. He doesn’t know that the oil and salt are expensive for money fans. He always has to upgrade the version.

Who can afford the value of millions of clothes?

“Hum, mole ants, the God stone has a way to crack it.” God stone was proud, “as long as you kowtow to me and plead guilty…”

Without saying a word, Xu que pressed the divine stone directly into the feces.

“Wait! Ben Shenshi suddenly feels that you are talented and intelligent. You are very suitable to learn the magic of Ben Shenshi! ”

Under Xu Que’s coercion, God Shixin reluctantly revealed a divine skill in the form of divine text.

Xu que stared at Shenwen, frowning.

Mom… This magic is too complicated. I can’t understand more than half of it.

After thinking about it, in order to master the door god book, Xu Ke can only bear the pain to use the system for translation.

A divine script is worth 500. Looking at a large string of divine scripts on the divine stone, I feel that my heart is dripping blood.

It’s all forced value… It’s forced by Saint Xinxin in exchange for forced value… It’s gone Shit, it’s all your fault! ” Xu Wei was so ashamed that he slapped the God stone into the feces. The whole stone was silly: “ah! What are you doing! Haven’t Ben Shenshi taught you all the magic? ” I don’t like you! ” After looking at the progress of system analysis and estimating the key time, Xu lacked to recover the divine soul, took a cloth and threw the divine stone back into the system. At this time, the nishang fairy had found the location of most people according to the jade pendant in the holy moon hall. Several monks who were close had come to the place where they gathered. After communicating for a while, they also found that the time flow rate here was wrong, but they haven’t summarized the law yet Don’t worry about this. Our task is to find the Tao grain stone. The competition time is only 24 hours. We have to move faster. ” The nishang fairy mused, “I suggest we divide into several groups first, take this place as the center, look around, find the Tao grain stone and come back immediately to report.” They repeatedly said yes, but it was long Aotian who was upset when he saw Xu Xu in a daze Monk, aren’t you going to come in and look for those two pit goods? ” He asked. Xu que glanced at the two lengzi and said in a deep voice: “I haven’t found any trace of them yet, so I want to help you find the Tao grain stone first.” As he spoke, he suddenly felt the divine stone shaking madly. Take it out and see that Shenwen is rapidly emerging: “mole ants, there is a grain stone in front!” Xu Xu looked up and his eyes brightened: “Hey, look ahead, there is a stone with a pattern.” When long Aotian heard the speech, he immediately disdained and said, “are you kidding? You think you can find the Tao grain stone with one finger…” he said. He looked in the direction of Xu’s missing finger and was stunned. what the fuck! There’s really one

chapters.title: Chapter 1817
chapters.body:
Chapter 1817

Chapter 1817

C.1817

They were still waiting to hear what long Aotian said. Then they saw him standing there, looking in a certain direction and motionless.

So he looked in the direction he saw, and was stunned.

what the fuck!

Really special!

Didn’t you say that this grain stone is hard to find?

What’s more, they didn’t even see a stone. At this time, they saw one!

Just when the Immortal Emperor was preaching, they had already got the portrait of the Taoist grain stone. At this time, they recognized that it was the real Taoist grain stone.

For a moment, everyone’s eyes to Xu Ke became hot.

It turns out that master Sanzang of Tang Dynasty is really hidden!

“Master Tang, are you thirsty? I have a century old hoard of nectar.”

“Master Tang, you have a good life and rest. I have a fairy weapon here. You have a good life and rest…”

“Go away! Master Tang’s noble status is something you can touch? Master Tang, this is a Buddhist immortal tool that has been treasured for many years… ”

In the face of everyone’s enthusiasm, Xu que is very indifferent.

“Don’t worry, actually, I don’t know the specific location of the Taoist grain stone, but it just coincides with its meeting.”

Xu que said as he slapped the divine stone in his hand.

Shit, where else has a grain stone?

Tell me quickly!

Someone noticed Xu Xu’s movement and said curiously, “master Tang, why do you always beat this hard stone so hard?”

The divine stone was angry when he heard the speech.

“Humble mole ant! You are the hard rock, and your whole family is the hard rock! ”

“Let go of the God stone. The God stone will let this ignorant maggot know what God power is today!”

“You cheap scum, how dare you treat the God stone like this!”

“The God stone will let the gods punish you scum in the future!”

Xu que raised his hand to cover the divine stone, covered the crazy divine text, and said calmly, “Amitabha, this is just a wooden fish of the poor monk. Knocking this stone will help the poor monk think.”

The monk suddenly realized: “I see. He is worthy of being a Taoist monk. Even the style of wooden fish is different from that of ordinary monks.”

Now that they have found the Tao grain stone, they naturally begin to prepare for collection.

“Let me do it.” A monk volunteered and jumped directly to pick the grain stone.

He was very fast, like a streamer, and went straight to the grain stone.

Then more and more slowly, more and more slowly, more and more slowly

Until it comes to a complete standstill.

People: “??”

What happened?

I saw the monk picking the Tao grain stone. The whole person seemed to freeze and stopped in front of the Tao grain stone.

Seeing that there is only a short distance from the Tao Wen stone, but these distances are like the end of the world and can no longer be touched.

“This is… Time turbulence!”

Finally, the nishang fairy was well-informed and revealed the truth at a glance.

“The time velocity around the stone is chaotic. The closer it is to the stone, the slower the time velocity will be, so he will stand still when he is about to reach the side of the stone.”

She knew the mystery of the grain stone because of the explanation of the divine stone, but she was able to tell the story of time flow rate in one word only through the defeat of a monk.

She deserves to be the elder martial sister of the holy moon hall!

When they heard the speech, they were at a loss.

“How can we crack it?”

“This is time. Even if we practice to xianzun, who can control time?”

“Don’t be kidding. Time is like running. It’s gone forever. None of us can master time!”

For friars, when talking about the five elements, they are clear and correct. It’s a long speech.

But when it comes to the way of time, these people are speechless.

The truth is that the way of time and space is too unpredictable. Ordinary friars can’t master it at all.

“Is there no immortal method that can affect time?” Xu Xu is a little curious. He asks and checks in the system.

Only when he saw it in the system, there were no fewer than three or four kinds of immortal methods involved in time, but they were very expensive and could not afford to spend all his money.

The nishang fairy smiled tightly and said in a slow voice after a moment of meditation: “it is said that there is a fairy method that can affect time. It is called immortal tea.”

When they heard the speech, they suddenly came to the spirit.

“However, this method needs to gather the strength of all of us. I can’t do it alone.” The nishang fairy said, “this immortal tea is an immortal method that can only be controlled by the Immortal Emperor. Now I’ve only found out some ways, and the specific effect can only be known by exerting it.”

The immortal method that the Immortal Emperor can use? Xu que couldn’t help looking up at the nishang fairy. The woman was hidden deep enough. Even the immortal method used by the Immortal Emperor System, how does this immortal tea compare with the immortal method you produced? ” Xu lacks a wonderful way. The system was silent for a moment, and two words jumped out: “garbage!” The huge exclamation mark is shocking. Xu Ke is the first time to see that the system has such a large emotional expression. It’s like… The creator of immortal tea has a deep hatred with him. Xu que couldn’t help feeling his chin and meditating. He has cooperated with the system for so long, but until today, he has not thought about the origin of the system carefully. During the love robbery, Xu was lucky to experience the free privilege of the whole audience. At that time, he really saw how many good things there were in the system for the first time. Not to mention the Immortal Emperor’s method, even the method of respecting the Taoist emperor is in the exchange list of the system. Xu Wei thought that the creator of the system might be the Immortal Emperor at the beginning, but after that time, he completely gave up the idea. After all, the decisions in the system were not created by the Immortal Emperor at all. While he was meditating, nishang fairy and others had begun to try to use immortal tea to crack the time turbulence around the Tao grain stone Go! ” The nishang fairy whispered, and the friar blessed by the immortal tea flew straight past. However, he only advanced a short distance more than the previous monk, and then stopped in the air again Failed… “Nishang fairy could not hide her disappointment in her eyes. Although there was no great hope for immortal tea, this failure was tantamount to cutting off everyone’s hope. At this time, Xu que, who had been silent nearby, suddenly stood up and looked righteous and awe inspiring: “I’d better give it to the poor monk.” In his ear, the prompt sound of the system echoed Ding, the divine skill has been cracked. You can use this divine skill by reciting the divine text. ” Everyone retreated and dispersed. It’s time to force the saint

chapters.title: Chapter 1818
chapters.body:
Chapter 1818

Chapter 1818

C.1818

“Master Tang, do you have a way to do this?” The nishang fairy frowned when she heard the speech.

Xu Duan put his hands together and said with a smile, “does the fairy not believe the poor monk?”

“No, that’s not what I meant…” nishang fairy was a little hard to say for a while.

What can you say?

Say I don’t believe you, even the Immortal Emperor’s method can’t handle things. Do you want to come and handle them in the early stage?

Don’t you have to count?

Several other friars also looked suspiciously at Xu Kuang. Unless their talent was so great that Yongzhen Immortal Emperor, ordinary friars could not control the way of time.

Even when Yongzhen Immortal Emperor was young, he couldn’t control the way of time.

Otherwise, wouldn’t it be invincible?

When the time comes to fight, directly raise your hand and wave it. Looking back, the enemy will never hit himself in his life.

Xu que smiled faintly and said confidently, “don’t worry, this time is not enough for the poor monk.”

After saying that, he jumped and flew towards the Tao Wen stone.

The nishang fairy was surprised and raised her hand to stop her. However, Xu que skilfully bypassed her and went straight to the place ten steps away from the Tao Wen stone.

According to the performance of the previous two monks, the flow rate of time will become slow almost from the distance of ten steps.

The divine stone trembled: “the humble mole ants should be honored as the noble Lord of the divine stone…”

“If you beep again, you’ll be thrown into the cesspit.”

“Cough… The divine skill of this divine stone is unparalleled in the world, and the effect is absolutely first-class!”

Xu Kui took a deep breath and asked. In fact, it didn’t make much sense.

If it doesn’t work, I’ll be a complete failure this time.

He smiled and said in the bottom of his heart, “since you are so confident, I will believe you once, but if it doesn’t work, I’ll put you in the intestines of animals.”

“Humble mole ant! How dare you!! The God stone will one day…… ”

Before Shenshi could vent his anger, Xu que directly stuffed him into the system.

Shit, there’s more gibberish than two dogs.

Xu Wei scolded secretly in his heart, then slowly leaned forward and whispered meaningless syllables in his mouth.

Originally thought Xu que was going to show some amazing means. Who knows, they just stretched out their hands to get it. They couldn’t help but sigh.

“Alas, master Tang still thinks too simply.”

“If we had just reached for it, we would have got it.”

“It’s over. Now even master Tang will be imprisoned.”

The closer you get to the striated stone, the slower the flow rate, which leads to no one being able to rescue the friar at the beginning.

Because anyone who wants to go to the rescue must also be close to the road grain stone, but if he can’t crack the time flow rate, the friars who go to the rescue will also be imprisoned in place.

In their eyes, when Xu que began to stretch out his hand and try to pick the Tao grain stone, the end was no different from the first monk.

“Forget it, let’s find another way. We’d better save master Tang before he is completely close to the Tao Wen stone.” As she spoke, the nishang fairy tried to pull Xu Xu back.

At this time, Xu’s voice suddenly sounded in her ear.

“Save me, don’t save me.”

The nishang fairy was stunned. She looked around and found Xu que standing on her side. She was relieved.

“Great, master Tang. Fortunately, you stopped in time. Let’s try other methods.” Nishang fairy suggested.

Xu que blinked twice, took out a wooden box, opened the box and said with a smile, “don’t try. I’ve taken down the Tao grain stone.”

“Take it off, then we… What? Did you take down the stone? ” Half way through her words, the nishang fairy suddenly realized something.

The people around also looked at the wooden box in Xu Xu’s hand, and saw that the stone in the box was impressively Tao Wen.

“God, how did he do it?”

“Did the confusion of time flow rate have no impact on master Tang?”

“That’s awesome… Can you say that master Tang is already the immortal Empire?” Some people guessed boldly, but they were soon despised.

After all, this guess is too outrageous. The Immortal Emperor is so idle that he came here to hang out with them.

But they were still confused, and their eyes were full of incredible looks.

How did Tang Sanzang do it?

“Wait a minute, not to mention how you took it off, master Tang. Why is the Taoist grain stone in your hands now, but we have not been affected?” Nishang fairy found something more shocking.

As soon as everyone listened, they immediately reacted. Yes, now the Tao Wen stone is among us, but it has no impact! Xu que said with a faint smile: “in fact, I have seen it in an ancient book before. As long as the stone is picked and filled with the trees it grows, it will not be affected by the stone.” I see. ” Nishang fairy paid attention to another question, “can master Tang tell us how you picked this stone?” This is also the most concerned issue of all people. After all, so many people present are all the elites of the holy moon hall, but there is no way to take the Tao grain stone. But Tang Sanzang was only in the early stage of xianzun, but he did something that he couldn’t even do at the peak of xianzun. It’s incredible Ha ha… “Xu que smiled softly, his hands folded, his face showed compassion, and a golden Buddha light gushed out of his body. He said calmly:” everything is because the poor monk has integrated humanity. Thousands of ways in the world have been broken at a glance for the poor monk. ” Unity of humanity? You’re kidding! Everyone felt that it was incredible. How could an immortal integrate himself with the avenue? When you reach xianzun, you only control one or two out of ten. The unity of humanity is an incredible thing. Only a few monks, such as Murong Yunhai, long Paotian and nishang fairy, suddenly changed their faces and looked at Xu Ke with shock. As the disciples with the highest accomplishments under the throne of the Immortal Emperor, they also vaguely learned some secrets about how to break through to the realm of the Immortal Emperor. The most important point is to combine yourself with the avenue, or replace the avenue of cultivation with yourself! The three looked at each other and saw each other’s serious shock. According to the master Sanzang of Tang Dynasty, has he not reached the realm of Immortal Emperor? Tang Sanzang, is it the Immortal Emperor

chapters.title: Chapter 1819
chapters.body:
Chapter 1819

Chapter 1819

C.1819

The idea immediately frightened the three people, and for a time, an unpredictable fear surged up in their hearts.

When did a new Immortal Emperor appear on Xianyun island?

Xu Wei was startled when he looked at the sudden crazy rise in the forced value.

What happened?

Why did it suddenly rise so much?

After installing the force for so long, Xu Ke has a general understanding of the increase in the value of the force.

Logically speaking, in terms of the number of people present and the cultivation level of these people, the forced value should not rise so much.

“Is it because Ben forced Sheng to become handsome again, so they were shocked by my handsome value?” Xu que subconsciously touched his face with some emotion in his heart.

Alas, sin, sin, the beauty of forcing saint is really amazing. It’s really annoying.

The crowd once again praised Xu Wei for a while. Suddenly someone pointed to Xu Wei’s head: “Hey, master Tang, you also have a grain stone on your head. Can you show me how to remove this grain stone?”

All the people looked up and found that there was another stone with a pattern on Xu’s head.

The discovery of the two Daowen stones is related to the Tang Sanzang master. Everyone subconsciously believes that the existence of Xu deficiency is related to the emergence of Daowen stones.

Hearing the speech, Xu que folded his hands and said, “Amitabha, it’s no problem. Let’s see the poor monk take it down.”

Then he jumped up again, as before, and stretched out his hand towards the Tao Wen stone.

Nishang fairy stared at Xu Wei and carefully observed his movements for fear of missing any detail.

Almost in the blink of an eye, the Tao grain stone appeared in Xu Xu’s hand.

With a confident smile, he showed the Taoist grain stone that had been packed in a wooden box to the people: “gentlemen, this is the power of the unity of humanity!”

WOW!

People were completely shocked this time.

They didn’t notice just now, but this time they really saw it in their eyes.

The master of Tang Sanzang just stretched out his hand and took the Tao Wen stone. How did he do it?

Suddenly, the nishang fairy seemed to have found something. She smiled and said, “master Tang, what kind of magic did you just use?”

Magic?

What magic can control the flow of time?

On the contrary, Xu que glanced at the neon fairy and was surprised at the bottom of his heart.

This woman’s eyes are poisonous!

The second time, I directly saw through the means of forcing saint!

Seeing Xu que didn’t speak, the nishang fairy thought she was right and said with a smile: “master Tang’s hand disappeared for about a second and appeared behind the Taoist grain stone when he was about to reach the static time area.”

When they heard the speech, they suddenly realized it.

It was originally completed with magic, but magic should also be affected in this case.

“But it’s a pity that what forced the saint to use was not magic, but divine magic…” Xu Ke sighed silently in the bottom of his heart.

What he used just now is the divine skill just cracked from the divine stone.

This divine skill is not a destructive skill, but a functional skill that can be called against the sky in Xu Ke’s view.

Using this divine book, you can open two interconnected void doors, that is, the existence entering from any void door will come to the space where the other void door is located.

Generally speaking, it can directly shuttle through the void and cross the area with slow flow at that time.

“Shit, I haven’t finished loading, but you’ve seen it.” Xu Xu whispered in his heart.

Nishang fairy looked at Xu que with deep intention and wanted to know what magic he used.

At least, it can’t be the unity of humanity.

Xu Que’s face remained unchanged and his heart didn’t jump. He said faintly, “I haven’t finished yet. In addition to the unity of humanity, I can also use external forces. I just used the power of my Buddhist unique magic tools to shuttle through the void and get this thing.”

Xu que secretly engraved the divine skill on the stone as he spoke.

The most magical part of divination is that it can be used not only through self recitation, but also if the divine script is drawn on other objects.

When they heard the speech, they all looked happy.

Buddha has such a treasure!

It’s incredible!

Under the gaze of the crowd, Xu que handed over the carved stone to several people and encouraged them to have a try.

Several people hesitated again and again, and finally urged Xianyuan to try the stone given to them by Xu que. They were shocked.

It’s really possible!

After trying to travel through the void, the monks’ eyes completely changed.

There was no other reason. The stones Xu lacked handed over to these people were all disposable.

After one use, the divine script will be destroyed. After all, the divine script is the script used by the gods. It’s the limit to be able to use it once engraved on a stone Amitabha, in fact, it’s not difficult to make these magic tools, but they only need to consume materials. ” Xu Kuang put his hands together and said calmly, “use my Buddhist secret method to make this shuttle stone and make one immortal tool at a time.” Hum, this forced saint has now deeply understood a truth. Monopoly is the fastest way to get rich! What deception and abduction are too low-grade and obscene. The forced saint has disdained to do it now This… Is a fairy weapon. ” Hearing this demand, people were a little difficult to accept for a time. After all, immortal tools are very important to every friar, and there is only one chance to enter the forest of chaos to collect Taoist grain stones. They don’t know what the Taoist grain stone is for. If they exchange immortal tools, they always feel a little bad. Seeing this, Xu que opened his mouth at the right time and said: “if you think it costs too much, the poor monk also understands. After all, making this thing also consumes the poor monk’s energy. As for entering the central Tianmen, the poor monk doesn’t really care…” the monks present were shocked when they heard the speech! Yeah! We’re here to win the place Master Tang, here are two immortals! ” Master Tang, I need three immortals! ” Fuck off, master Tang. Look, there are ten immortal weapons here! Do it for me first! ” Looking at the dazzling array of immortal tools, Xu que couldn’t help feeling. The friars in xianyunzhou are really rich… Immortal tools are kept in the storage ring one by one. Just as he was about to start making for these monks, suddenly a charming voice came from afar I wonder if master Tang is willing to make some magic tools for me? ” Before the man arrived, the nishang fairy’s face changed first, gnashing her teeth and cold eyes Qiuzili, what are you doing here?! ”

chapters.title: Chapter 1820
chapters.body:
Chapter 1820

Chapter 1820

C.1820

I saw a woman in black, falling slowly from the horizon, her eyes were like silk, and her whole body exuded the temperament of “I’m not a good man”.

Xu lacked a look and was immediately happy.

Isn’t this the woman who was chased and killed by the nishang fairy last time? Why did she come.

It seems to be the saint of some demon temple

In the face of the accusation of the nishang fairy, Qiu Zili felt as if she hadn’t heard it. Instead, her eyes always fell on Xu Wei. Jiao smiled and said, “this is the famous master Sanzang of Tang Dynasty. I don’t know if master Tang is interested in visiting our Tianmo hall?”

After saying that, he threw a wink at Xu vacancy: “there are many girls in our Tianmo hall, but they all admire master Tang.”

Nishang fairy couldn’t see such a posture of serving people with color. Her eyes almost burst out fire: “autumn purple leaves. Don’t be presumptuous here. The reputation of the immortal region is corrupted by people like you!”

“Oh, Ling nishang, look what you said.” Qiu Zili hid her face and said with a smile, “it’s boring to cultivate to your point. I only know meditation all day. I’m afraid I haven’t experienced the taste of men?”

Xu que couldn’t help praising in his heart. What a speech of shrimp and pig’s heart.

“Taoist friend, what is the origin of the magic hall this day?” Xu que couldn’t help asking others.

The friar looked indignant and said in a deep voice, “master Tang, you don’t know that the Tianmo hall is a major force under the throne of emperor Cheng Yuanxian. All the friars under his banner follow the evil sect line. They don’t look like friars at all. They are resisted by most forces in Xianyun Island.”

It turned out to be an evil way. Xu nodded and said, “in that case, we really can’t go with it.”

Upon hearing this, the friar seemed to find a confidant and denounced him: “master, you are worthy of being an eminent monk. These forces have polluted your eyes. It is said that the female friars in their hall often catch male friars from the outside and go back to practice the art of intercourse with them. Many male friars in Yongzhen immortal region have been poisoned by them.”

Xu que was surprised: “it’s so hateful. It’s a scum of monks!”

Such a good thing!

Where is the devil hall? Let me go and tell him about Buddhism!

“Yes, what our eldest martial sister dislikes most is this kind of thing, so she has always hated qiuzili very much.”

Yes, this kind of bastard force should be cleaned up by Buddhism!

“I think with the noble character of master Tang, I must hate this force. Master Tang must not be seduced by this witch.”

Amitabha, I have profound Buddhist principles. I can’t do this. Let me go to the devil hall quickly!

“Hey, master Tang, why are you drooling?”

“Oh, oh, the poor monk thought that so many male practitioners were poisoned by him. He hated it and wanted to spit.” Xu que wiped his mouth and said with a smile, “by the way, Taoist friend, do you know how to get to the Tianmo hall?”

“Master Tang, are you…”

“Oh, don’t get me wrong. I feel deeply disgusted when I hear that the Tianmo hall has done so many evil things. When the competition is over, I will go to the Tianmo hall to promote Buddhism and eliminate evil spirits!”

When the monk heard the speech, he thumbed up and said with appreciation, “master Tang is worthy of being a Buddhist monk, and we admire him!”

On the other side, Ling nishang and Qiu Zili are tit for tat at this time.

On the one hand, they have long had a grudge, on the other hand, the nishang fairy is really unhappy with Qiuzi. Now it’s just Tianmen competition, thinking about whether to take this opportunity to end the grudge directly.

“This is… Nine day Jedi array! Only the magic cloud immortal region has an array! ” Nishang fairy’s face suddenly changed, and she had no time to argue with qiuzili again. She suddenly looked up and looked ahead, “Xu Dingcheng, what do you want to do?”

With the voice of the nishang fairy falling, a monk in black appeared in front of the crowd and said with a proud smile: “nishang fairy, meet again. What’s the taste of my nine day Jedi array?”

The nishang fairy was livid and said, “hum, it’s just a nine day Jedi array. Do you think you can trap me?”

Qiuzili’s face was not good and her eyes were cold: “Xu Dingcheng, do you want to fight against our two immortal regions alone?”

Xu Dingcheng laughed and said, “I dare not. If the nine day Jedi array is still the same as before, I’m sure I can’t trap the two fairies, but now… You can try and see if you can come out.”

The nishang fairy snorted coldly, the immortal yuan surged around her, and the black hair drifted behind her. Subconsciously, she wanted to shake away the array.

I saw a bright colorful fairy yuan gushing from her, turning into several cranes and flying around.

Boom!

Only a dull noise was heard. These cranes hit the edge of the array and were directly scattered.

However, the array did not move!

“How is that possible?” The neon fairy’s eyes widened, unbelievable.

He has reached the peak of xianzun’s cultivation, only one step away from the half step Immortal Emperor. The upper limit of the nine day Jedi array is just the middle stage of xianzun. What’s more, Xu Dingcheng’s cultivation is not as good as himself. He can’t help himself with his array Hahaha, how’s it going? Is the fairy satisfied with my array? ” Xu Dingcheng laughed several times and said happily. Qiuzili walked to the nishang fairy and said coldly, “waste, let me come!” In the depths of her eyes, two black lights suddenly lit up. In an instant, a dark glow gushed out, and her five fingers bounced back and forth into dozens of civet cats, waving their claws towards the array This is qiuzili’s unique magic skill – Lingmao breaks through the array! ” A well-informed friar immediately shouted out the origin of the decision and said excitedly, “this decision is designed to break the array. It’s just a nine day Jedi array. We won’t be trapped!” Bang! The next second, the dozens of civet cats directly hit the edge of the array and were fragmented. The people were so stupid that even the two of them with the highest cultivation couldn’t break the array? Seeing this scene, Xu Dingcheng was very happy and said with a laugh: “hahaha, I have already said that this array is not what it used to be, but an ancient divine text. Even if the two fairies have great skills, I’m afraid they can only stay here today.” Ancient divine script! That’s the word of the legendary gods. I don’t know how many years it hasn’t appeared in this world Hum, I was lucky to find the legacy of the gods in a broken cave. I hereby improve this array. ” Xu Dingcheng said proudly, “you’d better hand over the Tao grain stone, or this place will be your death date!” Suddenly, a curious voice sounded in his ear Sorry, I want to know, where did you find the legacy of the gods? ” Xu Dingcheng turned back and his legs softened with fear. what the fuck! What a big bald head

chapters.title: Chapter 1821
chapters.body:
Chapter 1821

Chapter 1821

C.1821

I saw the slick head shining in the sun, which was particularly eye-catching.

Xu Dingcheng looked around in shock and thought there was something wrong with his array: “how did you get out?”

Xu Mei put his hands together and said kindly, “nature comes out like this.”

“This, this is impossible. You are just an immortal!” Xu Dingcheng looked at Xu Ke in disbelief. “It’s absolutely impossible to get out of it without mastering the divine text!”

“Oh, are you talking about this divine text?” Xu que smiled, stretched out his fingers, drew a few simple strokes in the air, and then patted forward gently.

These strokes survived in the air and passed through the array unimpeded.

Xu Dingcheng frowned and said, “who the hell are you? The Buddhism I know has no such ability. ”

“Amitabha, this is my profound Dharma. It’s normal that benefactor can’t understand it.” Xu que explained kindly.

Sample, do you still want to trap Ben Jisheng with your garbage array?

I don’t know the height of heaven and earth!

At that time, Xu lacked.

This guy has mastered the power of divine literature? And it seems so much better than yourself!

He finally got the answer after “persuading God stone with good words”.

“The power of divine script does not depend on how many basic divine scripts you master, but on how many advanced divine scripts you master!” The sacred stone was filled with indignation and said, “humble mole ants master one high-level divine text, which is as powerful as ten low-level divine texts!”

Xu Fuxing asked angrily, “how many high-level divine writings have I mastered?”

“Hum, ignorant maggot… Wait! Don’t lean on me! I’ll tell you! You have mastered an advanced divine script at most! It’s about space magic! ”

Xu Wei was very dissatisfied: “isn’t other divine writings useless?”

God stone dismisses: “boy, the basic God text is only used for communication. Like your one, two, three and four, what’s the difference if you master more?”

“How much does this guy master?”

“He knows shit! It’s just an array built with the help of some leftover materials of advanced divine script! ” The divine Stone said triumphantly, “if the essence of the divine stone still exists, this array is just a matter of blowing…”

Before the divine stone finished, Xu que threw it back to the storage ring.

Then he used the high-level divine script he mastered to drill directly out of the array.

Xu Dingcheng’s eyes were fierce and his heart was wavering.

Although he had heard of the name of Tang Sanzang before, most of them were limited to the concept of Buddhism and Buddhism. His strength has far exceeded the legendary Buddha.

“Hum, I don’t care how you get out. Since you’re here, you’ll die!”

Xu Dingcheng sneered and raised his hands to form a complex fingerprint.

“Eight wasteland broken seal!”

With a low roar, the earthy yellow light surged around him, the immortal yuan surged, and the later cultivation of xianzun completely burst out.

Not only that, when the light on his body lit up, the surrounding mountains poured out yellow light, just like meteors, gathering around Xu Dingcheng.

The nishang fairy’s face suddenly became extremely ugly: “this guy has succeeded in cultivation… This is the unique skill of the magic cloud fairy emperor when he was young!”

Qiu Zili also looked dignified: “if this move is used between mountains and forests, it can mobilize the power of heaven, earth and mountains for his own use. There are so many mountains and forests here. I’m afraid his move is powerful!”

Long Aotian glanced at him, shook his head and said, “it’s not just powerful. I’m afraid it’s about to reach the power of half a step Immortal Emperor level. Even if you go up, it’s very difficult to resist.”

He only said it was difficult, not that he couldn’t resist it.

In the eyes of this proud man, there was no one but the Immortal Emperor.

People looked anxiously at Xu vacancy and talked about it one after another.

“It’s too bad. Master Tang was seriously injured. How can he resist it?”

“Even if you’re not hurt, you can’t stop it! People are almost half a step away from the power of the Immortal Emperor! ”

“Shall we be caught here?”

There was nothing they could do, but there was nothing they could do.

The array constructed by the divine script can’t be broken even if the nishang fairies work together for a while.

At this time, they can only place their hope on this virtuous master Tang!

Master Tang, come on!

With the light around him, Xu Dingcheng’s breath rose steadily and quickly reached the peak of xianzun. The momentum emitted by the light scattered the flowing clouds in the sky.

“Tang Sanzang, this is your burial place today!” Xu Dingcheng said with a ferocious smile, and the formula printed in his hand gradually took shape.

They first formed a huge square seal, then slowly shrunk, and soon shrunk to the size of two palms. However, the frightening deterrent force has become more frightening, and the people below have felt the cold suppression force Can master Tang really do it? ” The nishang fairy looked at Xu Xu anxiously, but found that his face was indifferent, as if the terrible pressure in front of him had no influence on him Amitabha, benefactor, this move is really fierce. I’m afraid I can’t resist it with all my strength. ” Xu que said modestly Hum, it’s good to know. Don’t get out of here! ” Xu Dingcheng sneered. Although he has an absolute advantage, the monk’s ability is too strange. He really doesn’t want to meet this guy when he has to. However, Xu que looked very sad and said in a deep voice, “however, as a Buddhist monk and the blade handed down by the ancient Buddha, how can I shrink back in the face of danger! If I did, wouldn’t I put these Taoist friends who trust me at a disadvantage? I’m determined not to do such a thing! ” His words were just and awe inspiring, which moved the people below. You deserve to be master Tang Master Tang, get away quickly. You can’t stop it! ” A monk cried bitterly, “it’s an honor for me to get to know Master Tang!” Xu que glanced at the crazy rising forced value and said, “today, I will never move a step!” OK! Then you will die here! ” With a roar, Xu Dingcheng pushed out towards Xu que with the overwhelming force of destruction in his hands. Just as the Yin Jue was about to fall, he suddenly saw a dark hole between Xu’s hands. Huh? What’s that? Before he could react, a destructive force pressed down directly from the top of his head. Xu que looked at Xu Dingcheng, who was overwhelmed by the printing formula all the way, and said with heartfelt emotion: “what a powerful printing formula!”

chapters.title: Chapter 1822
chapters.body:
Chapter 1822

Chapter 1822

C.1822

The power of the Yin Jue gathered from the mountains and rivers with a radius of 100 feet is so powerful.

Xu Dingcheng was directly thrown into the ground without resistance. The whole person was dazed and could hardly find the north,.

But he didn’t even repair his injury because the mark came so suddenly.

Suddenly he couldn’t figure it out.

I shouldn’t have… My mark was clearly put on the bald monk.

Why did it fall off my head?

At first, Xu Dingcheng thought that someone had attacked him with the same move, but after careful feeling, this Xianyuan was clearly his own Xianyuan!

What the hell is this?

He rolled under the ground for a moment and finally stopped at an unknown depth.

Xu Dingcheng didn’t rush out, but held his breath and kept silent all the immortal yuan fluctuations in his body.

Although he knows that his method is better than nothing, he can at least reduce the situation of being discovered by the other party as much as possible.

After a while, Xu Que’s beating voice came from above: “benefactor Xu, I know you’re still alive. Take the initiative to come out. I don’t want to catch you myself.”

Xu Dingcheng heard the speech and knew that he had been found.

However, he only sneered and despised the idea of personally catching himself out.

Catch me yourself?

I’m a thousand feet underground now!

What are you taking for me?

You know, on the ground and under the ground, Qianzhang is completely two concepts.

It takes more than a hundred times as much power to go a thousand feet underground as to go a thousand feet on the ground.

In addition, the rules of xianyunzhou are much stronger than those in other places. The ground is extremely solid and difficult to break.

Kill Xu Ding. Chengdu doesn’t believe what he can do with his early cultivation of xianzun in Sanxue District of Tang Dynasty.

“No, what if this guy comes up with some shit Buddhist secret law?” Xu Dingcheng felt a little uneasy, so he quickly arranged many arrays around his body.

These arrays wrapped him up like armor.

“Hum, it’s safe now.” Xu Dingcheng sneered, “my arrays are all the top arrays in the magic cloud immortal domain. They are nested with each other, not to mention your early days as a immortal. Even if the peak of the immortal comes, what the hell?”

Before the words fell, suddenly a hand appeared in front of him out of thin air and grabbed his skirt.

When he didn’t react, he dragged him all the way.

“Ah ah ah ah ah ah ah ah!”

Xu Dingcheng felt that his face was madly rubbed by the land, and he couldn’t help crying all the way.

“Tang Sanzang, you son of a bitch!”

Above, Xu que is controlling his magic so that his hand won’t touch the land.

With his current cultivation, there is no pressure to forcibly suppress a Xu Dingcheng.

And with magic in hand, the so-called land barrier is nothing at all.

The friars around him just looked at Xu Ke with a confused face and didn’t know what he was doing.

“Why did master Tang suddenly stop moving?”

“After he put his hand into the void in front of him just now, there was no movement.”

“Is it true that master Tang was injured?” Nishang fairy worried.

Qiuzili shook her head and said, “not quite. His breath didn’t fluctuate. What’s more, although the Yin formula hit him just now, it didn’t cause any harm.”

That’s what surprised everyone.

In their opinion, the powerful Yin Jue just now has directly hit the Tang Sanzang master.

But miraculously, it was Xu Dingcheng who fell below.

This scene makes people puzzled. They can only understand it as a powerful Dharma, which is so profound and exquisite.

“Wait, did you hear anything?” Suddenly a monk said.

The crowd listened and shook their heads, indicating that they had heard nothing.

The nishang fairy listened attentively and smiled slightly: “it seems… It’s a scream coming from the ground.”

Underground?

Before they realized anything, a figure rose directly from the ground, carrying a lot of soil, like a sharp arrow.

The man ran straight to Xu Que and then stopped in front of him.

The people saw the man’s face and were stunned.

what the fuck!

Xu Dingcheng!!

How did he get out?

Qiuzi was the most poisonous in her eyes. She looked at him and said in a deep voice: “this man… Seems to have been dragged out by Tang Sanzang with his hand.”

Hiss!

The crowd couldn’t help taking a breath of air-conditioning.

Let’s not talk about how the operation of dragging out is realized, but how painful it is to drag it out from under the ground!

No wonder Xu Dingcheng looks like he’s going to die. Xu que looked at the unfortunate man in front of him and folded his hands and said, “Amitabha, benefactor Xu, God has the virtue of living well. I have to drag you out. Please forgive me.” Xu Dingcheng was almost furious. You dragged me out just to let me forgive you? You’re sick, aren’t you Tang Sanzang… Someday, I will kill you… “Xu Dingcheng said angrily. Xu Wei is noncommittal about this. I don’t know how many people tried to kill themselves, but they didn’t succeed? This forced Saint forced Qi to protect his body. You and other mortals can’t hurt a hair of this forced Saint at all Just now, I suddenly remembered something. ” Xu que said with a smile, “you said you got the legacy of the gods, but no one in Xianyun island can read the divine writings at all, so someone must have taught you the divine writings, and that person ordered you to ambush us?” He has just asked about the divine stone. Now, no one in the four heavenly gates knows anything except the unknown situation in the central heavenly gate. As for the legacy of the gods, there may be, but they will not teach others how to read the divine texts. After all, the gods who left a legacy were meant to leave it for their own future generations. Since they are the descendants of gods, how can they not understand divine texts? Xu Dingcheng was still yelling at Xu Kuang in a low voice. At this time, when he heard the speech, he suddenly shook his body and looked like Xu Kuang in disbelief You, how did you guess? ” Guess? Guess what? Xu que can’t help but wonder if the monks in xianyunzhou have bad brains because of the IQ of the people here. A long Aotian is like a second Leng. A question asked by Xu Dingcheng is comparable to a retarded person Hum, even if you guess, I won’t tell you… “Xu Dingcheng sneered,” kill me if you can! ” He was confident that he was a disciple of the magic cloud Immortal Emperor. It didn’t matter if he was hurt, but no one dared to kill himself If you kill me, my master, his majesty magic cloud Immortal Emperor, will… “Before his voice fell, a magnificent immortal yuan poured into his body and broke it into the void. Xu que lowered his head and shrugged when he saw the people at his feet looking terrified It’s the first time I’ve seen such a strange request. ”

chapters.title: Chapter 1823
chapters.body:
Chapter 1823

Chapter 1823

C.1823

They were trapped in the nine day Jedi array. The reason why they didn’t panic at all was because they knew that Xu Dingcheng didn’t dare to really kill himself.

After all, everyone is a disciple of the Immortal Emperor. It’s not a big problem to fight each other, but if one person dies, that’s another situation.

But they never thought that master Tang Sanzang killed Xu Dingcheng directly?

“Amitabha, I’m an honest man. Didn’t benefactor Xu ask me to kill him?” Xu que asked with a naive expression.

Nishang fairy and qiuzili are speechless, and their mood is quite complicated.

Although Xu Dingcheng was dead, they didn’t feel so uncomfortable. Anyway, everyone has long been a dead enemy.

The reason why there has been no killer is just that behind the other party is the magic cloud Immortal Emperor.

Although he also has the support of Yongzhen Immortal Emperor, unless his life is really in danger, the disciples will not hurt the killer easily.

“Now it’s over. Each disciple has a wisp of divine spirit hidden in the Immortal Emperor. Now Xu Dingcheng is dead, and the divine spirit has a feeling. I’m afraid the Immortal Emperor of magic cloud already knows about it.” The fairy said in a deep voice.

Xu Ke was stunned, and his heart was like a thousand grass mud horses running past.

Is there such a means? Didn’t you say it earlier?

I killed everyone!

But fortunately

Xu que suddenly showed a peaceful smile and said in a deep voice: “in fact… I can revive benefactor Xu.”

“Don’t joke, master Tang. People can’t come back from death.” Qiuzili habitually smiles, but her eyebrows are tightly wrinkled. “The magic cloud Immortal Emperor has the worst temper. This time, I’m afraid he will involve my master…”

“Master Tang, when this competition is over, you can leave the holy moon hall quickly.” The nishang fairy sighed and sincerely advised, “hurry up and return to the Buddha domain. The Buddha domain has been inherited for thousands of years. With the blessing of the ancient Buddha, the magic cloud Immortal Emperor will not step into it easily.”

“Yes, master Tang, you should leave quickly.”

“I have a flying shuttle here, which is very fast and can help master Tang leave.”

During the time they spent with master Sanzang of Tang Dynasty, they fully felt the noble personality of the Buddha. The friars who were moved by the kind quality naturally did not want master Tang to die.

As for Xu Dingcheng… Bah! Things worse than pigs and dogs!

If he hadn’t provoked master Tang, would he have died?

And the ability to kill me!

Listen, is that what people say?

Master Tang is so naive and innocent that he took this statement seriously before killing. The fault is not master Tang, but the damn Xu Dingcheng!

Everyone thought so, and their faces were filled with righteous indignation.

If Xu Dingcheng hears the voices of these people, he will die again.

Nima!

I’m dead! I’m the victim!

How did you do it one by one? The dead bald donkey is the victim!

Xu Ke raised his hand and clapped it. The power of divine literature surged and directly relieved the array.

Then he put his hands together and said, “Amitabha, I will let the benefactor Xu live now.”

The nishang fairy smiled helplessly, stopped the people who wanted to persuade, and whispered, “then thank you, master Tang.”

“Fairy, it’s impossible to come back from the dead…” a friar whispered.

Nishang fairy shook her head and looked sad: “I’m afraid it was just a mark that hurt master Tang’s brain. Now master Tang is not normal…”

The monk suddenly looked sad when he heard the speech.

Yes, the mark was so powerful that even they couldn’t stop it.

But master Tang stopped it with his own strength, and I’m afraid he suffered a lot of damage.

But in order not to worry us, master Tang always pretended not to be hurt and rescued us.

Master Tang, what high righteousness!

Xu que felt the grateful eyes of the people and couldn’t help shivering.

Mom, what’s wrong with these people?

Why look at Ben Jisheng with the eyes of my dead family?

“God stone, are you sure you have no problem with the usage you just told me?” Xu que communicates with the divine stone with his mind.

“Hum, humble maggot…”

“Feces.”

“No mistake! There’s no problem at all. Hurry up! ”

After receiving the positive answer from Shenshi, Xu Ke began to operate.

Just now, he didn’t actually kill Xu Dingcheng, but used divine magic to break him into the void in an instant.

The actual effect of this divine skill is to connect with the void and take things from space in the real sense.

In addition, the speed is extremely fast, that is, the blink of an eye, so in the eyes of outsiders, Xu Dingcheng seems to be annihilated by his own slap.

“Amitabha, the poor monk will start now.” Xu Shaonian gave a Buddha’s horn, his hands folded, his face serious, and a Buddha’s light shining around him. After counting his breath, he suddenly shouted, “come back!” Then he suddenly grabbed forward, and the invisible power of divine literature surged, and the whole void suddenly twisted, and Xu Dingcheng’s figure slowly emerged in it Return! ” Xu que shouted again, and his hand suddenly made a force. The Buddha light immediately spread around and lit up the whole sky. The monks present could not bear the strong Buddha light, and subconsciously closed their eyes. When they could see clearly in front of them again, they found that Xu Dingcheng was already standing in front of them. Although the man’s breath is still very weak, the spirit of life will not deceive people. He is still alive! The crowd was stunned. Master Tang can really bring the dead back to life? What kind of transcendental means is this I’ve heard that there are great virtues in Buddhism, who can connect the nine Youyin Cao, interfere with reincarnation and bring the dead out of it. ” The nishang fairy was shocked and looked at Xu Ke with a complicated look. “It is said that the person who can do this is the supreme and holy person of Buddhism…” Qiu Zili was also surprised: “this monk… Is it really the reincarnation of the ancient Buddha They haven’t believed the words of the reincarnation of the ancient Buddha before. After all, in a sense, the ancient Buddha is a saint, and its status may exceed that of the Immortal Emperor. But after seeing Xu Ke bring Xu Dingcheng back from the dead, even if you don’t believe it, it’s OK My God… Master Tang is so awesome! Can you really bring the dead back to life? ” Master Tang is a saint! ” Yes, only saints can do this. ” All of them immediately held Xu Ke’s position to the height of a saint. Xu Xu is extremely satisfied when he looks at the crazy rising forced value in the system. He raised his hand, gently shook it, and said softly, “don’t do this, don’t do it……”

chapters.title: Chapter 1824
chapters.body:
Chapter 1824

Chapter 1824

C.1824

Xu Dingcheng has been following the wind and water since his cultivation, and basically has not encountered any setbacks.

Although he is not the first disciple of the magic cloud Immortal Emperor, he has a high popularity in the magic cloud immortal domain with excellent interpersonal means and no low talent.
