In his mind, his competitors should be disciples such as nishang fairy and qiuzili, who are famous and popular in the immortal domain.

He prepared for this Xianmen competition for a long time, even with the help of external forces, just to win this competition.

But Xu Dingcheng never thought that he had not had time to start with the nishang fairies, but ushered in the strange Tang Sanzang.

First, he was broken by a move, and even he was exiled to a strange place, just like Jiuyou hell.

But he didn’t stay there long and was pulled back again.

This feeling of being manipulated wantonly made Xu Dingcheng feel a sense of humiliation.

“Bastard! I am a disciple of the Immortal Emperor. How dare you humiliate me! ”

Xu Dingcheng roared, and a powerful force surged around him. The immortal yuan rolled and began to shrink rhythmically.

The nishang fairy was still close. When she saw this, she was shocked: “no, he’s going to explode!”

The immortal monk blew himself up, and his power was unimaginable!

How dare this guy?

Hearing the roar of the nishang fairy, everyone turned pale and ran away frantically.

With Xu Dingcheng’s strength, once the power of self explosion completely breaks out, this area will be wiped out!

Xu que was shocked when he saw this.

Sleeping trough, is this guy so hard?

Say self explosion!

Just as he was preparing to evacuate, communication jade suddenly heard the news of Er Gouzi.

“Boy, hurry to ambush 500 miles northwest. This guy’s self explosion is fake! The real body has escaped! ”

Xu que doesn’t doubt the information given by Er Gouzi. When he hears that the self explosion is false, he immediately puts his heart down.

“Amitabha, the power of self explosion is nothing more than you in the eyes of the poor monk.”

Then he raised his right hand and reached out to Xu Dingcheng.

His face was full of calm and indifferent expression, and his eyebrows and eyes were full of disdain for the self explosion, as if the turbulent destructive force in front of him was not worth mentioning at all.

Xu Dingcheng stared at Xu que. Suddenly, the immortal yuan on his body suddenly shrank into his body. Countless immortal yuan like birds homing into his body.

But the sense of destruction is more and more powerful, enough to frighten the viewer.

“Boy, why don’t you go? His self explosion is false, but the power is true. ” Er Gouzi’s puzzling voice came from the communication jade again.

Xu que was shocked and said, “lying in the trough! You didn’t say it earlier! ”

“Shit! Who knew you would stop there and not walk! ” Er Gouzi was even more surprised. Suddenly his tone turned and said in a low voice, “brother short, go safely. I will take care of all your inheritance…”

“NIMA…”

Xu que scolded, and his hands flew like ten fingers, madly forming a formula.

Nishang fairy’s eyes were straight. She came forward to help Xu lack and stop the surging force of self explosion.

But long Aotian and Murong Yunhai stubbornly held him and took him far away.

“Fairy, this place is too dangerous to stay long.”

“Master Tang’s strength is unpredictable. I think it will be all right.”

It’s not that they are greedy for life and afraid of death, but this power can’t be resisted by everyone.

Nishang fairy wanted to say something, but she saw a strong light blooming from Xu Dingcheng.

The light spread very fast. In the twinkling of an eye, it filled the space around him for tens of feet, and shrouded his missing figure in an instant.

Boom!

The violent roar sounded. Most of them had been far away from the center, but they were still buzzing with this roar.

The strong light, like the sun in the sky, fell into the world, and the people couldn’t open their eyes. Even with the immortal method, it was difficult to resist.

I don’t know how long it took. Finally, the light began to become weak.

Nishang fairy started first and went straight to the center.

The crowd stayed in place for a while, followed immediately and sped towards the center.

Along the way, I saw that the surrounding land seemed to be swept by flames. The ground was blackened and there was no grass. The land seemed to have been roasted by the fire for several months, and I couldn’t feel the breath of life.

Even the air is full of pungent smell, making it difficult for people to breathe smoothly.

“Is this xianzun’s self explosion… This power is too terrible.”

“Yes, if we were in the center, we would be dead now.”

Everyone whispered and didn’t have any good ideas about the fate of Tang Sanzang. When you come to the center, the land here is red, as if the temperature has not receded. The thick smoke billowed up in the air and could not reach more than three or four feet in front of him. The nishang fairy looked around frequently, but she never found any trace of Xu Duan. I can’t help feeling sad. Can you say… Master Tang is dead?! Qiuzili followed behind the nishang fairy and said with emotion: “it’s the first time I’ve seen xianzun explode… This power, tut tut Tut, afraid of death, even a bone can’t be left.” The nishang fairy took a deep breath and said in a deep voice, “pass on this command. If you meet those in the magic cloud fairy domain, go all out and don’t die.” Between the words, a surge of fierce murderous spirit poured out of her. It means that people in the holy Moon Temple can use any means, as long as they don’t kill people. As for those who lack arms and legs and hit half dead, it all depends on the mood of the person who shot at that time. Everyone looked at each other and had the same idea in their hearts. Our eldest martial sister… I’m really angry this time. Nishang fairy turned her back to the crowd and looked far away: “qiuzili, go away quickly. I’m not in the mood to entangle with you now.” Qiuzili did not argue with the nishang fairy, but said faintly before leaving: “the people who found the magic cloud fairy domain, inform me that I still owe Tang Sanzang a life.” Looking at the desolation in front of her, the nishang fairy seemed to see Xu Duan’s voice and face here. Did the admirable noble man die here… Sadness and sadness filled her heart Don’t worry, Tang Sanzang, I will avenge you! ” Five hundred miles northwest of here. Black air gushed out of the void, then condensed together and slowly turned into human form. Before the human body was fully formed, it tried to run away. Just then, a joking voice sounded Amitabha, where are you going, benefactor Xu? ”

chapters.title: Chapter 1825
chapters.body:
Chapter 1825

Chapter 1825

C.1825

As soon as the humanoid movement stagnated, he slowly turned around, and a pair of black and bright eyes came out of the black air and stared at Xu que.

Xu que didn’t speak, kept his calm look, and looked at each other with a smile.

In fact, he yelled in his heart.

“Er Gouzi, can you rely on some music! I was almost killed! ”

Xu Wei was still in a panic at this time, and his powerful power came to his face just now. If it was not a critical moment, he used all his strength to show his magic and transfer himself to other places, he was afraid that he had become a pile of fly ash.

Transmitting itself is different from throwing Xu Dingcheng into the void. It’s just thrown into the void for a short time. It doesn’t matter where it will float.

But he is equivalent to building a transmission array in an instant, determining a safe transmission point, and transmitting himself in less than milliseconds.

Even if Xu que used the three in one chakra, he almost couldn’t escape.

Mainly, the time is too short.

It’s too short for someone else to respond.

Er Gouzi also had some grievances: “no… I thought you knew…”

“I know shit! You’ve been trying to rob me of my property for a long time. ”

After scolding for a while, Xu que was relieved and focused on the black air in front of him.

The black air was creeping slowly, like a mass of mud, but Xu Dingcheng’s face was gradually revealed.

The main reason why he didn’t start immediately was that he consumed more than half of chakra in his body and needed time to recover.

“Benefactor Xu, your power doesn’t seem to belong to magic?” Xu que asked with a smile.

He could sense a sense of familiarity from the black air.

This is clearly evil gas!

A disciple from under the Immortal Emperor could have magic Qi, and it seems that he has a good grasp of magic Qi.

This matter gave Xu Ke a sense of vigilance.

Even the disciples under the Immortal Emperor’s seat have been eroded. It is difficult to ensure that many people in the central Tianmen have been eroded.

Think more deeply, is the magic cloud Immortal Emperor affected?

Along the way, Xu que found that the evil spirit seemed to be hidden deeply in Xianyun Island, and there were many people involved. He vaguely felt that those damn foreign demons seemed to be planning something.

At this time, Xu Dingcheng’s human form has been condensed.

He stared at Xu for a moment and slowly said, “who the hell are you?”

This voice sounds very strange. There is not only Xu Ding’s voice, but also a hoarse and muddy voice superimposed on it.

“Sleeping slot, you can also speak two channel surround sound.” Xu Xu was shocked. “Are you so advanced after being eroded by magic gas?”

Xu Dingcheng’s eyes were fierce, but he didn’t rush forward: “can you recognize the evil spirit? Who the hell are you? ”

All the records related to magic Qi in the whole xianyunzhou are locked in the central Tianmen. Ordinary friars can’t know the existence of this thing at all.

It is precisely because of this that Xu Dingcheng has a taste of being unscrupulous.

But the dead bald donkey can tell the origin of his black Qi?

“Wait, the reincarnation of the real Buddha… Do you say you came down from the divine world?” Xu Dingcheng seemed to think of something. He shouted, “the divine world has long been closed. You can’t arrive until you take a broken boat. How did you come to this world?”

Xu Ke was stunned, thinking what nonsense is this girl talking about?

“Hum, I didn’t expect you to see it.” Xu Kuang’s hands were folded and his expression was unfathomable. “I don’t hesitate to lose my accomplishments and descend to this world in order to bring you damn foreign demons to justice!”

He could see that most of Xu Dingcheng had died.

Now it is the foreign devil who controls this body!

When Xu Dingcheng heard the speech, he immediately said with a ferocious smile: “indeed… You people in the divine world are all dignified. You don’t want the lower world to compete for opportunities. I think you also want to get control of the big ship. It’s hypocritical to the extreme!”

Lying trough, I believe it. It’s too easy to cheat, isn’t it?

Xu Wei thought to himself and continued to say, “you damn foreign demons, I’m just trying to make this noble righteousness fill this world!”

“Hum, it’s ridiculous. What kind of bullshit and righteousness? Do you people in the divine world kill fewer people than us?” Xu Dingcheng scoffed at Xu Ke’s statement, “but it’s just to open the road to the emperor. It’s hypocritical to use such a high sounding statement!”

Xu Wei was stunned, and ER Gouzi howled wildly at the end of the communication jade: “lying in the slot, lying in the slot! Daozun! Boy, stop this guy and I’ll be there in a minute! ”

Daodi?!

Is this a legendary realm?

Xu Wei didn’t expect that he just wanted to get some information and heard such a shocking secret. You know, the Immortal Emperor is already the top power in the world, and there is more respect for Taoism and Taoism. Listening to Xu Dingcheng’s words, it seems that there is a secret of breaking through to the Taoist emperor in Xianyun Island, isn’t it? He looked up not far away and found that two figures, one tall and one short, were frantically coming this way. If the news gets out, the whole xianyunzhou will be crazy. I don’t blame Er Gouzi for running here in such a hurry Amitabha, it’s useless to say more. There’s only one war. ” Xu Ke makes a quick decision. He has to take this guy down quickly. Otherwise, when Er Gouzi comes, he has to share some benefits Hum, do you think I’m still that loser Xu Dingcheng? ” Xu Dingcheng’s body was covered with dense black patterns. These patterns seem to have life and wrap the whole body. With the appearance of patterns, Xu Dingcheng’s breath became more and more powerful, and soon broke through to the peak of xianzun If the master’s plan is broken, this chess piece can only be used as a disposable item. ” Xu Dingcheng’s eyes were red and gave off an ominous smell. “In that case, let’s use you to make up for your loss!” When the voice fell, Xu Dingcheng’s body flashed and suddenly disappeared in place. In an instant, countless black sharp blades poured in, covering all the space around Xu Ke’s body Amitabha, the Buddha is shining! ” Xu que recited the Buddha’s name, and the incomparable Buddha light burst out around his body. On these black sharp blades, they suddenly began to melt like solid ice meets fire ha-ha! You’ve been fooled! ” Suddenly, a ferocious laugh sounded. I saw Xu Dingcheng’s voice. I didn’t know when it appeared under Xu Ke. Raising my hand was a trick for monkeys to steal peaches. Xu que was shocked. what the fuck! This foreign evil does not speak of martial virtue

chapters.title: Chapter 1826
chapters.body:
Chapter 1826

Chapter 1826

C.1826

“As a Buddhist disciple, I didn’t expect that I would have such a sinister move!” Xu Dingcheng looked ferocious and laughed wildly.

He is not an ordinary monkey stealing peaches, which contains the strongest evil spirit. It is a masterpiece of resentment, killing and fierce.

Anyone who is hit, unless he has reached the realm of the Immortal Emperor, must be poisoned, sore and purulent, the immortal yuan melts and the avenue collapses!

Even Xu Dingcheng himself did not dare to take this move easily!

Seeing that the dark claw blade was about to hit, Xu que suddenly changed his look, suddenly smiled, folded his hands and said, “Amitabha, I’ve been waiting for you for a long time.”

At the same time, a dark hole suddenly appeared in front of the claw blade.

“Huh?”

Seeing this, Xu Dingcheng frowned and suddenly realized that the situation seemed bad.

The next second, another black hole opened under him, and the claw blade thrust into the black hole under Xu Ke’s body.

Whoosh!

“Ah… Ow, ow, Ow!”

Xu Dingcheng’s face suddenly changed. Before he could detect the problem, he suddenly gave a scream.

The claw blade stabbed out of the black hole under him and grabbed it in some unspeakable places.

Seeing this, er Gouzi, who had just arrived, immediately felt cold under his body and hurriedly covered his heirloom.

“Miss Duan, brother’s magic is becoming more and more insidious!” Er Gouzi looked frightened. It was obvious that he had come to an end from Xu Dingcheng. He thought of how miserable the recruit would be.

Duan Jiude stroked his beard, pondered for a moment and said, “we’d better not go there first.”

“My God agrees. Heroes think alike.”

“Ah… Bastard, despicable!”

“Hiss… It hurts so much, especially…”

Although he was possessed of evil Qi, Xu Dingcheng lost his strength almost instantly when he was hit at the key.

“How shameless is it to think of such a spell!”

Xu Dingcheng was shocked.

The second dog son applauded and said, “it’s worthy to be a lack of brother. It’s actually a model for our generation. Ben shenzun still needs to study hard.”

Xu Que’s body flashed and turned into a golden light. He suddenly flashed in front of Xu Dingcheng and raised his long sword.

“Amitabha, I will pass you now.”

After that, the long sword in his hand gushed out a strong golden light, and a sharp and unparalleled breath gushed out, almost tearing the void.

“What kind of Buddhist disciple are you?”

Xu Dingcheng roared. He was almost crazy. He saw a monk with a sword for the first time in his life.

This is ridiculous!

Xu Wei ignored him and cut off his long sword.

Bang Dang!

A deafening sound of gold and iron sounded, Xu Ke frowned and did his best to hold the long sword, so that the sword didn’t get rid of it.

Damn it, how can this guy be so hard?

He looked intently and found that a thick shield separated him from Xu Dingcheng. There was only a shallow sword mark on the shield.

“Sleeping trough! What is this? ”

Xu que was stunned. He was a fairy weapon hosted by Jianling!

Since Tianzhou, Jianling fell into a long sleep in order to repair himself.

During this period, Xu Ke woke up several times. Taking advantage of the opportunity, he chose the best among the best and changed Jianling to a boarding place.

Now this fairy weapon is a real medium-quality fairy weapon. After the sword spirit boarded it, its power doubled.

Can’t cut a shield?

“Boy, that’s the origin of foreign demons. You can’t cut it off by your own strength.” The sword spirit suddenly woke up at this time and said, “I passed on your sword formula before. Did you practice it later?”

Xu Ke was stunned and suddenly reacted.

Yeah!

I learned a set of sword formula at the beginning!

In those years, when he became a Taoist body for cultivation, the sword spirit taught him a set of “shenlei Jiugong sword formula”.

This set of sword formula was branded in the soul when the sword spirit followed the Immortal Emperor to fight in the South and North. At that time, he killed dozens of fellow soldiers as soon as he performed it.

However, this set of sword formula originally belonged to the Immortal Emperor’s method, so Xu bugen would consume a lot of immortal yuan every time he used it, and he could not give full play to his power. Therefore, Xu bugen did not use it again after mastering other more appropriate immortal methods.

But now xianzun has reached the peak!

It’s only one step away from the realm of Immortal Emperor. Isn’t it just right to use this sword formula?

Seeing that Fang Ling had no choice, Xu Dingcheng smiled proudly and said, “Tang Sanzang, even if your means are despicable and shameless, it’s bad luck for you to meet this demon. This shield can’t be broken even if you cut it for ten or eight days with your current strength!”

chapters.title: Chapter 1827
chapters.body:
Chapter 1827

Chapter 1827

C.1827

He subconsciously posed in a cold position, ready to pretend to be a big force.

He looked around and suddenly reacted.

There’s no one else except Er Gouzi and Duan Jiude. What’s your strength here.

“No fun, not even an audience.” Xu Wei sighed with interest.

Pretend to force no one to see. What’s the difference between this and the night trip in royal guards?

Xu que didn’t bother to take care of the pit goods. Instead, he communicated with Jianling.

“Sword spirit, what the hell is this foreign evil? It seems that he has seen the Immortal Emperor you follow? ” Xu lacks a wonderful way.

The sword spirit was silent for a while and said faintly: “actually… I only remember that the foreign evil came from outside the sky and once caused serious damage to xianyunzhou, but I can’t remember the specific origin of the foreign evil.”

Xu Wei expressed his understanding. After all, Jianling slept too long. Many things are normal if he can’t remember clearly.

At this time, two dogs suddenly gave a scream.

“Brother Qian, help! Dying, dying! ”

Xu que turns around and sees Xu Dingcheng get up again and hold Er Gouzi.

As for Duan Jiude, seeing that Er Gouzi was caught by Xu Dingcheng, he had already run away.

Xu que looked at Xu Dingcheng and said with a smile, “do you think it’s useful for you to catch Er Gouzi and threaten me?”

Xu Dingcheng took a deep breath, bared his teeth and said, “hum, I’ve heard that you wicked dogs are Trinity, close and close as brothers. Now this dog is in my hand, you’d better cut yourself honestly, or it won’t be safe!”

Xu Wei almost laughed: “you kill you. If you can kill it, it will just alleviate my troubles. This dead dog follows me all day. He only knows how to rob babies and eat. It’s useless.”

The second dog immediately screamed, “brother lack, you can’t do this! We are brothers! ”

“It’s not related by blood.” Xu que said faintly.

“Half brothers! You can’t let God die like this! This God is the only blood of the ancient magic dragon. There are three so-called filial piety. No future generations are great. If this God is dead, the ancient magic dragon will be extinct! You can’t make me unfilial! ” Two dogs cried bitterly, covering their chest and howling.

Xu Dingcheng was so annoyed by the howl that he directly cut Er Gouzi’s neck with a knife: “sleep honestly!”

Dang!

Xu Dingcheng only felt a sharp pain coming from his palm, and the whole face was twisted with pain.

Sleeping trough… Why is the dog so hard?

Xu Ke’s eyes flashed a light, and his body suddenly disappeared in place.

“Want to save the dog? There are no doors! ”

Xu Dingcheng sneered, and his whole body was filled with evil Qi. Even though he had exploded once, he still broke out a powerful momentum.

With the experience of self explosion, Xu Ke subconsciously slowed down for fear that this guy would engage in the operation of human flesh bomb again.

He doesn’t have that strength now. He’ll do it again.

“He’s cheating you. Foreign demons at this level can’t explode twice in a row. If they explode again, they can’t recover!” The Sword Fairy snapped.

Xu Ke was slightly stunned. Before he could move, he saw Xu Dingcheng turn around and run.

“Ha ha! I can’t beat you. Can’t you run? ”

Mom, sell batches!

Xu Wei was also surprised. He saw such a shameless opponent for the first time since he stepped into practice!

It’s like fighting with yourself!

“Brother Kuang, hurry up. The second dog teacher is in his hand. I’m afraid he will suffer a lot!” Duan Jiude didn’t know where he came out and said in a hurry.

Xu que gave him a meaningful look and suddenly said, “put the treasure you two searched here on ER Gouzi?”

“Ah… Brother Qian, how can you think of me like that?” Duan Jiude said righteously, “I spoke out of fear that my dear friend, teacher Ergou, would be hurt by evil spirits!”

“Hehe, cheat the ghost.”

Xu que sneered twice and knew he was right.

These two pit goods will cooperate unless they really encounter a crisis of life and death. When did they care so much about each other’s life and death?

“Steady.” Xu Ke grabbed Duan Jiude’s shoulder and ran after him.

“Ah ah! Brother Qian, please slow down! ”

On the other side, Xu Dingcheng already had some fear in his heart.

The damn Tang Sanzang had the power to completely restrain himself.

What’s more terrible is that this guy seems to have some resistance. His magic Qi has little effect on him.

Like a natural enemy You’d better put down your God as soon as possible and wait for brother Ke to catch up, which is your time of death! ” The second dog son still roared, “now knock a hundred heads for the God Zun. The God Zun can consider pleading for you in front of brother Kuang and take you into favor!” Hum, are you still so arrogant when you die? ” When Xu Dingcheng saw an abyss ahead, his eyes suddenly brightened. Before he rushed to the abyss, a sharp sword fell from the sky and cut off the way ahead The one in front, raise your hand and surrender. This forced saint can spare you a dog’s life! ” Xu que shouted loudly, “be lenient when you confess and strict when you resist. All you are doing now is letting yourself slide into a deeper abyss! It is irrational and immoral! ” Xu Dingcheng was almost crazy. Even if Tang Sanzang couldn’t beat him, he was still chirping like a fly. He turned his head and looked at the abyss on the side. He was cruel and jumped directly. Shit, it’s a big deal. Don’t want this body! Seeing this, Xu que directly dragged Duan Jiude into the abyss. However, as soon as I rushed in, I suddenly noticed something wrong The time flow rate here is wrong! ” Xu que looks up to the front and finds that the actions of Er Gouzi and Xu Dingcheng are fast and slow. He suddenly realizes that he has been caught in a trap. Xu Dingcheng said with a ferocious smile: “hahaha, die together. This body has long been useless!” Son of a bitch, you fucked me! Xu Ke subconsciously wanted to rush up, but a strong suction suddenly came from the abyss. Almost in an instant, several people were sucked down by the abyss… I don’t know how long it took, Xu que finally fell to the bottom. He landed steadily on the ground. Before he could speak, the sword Spirit said in a heavy tone: “boy, hurry up. The abyss swallowed you for at least five hours just now.” what the fuck! Xu que was suddenly surprised. There was a time limit for opening the entrance of the forest of chaos. If they don’t go out before the final closure, they can’t go out completely

chapters.title: Chapter 1828
chapters.body:
Chapter 1828

Chapter 1828

C.1828

Not far away, two dogs came running screaming.

Seeing it come near, he threw the dark body in his hand forward and said, “God has killed this guy. Any strong enemy is not the enemy of God’s fist!”

The dark corpse vaguely shows Xu Dingcheng’s appearance.

It’s sad to think that a disciple of the Immortal Emperor ended up like this.

Xu Ke slapped him on the head: “fuck you, this guy has been possessed by foreign demons. He has already died. Do you have a face to say such words?”

The second dog died and the duck said, “this is the honor of God. All his treasures should belong to me.”

“Take it. It’s like someone wants to rob you.” Xu que waved his hand impatiently and observed the situation around him.

This forest of chaos is full of time turbulence. It just fell into the abyss. It should be that it has gone through time turbulence, so it will consume so much time.

It was dark around, and I could vaguely see huge vines standing like towering trees. I couldn’t see the end at a glance.

“This place is weird.” Duan Jiude looked serious and raised his hand to one side, “brother Duan, look over there.”

Xu Fushun looked in the direction of Duan Jiude’s fingers and found several dried bodies lying under the vines.

“Go and have a look.” Xu que grabbed Er Gouzi and threw him directly next to the body.

A moment later, er Gouzi suddenly shouted, “lying in the trough! Brother Ke, these guys are still alive! ”

Xu Que and Duan Jiude looked at each other, and their faces were strange.

“This place… At least tens of thousands of years?” Xu Ke said faintly.

“It should be… That is to say, these people have lived for tens of thousands of years?” Duan Jiude said slowly.

An idea burst out in their minds.

Baby!

The immortal practitioners who lived here tens of thousands of years ago have not died yet. Doesn’t that mean they still have their treasures?

“Brother Ke, it’s too dangerous here. Stay back and let me come.” Duan Jiude just said, and walked forward at the same time.

Xu Wei folded his hands and looked compassionate: “Amitabha, I don’t go to hell. Who goes to hell? Teacher Duan, your accomplishments are not enough. Let me come.”

“No, no, no, let me come. I’m old and you’re young.”

“If you know you’re old, go away quickly. Don’t get in the way here!”

“Hey, how do you swear?”

They came to ER Gouzi and almost grabbed the body at the same time.

When Er Gouzi saw this scene, he couldn’t help sneering: “tut tut Tut, you don’t even let go of the dead. You’re crazy!”

Hearing this, they stopped by coincidence, looked at each other and surrounded the two dogs.

“You, what do you want to do to God?” Er Gouzi felt something wrong and subconsciously hugged his stomach.

All his treasures are hidden in his stomach, which is his storage space.

“Hey, hey, you were the first to touch the body just now. You must have taken all the baby.” Duan Jiude said with a smirk on his face, “be honest and hand it in.”

“Sleeping trough! There are no babies here! ” The second dog’s eyes suddenly widened.

“Amitabha, benefactor two dogs, you are still lying. You are so stubborn.” Xu que faintly read a Buddhist name, suddenly changed his face and said, “hold it down for me and search it!”

After a burst of noise, the three collapsed on the ground.

“Shit, there’s really nothing.” Xu Xu glanced at the vines and asked, “what did you mean when you said these friars were still alive?”

The second dog said angrily, “Mom, the God said there was no treasure… The spirits of these friars still exist, but only a little. This little soul maintains the vitality of their body, and then supplies them to these vines.”

“So……” Xu que looked in one direction and suddenly said in a harsh voice, “come out!”

From stepping here, he felt that there was always a spirit around them.

Duan Jiude and ER Gouzi jumped up directly from the ground, raised their hands and put out several killing arrays, like facing a great enemy.

A moment later, a slim figure emerged from the darkness.

It was a woman in a big red dress. She was slender, concave and convex, and had a beautiful smile on her exquisite face.

“Oh, don’t scare people, master Tang. They are very timid.” She stroked her chest. The waves were so rough that people were shocked.

“Is that you?” Xu que was stunned. He suddenly stood up and smiled, “Amitabha, I didn’t expect Qiuzi to fall here too. We are really reduced people at the end of the world.”

The visitor was the saint of the magic hall that day. Autumn purple left.

Xu que stretched out his right hand and stopped her. He asked in a deep voice, “I don’t know how donor Qiu fell here?” Qiuzili threw a wink and said softly, “it’s not because you ran away. Ling nishang thought you were blown up, so she had to vent her anger at me…” it turned out that qiuzili left after Xu lacked disappeared, but soon the people clashed again because of the Tao grain stone. This time, the nishang fairy didn’t leave her hand and started fighting without saying a word. Qiuzi left only one person. Of course, she couldn’t stop those guys and hurriedly fled into a cave. Walking around the cave, I didn’t know how, so I came here Be careful, brother Ke. I think this woman is very deep in the city hall. I suggest you let me come forward and have a test. ” Duan Jiude said, his eyes sweeping around qiuzili, staying in key parts. Xu Wei waved his hand, “she’s telling the truth.” When the cultivation reaches xianzun, the spirit is powerful and has its own way to tell whether the other party is lying or not. Maybe qiuzili may have concealed it, but he just ignored some details and didn’t matter to the key events Benefactor Qiu is the eldest martial sister of Tianmo hall. Do you know this place? ” Xu Wei urgently wants to know how to leave. He doesn’t want to wait until the next Tianmen written examination. Xiaorou is still waiting at the central Tianmen gate. When the next Tianmen competition, I’m afraid the cauliflower will be cold. Qiuzili shook her head: “it’s my first time here.” Well, it’s over Alas, since ancient times, our Buddhism has been at odds with the devil. Now everyone is in trouble here. Miss Qiu, don’t blame me. ” Xu sighed and was ready to take down qiuzili. There should be a lot of treasures on this woman. Don’t take them for nothing. But I heard qiuzili say again, “but I have seen records about this place in ancient books.” Xu Wei’s eyes suddenly lit up, looked at Qiu Zili, and praised from the bottom of his heart: “Miss Qiu is worthy of being the saint of the devil hall. She has a broad knowledge of the past and the present, and her cultivation is profound. I really admire her! Our Buddhism has always been close to the devil hall. I don’t know if benefactor Qiu can start talking about relevant records. ” Autumn purple left her face. Shit, this dead bald donkey turns his face faster than a woman

chapters.title: Chapter 1829
chapters.body:
Chapter 1829

Chapter 1829

C.1829

Qiu Zili made a psychological condemnation of Xu Ke’s behavior of turning over faster than women.

But she didn’t dare to say it. After all, she saw with her own eyes how Xu Ke forced Xu Dingcheng to explode. When everyone thought the monk was dead, she actually appeared here again.

“Master Tang, you seem to have a lot of secrets.” Autumn purple left her eyes like silk and said softly, “if you want to know my secret, you should naturally exchange your secret.”

Xu que frowned: “do you threaten the poor monk?”

“No, but we are all fallen people at the end of the world. We always want to be fair.” Qiuzi Li Jiao said angrily, “it’s Fair for you to tell me your secret and I’ll tell you the secret about this place, isn’t it?”

Xu Xu was silent for a moment, sighed, shook his head and said, “I didn’t expect that you found out the secret I had hidden for so long. I promise you the conditions.”

Qiu Zili was delighted. There were too many secrets hidden in the monk at present. As long as she could know one, with the power of the Tianmo hall, she could pick him up like a cocoon.

I’m afraid I don’t know any secrets and haven’t started the investigation.

The most notorious place of the hall of heavenly demons is its pervasive intelligence system.

As long as there is a little thread, a lot of wool can be drawn out.

This is also the reason why the nishang fairy hid the last bottle of holy water in her residence, but she was found out by Qiu Zili.

“In that case, I’ll throw a brick to attract jade.” Qiu Zili smiled and raised her hand to the front. “According to the records in ancient books, this should be the residence of a strange race tens of thousands of years ago. They were born with the ability to control the avenue of time, which caused the fear of the gods at that time. Later, the gods punished and destroyed this place. The remaining races incarnated themselves into vines and lived here, But tens of thousands of years have passed, and their only remaining spirits have long been worn away. Now they are just a group of plants with the idea of survival. ”

This is the advantage of Tianmo hall. Many secrets on Xianyun island are not known by outsiders, but as the saint of Tianmo hall, she naturally knows it clearly.

Xu Xu looked around: “so these vines are the remaining ancient races?”

Qiu Zili nodded and said, “yes, and according to my guess, those Tao Wen stones were also born on these vines.”

Speaking of this, she smiled at Xu que: “I say so, master Tang Sanzang should know what I mean?”

Xu que thought about it and said, “you mean, as long as we follow the vines, we can naturally find the exit.”

“That’s right.” Qiuzi nodded.

This is a very simple inference. If the Tao Wen stone was born from vines, that is to say, there are traces of vines in the places where the Tao Wen stone grew outside.

Therefore, the vine is the guide to the outside world. As long as you keep looking, you will be able to find a channel to the outside world.

“She is worthy of being the saint of the devil hall. She is really knowledgeable.” Xu Kuan praised him. He walked forward with two dogs and Duan Jiude.

Qiuzi was stunned: “well… Tang Sanzang, the secret you promised me hasn’t been said yet.”

Xu lacked a step, folded his hands, and looked compassionate: “are you sure you want to listen to this secret? This secret is very important. Anyone who hears it will change his life trajectory. ”

Qiuzili looked serious immediately. She was silent for a moment and nodded vigorously: “tell me, I’m ready to pay the price.”

In her mind, the secret that Tang Sanzang wants to say must be top secret.

The secret of this degree, as long as it is said, will be noticed by the way of heaven, and the fate will naturally change.

Seeing this, Xu que put his hands behind his back and looked up at the cave top. His tone was bleak and wandering: “the secret I want to say is… I found that I am really handsome!”

Qiuzi stumbled and almost fell to the ground.

What the hell are you talking about?

“Moreover, looking at the whole xianyunzhou, there is no one more handsome than the poor monk!” Xu Kuxin swore in a firm tone.

Qiuzili: ”

She saw that the dead monk was teasing her.

Shit, I’m a saint in the demon hall. I’m going to be played with one day?

The crowd began to walk along the direction of the vine. It was dark around. If the vine didn’t lead the way, they would lose their way at any time.

Thinking of this, she was suddenly surprised and looked at Xu Ke with a secretive look.

On the way here, she has heard that the monk’s purpose is to catch Er Gouzi, Duan Jiude and Xu Ke, the immoral dog, back to the gang. Those who can catch the leader should be the inside information of the gang! Moreover, the power of Xu Dingcheng at that time was infinitely close to the half step Immortal Emperor. Tang Sanzang not only blocked it, but also seemed to have no injury at all. Is this monk an old monster of the deep fried heaven sect that is hidden from the world and exists as the town sect? Xu que noticed Qiu Zili’s eyes and said with a kind smile, “Amitabha, why is Qiu benefactor looking at me like this?” Qiuzili looked stunned, then smiled and said, “nothing. I just think what the master said is really right. He looks really handsome.” Ha ha, I’m flattered. ” Xu que smiled twice, thinking that the saint of the heavenly demon hall had a good eye, much better than the neon fairy, “sometimes, this kind of handsome that can’t be covered up has also brought me a lot of trouble.” Two dogs muttered: “stink shameless… It’s clear that God is the most handsome…” Xu que smelled the speech, turned his head to two dogs, smiled and said: “deputy leader, I heard you seem to be unwell recently. The poor monk just learned to be merciful recently. Why don’t you treat you?” Cough… There is no doubt that master Sanzang of Tang Dynasty is the most handsome person of the fried heaven sect. Who dares to deny that he is unable to live with his God! ” Er Gouzi said righteously. At this time, Duan Jiude suddenly stopped and looked at the front: “boy… No, master Tang, what’s that in front of you?” The crowd looked in the direction Duan Jiude saw, and suddenly their hair exploded.

chapters.title: Chapter 1830
chapters.body:
Chapter 1830

Chapter 1830

C.1830

“Sleeping trough! There are ghosts! ”

The second dog screamed, jumped directly onto Xu Ke and hugged his thigh tightly, “escort, escort! Ben shenzun is the only blood of the ancient magic dragon. There must be no accident in a single pass! ”

Xu que pulled the two dogs down with a look of disgust, and his mood was also a little dignified.

This place has not been open for tens of thousands of years. Even those who break in by mistake have long become supplies for those vines and a half dead existence.

Where did these figures come from?

Is it true that the spirit of the monk who died tens of thousands of years ago has remained until now?

Think about the monks here. One or two died miserably. Isn’t it a fierce ghost for thousands of years!

“Master Tang, you are a Buddhist disciple. You should have a way to deal with these ghosts.” Qiu Zili said softly, “why don’t you do it, master Tang…”

“Amitabha, I don’t want to kill in vain. Let them go today. Let’s change our way.” Xu Qian put his hands together and turned to go in the other direction.

Mom, this woman is really upset and kind.

This shows that there are many dangers and wants ben to force saint to take risks. It’s not human!

Good looking women are the best liars. The ancients sincerely didn’t deceive me.

“Wait, don’t you think the figures in front of you look familiar?” Duan Jiude spoke again, with some surprise in his tone, “Hey, really, it looks familiar!”

Two dogs smelled the speech, looked straight at it, and immediately exclaimed, “it’s the woman in white. What’s her name… Oh, nishang fairy! It’s them! ”

Now it’s qiuzili’s turn and XuKe’s turn.

They turned their heads together, carefully distinguished them, and said in a voice: “it’s really them!”

Among the figures in front, the last one, wearing a long white dress, is clearly a neon fairy!

“Why are they here?” Xu Wei wondered, and his eyes fell on Qiu Zili. “Didn’t benefactor Qiu just say that he escaped here after being chased?”

“She must be lying. This woman is definitely a monster!” The two dogs immediately shouted, pointing to qiuzili and shouting, “take her down quickly, and then search her naked and find all the babies!”

Qiu Zili smelled the speech, subconsciously hugged his arms, looked alert and said, “I’m a real person. I don’t know how they came in!”

Before, er Gouzi and Duan Jiude also fled to the boundary of Chengyuan immortal domain. She had no doubt that these two crazy guys would do what they said.

“Er Gouzi, I didn’t expect you to have such dirty and obscene thoughts. I’m very disappointed!” Xu lacked pain and heart disease first.

Qiuzili just breathed a sigh of relief, and then heard Xu deficient say: “half is enough.”

Shameless!

After flirting with qiuzili, Xu Ke paid attention to the figures in front of him.

Those figures had stiff limbs and walked like walking corpses. It was obvious that they had lost their mind.

Out of his heart, Xu que actually wants to save them. After all, in this ghost place, more people have more power.

However, the current situation is unknown. It is difficult to ensure that there will be no accidents when they save them in the past.

“I see!” Qiuzili suddenly said in a hurry, “it’s Jiuyou confused heart fog around them!”

Jiuyou confused heart fog?

Xu que looked at Qiu Zili suspiciously: “benefactor Qiu, what is this fog?”

Qiu Zili seemed to be worried that she would speak slowly. She was really picked up by two dogs. She spoke quickly: “I have only seen relevant records in ancient books. It is said that this is a family protection thing kept by the family in captivity in those years. It can confuse the intelligence of others, and even half the realm of Immortal Emperor can’t escape!”

“Captive?” Xu Xu noticed the word, “can this fog be raised?”

“Jiuyou confused heart fog is just a name. The fog is actually a living creature.” Qiu Zili said in a deep voice, “they are alive. I didn’t expect to see the real thing after tens of thousands of years.”

Xu Ke was stunned and said to the communication system, “is there a prop that can isolate this fog?”

“Ding, we have selected props, breathing masks and loaded with nano air filters to ensure that every breath is the purest fresh air.” The system quickly gave feedback.

“Good! Change! ”

Without saying a word, Xu que exchanged the props directly.

Qiu Zili looked at Xu que standing in a daze and reminded him, “don’t get close to those fog. According to the estimated records, tens of thousands of years ago, I don’t know how many half step immortal emperors died in this fog. Now I’m afraid the power is even more terrible… What are you doing?”

Halfway through, she suddenly widened her eyes and screamed.

Xu Xu has stepped into the white fog and wears a strange hood like a ball on his head.

“Don’t worry, I know.” Xu que waved his hand, and the voice came from under the mask. Qiuzili sighed and looked at Er Gouzi and Duan Jiude: “he’s hopeless. Let’s go. Before the Immortal Emperor can fix himself, he will die in the fog of Jiuyou confused heart.” However, er Gouzi snorted coldly with disdain, thrust himself into his waist, and said proudly: “you underestimate the lack of… Master Tang Sanzang. Master Tang Sanzang is the existence of the highest cultivation of our fried heaven sect. Ordinary people don’t understand its strength!” Yes, there are millions of strong people like master Sanzang of Tang Dynasty. We can overthrow xianyunzhou at will! ” Duan Jiude also said with awe inspiring approval, “you Tianmen had better honestly open the treasure house and pay the protection fee. We can consider letting you go!” If placed before, qiuzili may not believe these words. However, after seeing the strength of Tang Sanzang with her own eyes, Qiu Zili couldn’t help wondering whether the strength of the fried heaven gang was really so strong. Of course, she certainly doesn’t believe a million, but at least there should be a hundred? Otherwise, how dare you boast that there are millions of strong people! If this is the case, the Immortal Emperor will not come out. None of the four Tianmen can stop the fried tianbang! She can’t imagine that Er Gouzi and Duan Jiude really have the courage. Obviously, they don’t have a strong man, but they can pretend as if there are dozens of immortal emperors You believe me, he really can’t be saved. Even if the half step Immortal Emperor is in it, it’s impossible to escape the effect of nine head confused heart fog… “Before the voice fell, I heard the voice of Xu deficiency ringing in my ear Who did you say was hopeless? ” Qiuzi was surprised and looked around. Xu que was standing beside him. Behind him, there are dozens of nishang fairies

chapters.title: Chapter 1831
chapters.body:
Chapter 1831

Chapter 1831

C.1831

Qiuzili was stunned. How did this guy save people?

That’s Jiuyou confused heart fog!

According to the records, hundreds of strong men of half step Immortal Emperor were confused by Jiuyou confused heart fog and finally died!

The monk not only didn’t do anything, but also brought back the people inside?

How did he do it?

A terrible idea suddenly surged up in the autumn purple centrifugation.

Half a step, the Immortal Emperor has no way to take Jiuyou confused heart fog, but what if it is the strong one of the Immortal Emperor?

But the whole Xianyun Island, for so many years, only the four immortal emperors exist. Suddenly, there is an additional Immortal Emperor. Where did it come from?

Qiu Zili’s delicate body couldn’t help shaking. Her heart was full of fear and excitement.

Although she is a saint of the temple of heavenly demons, she has never actually seen Cheng Yuanxian emperor.

Even when he was taught by the Immortal Emperor, he was just kneeling under the hall. He only heard the Immortal Emperor’s holy voice and didn’t see his body shape.

If Tang Sanzang is really an Immortal Emperor, he is a living Immortal Emperor he has seen with his own eyes!

Anyone who can be guided by it will surely benefit immeasurably!

You know, whether it’s the Immortal Emperor level or the semi emperor level strong, they all cover their promotion methods to death and never teach them to others.

This has led to numerous immortals on Xianyun Island, but the semi imperial strong are less than one tenth.

Xu Wei was completely unaware of the ups and downs in the autumn purple centrifugal, raised his hand and played a Buddha light, which banned the people in it to prevent them from dispersing.

Although the power in the body has completed the three in one, he can still use a single power.

“Is there any way to wake them up?” Xu que touched his chin and thought.

Among the system props, only the respirator is the protective prop, but these people have inhaled the Jiuyou confused heart fog into their bodies, so it is difficult to peel it off.

According to the detection given by the system, Jiuyou confused heart fog has even been integrated into their immortal yuan.

“Is there really no way to peel it off?” Xu Xu is unwilling to ask the system.

“Ding, to enable this function, please upgrade to…”

“Well, well, needless to say, I know. I have to upgrade again.” Xu Xu interrupted the system directly, and a rush of grass and mud ran through his heart.

Why does this broken system have to be upgraded now? Don’t you count the installed force value?

At this time, the God stone suddenly shook violently.

Xu Ke was stunned, took out the divine stone and found that the divine text was emerging madly.

“Humble maggots, that’s the food of the God stone!”

“Let the God stone pass quickly!”

“Let the God stone have a full meal and will reward you heavily in the future!”

“Come on, can’t you see? Let Ben Shenshi go and eat! ”

Xu Wei was surprised: “aren’t you a stone? You have to eat? ”

“Ignorant mole ants, although the original God stone has participated in creation and chemistry and lives the same life as heaven and earth, it is enough for you maggots to look up for thousands of years…”

“Speak human words.” Xu que said coldly.

“… Jiuyou confused heart fog can repair the injury of this God stone.”

“You see, it’s not so difficult to talk well.” Xu que shrugged and a plan loomed in his heart.

After thinking about it, he came to the side of the nishang fairy and took out the divine stone.

Several people stared at Xu Que and wanted to see what he wanted to do.

Qiuzili only took out a stone and sighed, “Tang Sanzang, these people are confused by Jiuyou and have no salvation.”

Although Xu que rescued the people and she was not affected, she didn’t believe Xu que could treat them at all.

It is recorded in ancient books that the half step Immortal Emperor level strong people were confused by Jiuyou. Some immortal Emperors tried to save these half emperor level strong people, but they could only give up in vain after trying for a few days.

Even the senior Immortal Emperor level strong people ten thousand years ago can’t do anything. What can you do?

Er Gouzi sneered and said dismissively, “joke, is there anything in this world that master Tang Sanzang can’t do? What a joke! ”

“Yes, do you have the courage to bet with us?” Duan Jiude turned his eyes and said in a deep voice, “I’ll bet ten middle-grade immortal tools!”

Although Qiu Zili doubted that Tang Sanzang was a strong Immortal Emperor, it was not confirmed after all.

At this time, he was provoked by Er Gouzi and Duan Jiude, and his heart became angry. He raised his head and said, “OK, let’s bet. What if you can’t get ten medium-sized immortal tools?”

“Hum, if we lose, we’ll give Er Gouzi’s dog head!” Duan Jiude said plausibly.

Er Gouzi echoed: “that’s right! If we lose, we’ll take Ben shenzun’s dog head… Damn Duan Jiude, you shameless old man, actually take Ben shenzun as a bet?! And Ben shenzun is not a dog, but a descendant of the ancient magic dragon! ”

“Oh, don’t worry, we won’t lose. Even if we do lose, don’t you claim to have nine lives? It’s nothing to lose one head.” Duan Jiude waved his hand Fuck you, I am your ancestor! ” Hey, how can you swear? ” The God will not only scold you, but also beat you! ” One man and one dog fought directly on the spot, tossing dust and smoke all over the ground. Qiuzili looked at the two goods entangled with each other silently, thinking whether it was because she had stayed with them for too long, so her IQ had declined. Actually bet with them Alas, I’m also confused. No one has ever been rescued. How can I be rescued now? ” Qiuzili patted her head and sighed. As soon as the voice fell, a palpitating feeling suddenly came. This is… She suddenly looked in the direction where Xu Ke was, and saw him standing on the side of the nishang fairy, holding the ugly stone in her hand, with a serious face. The next second, countless strange patterns burst out on the stone. These patterns flow along the stone surface like running water. With the flow of patterns, the body of the neon fairy was slightly shocked, and a faint white fog “bang” gushed out from the body surface, just like covering her with a layer of gauze. While the white fog appeared, the pattern accelerated suddenly. These white fog had almost no resistance, so they were directly sucked into the stone. After a few breaths, there was no more white fog gushing out of the fairy. I don’t know why, qiuzili vaguely felt that the stone had a satisfied burp This… Where is this? ” A confused voice sounded, and the fairy slowly opened her beautiful eyes and murmured. Qiuzili was as stupid as being struck by lightning. Wake up? Even the Immortal Emperor couldn’t save the monk who was confused by Jiuyou. The monk just saved him with a stone? Is he the existence above the Immortal Emperor

chapters.title: Chapter 1832
chapters.body:
Chapter 1832

Chapter 1832

C.1832

Nishang fairy felt as if she had experienced a big dream. She couldn’t remember anything in the dream. She could only vaguely remember that feeling.

Even if I wake up now, the feeling of blankness still lingers for a long time.

“Nishang fairy, are you okay?” Xu que asked with concern.

When the nishang fairy heard the speech, she perked up and suddenly looked to her side: “master Tang Sanzang? What are you doing here? Are you dead, too? Is this the underworld? ”

The fourth strike caught Xu Kuang unprepared. He thought how the fairy in nishang was so pessimistic. She was dying all the time.

Can’t you think of something positive energy?

“You’re not dead yet.” Qiuzili said softly, “I’m lucky. I didn’t hang up when I was confused by Jiuyou’s heart fog, but it doesn’t matter. Anyway, I’ll kill you one day.”

Jiuyou confused heart fog?

The nishang fairy was shocked. A cold color flashed in her eyes. She raised her hand and decided to hit qiuzili: “it’s all because of you, witch!”

Qiuzi stood upright from her eyebrows and eyes, avoided the blow, and said in a fierce voice: “what’s the matter with me, you crazy woman, who is confused by Jiuyou? If you want to fight, just say it. Don’t make such an excuse! ”

“If it wasn’t for you to rob the Tao Wen stone, why should we chase you into the cave! If we didn’t chase you into the cave, how could we fall into such a dangerous place! ” The nishang fairy was obviously extremely angry, and her pretty face was red with anger.

That’s Jiuyou confused heart fog!

It is not only recorded in the ancient books of Tianmo hall, but also in the ancient books of Shengyue hall, and the records are more detailed.

In ancient times, there were descendants of the flood and famine who had natural powers and could master the avenue of time.

This clan nurtures and protects the clan’s deity Jiuyou to confuse the heart and fog, resist foreign enemies, and those whose cultivation is not as good as the Immortal Emperor will lose their mind and become walking corpses.

He brought the elite members of the holy Moon Temple. Now the whole army is destroyed here, which means that the holy Moon Temple will never recover in the next hundred years.

It may even become a history of xianyunzhou forces!

Think about it, all the elite died here, and even one person in charge of the overall situation could not go back. Even other forces would not fight in the face of Yongzhen Immortal Emperor.

But secretly, there are countless ways to make the holy moon hall fall into the situation of never turning over!

All this is brought by qiuzili this woman!

At the thought of this, the nishang fairy’s eyes were red, and her moves were aimed at harm.

Qiuzi left the block for a while and was worried. She roared, “Ling nishang, I warn you that if you fight again, your people will really die!”

The nishang fairy was shocked, and the palm stopped three inches away from Qiuzi.

Sharp Xianyuan blasted out of her face and directly smashed a huge stone not far away. Even there was a roar in the dark. It was obvious that it had been bombarded to an unknown distance.

“What do you mean? Are they still saved? ” The departure of nishang fairy began to return.

Qiuzi looked at her and said coldly, “otherwise, how do you think you survived? You deserve not to have a partner without a chest and a brain! ”

Xu que suddenly listened to music. Qiuzili was a talent. Every sentence poked people’s pain.

Nishang fairy didn’t care about Qiuzi’s stabbing people’s lungs. She turned her head to Xu Que and asked in a trembling voice, “just now, master Tang Sanzang saved me?”

There are only a few people present. Qiu Zili must not be so kind. I think it must be master Tang Sanzang!

The two dogs were very dissatisfied and jumped out and said, “why don’t you pay attention to the respect of God and think that the bald donkey saved you? What is the reason! ”

He didn’t say it was okay. As soon as he spoke, the nishang fairy immediately stared at Er Gouzi with beautiful eyes and said with gnashing teeth: “so you are here… If you hadn’t made trouble in my holy Moon Palace, why would my holy Moon Palace be so withered and defeated!”

Feeling the strong murderous spirit emanating from the nishang fairy, er Gouzi didn’t dare to fart, so he jumped directly behind Xu Wei: “master Tang, this woman is impetuous. I’m afraid it’s Tiankui. I suggest gratitude and let him drink more hot water.”

“You!”

The nishang fairy’s face turned red, looked at Xu que, bowed her hand and said, “master Tang, dare you ask, but you saved me?”

Even the title has been changed.

Xu nodded with a kind expression: “I’m just making a little effort. The nishang fairy doesn’t have to be so polite.”

Hearing Xu Que’s admission that he saved himself, the nishang fairy was immediately excited. She stepped forward and firmly grasped Xu Que’s hands: “master Tang, can you save my disciple of the holy moon hall?”

Feeling the fragrance from the pavement, Xu que swayed and murmured, “fairy, I’m a family. The so-called man and woman don’t give and receive…”

Nishang fairy blushed and quickly spread her hands: “sorry, I’m too anxious.”

“It doesn’t matter. The nishang fairy cares about the disciples in the hall. I really admire her.” XuKe zhengse road. Shit, it’s too much. Even the words that men and women don’t accept each other… Took a deep breath and put aside the complicated thoughts in her mind. The nishang fairy looked at Xu Xu seriously: “master Tang, I don’t know if you can cure my disciples in the holy moon hall now.” Xu Xu didn’t answer immediately. Instead, he looked weak and covered his chest and gasped Master Tang, what’s the matter with you? ” Nishang fairy immediately panicked. Now everyone’s lives in the holy moon hall are in his hands. If something happens to Tang Sanzang, the holy moon hall will be destroyed. Xu Duan’s lips trembled: “I’ve just… Consumed too much power to cure the fairy. Now I’m afraid the oil will run out and the light will run dry…” seeing this, nishang fairy took out a bottle of pill without saying a word: “this is the secret pill of my holy moon Hall. Take it and you can immediately replenish the immortal yuan in your body. Take it, master Tang!” Thank you, fairy… “Xu que turned his back to the nishang fairy, sat down cross legged, took a pill and took it, and put the whole bottle of pill into the system. Seeing this scene, er Gouzi’s eyes lit up and ran to Xu Xu, his limbs twitched and foaming at the mouth Ben, Ben is exhausted… He needs Dan medicine to cure… “Xu kubai glanced at it and kicked him out Shameless! I even tried to pretend to be ill to cheat the pill! ” How can our fried heaven Gang have such a brazen and shameless person as you? It’s the shame of the fried heaven Gang! ” Today, I’m going to do justice for heaven and bring you villain to justice! ”

chapters.body:
Chapter 1833

Chapter 1833

C.1833

With that, he ran after ergouzi and grabbed ergouzi’s back neck in three or two steps.

“Shit, you want to grab food, don’t you?” Xu Xu lowered his voice and said viciously.

Seeing the benefits, the two dogs were unwilling to show weakness: “those who see have a share, the God wants 50%!”

Xu que: ”

I’m just cheating you. So you really peeked?

Oh, my God!

Qiuzili looked at this scene and couldn’t help looking suspiciously at the neon fairy.

But it was only a few breaths from taking the pill to the end. When did the holy moon hall have this magical pill?

I have to touch two bottles sometime to see the effect

After cleaning up the last monk, the speed of the divine text on the divine stone has fallen to only one tenth of the level. But even so, Shenshi was still crippled and determined to express his condemnation of the defect: “you… Humble… Mole ants…” “shut up.” Xu Wei shoved the stone back into the system and turned to look at the crowd. Everyone looked at Xu Xu, full of respect. This is the man who saved their lives. How can they disrespect! Xu que glanced at Er Gouzi. His red face suddenly turned pale and fell straight Finished… It seems that the source of the poor monk has been exhausted… I’m afraid there will be a big problem now. ” As soon as the voice fell, er Gouzi ran all the way crying Master Tang! Hearing the speech, the people looked frightened and stared at Er Gouzi in horror.

After all, it takes a lot of time to make a full set of plays and miraculous herbs. Naturally, it can’t be as fast as swallowing pills just now.

Seeing Xu Que’s figure revealed, they immediately gathered around and asked with concern.

So without saying a word, he took down his storage ring and photographed it in Xu Xu’s hand: “master Tang, you saved my life, mine is yours, and our family doesn’t speak two words!”

Xu Ke then showed a kind smile, and the Buddha light behind his head was even more dazzling: “Amitabha, my Buddha once said that people like you must have made great achievements!”

As for which Buddha said, God knows.

After searching for oil and water, Xu que pretended to meditate for a while, and then got up.

“Thank you for your care. I’m all right now.” He wore a faint smile on his face, “the nine you confused heart fog has been completely suppressed. There should be no danger next.”

When they heard the speech, they all showed their gratitude Thank you, master Tang Sanzang, for saving your life! ” Xu Wei, with his hands on his back, put on an indifferent look, and a Buddha light appeared behind him: “you don’t have to be so polite. This is what the poor monk should do.” Seeing this scene, everyone was even more excited. This is the real Buddhist master. They are lucky to meet such a compassionate master in their life! Then, under the explanation of qiuzili, everyone learned about the current situation. We are all disciples of the Immortal Emperor. We all know some secrets more or less. We were surprised to learn that this is the place of ancient flood and famine survivors Now think about it, no wonder every Tianmen competition before, there were always disciples missing. ” Nishang fairy looked ahead and said sadly. Not far away, a corpse dressed in the holy Moon Palace was tightly bound to the vines. It’s not the person they entered here this time. I think it should be the friar who entered here by mistake after taking part in the Tianmen competition many years ago Amitabha, don’t be sad, fairy. We can find a way out soon. ” Xu que put his hands together and said with a smile. Then, under Xu Xu’s leadership, people began to find their way out along the direction of vine growth. I don’t know how long I left, but suddenly a stone wall appeared in front of me, on which countless complicated patterns were carved. Xu que came forward and looked at it. Suddenly, he was shocked. what the fuck! It’s all divine writings! Shenshi was excited and trembled: “there is a breath of gods here! Humble mole ant, you’re dead this time! ” Xu Wei didn’t answer him at all. Instead, he said excitedly, “you guys, you can go out when the poor monk solves the words on the stone wall.” At this time, a sarcastic voice sounded: “we don’t even know this article. You can understand it with a casual practice?” Xu Wei looked at the speaker and was immediately happy: “Dongwuqi? Why aren’t you dead yet

When Dongwu heard the speech, his face became gloomy.

Unpredictable changes?

Change is a hammer. This broken stone is swearing all day. I haven’t seen any change?

It’s true that master Sanzang of Tang Dynasty is a good man with noble virtue, but he can’t be good at everything because he has a specialty in art?

Dongwu smiled proudly and said, “to tell you the truth, I once found some records about divine writings in an ancient book.”

Since the host friend wants to interpret it, how about we interpret it together?” I’d like to have a look today. How many kilograms of nails are there in your broken boat. What’s the difference between that and letting people die? Xu que took a deep look at Dongwu and said, “since you want to bet, let’s bet.” Dongwu suddenly felt hot. Dead bald ass, you’re finished! In fact, he didn’t tell the truth to these people. As for the divine script, he is not slightly the same, but has already got the comparison table of the divine script in his hand. This comparison table was found by the magic cloud fairy emperor many years ago and hidden in the magic cloud fairy palace. He has thought that once he wins, he will immediately abolish Tang Sanzang. The humiliation of being beaten that day is still fresh in his mind. He must not let the dead bald donkey live! They stood in front of the stone wall and began to translate. Dongwu took a deep breath and began to recall the divine text table in his mind. As the last immortal yuan poured into it, the jade piece suddenly shook, and a light curtain shot out of it and reflected in the air.

The light curtain is divided into two parts, generally ordinary characters, and on the other side are all kinds of mysterious divine texts.

“The divine script corresponds to the text one by one. As long as the content of the text is compared, the content on the stone wall can be translated.” Dongwuqi explained.

With that, he looked at Xu Ke proudly. His eyes seemed to say, I have seen through your means.

Little thing, Ben forced saint to remember you.

You’ll have juice later.

If you want to learn divine scripture, you must at least have a source of learning.

Without a source, it is like rootless water. Even if you are an Immortal Emperor, you can’t learn divine literature.

Therefore, when he saw Xu que begin to translate, he laughed at him, thinking that he was just pretending.

Although the friars around them were a little angry, it was about whether they could go out, so they still looked at this divine script seriously.

While translating, Xu que was also worried: “they won’t learn, can they use divine magic?”

God stone seemed to be angry: “dream! Really think it’s that easy to use magic? Just learning to interrogate is not enough. If you don’t master the law of the road, you can’t use it at all! ”

Xu Wei’s heart was shocked and his tone became cruel: “Oh… No wonder you taught me divination so happily before. There’s another reason for your feelings.”

Shenshi seems to realize that the big thing is bad: “well… Anyway, you’ve learned that, haven’t you… It’s all small problems.”

Xu Wei didn’t pay attention to the divine stone. He thought it was time to educate this divine stone.

I’m so bold. I dare to deceive Ben and force him to be holy.

But it’s strange to say that why can you use divine magic when you clearly don’t master the law of the great road?

“Ding, the host doesn’t master the law of the great road, but others don’t master the law of the great road, so they can’t use divine magic.” The system suddenly appears and brushes up the sense of existence. Xu Ke was stunned and said curiously, “start talking.” Ding, you can gradually master the law of the great road when you practice in the fairyland, but you can’t use it because you master too little. ” The system replied firmly, “the host master the law of the great road is more than a hundred times that of others, so he can use divine magic.” How can we master more laws of the road? ” The greater the power of heaven’s calamity, the more you will master the law of the great road if you survive. ” In fact, the natural disaster is not just a simple disaster. Low level friars practice their bodies and spirits when they cross the sky. When they reach the realm of Xu Duan, if they fight the sky, they can get the Tao from it. But for thousands of years, almost no one dared to take the initiative to fight against the natural disaster, so few people found it. Even if they found it, they would only keep it secret. Xu Wei suddenly realized that it is still useful to cross the natural disaster with feelings! It seems that next time I have to ask God to give me more natural disasters. The more powerful it is, the better. It’s better to be the one with millions of heavenly soldiers and generals. At that time, when he has finished the robbery, he will master the avenue, immediately go to the central Tianmen, punch all directions, kick the Immortal Emperor and save rou’er. On the other hand, they looked more and more strange compared with the content translated by Xu Que and the translation on the divine text table Master Tang Sanzang… It seems that all the translations are correct? ” Said a friar vacillating. So far, all translations have been fought for.” You know, Tang Sanzang didn’t even look at the table! Er Gouzi despised this, raised his hand and said, “all the basic operations will be used to in the future.”

I saw that he was as angry as a gossamer, but he still said with difficulty: “it doesn’t matter… As a Buddhist, I should help the world at the same time… In order to enable all Taoist friends to go out, even if I lose my life…”

Hearing this, all the monks around were shocked. Tang Sanzang can’t die! If he dies, we can’t get out! What, you say Dongwuqi can understand divine script? He took a deep breath, looked around, and said in a deep voice: “the kindness of your Taoist friends is appreciated by the poor monk. Saving the world is my lifelong wish. Even if I risked my life, I will certainly bring you out of here.” As he spoke, he incorporated these Tiancai and Dibao into the system space. The monks originally wanted to persuade, but in the twinkling of an eye they saw that the natural materials and earth treasures in their hands were gone, so they had to stop and stand in place and laugh. Another wave of benefits was brought to the people. Xu lacked no longer delayed and quickly translated the contents on the stone tablet. Then he took the crowd and set out towards the place recorded on the stone tablet. Soon, a huge stone pillar connecting heaven and earth appeared in front of everyone Ladies and gentlemen, this should be the place to go out. ”

chapters.title: Chapter 1838
chapters.body:
Chapter 1838

Chapter 1838

C.1838

It’s a stone pillar, but it’s not accurate.

Because it is a hundred feet wide, it extends infinitely into the darkness, covered by the fog and can’t see the end.

Below the stone pillar, there is a black lake without any luster. The range is extremely wide and almost can’t see the end.

“There’s water at last! I want to take a good bath! ”

Two dogs jumped into the water and jumped back the next second.

“What’s the matter?” The nishang fairy suddenly said in a hurry.

This black lake is unheard of. It’s impossible to imagine its impact. If something goes wrong, it will be in great trouble.

“Ice, very ice.” Two dogs said honestly.

Nishang fairy: ”

The crowd gathered in front of the stone pillar, with a look of hope at the bottom of their eyes.

I can finally go out

“According to the records on the stone wall, this place is called ‘the road to freedom and eternity’.” Xu que looked at the stone pillar and explained, “at that time, the meaning of freedom and eternity in that race was the road to the outside world. If you find the stone pillar, you will find the road.”

People, look at me, I look at you, with a confused face.

So here’s the problem. Where’s the road?

Where is the road?

At a glance, except that water is a pillar, where is the road?

The two dogs rushed forward excitedly: “whatever, it must climb up along this stone pillar!”

Xu Wei didn’t even have time to stop, and ER Gouzi rushed out.

Then, I saw it move more and more slowly

“Sleeping trough! The stone pillar is surrounded by the turbulent flow of time! ” A monk suddenly exclaimed and hurriedly stepped back.

Those friars around who wanted to go and have a try immediately retreated and dared not approach.

The two dogs were like clay sculptures, solidified in the air, neither up nor down, neither front nor back.

What does Xu lack think? How does he think that this time turbulence is unscientific? It fundamentally violates the common sense of physics.

But this is a world of cultivating immortals after all. It is unscientific for human beings to burst out such a powerful force. Don’t worry about these details.

“This… These things are not recorded on the stone wall!” A monk said anxiously.

Xu que saw that it was time to pretend to be forced, and then stepped forward.

“Don’t panic, I just found a secret method that can measure the speed of time turbulence when translating the stone wall. Let me have a look!”

As soon as Xu que could measure the time turbulence, everyone gathered around.

“You deserve to be master Tang! What a talent! ”

“Master Tang, look! Our lives depend on you! ”

“Master Tang, you are really a living Bodhisattva who saves people from suffering!”

In the face of everyone’s eager eyes, Xu Kuang put his hands together and said with a smile: “Amitabha, but this secret method consumes a lot…”

Before he finished, a lot of natural materials and earth treasures were sent, which can be said to be everything.

Xu Xu’s eyes are straight. These dogs are hiding so many things secretly!

He put away these natural materials and earth treasures, closed his eyes and showed a burst of golden light around him.

Then

“System, measure the approximate time turbulence over there, and the specific value.”

Along the way, he found that although the system can not solve the problem of time turbulence, it can visualize time turbulence into numerical values.

For example, the time turbulence in an area can be evaluated as one-third of the actual time.

In other words, the time spent crossing that area will be three times the actual time.

If the actual time takes one minute, it takes nine minutes to cross that area.

So on the road, he actually took the people through many areas where the flow velocity was not so abnormal. Although it took more time, it was not so exaggerated.

After a while, the system sent a reply.

“Ding, according to the system calculation, the time velocity here decreases exponentially. In the area near the stone pillar, the time velocity is about one millionth of the normal velocity per hour. The actual time required to pass through the whole area is about three years.”

“Three years?!”

what the fuck!

Xu Ke was stupid on the spot.

From the place where the people are to the stone pillar, the visual inspection is only about 500 meters. It takes three years!

You’re kidding!

When you get out of here, rou’er has children!

“System, crack this time turbulence for me.”

“Ding, please upgrade…”

“Get out!”

Xu Xu is helpless. Up to now, the broken system is more and more difficult to use.

In fact, he wants to upgrade, but the upgrade is not enough!

When Xu que blurted out the three-year old, the monks around him were also stupid. Their group of immortal zuns actually crossed this area in the blink of an eye. But this blink of an eye takes three years? The time flow velocity with such a large drop makes everyone feel a touch of despair In fact, you don’t have to. We can go through this area and wait for the friars who come to compete next time to open the forest of chaos! ” There are friars breathing. But no one answered him. Xu que is happy. The monk who can say this is a talent. Not to mention whether you can go out through this stone pillar. Will the next Tianmen competition still be in the forest of chaos? As nishang fairy said before, the assessment method and location of Tianmen competition are the same every time. If the next assessment place is not here, won’t they have to wait again? The special mother waited until the monkey years and horses went. At this moment, a figure suddenly flashed past the crowd and rushed towards Xu que quickly. Xu Ke was stunned and almost shouted “escort”. Turning around, he saw Er Gouzi shrink behind him. He suddenly said, “aren’t you imprisoned by the flow of time?” The position where Er Gouzi was just now was enough for him to walk for three or four weeks. Maybe he could only move less than one meter. How did he suddenly run back? The second dog son looked confused and forced: “Ben shenzun didn’t know. Just now, he suddenly saw your movement fast, and then Ben shenzun didn’t dare to move. Then he saw that your movement became normal, so he ran back quickly.” In a slow time flow, people who look at the normal time flow will move faster. It is like a stone looking at human beings. If it blinks, it will feel that human beings have changed from youth to old age in just a blink. Xu Kuang was stunned. He picked up a handful on ER Gouzi. His hands were full of water. Sleeping trough… Can you say? Xu Ke suddenly plunged into the water and let the system start the detection Ding, the detection is completed, and the underwater time flow rate is normal. ” Xu que was ecstatic and got up and hugged Er Gouzi: “well done!” The second dog began to panic: “what are you doing! God likes the warden! ”

chapters.title: Chapter 1839
chapters.body:
Chapter 1839

Chapter 1839

C.1839

I have to say, er Gouzi is really a good dog with long love.

After seeing the warden’s huge beauty in that ghost place, I still can’t forget it today. I always regard it as the object of my lifelong pursuit.

Xu que didn’t bother to take care of him so much. He hugged him and threw him out. Instead, he put on a calm look.

“You Taoist friends, I have found the way to the stone pillar.”

The faces of the people were all beaming.

I know that master Tang is crafty… No, he is resourceful. He must be able to find a way out.

“Master Tang, tell us quickly!” A friar couldn’t wait to shout.

Of course, there are also villains like Dongwuqi who show disdain.

“Don’t be funny. Unless the Immortal Emperor comes to this place, no one can control the time flow rate!” Dongwu said coldly.

Xu que narrowed his eyes and asked meaningfully, “really? Would the host friends like to come and make another bet? ”

Dongwuqi was not convinced, but suddenly a spirit came to his mind.

The bastard was able to open the void passage briefly before, which has involved the use of space Avenue.

What if this guy can control time?

Dongwuqi stopped talking, but still maintained a skeptical attitude.

Xu Wei was too lazy to answer him and looked at the nishang fairy: “fairy, please go into the water.”

The nishang fairy was stunned. She didn’t expect to call her name: “me? Is there anything underwater? ”

“You will know when you enter the water.” Xu que said faintly.

Out of her trust in Xu Xu, the nishang fairy didn’t hesitate for too long and went into the water.

Then Xu que came in and took nishang fairy’s hand.

The nishang fairy subconsciously wanted to break free. However, after seeing Xu Que’s righteous face, she gradually relaxed her vigilance.

I think master Tang is worried about my accident, so he will hold me.

Thinking of this, she thanked Xu with a grateful look.

Xu Duan saw it and pulled it tighter.

I didn’t expect that the nishang fairy was so good. I should try my best.

The two walked about tens of meters, and the nishang fairy suddenly reacted.

The time flow rate here has dropped to at least 100 times the actual time!

But looking at the action of the reflection outside from the water, there is still no change!

There is no time for turbulence underwater!

In other words, the water has the effect of isolating the turbulent flow of time.

No wonder Er Gouzi had just entered the area of time turbulence, but he still escaped from it.

She subconsciously wanted to get up, but she was firmly held by Xu vacancy.

The nishang fairy’s face was full of red clouds, but then she realized that master Sanzang of Tang saved herself!

If trade rises rashly now, it will be imprisoned by the turbulent flow of time immediately!

Feeling the tender and delicate body between his arms, Xu que sincerely sighed again.

Alas, is the poor monk so handsome that women can’t resist him?

It’s a great sin to be so handsome

They sneaked all the way back to the shore from under the water. As soon as they got ashore, they surrounded.
