The water is dark. You can’t see the underwater scene from the outside, but you can see the water from under the water.

The people outside couldn’t see that they had walked tens of meters. At this time, they just thought they were diving underground.

“Nishang fairy, master Sanzang of Tang Dynasty, have you found anything?” The friar asked hurriedly.

The nishang fairy pressed her excited heart and said in a deep voice, “this black water can isolate the turbulent flow of time!”

“Really?”

“Doesn’t that mean we can dive to the stone pillar!”

“Great, we’re saved!”

Even if you are a monk, there are a few who are not afraid of death.

What is Xiuxian for?

Isn’t it just to live a long life and live with heaven?

Therefore, for most monks, life and death can never overcome the great fear of the past.

At this time, I suddenly heard that there was a chance to escape, and most monks wept with joy.

At this moment, the fairy suddenly turned pale, swayed and almost fell to the ground,

Fortunately, Xu que reached out in time to hold her.

“What’s the matter with you?” Xu que asked with concern.

The nishang fairy’s eyebrows were slightly broken. After a long time, she suddenly said, “my soul… Has been melted…”

The soul melting is not a small matter, because most immortal dharmas are difficult to kill them physically when they practice in the immortal state.

Even if the body is destroyed, the spirit can escape from the heaven, find a way to give up and continue to survive.

But if the spirit is destroyed, it means that it disappears and cannot even be reincarnated It’s black water. It should melt the spirit. ” Qiuzili pondered for a moment and said. WOW! The friars around quickly moved away from the black water. Everyone is immortal, and nishang fairy is one of the highest accomplishments. Even she can’t resist the erosion of black water, let alone herself. The nishang fairy calculated that only a few tens of meters ahead, her spirit was melted by one tenth. If you want to pass through the distance of more than 500 meters, won’t your soul be melted completely? The crowd was again at a loss. It was not easy to find a way to get to the stone pillar, but the only way to live was also the way to kill them Master Tang, I know you must have a way! ” Nishang fairy suddenly looked at Tang Sanzang. She wants Xu vacancy to help these people get through the black water What? Solve these black water? ” Xu que was stunned after hearing this and thought that you might not be out of your mind. If I had a way, I would have run out directly. I still need to hang out with you here Master Tang, I know you must have a way. ” The nishang fairy looked at Xu que with hope, “otherwise, why is my spirit melted and you have nothing to do?” Xu Ke was stunned and suddenly reacted. Yes! Why are you okay Ding, the power of the host spirit is far beyond the immortal realm. This black water is only effective for the immortal realm and below. ” Oh, my feelings are too strong Do you have any props that can stop the black water? ” Xu que asked casually. After asking, Xu que felt that he had asked nonsense. It’s mostly bullshit about upgrading the system Ding, yes. ” Look, I said it must be an upgrade… What? Xu que was surprised: “are you so awesome in the system? Are there still such artifacts?” Ding, just exchange for a diving suit. ” Xu que: “……” the avenue is very simple, and I’m not deceived. Xu que put on a kind expression, folded his hands and said, “Amitabha, I suddenly found that there is a Buddhist holy weapon, the golden light is not bad, and the magic clothes for ward off evil spirits. Only ten immortal tools can be exchanged for one set.”

chapters.title: Chapter 1840
chapters.body:
Chapter 1840

Chapter 1840

C.1840

After all the difficulties and obstacles along the way, Xu Ke was a living Bodhisattva to save the suffering in the eyes of all the monks.

Don’t mention ten sets of fairy tools. Even if they have 100 sets of fairy tools, they are willing to take them out!

“Master Tang, these are my ten immortals!”

“Get out of the way and let master Tang take mine first!”

“Fuck off, what kind of rubbish are you? Master Tang, look at me. I’m a good one!”

All the friars gathered in front of Xu Wei and rushed to wave the immortal tools in their hands, trying to exchange the Buddhist Vajra not bad exorcism robe from Xu Wei first.

At this time, er Gouzi acted as a quality inspector, stopped in front of everyone, and said with a righteous waist: “give the immortal tools to our God first. Our God zunbo has been familiar with the past and the present. He is best at the inspection of immortal tools. Only those immortal tools that pass the inspection of our God are eligible to exchange for Buddhist Vajra… Vajra… Brother deficient, what did you just say?”

“Buddhist Vajra is not bad at warding off evil spirits.”

“Yes, it’s just the vestments. You smelly fish and shrimps want to exchange these pieces of copper and iron. It’s just wishful thinking!” Er Gouzi put his hands in his eyes and was arrogant, “bring me some good things! Is that clear? ”

Duan Jiude echoed: “yes, nothing can escape the eyes of the elder and the deputy leader!”

As for the nishang fairy and qiuzili, they also had no exception. They exchanged ten fairy weapons for diving suits.

The nishang fairy looked up and down at the diving suit. Her beautiful eyes flashed and looked very surprised.

This Buddhist dharma garment is not only light in texture, but also feels as if a strange force flows in it. Even in a dark place, you can see the flowing luster on it.

“The cost of refining this magic weapon must be amazing!”

Nishang fairy and qiuzili looked at each other and knew that each other must have seen the value of this magic dress.

After tossing for a while, I finally equipped most people’s vestments.

When Xu Weizheng was about to let the people follow him into the water, suddenly an angry roar sounded.

“Tang Sanzang, what you gave me is bad!”

When they looked back and saw Dongwuqi’s dress, one didn’t hold back and Qi laughed.

“Hahaha, host, why are you like this!”

Dongwu stood up impressively as a standard three-point style, covering only important parts, and all other places were exposed.

The second dog looked appreciative, thumbed up and said, “it’s good. It fits well.”

Duan Jiude nodded again and again: “this suit of Dharma clothes not only protects your body, Taoist friend, but also sets off your perfect figure. It’s just perfect!”

Dongwu Qi almost fainted with anger.

You two are lying with your eyes open. Won’t your conscience hurt?!

“Bastard!” Xu Wei suddenly roared and said righteously, “how can you laugh at our host so much?”

Hearing that Xu que spoke out for himself, Dongwu couldn’t help trembling.

Unexpectedly… He was so targeted at him that he was willing to speak for me!

It seems that… I misunderstood him before.

Then Xu que put on a kind expression and looked at Dongwu.

“My host, you have a special constitution, so I’m afraid you need double the magic clothes.”

Dongwuqi: ”

Or I think too much.

The dog thief really didn’t have a good heart.

After paying a full price of 20 fairy weapons, Dongwuqi finally changed into a normal diving suit.

“Now, gentlemen, it’s time to decide whether we can leave here.”

Xu que looks at a lot of immortal artifacts in the storage space and a large number of loading force values obtained recently. He is very happy in his heart.

He has made plans, and the system will be directly upgraded to version 15.0 at that time.

At that time, he will directly rush into the central Tianmen and beat the immortal emperors!

After everyone put on their diving suits, they gathered together and waited for the instructions of the nishang fairy.

The nishang fairy felt the tight robe around her body. Although she felt a little uncomfortable, she said in a deep voice: “everyone, next, follow master Tang. We can leave here soon.”

Xu que came out from the crowd, smiled and said, “since everyone values the poor monk so much, the poor monk will take pains to take you out.”

Then everyone began to dive underwater.

The structure of the lake is very strange. It can see things clearly underwater, so even if they don’t lean closely together, they can still ensure that they won’t be scattered.

In order to avoid encountering emergencies, everyone’s movement speed is not very fast. We can just observe the underwater situation.

Xu que glanced around, and suddenly his body shook. Where I don’t know how deep, a large number of black virtual shadows are floating slowly, like seaweed. What the hell? Xu Weizheng was ready to remind the people that these black virtual shadows suddenly rushed over at a lightning speed and surrounded them firmly This… “The two dogs reacted first and wanted to run out. However, without running twice, he was directly entangled by these virtual shadows and couldn’t move. All of them were in a panic and tried to escape from it. However, the magic fell on the virtual shadow, but it didn’t seem to have any impact, and disappeared without a trace System, check what this is! ” Xu lacked the first time summoning system Ding, this is the root of nightmare vine. ” Nightmare vine? What’s that? Before Xu Ke had time to ask, he was entangled by the virtual shadow. Even if he broke out with all his strength, chakra didn’t have any impact. The darkness gradually engulfed the vision, and the mind began to faint… “Ding… Detected that the host entered the virtual dream.” Ding… Virtual dreams try to block the system. ” Ding… The system automatically starts the defense mode… “Hiss! I don’t know how long after that, Xu que suddenly took a breath and sat up from low to high. The sky is a little dark, with a light rain, and a dense grass under the body. Xu Wei looked around. In the distance, he looked at the endless mountains and forests. He seemed to have returned to the top of the forest of chaos Strange, where are they? ” Xu lacked the subconscious calling system, but failed to call it out. Suddenly he felt something was wrong. He got up and went to the forest, trying to find the whereabouts of the people. Walking, a lake suddenly appeared in front of me. Xu que suddenly stopped and suddenly widened his eyes. In the lake, impressively, a beautiful woman is bathing Hiss… Amitabha, I’m an eminent monk. Don’t treat me with disrespect. ”

chapters.title: Chapter 1841
chapters.body:
Chapter 1841

Chapter 1841

C.1841

“Who?!”

The woman suddenly screamed, Zhou Xianyuan surged, and suddenly burst into large spray.

Xu que felt the breath and his face suddenly changed.

what the fuck!

Half step fairy emperor!

Where on earth is this special? It’s half a step fairy emperor who meets anyone who takes a bath!

Xu Ke subconsciously was about to run away. He glanced and suddenly saw an obscene figure hiding in the bush. His tail shook behind his ass and looked very familiar.

Without saying a word, he grabbed the tail with his backhand and jerked it up.

The oncoming face was a familiar face.

“Sleeping trough! Two dogs?! ”

Xu que was stunned: “why did you run out, don’t you come to me, run to peek at people’s bath?”

However, er Gouzi showed his teeth: “who are you? Don’t grab the tail of our God, be careful that our God’s arrogance will leak out and shock you to death! ”

Xu Wei was shocked at that time and thought that Er Gouzi, you are brave now!

How dare you open your teeth and claws at Ben?

Then he realized something was wrong, because no matter how brave the two dogs were, they couldn’t put this expression on themselves.

Is it amnesia?

“What’s your name?” Xu que stares at Er Gouzi’s eyes tightly, trying to see something.

Before Er Gouzi answered, the woman suddenly appeared behind Er Gouzi, with a cold face and a cold voice: “just now you two peeked at my bath?”

“Well, I saw the dog peeping at the almsgiver’s bath when I passed by. It was a terrible crime, so I specially took it down!” Xu Kuyi said in earnest.

Er Gouzi was shocked and said in a hurry, “boy, don’t talk about people. Is Ben shenzun that kind of dog?!”

The woman’s beautiful eyes immediately fell on ER Gouzi, stared for a moment, and suddenly showed an angry look: “it’s you! Magic Dragon God! Dare to appear! ”

Xu Xu trembled when he heard the name.

God, when did Er Gouzi have such a domineering name?

The woman directly slapped her back, and Xianyuan rolled, arousing startling waves. The whole space seemed to be shaking.

Xu Ke was stunned at that time.

“Sleeping trough! I’m still here! ”

As soon as the voice fell, the wave rolled over and hit them directly.

Feeling the surging Xianyuan, Xu Ke felt a rush of grass and mud running through his heart.

What luck is this… I met a half step Immortal Emperor when I landed casually.

I don’t know how far he flew. Xu que finally stopped. A prompt sound of the system suddenly sounded in his mind.

“Ding, the host is in a dreamland. According to Article 1 of the host protection code, the whole audience is free.”

All, all free?

Xu Xu’s spirit suddenly burst, and his heart blossomed with joy.

“Good brother, I knew you wouldn’t abandon me!”

“So, what the hell is this place?” Xu lacks a wonderful way.

“Ding, according to the test, this is the forest of chaos ten thousand years ago.”

Xu que: ”

What happened?

In the blink of an eye, I came ten thousand years ago?

“Ding, this is a fairyland. According to the system detection, you can break through the fairyland by reversing the ethnic fate here and interfering with the fatalistic line.”

Xu Wei was full of confidence when he heard the speech.

Joke, now the whole audience is free, Ben forced saint, what else to be afraid of?

Now he can be said to be God blocking and killing God and Buddha blocking and killing Buddha, let alone reversing the ethnic fate here. Even if he is allowed to rush to the central Tianmen to beat the Immortal Emperor now, he will not be afraid!

With that, Xu que began to browse the system mall to see what he could use this time.

After sweeping around, there is not much change from before. Spells such as the top ten supernatural powers are still among them, such as “unhindered and clean heavenly eye intelligence power”, referred to as “heavenly eye power”, such as “good knowledge of his mental power”, referred to as “his heart power”

The last time the whole audience was free, Xu Ke learned it, but he didn’t study it too carefully. After all, at that time, his realm was not even immortal Zun. Even if he mastered the ten magic powers in a short time, he couldn’t understand anything.

But this time it’s different. Not only has he become a Buddha, but also his cultivation has reached the mid-term state of xianzun.

Even if he is only in a dreamland, relying on the system to master these forces in a short time is enough to let him understand something.

It is also a powerful support against the Immortal Emperor in the future!

“Yes, yes, you have more and more eyesight.” Xu Xu nodded with satisfaction, “I know how to save lost users.”

After all, if you can’t afford to exchange what you want to use before, is there any effect on what you can afford to exchange.

If there is no change in the system, Xu Ke will almost ignore the existence of the system The system is in hand, I have it in the world! ” Xu Wei was so excited that he let out a long roar. Boom! Suddenly, a powerful force suddenly came from the forest ahead Who is making noise in our forbidden area! ” Xu Xu was shocked, his head hummed, his face turned pale, and his heart was very surprised. This is just the breath of xianzun’s peak, but it makes him feel oppression. Why were all the monks ten thousand years ago? One by one! Xu Ke couldn’t help wondering how such a brilliant monk ended up like that in the end? Up to now, he has basically guessed that the race here should be that in the forest of chaos, it has become a race of vines Who is ahead? ” At this time, a figure suddenly appeared in front of him. Xu Xu’s eyes burst out when he saw the man. It’s a beautiful girl. She has a good figure, slender, protruding and warping. Her skin is like fat, and her fingers can be broken. The point is that the girl didn’t wear clothes. She just covered some indescribable parts with a few broad leaves. As for other places, large areas are exposed to the air. Looking around, it’s all spring Cough… I’m a Buddhist of the fried heaven sect. I’m traveling all over the world. ” Xu que swallowed a mouthful of water and forcibly controlled his eyes not to glance around. When the girl heard the word “Buddha”, her pretty eyebrows wrinkled slightly: “Buddha? What Buddha? I have never heard of this name in xianyunzhou. ” Well, poor monk… Is a Buddhist monk, named Shakyamuni. ” Xu Ke’s heart jumped. Mom, is there no Buddhist inheritance now? Seeing the ghost, where did the special mother come from? The girl wanted to ask something else. Suddenly her face changed and she came forward and grabbed her missing arm Hey! Girl, men and women don’t get married. I’m a monk… “Don’t talk nonsense, the demon clan is coming!” The girl said anxiously. Demon clan?

chapters.title: Chapter 1842
chapters.body:
Chapter 1842

Chapter 1842

C.1842

They were standing outside a forest, only tens of feet away from the forest.

In this distance, a surge of evil spirit suddenly rose.

Xu Xu felt a very familiar taste from these magic Qi.

“Foreign demons?” Xu Ke subconsciously said.

The girl nodded and looked dignified: “yes, these guys have besieged our eternal forest for half a year, and no news can be transmitted.”

“What forest of chaos?” The girl looked puzzled, “this is the residence of my eternal family, called the eternal forest.”

“Amitabha, I have just succeeded the Buddha. I don’t know much about many things.” Xu que said slowly.

“Stop talking so much and hurry back to the forest!” The girl pulled her missing arm and ran in the direction of the woods.

Boom!

At the moment of their departure, several evil spirits suddenly rose and attacked them.

Xu Que’s pupils contracted, his hands folded, and recited the Buddha’s name: “Amitabha! King Kong is boundless! ”

Now you have your own system in hand. You can master it immediately after using the Dharma. You don’t need to practice familiarity.

At this time, what he used was the Buddha’s supreme power, eighteen golden Ganges and angry eyes, body protection and blessing method.

This method can resist all evils, so that it will not disturb your body, disturb your heart, or infect your soul.

Bang!

The magic Qi bombarded the Golden Bell and made a deafening roar, but it failed to disperse the golden bell.

“Who are you?” A sound like the friction of gravel came from the void.

Xu Duan folded his hands and said with a smile, “Amitabha, the poor monk’s Dharma name is nibaba. Benefactors, you can call the poor monk Baba.”

“Baba…” the voice murmured.

“Hey, my son is so good.” Xu Ke immediately replied.

The voice was silent for a moment and suddenly became angry: “bastard! Dare to take advantage of this devil. This devil wants you to die without a burial place! ”

I saw the black air spinning rapidly, and a moment later, it turned into several tall monsters.

These monsters are dark and three feet tall. Their body surface is covered with black scales, and their head is triangular. The scales and swords overflow strands of black gas. They look terrible.

“Boy, remember, the one who killed you is the demon general, makabaka!” The leader of the demon clan laughed wildly and beat his chest with his right fist, making a dull sound.

Xu Kuang was stunned and asked carefully, “Amitabha, with all due respect, does your mother hate you very much?”

On makabaka’s ugly face, a blank expression appeared: “mother? This demon has no mother. This demon is the third batch of demons born by the great heavenly demon ancestor! ”

“All your demons were born by the ancestor of the heavenly devil?” Xu que asked.

“Yes… What’s the problem?”

Xu que couldn’t help sighing: “cow! It’s amazing that you can have sex with yourself… No, asexual reproduction. Your demon clan is very advanced! ”

Hearing Xu Kuo praising himself, Rao Shima kabaka also showed an embarrassed expression: “Hey, actually, it’s not so advanced… Cough! Even if you praise the devil, the devil will never let you go! ”

Until these guys turned into human beings, Xu Ke was sure that these guys were the ancestors of the foreign demons he saw later.

Of course, it may be the foreign demons I met, but they all look the same, so I can’t tell who is who at once.

“Die!” Makabaka roared, kicked his feet violently, turned into a dark shadow and rushed towards them.

“Wait!”

Xu que stretched out his right hand and roared.

Makabaka urgently stopped his steps and shouted impatiently, “mole ants, what do you want to do?”

“No, you guys all look the same. I’m afraid I won’t find who is who later.” Xu que said sincerely, “think about it. If I lose and publicize your great reputation, I will always have an accurate description?”

Makabaka thought about it, as if it was the same thing, nodded and said, “OK, the devil mercifully tells you that the devil is the third batch of heavenly demons. The color of his scales is luxurious black and bright, and there are three silver lines on his chest.”

He patted his chest with a proud look on his face, as if he were very proud of his silver lines.

Xu Wei looked carefully. Except for this makabaka, there were no silver stripes on other foreign demons.

“OK, I have seen it clearly and can start.”

Xu que waved back and motioned the girl to stand away.

Seeing that he wanted to face these demons alone, the girl was surprised and said, “makabaka is the third batch of demons with strong strength. You can’t beat him!” Amitabha, I have justice in mind. Justice will prevail. ” Xu que stretched out his right hand and said in righteous words, “poor monk, don’t share heaven with evil!” Die! ” Makabaka roared, and the whole devil rose into the sky, wrapped in boundless black gas, and fell from the sky when he flew to the highest point. Boom! The roar rolled in, like a meteorite falling, and the air was almost luminous due to the terrible speed Ha ha ha! This is the magic’s unique skill, meteor star falling! ” Makabaka’s wild laughter came and echoed in the air. When the girl saw this move, her face changed greatly: “get out of the way! This move is makabaka’s famous stunt. No one below the half step Immortal Emperor can stop this move! ” However, the surrounding foreign demons surrounded the surrounding areas and sealed Xu Wei’s retreat. Facing the unparalleled power, Xu Ke took out a pack of cigarettes from his arms, lit it, put it to his mouth, took a sip, and slowly spit out a mouthful of smoke Hoo, just this move. The poor monk can block it with only one finger. ” He said faintly, his eyes looked sideways, and his whole body showed a temperament that was extremely cold at high places. Makabaka could not help hesitating when she saw this scene. The monk is not only handsome, but also so calm. Is what he said true? On second thought, no, impossible! No human friar can stop this with just one finger! Between the lightning and flint, the majestic black gas crashed down and stirred up boundless smoke and dust. A moment later, the smoke dispersed, and the eyes around became very frightened. Xu Duan stretched out an index finger against makabaka’s eyebrows, and the cigarette on his finger didn’t even drop the ash

chapters.title: Chapter 1843
chapters.body:
Chapter 1843

Chapter 1843

C.1843

Makabaka was shocked and looked at the young monk in front of her unbelievably. Her eyes, which had only one slit, stared round.

The monk, he really stopped it with only one finger!

How did he do it?!

“Boom!”

Makabaka quickly flashed back and stared warily at Xu que, for fear that the other party would suddenly attack while he was out of his power.

Holding a cigarette in one hand, Xu que took out a can of Sprite in the other hand, shook it gently, then put it under his nose, sniffed it twice, nodded with satisfaction, then took a sip and swallowed it into his throat.

Makabaka felt her soul shocked.

However, it is such a simple action that it is so smooth and full of elegant temperament.

Although foreign demons and human friars are sworn enemies, foreign demons will also maintain a certain degree of respect in the face of such friars who know that they are not simple at first sight.

“Human friar, you deserve to let this demon know your name.” Makabaka said solemnly, “tell me your name!”

“Amitabha.” Xu que spits out a mouthful of smoke and says faintly, “poor monk, Shakyamuni.”

“Good. Next I’ll show all my strength.” Makabaka squarely hugged and said, “please do your best.”

“Sure.”

Xu Wei thought, is this IQ still invading xianyunzhou?

Haven’t been killed yet?

What a miracle!

“I’ll give you three moves.” Xu que, carrying his hands, spoke softly.

“What?”

Makabaka’s face changed. Instead of getting angry, she became more cautious.

Among their demons, only the strong are qualified to say this.

When the strong say this, it means that he will show real strength.

The man in front of him actually knows this custom, which means he has studied extraterritorial demons quite thoroughly.

However, before he was ready, he heard a wind.

“Whoosh!”

The speed was so fast that it approached itself almost in an instant.

Before makabaka could react, she heard a loud noise blowing under her body.

Xu que had already swept in front of him, with a sneer on his mouth. The purple and gold long stick in his hand was wrapped with boundless lightning and crackled. It seemed to be extremely powerful.

Even a strong man like makabaka can’t help but feel a chill in his heart!

“Shameless human beings!”

Makabaka cursed in an instant.

What shit master!

Where is the master Gao sneaking attack!

Fuck you, calm down. Human beings are so shameless!

Makabaka wildly mobilized the magic Qi in his body, gathered in front of him, and even used the secret method of extraterritorial heavenly demons to condense a thick and unparalleled black gas shield to try to stop this attack.

Three generations of heavenly demons are powerful and unparalleled. Even though they were secretly attacked by Xu Wei, they came later and came first, forcibly condensing a black air shield.

“Hahaha! This is the secret method of our demon family, the mixed yuan demon gas shield. Even if the half step Immortal Emperor wants to break through… ”

Before he could show off, he heard a “click”, and several cracks suddenly appeared on the shield.

Hiss!

Makabaka took a breath and looked at the shield in disbelief. It was hard to imagine what she saw.

This is a mixed yuan magic gas shield condensed from the original magic gas!

How could it be broken by a punch?

“What did you say about the shield?” Xu que punched on the shield and asked with great interest.

Gulu

Makabaka swallowed a mouthful of water and said shakily, “Ben, the shield of Ben devil is even the half step fairy Emperor…”

“Oh, I see.”

Xu nodded his head and made a sudden effort. His powerful Qi burst out, and the Buddha’s light bloomed all over his body and blasted hard on the shield.

Boom!

The shield broke into countless pieces and scattered around.

One of the fragments swished over makabaka’s head.

Makabaka only felt the light on her head. She raised her hand and found that one of her horns was missing!

“Oh, it looks much better without a corner.” Xu que said with interest.

“Bastard! I lost a horn! ” Makabaka roared angrily, but quickly withdrew back to avoid a frontal battle with Xu Xu.

The monk’s strength has far exceeded his imagination. It is impossible to win Xu Kuan by himself.

“Are you roaring hot? Are you making a noise?” Xu que took out his ears and said impatiently, “no matter how loud you roar, no one will come to save you!”

With a laugh, Xu que was like flying and ran towards the foreign demons around him. Bang bang! After several muffled noises, the foreign demons flew out directly and fell to the ground. Their strength was not as good as makabaka. They had almost no strength to fight back against Xu Ke. They were directly beaten to the ground, and their scales and armor were broken and difficult to move. Makabaka was almost dumbfounded and thought when did human beings have such a strong man? No! Now all your human strongmen should be fighting with large forces outside the territory. Where does such a strongman emerge now Well, do you still want to play now? ” Xu que said with a smile. Makabaka’s neck was a stem and hard airway: “this devil is the leader of the devil. He is absolutely not afraid of any cruel punishment. Even if you can kill this devil, you can’t destroy his strong and unyielding will!” The girl behind her hurriedly said, “kill him! This bastard must be skinned and cramped so that he will never be reborn! ” Xu Wei looked at makabaka and the girl. He always felt a little strange in his heart. I don’t know why… I always feel that makabaka is more like a decent person… “Forget it, I won’t kill you. Go back and take a word for your boss.” Xu que squatted down and said with a smile, “he is limited to kowtow and apologize outside the eternal forest within three days, and announced to join the Buddhism. The poor monk can forgive his sins.” Asshole! A scholar can be killed, not humiliated! ” Makabaka said hard, “even if this demon is dead and jumps down from here, it is absolutely impossible to help you deliver a message!” Xu lacked a sinister smile on the corner of his mouth: “really… I want to see how hard you are!” After a while, there was crazy laughter in the forest Stop scratching! Stop scratching! I’ll send you a message! ” Makabaka was tied to the book, the soleplate of her feet was exposed, and she was tortured by Xu Gai scratching the soles of her feet. The girl felt cold when she saw this scene. This human friar is so cruel… You must not provoke him in the future

chapters.title: Chapter 1844
chapters.body:
Chapter 1844

Chapter 1844

C.1844

A moment later, makabaka escaped from the forest that frightened him with an unprecedented disgrace.

“Hey, some people don’t listen to what they say. They have to torture the poor monk.” Xu Wei folded his hands and looked compassionate. “I don’t want to. I’ve always been compassionate. All this is for world peace. Can you understand, benefactor?”

“Understand, understand, but master, what are you doing holding my hand?”

“Oh, I haven’t been here before. I’m afraid I’ll get lost.” Xu que calmly took the girl’s delicate hand and smiled.

The girl did not doubt him, nodded and continued to walk to the depths of the forest.

On the way, Xu que felt a little strange when he learned that the girl’s name was Rabdosia rubescens.

“Isn’t that the name of Chinese herbal medicine?” Xu lacks a wonderful way.

“Yes, we all use earthly Chinese herbal medicine as our name.” When the girl smiles, two tiger teeth will be exposed outside, which looks particularly cute.

Different from the dangerous forest of chaos in later generations, the eternal forest, as the predecessor of the forest of chaos, seems to be much more peaceful and peaceful.

Tall shrubs covered the sky, and the sun fell down from the cracks of the leaves, making people feel lazy.

Not far away, a few little beasts poked their heads out and looked here curiously, as if they were observing who had entered the forest.

“This is really a good place.” Xu que couldn’t help feeling.

After too much fighting and killing in xianyunzhou, Xu Wei suddenly came to such a peaceful place. He felt that his mind had become calm.

Donglingcao looked at him and said faintly, “the murderous spirit on you is too heavy. If you go on like this for a long time, it will be difficult to go in the future.”

“Yes?” Xu Xu looked at himself.

Where is murderous?

I always value peace. Well, I never disturb and kill.

“If you want to understand the road, you can’t be disturbed by the outside world.” Donglingcao whispered, “aren’t all immortal emperors like this now? Before you want to integrate the avenue, you are bound to choose a clean mind. Otherwise, how can you feel the Tao of heaven and experience the avenue? ”

And this one?

Xu Wei didn’t expect that a girl who wasn’t even a half step Immortal Emperor could know so much.

“You don’t know?” Donglingcao looked at him strangely, “your human friar, the way to cultivate the Immortal Emperor is to understand the avenue, and then replace it with your body. When you completely replace the avenue, you will become the Immortal Emperor.”

“Amitabha, the poor monk is narrow-minded.” Xu Kuang put his hands together and thought that in the world ten thousand years ago, it seems that most of the Immortal Emperor has left. He’d better take it easy.

Isn’t I free?

Take it easy!

I have a system, I am the strongest!

Looking at Xu Duan’s face changing for a while, Rabdosia rubescens couldn’t help covering her mouth and laughing, “your face is so strange, like a chameleon.”

“Ha ha… I’m not in good health.” Xu Wei looked deep in the forest, “how long will it take to get to the gathering place of your race?”

“Soon, right ahead.”

Rabdosia rubescens stretched out its green index finger and went straight ahead.

The space in front of them suddenly twisted, rippling and rotating like water waves, gradually revealing a channel opening.

“This……” Xu que suddenly widened his eyes.

What happened?

Is there an array here?

No! If there is an array, the system should remind me!

“Ding, there is no array here.”

Xu que was even more surprised when he heard the speech and suddenly looked at Rubus rubescens.

“Have you mastered the space Avenue?!”

Donglingcao was startled. Hearing Xu Xu’s question, she smiled and nodded: “this is the talent of our family. We can master the road from birth.”

Hiss

Xu que was so frightened that he took a breath of air-conditioning.

What kind of abnormal race this special mother is!

According to this principle, doesn’t it mean that once they are born, they are at least half step Immortal Emperor?

“Well… According to you human beings, we are indeed half step Immortal Emperor at birth.” Rabdosia rubescens bit her index finger and nodded for a long time, “but our cultivation is not so high.”

After listening to the explanation of Rabdosia rubescens, Xu Ke understood.

This race has mastered the avenue since birth, but they only have the ability to use the avenue.

In fact, you still need to practice from scratch.

This is like a child born will use a kilo axe, just need to grow up slowly and move the axe bit by bit.

Until the day when you fully own the moving axe, you can really use the avenue.

“It scared me to death. I wondered how such a strong race could be exterminated.” Xu Xu patted his chest and thought.

At this time, the two have crossed the vortex. In front of them is an endless grassland. There are a large number of wooden buildings built together in the distance. I think it should be their place of residence Grandma, I’m back! ” Rabdosia rubescens ran forward happily. The girl’s voice echoed in the air, and soon a mature woman came out of the camp. The woman has a good figure and is more conspicuous than Rabdosia rubescens. Her hair is tied high behind her head, revealing her slender neck like a swan Xiao Dong, it’s great that you’re safe! ” The woman looked at the back of Rabdosia rubescens, her face showing vigilance, “who is he?” Donglingcao hurriedly pulled Xu que over and said, “grandma, this is the man who saved me! His name is Tang Sanzang. He is a monk! ” Monk? ” The woman looked up and down at Fang Ling, bowed and said, “I’m in peace. Thank you so much for saving my granddaughter.” This bow is amazing. Suddenly, it is full of spring, which makes people’s blood expand. Xu kudeng took a breath of air-conditioning and subconsciously wiped his nose: “it’s all right… It’s easy to raise a hand. I’m always happy to help others.” Ah! Tang Sanzang, why do you have nosebleed! ” Rabdosia rubescens suddenly exclaimed. Xu Wei looked at his palm, quickly turned around and wiped it hard. Then he turned around and looked weak: “it doesn’t hurt. He just resisted those foreign demons and suffered some injuries.” The benefactor was injured! ” Hearing this, Shui Sabbath hurriedly took Xu Ke’s hand and walked to the house. “I happen to know a healing spell. Hurry into the house and I’ll treat you as a master.” After a while, Xu que stood in the room, looked at the scene in front of him, and subconsciously swallowed a mouthful of water Well… Sister Shui, it’s not right. I’m a monk. ” Shui Ping knelt down in the middle of the room and heard Xu Xu’s words with a strange look in his eyes What’s the matter, Grandpa? Come and lie down quickly. I’ll heal you. ” Then he patted his plump thighs. Xu que suddenly widened his eyes. Ah… So this is the test of fantasy? It’s too hard

chapters.title: Chapter 1845
chapters.body:
Chapter 1845

Chapter 1845

C.1845

“Cough… Forget it. I feel much better all of a sudden.” Xu que waved his hand and rejected the proposal.

“Well… Master, take a break first. There are still some things in the family. I need to deal with them.” The water rested and got up. With another burst of curve, Xu Ke’s eyes were straight.

Shit, is it too late to go back?

Looking at the back of the passing, Xu que sighed with regret.

“Alas, poor monk, why should I be so honest!” Xu Xu shouted, “I’m really a gentleman!”

Boom!

Suddenly there was a burst of thunder in the sky. Xu que was so frightened that he quickly stopped.

After looking at the weather, it didn’t look like rain. It should be drought and thunder.

“Shit, God, I’ll just shout. What thunder.” Xu Wei muttered, “people still can’t be too perfect. Now even God is beginning to envy me.”

At this time, Rabdosia rubescens walked into the room and saw that there was only Xu Duan. She wondered, “Tang Sanzang, where’s my grandmother?”

“Your grandmother…” Xu Ke still couldn’t accept that the woman was grandma’s business. “She said she was going to deal with the family affairs, so she left first.”

“Oh… It should be to arrange defense.” Donglingcao nodded and said excitedly, “let me show you around the family. There are few human friars here!”

Xu que thought for a while. Anyway, he couldn’t finish the task for a while. Just hang out here.

Just in time, let’s see if there is any place to bury treasure here. When we go back, we can dig it out along the place.

Ben forced saint is really a plan!

Led by Rabdosia rubescens, Xu que began to walk around.

“Our family has lived here since ancient times. It is said that a long time ago, the goddess of nature gave birth to human beings. She pinched people with soil and created human beings in the world.” Rabdosia rubescens happily introduced Xu que, “but later she found that humans have too many defects, so she chose the most perfect batch of humans and placed them in the eternal forest to make this place a pure land.”

Xu missing corners of the mouth twitched two times, but for a time, he didn’t know how to make complaints about the story full of holes.

Fortunately, Rabdosia rubescens was not as stupid as he thought: “of course, I know it’s false, but it represents the noble status of our eternal family, doesn’t it?”

“Amitabha, benefactor is right.” Xu que put his hands together and said with a smile.

He had heard a saying before. If he couldn’t make sense with someone, he agreed with him.

In this way, he will become a popular person.

Xu Wei thought that he was really a diplomatic expert who was good at communicating with others.

“By the way, you seemed very excited when you saw the dog just now. Did the dog do anything?” Xu que thought for a moment and asked.

Er Gouzi’s life experience has always been a mystery. It was confirmed that the guy was the ancestor of Duan Jiude, but he never found any trace after his previous experience.

Except when he was in the exterminating desert, er Gouzi said that he seemed to have been here, but he didn’t go deep into it because he was scattered by foreign demons.

Take this opportunity to find out what happened to the dog.

When you think about it carefully, Xu Ke feels like she can be found everywhere in xianyunzhou. The dog is haunted!

If those ancestors who tried hard to live with heaven learned that there was such a demon as Er Gouzi, I’m afraid they would spit blood with anger.

“That dog… It’s so annoying!” When Donglingcao heard the speech, she immediately scolded with indignation, “I saved it at that time. Unexpectedly, this guy was a scoundrel! It’s shameless! ”

“You saved it?” Xu Ke suddenly became interested, “talk about it?”

When Donglingcao saw someone listening to her complaint, she pulled Xu que to find a place to sit down.

It turned out that when Er Gouzi came here, he was seriously injured.

At that time, Rabdosia rubescens looked pitiful and simply brought ergouzi back to the eternal forest to treat his injury.

Unexpectedly, after the dog was seriously injured, he began to make trouble everywhere in the family, making the whole eternal family jump.

There are so many things like cheating, peeping and so on.

After about three months, it emptied the treasure house of the eternal forest and ran away.

No one knows how it found the treasure house.

Perhaps, this is another degree of keeping the original heart.

“This dog is insane and extremely evil. Its crime makes people want to eat its meat and blood raw.” Xu que looked angry and said in righteous words, “if I see this dog next time, I will skin it and cramp it, beat it hard, and send it to the fairy to vent her anger!”

chapters.title: Chapter 1846
chapters.body:
Chapter 1846

Chapter 1846

C.1846

The treasure house is in the west of the eternal forest. They used to need to cross the whole eternal forest.

I want to know with my toenail. It must be that guy who found something good here, so he specially marked it and waited for him to come back in the future to dig it out.

“It feels like there’s been a battle here?” Xu Xu looked around and found that there were traces after the battle everywhere.

Donglingcao nodded and said, “yes, we were often invaded by foreign demons before. It seems that there have been fewer foreign demons since Er Gouzi came here…”

She thought for a while and suddenly said, “it seems that after Er Gouzi left here, foreign demons ambushed outside the forest at most, and never came in again.”

Xu que hears the speech and has some guesses in his heart, but he is not sure yet.

Through the whole eternal forest, they came to the treasure house of the eternal family.

The entrance is a tree cave. When you enter the cave, Rabdosia rubescens clicks somewhere on your side. The light lights up from your side and spreads in a ring, gradually illuminating the whole cave.

“Winter girl, is this your treasure house?” Xu que looked at the treasure house and frowned, “did you really take the wrong way?”

“How is that possible?!” Donglingcao drank in shame and indignation. It seemed to realize that there were few people in the treasure house. In fact, it gradually lowered, “that’s… We don’t take care of it very much, and we were robbed by the dog before…”

Generally speaking, for convenience, the treasure house will number and display items, not to mention sorting and placement, as before Tiangong academy, and even protective array, but you must at least have a shelf?

No, nothing.

Looking around, there is basically nothing in the treasure house except three or two weeds.

“The aristocrat is really…” Xu Ke thought for a long time. He was stunned that he couldn’t think of any serious adjectives, “simple and generous.”

In other words, poor.

Donglingcao also knew that there was nothing in their treasure house, and muttered that she didn’t know what to say.

The lights on both sides of the treasure house are very soft. Xu Xu walked around the treasure house for two times and always felt something was wrong.

“How long did it take Er Gouzi to take away your treasure house?” Xu que asked.

Rubus rubescens puffed his mouth angrily, thought about it and said, “there should be an hour or so…”

An hour?

Xu Kuan was stunned. The speed of two dogs stealing was too fast to hide their ears. They couldn’t catch up with their horses. How could they stay in the treasure house for so long!

After two more rounds, Xu que suddenly felt shocked and showed an incredible look in his eyes.

This is a special mother’s array!

The whole treasure house seems to have no property. All kinds of sundries are placed on the ground, including stones, weeds and wood blocks.

But in fact, Xu que sees clues from these things. After all, he has learned from Er Gouzi for a while before.

According to the current form, there is a transmission array and a seal array in it.

What the hell did Er Gouzi do here?

Xu Xu asked intentionally and unintentionally: “in other words, I don’t think there is any protective formation in this forest?”

“We don’t learn the array,” said Dong lingcao with a slightly broken eyebrow

“No? Why? ”

“We are born to master the road, and the array is of little use to us.” Rabdosia rubescens said honestly.

Xu Kui thought for a moment, which is also the truth.

Generally speaking, the array forms a certain regular force with the help of the natural force of heaven and earth, which can also be said to achieve the effect of controlling rules with the help of external forces.

Since you naturally control the road, you don’t need to learn arrays anymore.

“Well, there’s nothing to see. Let’s go.” Xu que waved his hand, then turned and swaggered away.

Donglingcao saw that he suddenly left and hurriedly followed his footsteps.

After two more rounds in the forest, Xu Ke always wanted to find the hole of the forest of chaos. After all, they were trapped in it in later generations.

But after looking for a circle, Xu lacked and gave up the idea.

That afternoon, he was warmly received by the eternal family in the tree house in the forest. It can be said that the people of this family are quite friendly to outsiders.

During the banquet, he even prepared quite wonderful and exciting song and dance performances, which made Xu lack feel deeply.

Unexpectedly, there was such an advanced idea ten thousand years ago, which was lost in future generations!

This is really the loss of cultural treasures, which makes people heartache!

It was night. Xu que was lying in the tree house, thinking about the day.

I deliberately let that foreign evil devil go. I think it won’t be long before a large army will crush the border.

After all, I don’t have so much time delay. Now I don’t know how far the time flow rate in the dreamland is from the outside world. If the delay is too long, I’ll find myself dead as soon as I go back. That’s a tragedy But the eternal family seems a little strange… “Xu que turned over and muttered. They were so enthusiastic. This is unusual. A race that can survive under the invasion of the demon clan and still maintains such a large population should not be so wary of outsiders. What if you were pretended by the demon clan? What’s more, how can those friars who have no profit and can’t get up early be indifferent to such a race that naturally controls the road? Thinking, I suddenly heard a slight sound behind me. Xu Ke turned over and stood up, and his magic power had condensed in his hand: “who?” The whole system is free. During the day, Xu que has mastered the ten magic powers. Now he has reached his heart. Whoever dares to come here is a great magic power, which will destroy you. I saw a girl in white standing at the door. Under the shadow of the moon, her body seemed to shine, her pretty face turned red, and her skin was like jade, which could be broken by blowing. It’s Rabdosia rubescens What are you doing here? ” Xu que was relieved to see that he was an acquaintance. I saw the winter lingcao blushing, and murmured a moment later: “I, I come, come to sleep with you…” Xu lacks feeling that he has heard wrong, and after confirming that the other party is not saying false words, he looks up and down on her clothes. A white dress was wrapped from head to foot, covering the whole body from top to bottom, not to mention the beautiful spring, and even the skin didn’t leak Alas… Will you test the poor monk with this? ” Xu que, with a righteous face, whispered in righteous words, “which monk can’t stand such a test?”

chapters.title: Chapter 1847
chapters.body:
Chapter 1847

Chapter 1847

C.1847

Obviously, Rabdosia rubescens had never heard of such an advanced stem. She thought Xu lacked looked down on herself and her face turned red.

Seeing her standing at the door, neither entering nor retreating, Xu sighed: “come in.”

Finally, he added, “close the door… No, lock it.”

This kind of thing, of course, can’t have external interference!

How many elders, all of a sudden, were interrupted by intruders.

It’s impossible for ben to let this happen.

Donglingcao watched for a long time, and finally came to Xu Xu’s side and sat down.

The window was not closed. The moonlight splashed in and reflected on her like a dream.

Looking at these amazing people sitting beside them, Rao Shixu Ke has well substituted himself into the identity of a monk, but his heart is still surging.

I can’t help feeling that there are too many temptations in this world. There are bad people among the masses

“I’d like to know if there are any strange customs among nobles? For example, the new guests will let the most beautiful girl in the family have a night of friendly exchanges with them, so as to promote bilateral diplomatic relations and achieve the realm of fish and water blending? ”

The girl was confused by this series of words. After a long time, she murmured, “actually, grandma asked me to come…”

So you didn’t volunteer, but forced?

Damn it, such an excellent tradition has not been inherited in future generations?

The lack of traditional culture is terrible!

Xu que recalled the vines that could be seen everywhere in the broken cave ten thousand years later, as well as the friars who were used by vines as human flesh batteries. Then he looked at the bright red and delicate young girl in front of him, and his heart was more determined to save the eternal family.

“Why did your grandmother do that?” Xu que asked.

Dong lingcao said, “in fact… The children born in the family in recent years have a lower and lower level of understanding the road. It is said that the newborns born some time ago are no different from ordinary people. My grandmother said that this is because there are problems with the reproduction method adopted in our family, so we need to try other reproduction methods…”

Xu Wei was stunned and felt that his world outlook had been greatly impacted.

Shouldn’t it be your parents’ physical problems that the newborn has problems?

It has something to do with the way of reproduction!

Have you fed the concept of scientific fertility to dogs… Oh, there is no science in this world, that’s all right.

“No, what was your previous… Breeding method?” Xu Wei thought of vines and thought that he had never seen a man in the family during the day. He vaguely had a bold idea, “wait, where’s your grandpa? I don’t seem to have seen your grandpa!”

“I don’t have a grandfather.” Rabdosia rubescens naively said, “I only have grandma.”

“What about your parents?”

“I don’t have a father, only a mother, but I was killed by a foreign demon last time.” Rabdosia rubescens said strangely, “there are no men in our family.”

Xu Xu almost determined his own idea: “are you making friends with yourself?”

“I don’t know what selfing means, but I can show you how we reproduce.” Rabdosia rubescens excitedly picked up Xu Que and walked out, “come with me!”

“Hey, it’s not good. It’s a very private thing. I’m a monk who is divorced from low taste. I’m not interested in this kind of thing…”

A moment later, they stood in front of a huge plant.

From the appearance, the plant looks like a vine, but the vine is very thick and about the width of being surrounded by two people.

“This… Is that what you call your second aunt?” Xu que looked up and down at the vines, stunned that he couldn’t find the human form from above.

Don’t say it’s human, not even with the word people.

“Yes, today is when she has a baby.” Rabdosia rubescens said excitedly.

Subsequently, Xu Xu witnessed the detailed production process of vines. In short, just like dandelion, there were not so many offspring, only a small vine fell off.

In the twinkling of an eye, the tiny vine grew in the wind and turned into a little girl of about two or three years old.

Xu Wei was almost stunned.

Mom… What an advanced way to reproduce!

It is the pioneer of human society!

“What’s wrong with this way?” Xu kuhao said strangely, “if it was this way of reproduction, you should have occupied xianyunzhou long ago.”

Now he knows why all the eternal races have become vines in the forest of chaos in later generations.

They were vines at the beginning!

Donglingcao shook his head: “it’s useless. Our family can produce once every three years, and the survival rate is very low. According to grandma, our way of reproduction will gradually reduce the blood concentration, so now the offspring will gradually lose the ability to master the road.”

Xu Weizi thought carefully. In fact, this situation is understandable. After all, strictly speaking, the descendants of the eternal family are actually differentiated from the first vine. After generation by generation differentiation, the reduction of blood force is also normal, just like mixing water into wine. If you mix more wine, it will become water. Then, Rabdosia rubescens looked at Xu Ke eagerly and said sincerely: “in fact, in my generation, the blood concentration has been very low. I can only place my hope on the next generation and hope that she can have better qualifications. Master, you are a human with extraordinary qualifications recognized by your grandmother… So I hope you can help me.” Xu Xu almost spit out a mouthful of water at that time. He can say what he wants so sacred. The eternal family is also a person. In the face of such a huge temptation, Xu Ke thought twice and finally refused I am really a man full of justice. ” Xu missed thinking. The main reason is that this is a dreamland. If it is not necessary, he doesn’t want to happen in the dreamland. Is there any difference between this behavior and relying on YY to get satisfaction? Ben has several wives. Is it necessary to do this? It’s a pity to hear that Xu que rejected him, and said he would continue to work hard. After leaving the observation site, Xu que simply didn’t rest and began to arrange around the forest. Foreign demons will start a counterattack in a few days at most. They have to be fully prepared. After all, the power to force the eternal family to stay in a closed place should not be underestimated. After a busy night, Xu que wiped his sweat, straightened up and looked at his layout with satisfaction As long as those foreign demons dare to come, don’t go! ”

chapters.title: Chapter 1848
chapters.body:
Chapter 1848

Chapter 1848

C.1848

In the twinkling of an eye, two days passed.

Xu Ke spent two happy days here. When he got up every day, he had to face a large number of eternal people who were as beautiful as flowers.

Of course, there are still some minor pain in these days.

After all, a young, beautiful, white and beautiful girl follows you every day and asks for a fit.

Who can resist this temptation?

Xu Ke sometimes wants to challenge his weakness, but his firm belief has kept him true.

During this period, he spent a lot of time studying the array left by Er Gouzi. This guy will not leave the array in the eternal family for no reason. There must be something fishy.

After two days of research, Xu que finally understood the effect and principle of this array.

In short, it is a seal array. Taking this place as the core, it seals the whole forest, thus blocking the invasion of foreign demons.

Under this seal array, there is a transmission array, but the array is directly connected to an extremely distant place.

Without breaking the array, Xu Ke doesn’t know where to connect.

“Well… Just go and have a look.” Xu que touched his chin, so he set up a transmission array in the treasure house again.

It’s just that this array is used for feedback. After all, you have to come back after you go to the transmission location.

When everything was ready, Xu que directly opened Er Gouzi’s transmission array without saying hello to anyone.

Their own arrays are learned from Er Gouzi. They are both from the same school and can naturally control the arrays set by it.

The micro awn rose and the scene began to blur.

Xu que only felt his head faint for a moment, and then came to another boundary in the twinkling of an eye.

The roaring wind, looking around, covered with yellow sand.

Feeling the familiar breath under his feet, Xu que couldn’t help being stunned.

Shit, isn’t this a special god killing desert?

How did Er Gouzi connect the transmission array settings here?

Before he got used to it, there was a violent vibration at his feet.

Boom!

A dull voice came one after another, a huge virtual shadow rose into the sky, and the yellow sand covered the sky, immediately obscuring the vision.

Without saying a word, Xu que stepped lightly under his feet, quickly left his place, came to a place several feet away, and finally saw the shape of this thing.

At this look, he was stunned.

“This… What’s the situation?”

In front of him is the foreign demon Xu que met when he went through the trial in the Buddha domain and mistakenly entered the God killing desert!

After ten thousand years, seeing this demon again, Xu lacked a sense of dislocation.

“Hahaha, this demon finally broke through the boundary left by the damned demon Dragon God!”

The deafening laughter echoed in the whole desert, shaking the gravel. Xu kuanrao is now in the middle of xianzun, and he also felt his head buzzing.

“Do you call spicy? Do you make Sen loudly!” Xu Xu shouted impatiently.

The foreign evil devil made a move, and his huge eyes like a copper bell looked at Xu Duan, with an obvious hesitation: “human friar? Why are there human monks here? Shouldn’t you all fight with my demon army outside the sky now? ”

Hearing the speech, Xu que put one hand on his waist and said bluntly: “I heard that there are important figures of the demon family here, so I came here specially to check.”

The foreign evil devil sneered: “a fairy in the middle stage also wants to come and subdue this devil? It’s too much for yourself! ”

Although there is a time interval of ten thousand years, it is obvious that this foreign evil has not been sealed for too long. Unlike future generations, after ten thousand years of sealing, its power has weakened.

At this time, is at its peak.

Xu que can obviously feel the strong and arrogant breath from the other party, which is almost suffocating.

Yo Ho, quite arrogant!

Even if you were arrogant before, now you dare to be arrogant if you force the saint to give the whole audience free of charge?

“Amitabha, no one has ever dared to pretend to force me in front of the poor monk. I suggest you kowtow and admit your mistake.”

Finally, Xu que added, “even demons can’t do it.”

Foreign demons seemed to hear something funny and laughed wildly: “if you want to make this demon kowtow and kneel, it depends on whether you have this ability!”

In an instant, the evil spirit rolled like a dark cloud over the city, covering the sky.

Boom!

The huge palm, with the momentum of destroying the sky and the earth, probes down from the clouds to crush Xu into ashes.

Xu que smiled faintly, put his hands together and recited the Buddha’s name: “Amitabha, let me walk on behalf of heaven today!”

After saying that, he suddenly burst into a rich golden light 1, and stubbornly propped up a pure land in the dark.

“Supernatural power – the great array of Luofu demons.”

A Buddha’s true shape with a size of thousands of feet condensed in an instant and firmly supported the huge palm. When the foreign demons saw this, they couldn’t help laughing: “this palm is only three points of the devil’s skill. Why don’t you hold it?” Don’t worry, there’s more. ” Xu que smiled, hands apart, raised to his head, “array falls.” Boom! After the black cloud, a golden light burst out in an instant. The golden light spread rapidly, and the black cloud was completely wrapped in the twinkling of an eye. A statue of angry King Kong appears in the clouds, which is countless times larger than the true shape of the Buddha just now. King Kong’s palm slowly fell towards the foreign demons, and the whole world was trembling Ha ha, do you think you can trap me? ” Foreign demons have begun to panic. Nima, such a big King Kong! Who the hell is this dead bald donkey? Then he heard a voice that frightened him There’s more. ” I saw Xu Ke with a smile on his face, his hands closed on his head and formed a formula. Bang! Do not know how far away in the void, suddenly burst out a dull sound. Through the sky, you can see a Buddha faintly. The Buddha statue is infinite and can hardly be described in words. Just one palm is enough to cover all the sky above. Whether it was just the magic Qi giant palm or the later statue of King Kong, it was as small as an ant in front of the Buddha! Foreign demons are stupid. Is this special? How is it possible?! Foul! Human friars still exist? Then why did you fight with our foreign demons for so long and kill us directly?! The strong air pressure fell, the sky turned red, and the world turned gold. No matter how hard the foreign demons struggle, they can only be reluctantly sealed back into the depths of the desert by the town. Before the body completely disappeared, the foreign demons issued a final roar: “who are you?” Xu que thought for a moment and said with a smile, “I’m the father of Buddhism, Sakyamuni!” I will remember you… “With the disappearance of foreign demons, the last cry gradually dissipated. Xu Weizheng is preparing to start the return journey of the array. He suddenly realizes what the problem is. Doesn’t it mean that the foreign evil demon released by himself was actually sealed by himself? What is this? The world is a circle

chapters.title: Chapter 1849
chapters.body:
Chapter 1849

Chapter 1849

C.1849

“Will the system, what I do in the dreamland, have an impact on the future?” Just in case, Xu Ke decided to check with the system.

This time, however, the system did not reply immediately.

After a long silence, the system slowly said, “Ding, this place… Is in a state of space-time entanglement. The system can’t judge whether it will have an impact.”

Xu Ke was stunned. It was the first time he heard the reply from the system, and he took uncertain hesitation.

“So this is not a pure fantasy?” Xu que asked.

“Ding, the system cannot recognize it. If you want to make a more accurate judgment, please upgrade it. At present, it has exceeded the function of the system.”

“I lost it!”

Xu que gave a frustrated scold and gave up questioning.

Especially after he came to xianyunzhou, Xu lacked a feeling that he was unable to do what he wanted.

Not because of their own strength, but with the improvement of their own strength, the enemies they meet are becoming stronger and stronger, and the system has begun to fail to keep up with itself.

In the past, no matter what happens, as long as the system starts, it can be won in minutes.

But now we have to rely on ourselves most of the time. The system has gradually evolved from a treasure house to a knowledge base that provides troubleshooting.

Now, even the effect of knowledge base will not work.

Leaving these complicated thoughts behind, Xu que started the return array.

Before leaving, he took a deep look at this place, suddenly remembered something, and hurriedly asked, “system, is there anything that can be immortal for ten thousand years?”

“Ding, yes.”

“Exchange it for me quickly!”

Xu que redeemed a space-time capsule directly from the system.

According to the system description, this space-time capsule can be maintained for tens of thousands of years without any damage.

Before the array was completely launched, Xu que quickly arranged a small array on the space-time capsule, and then threw it into the desert.

If it is really related to future generations, you must be able to find this space-time capsule in the God killing desert.

After all this, the array starts completely and the light and shadow flow in front of you.

A moment later, Xu que returned to the treasure house.

Before he could stand firm, he heard a roar of fury.

The grief of that voice was as strong as that of a wife who had been cheated by her ex girlfriend for three years and later married on a blind date. She also rolled up her family property with her lover and ran away. Finally, she found that even her children were not her own.

Hearing the voice, the man cried bitterly: “who moved the array of God! Who is it? ”

Xu que was suddenly happy and looked in the direction of the voice. It was Er Gouzi.

As soon as he saw Xu Xu’s appearance, he immediately rushed up with a ferocious expression: “are you? It’s not you! You moved the array of God! ”

“Your teleportation array sealed a foreign evil. I just went to have a look.” Xu Wei said casually, “aren’t you so sad?”

“Bah! Do you know that the transmission array is matched with the seal array, which can seal the foreign devil in it. It only takes 20000 years to refine the foreign devil into an unparalleled natural material and earth treasure! ” Er Gouzi obviously lost his intelligence and even said his purpose.

Xu que smelled the speech and said, “don’t tease me. Your array can’t seal the foreign demons at all. I forced Sheng to go in and clean your ass and easily seal the foreign demons again.”

With that, he saved Er Gouzi’s neck, regardless of where he punched and kicked, and walked out of the treasure house.

As soon as he came out, Xu que was stunned.

“What happened?”

The originally peaceful forest has turned into a sea of fire. There are burned trees everywhere. The vines clinging to the trees make a painful groan.

On the ground, dead eternal people can be seen everywhere. There are pits and scars bombarded by spells everywhere.

Xu Que’s eyes turned red and ran quickly towards the tree house.

Along the way, he saw many dead eternal people, all of whom were full of evil Qi. It was obvious that they were killed by foreign demons.

“What’s going on? Isn’t your seal array able to prevent the demon clan from entering? ” Xu Shao grabbed Er Gouzi and asked fiercely, “how can foreign demons break in?”

Er Gouzi was also very angry. Unwilling to show weakness, he bared his teeth and said, “you are deaf. As God Zun said just now, the seal array is matched with the transmission array. If you use the transmission array, the seal array will naturally fail!”

Xu que heard the speech, and his head seemed to be hit by a heavy hammer.

Damn it… It was because of myself!

Although this is a fairyland, he has been with these eternal people for several days, and Xu que has also forged a deep friendship with them.

Now seeing those eternal people who died miserably, Xu’s lack of heart seemed to be caught and was extremely uncomfortable No hurry, no hurry, there is still room for redemption. ” Xu Kui took a deep breath and continued to run towards the tree house. He used to exchange props from the system and gave them to Rabdosia rubescens just in case. He spent a lot of money to exchange it. Even the Immortal Emperor’s attack can resist for a quarter of an hour. Now only believe that the system product must be a high-quality product. After flying for a while, the tree house soon appeared in front of us. Xu que fell down and hurried into the tree house. At a glance, he saw Dongling grass and shuiruyi, and his heart was relieved. When Donglingcao saw Xu Duan coming, she panicked and said, “Tang Sanzang, foreign demons don’t know why. They suddenly attacked on a large scale, and we weren’t prepared for it for a while, so…” Xu Duan waved his hand: “I saw it. What’s the situation now?” Fortunately, I responded in time, gathered most of the people together and stayed with the array you gave, master Tang. ” Shui Ruyi answered, “but this array can’t stop for too long. At most, in another quarter of an hour, those foreign demons will rush in!” The eternal people present were all worried. Although they had fought against foreign demons for so long, they were essentially a peace loving race. Now the disaster of extermination is coming, and everyone’s face is full of the word fear What should I do? Are we going to die today? ” Who will save us… “Damn foreign demons, they are bastards!” Xu’s face sank like water. He walked out of the tree house and looked at the sky Don’t worry, I’ve already been ready. Don’t be afraid anymore. ” He smiled at the corner of his mouth, “all the fear comes from the lack of firepower. Today, the poor monk will show them what unlimited firepower is

chapters.title: Chapter 1850
chapters.body:
Chapter 1850

Chapter 1850

C.1850

The sky is full of foreign demons.

At a glance, it was like a locust.

The first to bear the brunt is makabaka, who was eaten by Xu Que’s men before.

After several days of cultivation, his injury has recovered completely. Now he looks more fierce. He is also covered with a layer of black and gold armor, as if he has been fully prepared for battle.

Seeing Xu que coming out, makabaka laughed and said, “monk, today, our army of demons will destroy the eternal family. You can’t stop us!”

Xu que didn’t speak, but raised a middle finger at makabaka.

After years of fighting with human beings, makabaka is well versed in local customs and naturally understands the meaning of the middle finger.

Seeing this, he immediately became angry from his heart, waved his big hand and said, “all the little ones, rush for me! The destruction of the eternal family is today! ”

With his command, countless foreign demons in the sky swooped down like fighter planes.

In fact, most foreign demons have no human form. Only generals at the command level like makabaka have human bodies.

Most of the foreign demons that dive down now are similar to ladybugs, but they are all black and have a lot of magic Qi attached to them.

Buzzing, buzzing!

Tens of thousands of foreign demons swooped down. Just seeing this scene makes people feel numb on the scalp and burst all over.

Xu Ke seemed not to be stupid and stood still.

The second dog son held his head and shouted in panic: “it’s over. Ben shenzun will explain here today. Ben shenzun can’t die. Ben shenzun hasn’t left his descendants yet!”

The eternal family who had expected Xu que to save them did not respond at all when they saw Xu que, and despair filled their hearts.

“What happened to Tang Sanzang?” Rabdosia rubescens asked in a low voice.

Shui Ruyi came to her and looked at the sky with calm eyes: “master Tang, we should be at a loss. This is the final destination of our eternal family…”

She was ready for death.

“Unfortunately, my strength is too weak to drag these foreign demons along…”

At this time, Xu que finally moved.

He took out a control board from behind with countless control buttons on it.

“Finally in range.” Xu lacked a smile from the corner of his mouth, “have a good experience of the feast of firepower!”

Then he pressed his finger on one of the buttons.

Zi -!

At the moment of pressing, a sound similar to current flow began to sound in the whole eternal forest.

Then, countless ground and tree trunks opened to reveal the objects in them.

It was a black barrel, most of which were covered, but the barrel alone had made people feel a cold killing intention.

Xu que laughed and said, “welcome fear, Ollie!”

Bang! Bang! Bang!

Countless barrel designs were launched at the same time.

A large amount of artillery fire went straight into the extraterritorial demons in the sky, and each ammunition smashed an extraterritorial demons.

In almost a short period of time, the first batch of foreign demons rushed in and destroyed the whole army.

Makabaka looked silly and was shocked.

What the hell is this?

Xu Wei smiled proudly and pressed the second button.

A black barrel several times larger than the other barrel rose slowly from behind the tree house and pointed at makabaka.

“Amitabha, this is the Nanwu Gatling cannon made by the poor monk. It’s a shell piercing depleted uranium bomb!”

The voice fell and there was a loud noise.

Bang!

The huge fireball, wrapped in countless golden lights, flew straight to makabaka.

The speed is three points faster than lightning. It’s almost at the time of an idea.

However, his speed was not as fast as ammunition after all, and he was directly hit by the front.

Boom!

A gorgeous spark burst out in the sky, and a dark shadow fell straight from the air like a meteor.

“Hum, how dare you threaten the poor monk?” Xu que sneered.

He spent a lot of money to exchange countless mechanical fire devices from the system, and then transformed these devices through the system.

Of course, it mainly took time. After all, it is now free.

If the transformation of these firepower devices requires at least hundreds of millions of installed force value when it is normal, he can’t take it out.

However, the power of wealth is huge. After the transformation, these firepower devices not only have a significant increase in attack speed power, but also have a powerful lethal effect on foreign demons.

This is why he had to provoke foreign demons and let them go. If you want to help the eternal family destroy the enemy, you can’t take people to the territory of foreign demons to find fault, can you? The best way is to lead the enemy. It’s a pity that he failed to count. Er Gouzi set up an array in advance to block the attack of foreign demons. I happened to break the array again, which led to today’s situation. This may be fate. Xu que thought for a while, and the more he thought about it, the more angry he felt. If Er Gouzi hadn’t been there with many hands and feet, how could his plan have gone wrong? Without Er Gouzi, foreign demons will invade, they will be vigilant, and they will help the eternal family set up an array in advance. Naturally, they will not suffer heavy losses like now. Shit, it’s all about the dead dog To NIMA, it’s all because of you! ” Xu que put his foot on ER Gouzi’s ass and scolded angrily. Er Gouzi was kicked in a daze. He thought that it was not because you destroyed the array that you let foreign demons invade? Why is it on me? But looking at Xu Que’s murderous face, er Gouzi dared to be angry but not speak, as long as he was in his heart. With strong firepower support, foreign demons can’t invade at all. Xu Xu also took the people of the eternal family and began to fight against those isolated foreign demons. There are free blessings for the whole audience. Xu Ke almost exists at the bug level. Kill one by one. God blocks killing God and Buddha blocks killing Buddha. Soon, the first batch of invading foreign demons were killed. Fortunately, he also found makabaka who survived the bombardment by a giant gun Oh, you have a hard life. You’re not dead? ” Xu Wei looked at the foreign devil who was almost blasted into coke and sneered, “are you satisfied now? Dare you come again? ” br>

chapters.title: Chapter 1851
chapters.body:
Chapter 1851

Chapter 1851

C.1851

“Still special, demon!” Xu Xu slapped makabaka’s face, “you’ve been caught. You should dare to pull it in front of the poor monk!”

Although races are different, the humiliation of being slapped is common.

Makabaka’s eyes widened at that time, and her black face became even darker in an instant, just black and shiny.

Xu Xu is a little surprised. This foreign evil is different.

“You dare to humiliate the devil like this. The devil will not let you go!” Makabaka roared angrily and struggled.

However, he was half paralyzed by one shot. Now he moved like a big cockroach.

“Two dogs.” Xu lacked one finger and two dogs. “Take this guy down and torture him!”

“Yeah? Why did God come? ” The second dog looked surprised and said, “why do you want to listen to you?”

“No?”

“No!”

Xu que smiled, leaned down and said in a voice that only two people could hear: “if you don’t go, I’ll tell Shui Ruyi the marks you made in the eternal forest…”

The second dog took a breath of air-conditioning, pretended to be calm and said, “you, what are you talking about? I don’t understand.”

“Water…”

“Don’t worry, give it to my God! Let this guy spit out everything! ”

The two dogs jumped up, grabbed makabaka’s neck and ran behind.

While running, you also make a gesture to Xu que. That means you should keep your promise.

Xu que nodded with a smile and thought that I would give you something to dig out. It can be regarded as keeping my promise.

Donglingcao stared at Xu que with a surprised look on her face and asked, “why does the damn Magic Dragon God listen to you so much?”

“I told him that if he was willing to help, he would be thanked by the eternal family.” Xu que said without changing his face, “then he ran away happily.”

“Really…”

Rabdosia rubescens is just silly, not stupid. In the face of Xu Ke’s obvious perfunctory answer, she expressed doubt.

Xu que hurriedly turned off the topic: “anyway, you call him the Dragon God. Is he really a dragon?”

Xu Wei has always been curious about this. After all, no one has ever seen Er Gouzi’s real body.

But there is one thing Xu Ke has always kept in mind.

When Er Gouzi faced Hai Zu that year, he was confused and became violent on the spot. He directly gave Hai Zu seconds.

In terms of combat effectiveness, the dog is not without strength, but simply lazy and counselled.

Donglingcao shook her head when she heard the speech: “I don’t know. He always claims to be like this. I’ll take him as a.”

Well, I still don’t know the origin of Er Gouzi.

At this time, Shui Ruyi walked over and bowed: “thank you, master Tang, for saving our eternal family.”

“You’re welcome. My Buddha is merciful. I’m here to help the eternal family.” Xu que put his hands together and said, “but the makabaka shouldn’t be lying. I’m afraid the demon king will come soon. I don’t know what the noble plans to do.”

He hoped that he would kill the devil with a great magic power, but even makabaka was just a big general.

In addition to the news heard in the extermination desert before, now most human friars are fighting with foreign demons. Think with your toes, you should know what strength the demon king is.

Even the Immortal Emperor took part in the war on a large scale. According to the traditional custom, the demon king is at least the peak of the Immortal Emperor and even the existence of Taoist Zun.

Even if you have mastered the great magic power, you still need to consume chakra to display it.

That little chakra, maybe a big magic power will disappear after it is released, and the devil who farts.

Hearing this, Shui Ruyi also showed a worried look: “I don’t know which demon king will come. According to my pursuit, the lowest cultivation of the demon king is also the second Immortal Emperor. It seems that there are eight immortal emperors at the top. We have no strength to compete with it.”

“Two immortal emperors?” Xu Xu feels as if he is going to hear something great.

“Well, above the Immortal Emperor, there is the Taoist Zun. Master one avenue and replace it with the Immortal Emperor.
