If you can start to set foot in the Second Avenue, you will move towards the road to the Taoist Zun. Mastering ten avenues is the Taoist Zun.” Shuiruyi said strangely, “don’t master Tang know these things?”

“Amitabha, I naturally know.” Xu Wei was shocked, “but I didn’t expect the strength of the demon clan to be so strong.”

Mom, the Immortal Emperor is still strong and weak!

If you think that you can master ten roads, what kind of cruel person is that?

He glanced at the firepower devices he had installed and asked the system, “system, if you use these to fight the Immortal Emperor, can you win?”

“Ding, the probability of defeating one Immortal Emperor is 60%, the probability of defeating two immortal emperors is 10%, and the probability of defeating three immortal emperors is 1%

The Immortal Emperor system in the future didn’t say, but Xu Ke understood the meaning of the system. More than three immortal emperors can’t fight at all, so it’s meaningless to say so. But the problem is that the success rate of these two and three immortal emperors has fallen too far! It has dropped directly from 50% to 10%, and there is only 1% in Sandao! This can only illustrate one problem. If you master multiple roads, your strength will increase geometrically. The cultivation of the foreign devil in the exterminating desert is probably between the half step Immortal Emperor and the one Immortal Emperor. Xu can suppress it, on the one hand, the valve is awesome, and two is that the evil spirits outside the country should have been hurt before, and the power of the two dog’s seal has been wasted. Rao is so. Before Xu Ke used the great magical powers of the valve, he almost consumed all the power in his body. Otherwise he would have to use these firepower devices? Go and kill makabaka yourself! The makabaka is only half a step away from the Immortal Emperor. It’s not as good as exterminating the foreign demons in the desert HMM… so my current real combat power should have been able to crush the half step Immortal Emperor without using the Zhengqi seal magic Sutra. ” Xu que touched his chin and thought, “if you use Zhengqi to seal the magic Sutra, you should be able to resist the Immortal Emperor. You still need to continue your efforts… Can there be four immortal emperors in xianyunzhou…” “as for the existence above the demon king, the thorn water should be dragged by the top strong among human friars, and you won’t be interested in our eternal family.” The meaning of water emulsion continues. Xu Ke was stunned and suddenly reacted. What the hell? What’s on top of the devil? br>

chapters.title: Chapter 1852
chapters.body:
Chapter 1852

Chapter 1852

C.1852

Xu was a little dumb for a while, but he was not surprised by the existence of demons.

He was surprised that human friars could resist demons.

In other words, there are actually nine immortal emperors and even Taoist zuns in xianyunzhou now!

Thinking of later generations, four immortal emperors can dominate xianyunzhou, but ten thousand years ago, these immortal emperors were just like wholesale. Xu Ke couldn’t help feeling in his heart.

Shit, according to Darwin’s theory of evolution, shouldn’t humans evolve?

Why do human friars become so weak after ten thousand years!

On second thought, Darwin talked about science, and there was no science in the fairy world.

“Why don’t the nobles choose to move out of here?” Xu que suggested.

Anyway, to interfere with the fate line of the eternal family, the easiest way is to get them out of here.

It’s really not good. Now Tianzhou under Xianyun island should still be in good condition. You can go directly to Tianzhou and stay there.

The strength of the eternal family is not weak. At least it can walk horizontally in Tianzhou, which is a little barren.

However, to Xu’s surprise, Shui Ruyi shook her head and showed hesitation: “we… Can’t go.”

“At the moment of life and death, don’t think about hometown feelings.” Xu Wei thought she would not give up the forest, so she didn’t go.

However, Shui Ruyi waved his hand and said, “it’s not this reason… It’s because we can’t go.”

“Can’t go?” Xu Xu understood, “can you only live here?”

Shui Ruyi nodded and motioned Xu que to follow her.

They walked through the forest and came to a place Xu Ke had never arrived.

The surrounding woods are far more dense than other places. The head is full of dense branches and leaves, and only the faint sky light falls through the gap.

“What do you want me to see?” Xu Wei looked around and saw nothing but a mountain wall.

Shuiruyi showed an indescribable expression and pointed to the mountain wall: “this is it. This is what I want you to see.”

Fang Ling was stunned: “what’s good on the mountain wall?”

“This is not a mountain wall.” The next second, Shui Ruyi’s words shocked Xu Ke, “this is our eternal ancestor.”

The Eternal Father?

“Ha ha, you are all vines. Xiao Dong told the poor monk…” halfway through, Xu Xu suddenly stopped.

He suddenly realized a terrible thing.

As for the high place, I can’t see where the vine has grown, and the top has been submerged in the clouds.

But when you feel it carefully, you can find that the vines are full of strong vitality, just like an old man.

The eternal family can only survive under the protection of the eternal ancestor. Without the eternal ancestor, they will soon die even if they move.

“This is unscientific!” Xu que could hardly understand the Luo family. “What’s more, I didn’t see this before!”

Before, outside the forest, let alone vines, he saw only blue sky and white clouds.

Shui Ruyi explained that only in this forest can we see the existence of the eternal ancestor, which can not be seen elsewhere. Then they left the forest, and Xu que paid special attention. Therefore, only a fixed area can be seen. At present, life has entered the end. If there is no alternative core, it will die of old age naturally. ” Hearing this theory, Xu Ke had only two words in his heart: advanced. This creature is almost comparable to the gods Well, it seems that we can only help you get things done. ” Xu lacked a hand. He wanted to solve it easily. It seems that he still has to make great efforts to decorate it. So, in the next period of time, Xu Ke was crazy about moving things out of the system, and what advanced moved out of the system. Anyway, they don’t need money. Use it if you can. At the end of the move, even the system can’t stand it. Remind Xu que to do what he can. Xu Kegen didn’t take it seriously. He moved out and asked the system to transform. Anyway, he spent some handling fees for the transformation. Then, five days later, the whole forest has completely changed. This time Xu que did not cover up. Countless steel fortresses stood in the forest, just like a huge military factory Hey, you have to give the system awesome, that’s the emperor. Chapter 1853

Chapter 1853

C.1853

On the third day after Xu’s transformation, the devil came.

Compared with makabaka, the arrival of the demon king seems to have no card face.

In the sky, three slender black figures appeared in front of the eternal family, without the slightest fierce breath, just like an ordinary person passing by.

“Here is the eternal family?” The demon king in the middle said faintly.

Obviously, these have the way of information transmission that Xu lack doesn’t know.

These foreign demons seem to have understood what happened here.

Not far away, makabaka, who was hanged, saw this and shouted in surprise: “Lord arudo! You’re here at last! Crush this humble mole ant to death! ”

Xu que looked up at each other, nodded and said, “welcome to the devil. Here are all the gifts prepared by the poor monk for the devil.”

The demon king in the middle, called aludo by makabaka, looked around and sneered, “have you hidden the eternal family?”

Xu Duan folded his hands and showed his compassion: “Amitabha, put down the butcher’s knife and become a Buddha on earth. Benefactor, don’t kill in vain. Why do all the creatures in the world kill each other?”

Arudo frowned: “where is the bald donkey so noisy?”

Compared with makabaka, arudo’s magic Qi is obviously more concise. With the naked eye, it looks like a black pillar, straight to Xu deficiency.

Before his eyes, Xu lacked had felt the smell of destruction.

At the critical moment, a large amount of golden light suddenly surged under Xu que, the complex array patterns lit up in turn, and the golden barrier appeared to block the black gas.

Dang!

The violent sound of gold and iron echoed in the air, and the barrier trembled constantly.

Xu Ke felt the power from the barrier, the surface was calm, and his heart had already turned over.

Sleeping trough… Is the devil so fierce?

Seeing that he had no power, Aruba obviously hesitated. After a moment, he said in a deep voice: “you have arranged a good array. Do you want to stop me with this array?”

“Of course not. I always believe in only one truth.” Xu Wei said with a smile, “the best defense is attack!”

The voice fell, and countless dark barrels were raised and aimed at the three demons in the sky.

Boom boom!

The roar exploded, and countless guns tilted out like raindrops.

Under Xu Ke’s transformation regardless of cost, these firepower devices have reached their limit, and a large amount of artillery fire is covered by three evil kings in an instant.

All development has not deviated much from Xu’s plan.

Although the eternal family is located in a remote place, it is ultimately located in the hinterland of Xianyun island. Even foreign demons cannot enter the country.

The group of foreign demons brought by makabaka should be all the military forces that have been recruited.

Therefore, if the devil wants to come in person, he must come alone.

Of course, in addition to the tax reduction of three demons at once, Xu vacancy was a little surprised.

“Er Gouzi, do you think these firepower can kill these guys?” Xu que narrowed his eyes and couldn’t see the situation inside.

The second dog skimmed his mouth and said, “what dream do you have? The demon king is an Immortal Emperor level strong man. You can’t really kill them unless it is crushed by the strong man of high realm or killed by the strong man of the same realm. ”

“According to what you say, isn’t it impossible for the low realm to cross the border and kill the high realm?” Xu que frowned.

“Of course!” The second dog looked at the hillbilly, “do you know where xiandiqiang is? The strength is that they can use the power of the road, that is, the power of the law in the ordinary population. The road will not die, and the Immortal Emperor will survive forever. Therefore, unless you have the power to break the road, you will die, that is, you will break their bodies and spirits, but as long as you give them time, you can resurrect. ”

Xu Wei was stunned. The Immortal Emperor realm was too special.

According to this, don’t you think you can’t kill these demons today?

“That’s not necessarily. If you have the ability, you can break their flesh and spirit.” The second dog took out his ears and said casually, “even if the Immortal Emperor level strong man, his body and spirit were broken and resurrected by relying on the avenue, it should take hundreds of years.”

“I see.” Xu nodded and suddenly looked at Er Gouzi unkindly. “Now there is a glorious mission for you. Are you willing to complete it?”

Seeing this, er Gouzi immediately became vigilant: “what do you want? I told you in advance that I don’t have the power to help you fight the demon king. It’s a strong man at the Immortal Emperor level! ”

Xu que has listened to these words for thousands of times. Every time the dead dog meets a strong man, it is this virtue.

But it’s incredible that no matter what level, he said he couldn’t fight, but he survived. It’s outrageous “No?” Even if you kill this God and let this God jump from here, don’t think that this God will help you clean up those demons! ” In this way, the poor monk just dug some natural and earth treasures recently and directly used them as the power source of the fire device. That’s a good thing… “Shang! Don’t leave the demon army. God wants you to die today! ” The love of treasure finally made Er Gouzi overcome his fear of the devil. This spirit is really admirable Arudo and the other two foreign demons felt extremely absurd at this time. One by one, with two and a half steps, the subordinates of the demon emperor were stopped by this seemingly harmless firepower device? Bullshit! He waved off a fired gun. Arudo was impatient: “you two, go around and kill the human!” Although the gunfire didn’t do much harm to him, it was annoying to have too many flies Yes! ” Two foreign demons nodded, flashed, and rushed out of the gunfire. However, as soon as the two demons disappeared, there was a scream Bastard, where are you playing… Ah! ” You beast, it’s too much… Ah! ” What followed was Er Gouzi’s arrogant Laughter: “you shout! You still want to cry in front of God! I don’t know! ” Arudo was shocked. They were his two strongest Pro defenders. Even if they worked together, they couldn’t win it for a while and a half. Before he took any action, he suddenly felt his lower body cool, and suddenly a sharp pain came from his double strands. I saw two dogs holding a long knife, stabbing into it, saying something in his mouth br>

Chapter 1854

Chapter 1854

C.1854

Humanoid foreign demons are almost the same as humans in physical structure.

You know, even if you are the Immortal Emperor, you can’t bear some pain!

“Ah! Asshole! ”

After taking two dogs away, arudo didn’t even have time to mend the knife. He quickly repaired his injured place with magic Qi.

The double income from body and mind made the demon king really angry.

On the other side, Xu que was still watching the war. He saw two dogs falling directly from the sky and falling to the ground like a meteor.

“Oh, I fell to death…” the second dog son climbed out of the hole and said angrily to Xu, “I’ve finished my task. Return my heavenly material and earth treasure quickly!”

Xu que looked up and down at Er Gouzi and said with a smile, “what genius treasure? I don’t know what natural materials and earth treasures are. ”

Two dogs immediately stared: “lying in the trough! Smelly monk, you want to default, don’t you? ”

“Amitabha, I only said that I would use Tiancai and Dibao as fuel, but did I say that you would give Tiancai and Dibao back to you if you dragged the demon king?”

Er Gouzi was speechless for a while. Compared with shamelessness, he was still weaker after all.

“Do you have any pain?” Xu que asked.

The second dog son covered his head angrily: “Ben shenzun’s whole body hurts. He feels like he’s going to die. Hurry to get a hundred pieces of Tiancai Dibao to help!”

“Oh, it seems that it’s all right.”

Xu Ke was a little frightened. The two dogs were hit by the Immortal Emperor. Nothing happened.

Who is so capable that you can beat Er Gouzi seriously?

This dog is not a pet of special Niang or Taoist emperor, is it?

Boom!

While he was thinking, a roar suddenly broke out in the sky. The surrounding artillery seemed to be blocked by something, and exploded far away.

The boundless evil spirit surged wildly, like a long river, blocking all the firepower around.

“Today, the eternal family will perish!” Aludo was like a demon God in the world, with a ferocious look in his eyes.

Xu que sighed, folded his hands and said, “Amitabha, it seems that I still need the poor monk to do it in person…”

Aludo was stunned and thought he had heard wrong.

A little immortal Zun in the middle stage wants to do it with himself?

Is the human monk out of his mind?

“If you are a mole ant, the devil can use one finger…”

Before he finished, a dark shadow flew in front of him at a speed that was too fast to cover his ears.

Bang!

The heavy force slammed into aludo’s chest and made him step back.

Aludo was surprised. He looked at Xu Que in front of him and said in surprise: “your power is so amazing. It seems that you are qualified to fight this demon.”

Xu que grinned: “it’s not over yet… Zhengqi seals the magic Sutra!”

In an instant, a circle of air waves broke out around his body, his eyes gradually turned red, a faint golden and red lightning arc appeared, and even silver hair began to grow on his head.

Of course, Xu Xu originally had hair, but now it’s just that the disguise of bald head has been removed.

Feeling Xu Ke’s rising breath, arudoden changed his face.

“What kind of skill is this! Why can it be so powerful! ”

In his perception, Xu Ke’s current power has been infinitely close to the Immortal Emperor, and even has reached the point of an Immortal Emperor!

How is this possible?

You should know that the Immortal Emperor can crush friars in other realms because after mastering the avenue, the increase of power is completely geometric multiple.

And with the power of the road, as long as the friar is still under the heaven, he will be restrained by the road.

Even if you are a gifted immortal, as long as you haven’t set foot in the avenue, no matter how evil you are, you can only be eaten by the Immortal Emperor.

The power of the two is not a level of existence at all.

However, Xu Ke now feels like a real Immortal Emperor Hey, now let’s have a good fight! ” Xu Kuan’s mouth grinned with an exaggerated and strange radian, just like a crazy devil, suddenly punched out Bang! ” The fist fell directly on arudo’s chest, but it formed a violent strength and suddenly burst out. Everywhere the fist strength goes, the void collapses, just like the glass is covered with dense cracks, and even a few wisps of void vigorous wind pour into it! Aludo’s face turned white. With his physical strength, he also felt severe pain from his chest! It’s horrible! This human friar is enough to threaten the Immortal Emperor just by his physical strength! Although he is only the weakest existence among the demon kings, he should not be an existence that immortal Zun can threaten! A strong sense of humiliation spread from the bottom of his heart. Aludo burst out: “bastard!” After that, he raised his fist and began to bang with Xu Xu. Like wild animals, they began to punch madly in mid air. Aludo is crazy, Xu Ke is more crazy than him! Relying on the recovery function of the system, Xu que doesn’t dodge aludo’s fist at all. Even if he gets a hard punch, he still has to hit. After the Qi sealing magic Sutra is applied, not only the strength and speed increase greatly, but also the whole body is strengthened. What’s more, the power that drives Zhengqi to seal the magic Sutra is chakra formed by the three in one of Xianyuan magic Qi and Buddha power, which is even more amazing! After several rounds of bombing, aludo was shocked to find that he didn’t seem to be Xu’s opponent This, this is impossible! ” Arudo’s eyes were full of incredible look, “you’re just in the middle of xianzun. How can you draw with this demon!” People… Oh, no, demons have to learn to accept reality. ” Xu que sneered, “if you can’t fight, you can’t fight. There’s nothing to lose face.” Looking at the rapidly rising installation force value in the system, Xu Ke is satisfied. br>

Chapter 1855

Chapter 1855

C.1855

One man and one devil fought fiercely in mid air, which was earth shaking, and even the space was distorted and broken.

Two dogs stared at the chaotic sky and swallowed a mouthful of water: “Mom… Is the dead monk so fierce?”

At the thought of pointing at this guy’s nose and scolding, er Gouzi felt a burst of emptiness in his heart.

Mom… This guy won’t come back and settle with himself, will he?

Shuiruyi and Rabdosia rubescens were even more shocked.

They didn’t expect that a human monk brought back out of kindness actually had the ability to save the eternal family.

This makes their hearts surge more and more!

“Granddaughter, if you can live today, you must repay master Tang.” Shuiruyi’s beautiful eyes were full of gratitude. “If it weren’t for master Tang, today we would be an eternal family, I’m afraid we would be destroyed.”

“Yes!” Shui Ruyi nodded hard and looked more seriously into the sky.

It seems that you want to engrave the wild and uninhibited figure firmly in the bottom of your heart. Remember to be deeper and deeper

In the sky, the two have fought hundreds of rounds.

After another fist touch, the figure suddenly separated.

Arudo was already covered with scars. In the confrontation just now, he was not as strong as Xu, whether it was strength, speed or even the strength of his body.

If we continue to fight, the body will be unable to bear it!

“Who the hell are you?” In arudo’s fierce roar, he even took a touch of panic, “human friars don’t have your skill at all!”

After all, he had fought with human friars many times before. If human friars had this kind of skill, it is estimated that the Tianmo family would have been shit long ago.

Think about it. A immortal in the middle of the immortal Zun could rely on his kung fu against the Immortal Emperor.

What if the Immortal Emperor mastered this skill?

Xu Kuan grinned: “of course, you Hicks don’t have any experience. This skill is one of our fried sky gang. Everyone in our millions of fried sky Gang is as powerful as me!”

“Fried heaven Gang? When did such a force appear among human friars? ” Aludo knows a lot about human forces, but he has never heard of the name of the bombers.

Especially when he heard that there were millions of people in the sky bombing Gang, arudo widened his eyes.

“No, it’s impossible. Xianyunzhou doesn’t have such a force at all, and your skill can’t appear in xianyunzhou…” aludo seemed to think of something and said in horror, “you are a man in the divine domain! I see. You must be a friar in the divine domain! ”

Xu Kuan was stunned. He thought he didn’t say anything. He deceived you casually, and even the character background was automatically completed for me?

It’s really reassuring. It would be nice if every foreign evil devil were so reassuring.

“That’s right. I’m the biggest force in the divine realm. I’m a member of the heaven bombing Gang!” Xu Kuang put his hands together and said, “I have justice in my heart. I can’t bear to see xianyunzhou’s life ruined, so I came to the underground to save all the people in water and fire!”

The words were solemn and awe inspiring. Shui Ruyi and others who watched the war below were moved to tears.

In fact, Xu Ke didn’t feel well in the battle just now.

Although he fought this aludo head-on with the seal of righteousness and magic Sutra, after all, he crossed two great realms, and the chakra consumption in his body was as fast as that of te Niang.

If there were not forced King fist and forced King leg, and the magic powers in the system were free, it is estimated that he would have a draw with an Immortal Emperor at most by virtue of pure strength.

“Well… If you are promoted to the peak of xianzun, you should be able to hit an Immortal Emperor on the ground.” Xu que thought.

At this time, aludo has calmed down and looked at Xu Xu’s eyes with great dignity: “the devil admits that you are very strong, but it’s not so easy for you to kill me.”

The voice fell, and he suddenly received the seal with his hands. The magic Qi around him flowed wildly, and a mysterious feeling gradually spread.

“Ding, warning! Warning! The enemy is using the power of the avenue. Please interrupt quickly! Please interrupt quickly! ”

Before Xu Ke reacted, the system began to give a crazy early warning, and even used a flashing red warning.

In other words, the system has determined that even with Xu’s current strength, once the other party uses the power of the road, he can’t beat it.

Xu que did not say a word, but finished printing at the same time. Then his palms turned to the sky and suddenly pressed down: “great magic power – valve Luofu magic palm!”

Chakalaton in the body is like opening the gate to release water. It is frantically lost, and even the automatic reply of the system can’t catch up!

Soon, chakara saw the bottom, and the palm was completely pressed down!

An incomparably huge Buddha’s virtual shadow appeared outside the sky, which was enough to cover the whole heaven and earth. With the power of destroying heaven and earth, it was pressed down!

Arudo is still exerting the power of the road. He feels the power from his head. He looks up and directly frightens three souls into the sky! What is this?! Is there such a move in the world? Xu Wei was tired and grinned: “Dear devil, can you stop this 30-year skill?” After that, the whole man fell directly to the ground. At the moment of Xu’s fall, the giant palm came with a bang Impossible! ” Arudo roared, his eyes were red, and his body burst into unparalleled magic Qi! In an instant, a huge ghost appeared behind him, which was more solid than the ghost condensed by the foreign demons in the exterminating desert. The demon God raised his palms and suddenly supported them to the huge palms in the sky! Boom! The invisible air wave spread in an instant, overturning almost everyone. The deafening roar echoed. It seemed that there was only one sound in heaven and earth, and all the other sounds were overstocked. I saw that the demon God stubbornly resisted the giant palm! Although arudo seemed to have no power to fight again, he survived in the end Hum… Hum, mole ants… “Arudo looked down at Xu Kuang, and a proud smile appeared on the corner of his mouth.” it’s too early to kill this demon… “Xu Kuang sighed when he saw this scene:” sure enough, his strength is too weak, otherwise he can’t use it at all. ” Then he took out a controller from his arms and slapped it on the top. Several flames rose, and dozens of missiles with nuclear pollution signs flew towards arudo The nanwuxidi nuclear bomb made by the poor monk is given to Lord Mojun for enjoyment! ” Then he got up and walked towards shuiruyi and others. br>

chapters.body:
Chapter 1856

Chapter 1856

C.1856

The raging fire seemed to burn the whole sky.

The invisible air waves rolled and spread around, turning everything into ashes wherever they went.

After systematic transformation, modern top science and technology has become a double combination of fairy law and science and technology, and its power is far more powerful than the nuclear bomb in reality.

When Shui Ruyi saw this scene, his eyes were full of panic: “no… we are too close and will be involved soon!”

This powerful firepower can even completely destroy the body of the Immortal Emperor, let alone those eternal people who don’t even have the realm of the Immortal Emperor.

However, Xu Ke just smiled faintly and said with his hands folded: “Amitabha, my Buddha is merciful and will not hurt you.”

After that, take out the remote control and press all the buttons together.

Boom!

Hundreds of powerful arrays were formed, and one light curtain after another covered the center of the explosion, like a turtle shell after another.

Rao is how the raging fire rushes, but he can’t break through the array all the time.

The coming heat wave rolled back again after encountering the array. It turned out to form a cycle, just like a rolling fire Lotus!

When Shui Ruyi and others saw this scene, they were surprised and couldn’t close their mouths.

“What kind of array is this? Can you even block such a powerful spell? ”

They have no concept of nuclear bombs, but think that this is the powerful immortal method exerted by Xu que.

“Amitabha, this is an absolute defense array developed by the poor monk with countless efforts.” Xu que smiled faintly, “so you don’t have to worry. When the power of immortal Dharma is completely dispersed, the array will disperse.”

Shui Ruyi calmed down, gave a gift to Xu for lack of money, and said softly, “thank you, master Tang. My family will remember this kindness forever.”

Then she took out a stone and gave it to Xu que.

“What is this?” Xu que looked at the stone and felt more familiar. Suddenly, his body was shocked, “is this the Tao grain stone?!”

“No, this is the ancestral stone of Tao pattern.” Shui Ruyi said with a smile, “it seems that master Tang should know the origin of this stone. Our family is rich in Taoist grain stone. If you want to come to master Tang, you should know the difficulty of picking Taoist grain stone. However, with this stone, you can not only sense the existence of Taoist grain stone, but also completely ignore the time deceleration of Taoist grain stone. This thing is given to master Tang as a witness of our friendship.”

“Hey, it’s not appropriate, it’s not appropriate…” Xu que said, and put the Taoist pattern ancestral stone into his bag.

Anyway, they are all things in the dreamland. I don’t know if I can take them out.

One side of Rubus rubescens, blushing, came over and handed out a box: “master Tang… This is, this is my body… The condensed crystal core is for you.”

“Your noumenon nucleus? Is it of any use? ” Xu que opened the box and took a look. There was a green spar in it. There seemed to be light swimming inside.

Xu keleng was stunned. Although he said he had system recovery, he had encountered too many injuries before, resulting in no way to recover quickly.

“Does this supplement vitality… Have a strong effect?” Xu lacks a wonderful way.

“In mortal words, it can be called life and death, human flesh and bones.” Rabdosia rubescens vowed, “as long as you haven’t died, you can survive!”

“Well, thank you so much…”

Xu Ke’s voice just fell, and the picture in front of him suddenly began to become blurred.

“What happened…”

Xu que realized that he should pass the customs.

He waved to Rabdosia rubescens and smiled: “see you in ten thousand years…”

Suddenly, a strange force suddenly hit, instantly repulsed him and fell into the endless darkness.

In this darkness, countless pieces of the picture float by from the side of the body, just like a sea of stars.

Xu Xu feels as if he has been for a long time, but it seems that he has only been for a moment.

When he woke up again, he found himself still underwater.

“The fantasy is over?” Xu que looks around, but he doesn’t find Ling nishang and others.

“Ding, warning, warning, there are five-dimensional creatures nearby. Please pay attention to the host.”

At this time, the system suddenly issued a crazy warning signal, and Xu was a little confused when he was absent.

What the hell! This red warning comes twice in less than a month!

Don’t want anyone to live!

“Young man… I can’t see. I woke up very fast…” the voice seemed to ring directly in my mind. Xu xudeng gave a pep talk when he was absent.

What monster! In Ben’s mind?

“… would you like to look down?”

Xu que heard the speech and looked down. An unspeakable trembling feeling immediately rose from the soles of his feet to the top of his head.

Not far from his feet was a huge head. He was above his head, just like the difference between humans and ants. Looking deep, the vast body was hidden in the dark water, and there was no end at all. Hiss… The fish is too big… The voice suddenly became angry: “you are the fish! Your family are fish! I am Meng Kun! ” Xu Ke was stunned. What is mengkun Ding, mengkun is a five-dimensional deity, or a product of the divine world, not owned by xianyunzhou. ” The system replied. Xu que looked at the behemoth below that was enough to completely lose hope, and wondered again in his heart: how could mengkun appear here? The voice laughed twice: “how did it appear… You can go and have a look by yourself…” the voice fell, and the muddy water surged up from the depths and whirled around the deficiency. For a moment, Xu que entered a strange state. A large number of pictures flowed in front of him at an extremely fast speed. However, Xu Xu was able to remember the pictures he had seen. Although his own nuclear bomb washed the land and killed arudo, it only wiped out the other party’s flesh and soul, and arudo still escaped. But in the eternal forest, it has suffered no small impact. Because of nuclear radiation. The most advanced technology from modern times will also have an effect on people in the fairy world. Soon, the eternal forest changed and a large number of eternal people died. In order to preserve the last eternal people, Rubus rubescens, who has become the head of the clan, chose to move into the underground. However, it was not a long-term plan for the vines to enter the ground. Finally, Rabdosia rubescens came up with a unique idea and thought of a way to make Xu lacked marvel at it. She integrated herself into the body of the eternal ancestor, became the new core of the eternal ancestor, went to the top of the vine and brought back mengkun. Then, using mengkun’s ability, all the spirits of all the people were transferred into the dream, while the body remained outside to form another form of immortality……. br>

chapters.body:
Chapter 1857

Chapter 1857

C.1857

Seeing this, Xu que was completely shocked.

Originally, all the vines here are actually the original eternal people?

No, I’m not in a dreamland… Wait!

Xu Wei suddenly thought of one thing, which was explained by the system before. At that time, he was in the space of dimensional chaos. Whether it would have an impact, even the system could not be tested.

He settled his mind and continued to look down.

After Rabdosia rubescens brought it back to mengkun, it has been raised for thousands of years. During this period, the eternal people have lost a lot of staff.

At the same time, the once eternal forest also changed its body due to nuclear radiation, and began to spread wildly in the forest. Countless Tao Wen stones began to grow. At the same time, various places of time chaos began to appear because the eternal ancestor was out of control.

Thousands of years later, mengkun entered his childhood and had the ability to make dreams and accommodate people.

Therefore, the eternal family began a long migration process

After reading all the pictures, Xu Ke’s body shook and returned to reality again.

Looking around, he could vaguely see a large number of vines entangled together, which should be the surviving people.

“How’s it going? Boy, what do those pictures say? ” Meng Kun’s curious voice came.

Xu Ke was stunned: “you are a dreamer, don’t you know?”

“Those fragments belong to sister Dong. I have no right to check them.” Mengkun was a little depressed. “In fact, as a customs clearance, I can’t even check your dreams.”

Xu Weiran, this should be the restriction set by Rubus rubescens himself, which only allows customs clearance personnel to check.

But the question is, do you really travel through time and space?

According to the current situation, everything is caused by oneself. It is because he went to the eternal forest ten thousand years ago that he led to the emergence of today’s chaotic forest.

But if you don’t choose to enter the holy Moon Palace and choose other immortal regions to participate in the Tianmen competition, will you still enter here?

Vaguely, Xu que felt a kind of existence called fate.

All fate will go to the final destination. Even if I don’t participate in the Tianmen competition, I think there will be other reasons to come to this place.

Xu Xu didn’t go deep into the logical relationship, which has formed a complete space-time closed loop.

The ambiguity of causality, even if I want to find out what’s going on, it’s impossible.

“I see… How many people have completed the assessment of this level in the past?” Xu que asked the question he was most concerned about.

Meng Kun’s answer was not too unexpected.

None.

“So I’m quite curious. What method did you use to make the original eternal family reverse its fate?” Meng Kun’s voice was full of curiosity.

Xu que suddenly woke up when he heard the speech.

If they don’t go to the eternal family, they will be besieged by foreign demons. Finally, they choose other ways to escape because of the arrival of the demon king.

Most likely, it will still move underground.

In a way, they have reversed their fate.

“You’d better not know.” Xu Xu said in a low voice.

This sudden heavy feeling and the sense of separation between right and wrong made him feel very uncomfortable.

Mengkun also noticed this, and a buzzing voice came: “OK, now that you have passed the level, I’ll let you pass. Don’t break in casually in the future.”

Xu Wei hesitated and said, “my companion…”

“Oh, they have been sent to the water by me. One dish after another. You haven’t lived for a tenth of your time!” Meng Kun had a tone of hatred for iron but not steel.

Xu Ke grinned. This is nonsense.

As soon as you enter, you are an external evil devil, or half a step of the Immortal Emperor level.

The most present is the peak of Xiandi. Who can play?

Only the proud son of heaven, Ben forced saint, can he have the ability to cut down well!

“OK, thank you very much.” Xu Ke arched his hands at the depths, “if I have a chance in the future, I will visit you.”

Meng Kun seemed very happy when he heard this.

After all, guarding a group for thousands of years alone, even creatures like mengkun who can survive for a long time occasionally feel a little lonely.

“Ready, I’ll send you away!”

Mengkun’s voice fell, and a bubble floated slowly from below, circling Xu que.

Then, with a bang, the bubble burst.

The next moment, Xu que found himself standing on the ground, with the sun shining on his head.

After staying underground for a long time, he felt that he was about to forget what the sun was like.

“Hoo… Finally came out…”

Xu Wuchang sighed and looked around. He found that all the fairies were lying on the ground, and hurriedly went to wake them up. At Xu Que’s call, everyone woke up and was confused about their situation. Xu que simply explained to the crowd, and then looked at the nishang fairy: “how much time do we have?” The nishang fairy wanted to ask something. She looked at the crystal stone in her hand and turned pale: “it’s half an hour!” The crowd panicked one after another What should I do? We don’t even have a grain stone now! ” Finished, I’m afraid I’ll fail in this Tianmen competition… “Alas, it’s a trip in vain.” Xu que shrugged. The distribution location of this grain stone is quite hidden. It may be difficult to find one in half an hour Everyone… “He patted his chest, suddenly moved and frowned. After hesitating, Xu que put his hand into his arms and touched out a stone and a small wooden box The sleeping trough… Actually brought it out! ” Impressively, it is the grain stone and the crystal core of Rabdosia rubescens! Xu que stared at the things in his hand and felt that his life had become a little false. Those things, in the end is their own dream, or their own through time and space? After a while, he suddenly put away the two things and hurried to the side. Seeing this, the nishang fairy immediately said in a hurry, “master Tang, where are you going?” I’m going to find the Taoist grain stone. ” Xu Duantou didn’t answer, “you go to the exit first and wait for the poor monk to come to you.” While talking, the figure has disappeared in the field of vision. The nishang fairy raised her hand and slowly put it down. She knew that Xu Xu was unwilling to give up and wanted to struggle before the end. But is it possible to find the grain stone by struggling to find it? If you can rely on efforts, why bother that over the years, only a few people have been able to enter the central Tianmen gate

chapters.title: Chapter 1858
chapters.body:
Chapter 1858

Chapter 1858

C.1858

Although it is difficult to move forward, it is extremely easy to leave.

When we came in, we all landed in all directions, but when we went out, it was a unified exit.

In the last half hour, this exit will be conveyed through the jade carried by the contestants

Following the route on the crystal stone, the people soon came to the exit.

When landing, several faces looked depressed.

“Alas, I saw several Taoist grain stones just now. What a pity…”

“What a pity. I can’t get it.”

“That’s what I said, alas…”

It turned out that on their way away, they found several road grain stones with good luck.

But unfortunately, no one has the ability to pick Tao Wen stones except Xu Ke, so they can only go home bitterly.

“Oh, this is not the neon fairy in Yongzhen immortal region. Why does she look ashen?” A woman saw the crowd and immediately sneered.

The nishang fairy looked at the man and said coldly, “Feng Yuehua, don’t gloat there. Don’t you know that Xu Dingcheng is dead?”

The woman is a disciple of the magic cloud fairy realm. Her name is Feng Yuehua. She has been at odds with the nishang fairy for a long time.

At this time, hearing this sentence, her eyes turned red and came forward to catch the nishang fairy: “what’s the matter with Ding Cheng?”

Suddenly, another figure suddenly swept out, raised his hand and slapped Feng Yuehua.

Bang!

The invisible air waves rolled out and set off large tracts of dust and smoke. The friars around them immediately stayed away for fear of being injured by mistake.

Feng Yuehua failed to strike. She looked at the man who blocked her and said in a harsh voice, “qiuzili, what are you doing?”

The scarlet skirt and gown fluttered, the autumn purple looked enchanted from the corners of your eyes, and the corners of your mouth Rose: “I don’t like you.”

“You…” Feng Yuehua took a deep breath and said in a deep voice, “you are a disciple of Cheng Yuanxian domain. I don’t know when Yongzhen Xian domain and Cheng Yuanxian domain will form an alliance!”

As soon as he said this, the friars around him immediately looked at the people with vigilance.

The monks in the four immortal regions are competitors to each other.

If two immortal regions choose to form an alliance, the other two immortal regions will be hit hard without knowing it.

After all, we are in the same state. How can we beat two with one?

Of course, a guy who does whatever he wants by relying on the system can be excluded.

Moreover, now everyone has not left the forest of chaos, and the competition has not ended.

In addition to picking the stone by yourself, you can also snatch it.

Compared with the subtle provocation of Feng Yuehua, qiuzili’s provocation is completely on the bright side.

It’s simply telling everyone that this woman is cruel and cruel. She turns her face and doesn’t recognize others. Don’t cooperate with her.

Feng Yuehua’s face is red with anger. Compared with the autumn purple with sharp teeth and sharp mouth, she can’t compare her eloquence.

But soon, Feng Yuehua sneered and took out three Tao Wen stones from his waist: “your mouth is very sharp. I don’t know how many Tao Wen stones you picked?”

The appearance of the three Tao Wen stones immediately attracted everyone’s attention.

Although the number of people present is quite large, in fact, many people may not even get a Tao Wen stone.

After all, just overcoming the turbulence of time and space will embarrass many people.

We are just immortal accomplishments. We haven’t mastered the road yet. Unless we have any special magic weapons or special means, we can’t pick them at all.

Qiu Zili’s face was cold and looked at Feng Yuehua not far behind: “Ding Yong, is it you silly fork who helped her again?”

The man called Ding Yong by Qiu Zili looks plain, completely different from those friars around him who are handsome and have a natural and unrestrained temperament.

To be exact, there are few people in the immortal cultivation world like Ding Yong.

After all, it’s easy to change your appearance and temperament when you reach the realm of xianzun.

Everyone has a love of beauty. Who would be willing to be an ordinary person?

Therefore, the higher the cultivation, the more perfect the appearance will be.

But Ding Yong is an alien. He always keeps the appearance of a passer-by, but his accomplishments can not be underestimated.

When they saw this scene, their faces became strange.

“It’s Ding Yong… No wonder.”

“Speaking of it, I heard that although Ding Yong is the third person in the magic cloud immortal domain, his cultivation seems not weak…”

“Indeed, I have fought with him. His strength should be only a little weaker than Xu Dingcheng.”

“Tut Tut, it’s a pity that you have good strength, but you don’t have a good mind. You like Feng Yuehua…” among the four immortal regions, there has always been a thing that disciples like to talk about. Xu Dingcheng, Feng Yuehua and Ding Yong’s love triangle. In short, Feng Yuehua likes Xu Dingcheng, Ding Yong loves Feng Yuehua, and Xu Dingcheng, the first disciple, is aloof, cold and arrogant, and doesn’t love anyone Hum, what if someone picks it for me? ” Feng Yuehua glanced at Ding Yong, his face improved a little, filled with a sense of pride, “who looks like, Sao Li Sao Qi, no man dares to see you.” Qiu Zili didn’t care about this degree of language attack at all. Instead, she looked deeply at Ding Yong: “Ding Yong, Feng Yuehua has never asked you to double repair with her? Tut tut… As far as I know, there are many lovers who have been in love with her in our Tianmo hall and are still in touch… “If Xu que is here, he will applaud and praise. Kill Kill Kill Kill Kill Kill Kill Kill Kill heart, these words simply hit a man’s pain point! When Ding Yong heard this, his dull look obviously changed, and he vaguely wanted to ask what he thought Shut up! ” On the contrary, Feng Yuehua couldn’t help it first. She screamed angrily, “Qiuzi leaves, I’ll tear up your cheap mouth!” Hehe, with your accomplishments, I’ll hang you up and fight with one hand! ” Qiuzili is unwilling to show weakness and tit for tat. The immortal yuan rolled, and the majestic force was frantically hedged, and the atmosphere became tense in an instant. Nishang fairy completely ignored the quarrel here, but looked into the forest with worry. Master Tang… What’s the situation now? How much can you get from this grain stone with your own strength? One, two? On the other side, Xu que pulls a stone from the tree and throws it into the system space. After all this, he took out the divine stone and carefully wrote the number 102 on it. God stone was so angry that he trembled: “you humble mole ant! Ignorant bastard! How dare you count the God stone! ”

chapters.title: Chapter 1859
chapters.body:
Chapter 1859

Chapter 1859

C.1859

“The God stone curses you, and you will die in the five disasters!”

“The wrath of the gods will come upon you!”

“Ignorant maggot, you will pay for your foolish behavior!”

“The God stone wants you to die without a burial place!”

Later, the divine stone even burst out the vulgar words of ordinary people, as if it had been extremely angry.

So far, the number written by Xu que has reached an extremely amazing level.

With the Daowen ancestral stone in hand, those difficult to find Daowen stones have almost become ordinary stones that can be found everywhere.

Coupled with his own wind like speed, Xu Ke dares to guarantee that all the disciples who come in this time are not as good as himself!

“You shameless maggot…” the speed at which the divine stone pops up the divine text has begun to slow down, and it has scolded tired.

At this moment, an exciting voice suddenly sounded.

“OK, it should be almost.” Xu que calculated the number of people and thought it should be enough.

God stone felt as if he had heard the sound of nature.

God… Did you hear the prayer of God stone?

Has this shameless villain finally stopped his evil deeds!

This is mercy from God

Xu que didn’t feel the rich and colorful inner world of the divine stone at all. After finishing all the Daowen stones, he collected the Daowen ancestral stones and prepared to go to the exit.

Before leaving, he looked in a distant direction.

Although you are empty, he knows that it is where the eternal ancestor exists.

The once eternal ancestor has long died. Now it is the naive and lively little girl who exists here.

For the future of the ethnic group, guard here forever.

“Good luck, little girl.” Xu que said faintly.

Then, turn around and leave without looking back.

At the exit, the atmosphere has reached the point of tension.

Caused by the wind, moon and autumn purple, people are in danger. I’m afraid someone will rob their own Tao Wen stone.

Later, Qiu Zili exposed Feng Yuehua’s love history in public. It has to be said that Feng Yuehua has a lot of lovers, crossing the four immortal regions.

Even Ding Yong, who has already made psychological preparations, can’t bear it.

For a time, the gossip flew into the sky, and the whole exit was filled with a strange and warm atmosphere.

Just then, the fairy suddenly said, “come!”

So the friars from Yongzhen immortal region looked into the distance with urgency in their eyes.

The monks who were still gossiping around were immediately attracted to the past.

“The famous nishang fairy, who will pay so much attention to?”

“I don’t know. Is it her double monks?”

“Have you ever heard of fairies in neon clothes?”

“No, hey…”

“What a fart!”

Everyone talked and was curious about the identity of the visitor.

The black spot in the distance magnified rapidly. Soon, a handsome monk appeared in front of the crowd.

I saw his Jue ring fluttering, a faint smile hanging on his handsome face, a bottle of Sprite in one hand and a cigarette in the other hand. The smoke swirled around him with the wind, just like the dust under the immortal.

Everyone was stunned for a moment. Even Feng Yuehua’s eyes were blurred and gave a heartfelt exclamation.

“What a handsome monk…”

The monk fell down slowly and didn’t hurry to come over. Instead, he took a deep breath of smoke. A smile of evil charm came up at the corners of his mouth and said faintly: “sprite with smoke has boundless magic power. Poor monk Tang Sanzang, I’ve seen your benefactors.”

“Good, so handsome, so natural and unrestrained! How could there be such a handsome monk! ” Someone exclaimed.

Xu Ke’s arrival immediately aroused the common hatred of most male friars present. Only the male friars in Yongzhen Xianyu didn’t respond much.

Seeing the envy, jealousy and hatred of others, the friar of Yongzhen immortal region sneered and whispered, “I haven’t seen the world.”

What about handsome?

Handsome is rare?

We friars in Yongzhen immortal region see such handsome monks every day. Did we say anything to show off?

Hum, ridiculous!

When the nishang fairy saw Xu que, her eyes flashed an excited look and quickly walked up: “master Tang, are you okay?”

“Don’t worry, I have nothing to do.” Xu Wei looked around and said curiously, “it seems that the atmosphere here is wrong. What happened?”

Before the nishang fairy spoke, Feng Yuehua swayed his waist and walked over.

She stood in front of Xu que, her eyes full of charm, and said softly, “this master, I’m Feng Yuehua from Chengyuan immortal domain. I don’t know your name?”

With that, a pair of slender jade hands pulled the deficient sleeves and threw a wink at the past.

“Master Tang, ignore her. This woman wants to take advantage of you!” The nishang fairy’s eyes were horizontal and said sternly. Xu Que’s spirit was suddenly refreshed, and his eyes were shining! And such a good thing? The girl has vision. She knows that Ben Jisheng is the most handsome person in the audience. It seems that xianyunzhou is indeed full of talents. Someone can find the advantages of Ben Jisheng anytime and anywhere. Just then, Feng Yuehua trembled and suddenly showed a wronged expression. She said shyly: “sister, are you unhappy that I am close to master Tang? How can my sister get angry so easily? ” Hiss! Everyone took a breath of cold air, especially Ding Yong, whose eyes were about to stare out. Although I’ve heard of the beautiful name of the wind and moon for a long time, it’s basically a rumor. Who has really seen it? In fact, the beauty of fengyuehua is not weaker than that of nishang fairy and qiuzili. At this time, she makes the posture of a little daughter with pear flowers and rain, which immediately makes countless people focus on her. The nishang fairy felt like an insect crawling on her skin and suddenly got a layer of goose bumps: “Feng Yuehua! There’s something wrong with you, isn’t it? ” Oh, don’t be angry, sister. Master Tang has nothing to do with me. ” Then Feng Yuehua looked at Xu Ke again, blinked and said, “my sister is so angry. Master Tang should be very tired?” Feng Yuehua, you… “If I were a sister, I wouldn’t quarrel with master Tang all day. After all, master Tang is so handsome.” Nishang fairy took a deep breath and felt that Zhenyuan in her body had begun to get a little disordered. The autumn purple on one side came forward and said with a mockery: “Feng Yuehua, are you disgusting?” The wind and moon Walton looked frightened. He hid behind Xu Wei, popped up half his head and said timidly, “master Tang, this witch is so fierce…” Rao Shiqiu Zili was used to intrigues. Seeing this scene, he couldn’t help but make a sound of lying in the groove! Xu Wei looked at the confrontation between the three women and put his hands together with a sigh in his heart. Sure enough,

chapters.title: Chapter 1860
chapters.body:
Chapter 1860

Chapter 1860

C.1860

The wind and moon are very strong.

From the beginning of her cultivation, she dreamed of becoming a strong person standing on the top.

But the reality is always cruel. After being slapped in the face by cold and ruthless hatred, she suddenly realized that sometimes hard work is not the only way to success.

Finding shortcuts and using them correctly is the quickest way to success.

In a secret territory exploration, Feng Yuehua lured male Xiu for the first time and asked him to explore for himself. After finding the secret treasure, the new door opened to her.

She found the wealth code!

There is no need to practice hard, to find relics with difficulties and dangers, and to take any risks.

Relying on this method, Feng Yuehua made great progress all the way, from Jinxian to Xianwang, and from Xianwang to xianzun.

The whole world seems to be making way for her!

Therefore, at the first sight of Xu Duan, she made a clear truth.

This will be a stepping stone to the next peak.

Of course, it’s not just because Xu is handsome, but also because Ling nishang and Qiu Zili value him so much.

Feng Yuehua hid behind Xu Wei and looked carefully at the look in the eyes of the nishang fairy. It was not the look in the eyes of his confidants or confidants.

The hidden worry, admiration, and even vague jealousy are clearly seen by themselves.

The lonely, cold and arrogant nishang fairy is moved by the monk in front of her!

Feng Yuehua feels extremely ironic at the thought that Ling nishang, who sneers at herself on weekdays, should one day fall in love with a monk.

But what if you rob the monk?

What else can make you happier than grabbing a man from someone else?

“Nishang, nishang… I’m really looking forward to seeing the monk and his face when he hugged me…” Feng Yuehua thought, and his face was still shy and timid, “master Tang, if I really annoy sister nishang, I’d better go…”

After saying that, I want to leave in a casual fashion.

The next second, she felt an arm wrapped around her so tightly that she couldn’t get away.

“Big, master?” Feng Yuehua’s body trembled and looked up, just right against Xu’s affectionate eyes.

Xu Que’s eyes were blazing, and he said in a voice of “only solitude and Qing in the world”. He said, “benefactor, I didn’t expect you to have such deep love for the poor monk. Even though the ancient Buddha green lamp is often accompanied by the poor monk on weekdays, the heart of the long drought can’t help getting wet.”

“Da, master, you, you feel good…” Feng Yuehua swallowed a mouthful of saliva and was shocked.

Why does this monk think differently from my mother!

Don’t monks always bow their heads when they see women and say that poor monks are not close to women?

Why does the monk look like special mother wants to eat herself!

One side of the autumn purple and the fairy in neon saw this scene, and their eyebrows beat wildly.

Master Tang, what’s the matter?

Are you obsessed with ghosts?

Before they went up to dissuade him, Xu que suddenly sighed with regret: “unfortunately, the poor monk has already made a great wish in front of the Buddha. Hell is not empty and vows not to become a Buddha. In this life, he can only often accompany the ancient Buddha with green lanterns. He can’t return to the common customs and get married with the girl to become a Taoist couple.”

Feng Yuehua reluctantly pulled out a smile: “no, it’s all right… As long as my body and mind can be big, the master knows.”

You can’t return to vulgarity!

Are you a fool? I really want to live and fly with you monk!

In the world of cultivating immortals, it is generally recognized that the poorest is Buddhism, because they advocate the spiritual satisfaction method and usually adopt the principle of Taking heaven as the quilt and the earth as the bed.

I’m Feng Yuehua. I’m not interested in working with you, a poor monk!

Come on, now you should say that you can’t live up to the girl’s kindness, so you decided to stay with the girl!

Feng Yuehua looks at Xu que with expectant eyes and waits for things to move towards the progress in his imagination.

Then, she heard Xu que suddenly speak excitedly: “how about this, benefactor? You also become a monk and serve the ancient Buddha together with the poor monk. Isn’t it a great pleasure for us to understand Buddhism in front of the green lamp?”

Pooh!

Almost everyone couldn’t help laughing.

At the thought of Feng Yuehua, a famous dissolute woman, suddenly shaving as a nun, the picture is really indescribably funny.

Even Ding Yong, the No. 1 big licking dog, couldn’t help it. His face twitched wildly and showed a smile from time to time.

Feng Yuehua took a breath of air-conditioning directly, resisted the idea of slapping her up, and said with a difficult smile: “that… Master, I haven’t planned to become a monk yet…”

“How can you stay with the poor monk without becoming a monk?” Xu que looked puzzled and hugged more tightly. “I’m very serious about my feelings. Since the benefactor confessed to me, I’ll accept you. No matter how many Taoists you used to have, from today on, I’ll be your only Taoist!”

Oh! You still want me to give up the fish pond that I managed to raise? Feng Yuehua almost scolded. Suddenly, he felt a big hand swimming slowly behind him, and his hair stood up. Shit! Dead monk takes advantage of me! Xu que sees Feng Yuehua’s reaction and decides to launch the last wave of attack. With a hug, Feng Yuehua was close to himself in an instant. Xu que exhausted the most affectionate eyes of his life, looked at each other and said slowly, “only when the mountain has no edges and the heaven and the earth are combined, can he dare to be unique with you. Do you know the difference between you and the stars?” No, I don’t know… “The stars are in the sky and you are in my heart. Guess where the poor monk’s heart is?” Left, left? ” No, it’s on your side! ” Feng Yuehua felt that she was going crazy and tried to break free from Xu Que’s arms, but no matter how hard she tried, she never moved. She was shocked. What is the monk’s cultivation? I’m the highest cultivation achievement of xianzun. I can’t even get rid of my arms?! Xu Xu continued: “benefactor, are you tired now?” No, I’m not tired! ” Feng Yuehua’s expression has begun to go crazy However, you have been running in my mind all day. How can you not be tired? ” Xu que came up to Feng Shui Yue, stared into her eyes and asked word by word, “benefactor, do you know what time it is?” Feng Yuehua felt that she was in a trance: “I, I don’t know, I don’t know anything…” Xu lacked a smile from the corner of his mouth and said in a low voice: “it’s the starting point of our happiness!” Feng Yuehua took a breath of cold air and burst directly: “ah! I was wrong! Let go of me, I really can’t stand it! ” Xu que opened his hand with the trend, and the wind and moon swept directly and disappeared without a trace. Hem, is the green tea bitch that the poor monk’s love is able to endure?

chapters.title: Chapter 1861
chapters.body:
Chapter 1861

Chapter 1861

C.1861

Almost all the spiritual love of the local people was spat out.

It’s disgusting, it’s disgusting!

“Mom… What are these?”

“Oh, my God! I want to wash my ears! The Taoist friend brought water! ”

“That brother over there, lend me your fairy tool!”

“There’s water here. Brothers, come and wash… Poof, I’m sorry. I’ll vomit for a while.”

The platform at the exit was a mess. The monks were in a complete mess. The killing of the local love words was comparable to that of the biological weapons.

Xu Wei looked at the crowd and shook his head with a regretful expression: “it seems that the poor monk’s emotion is too intense, and finally scared the benefactor away. It really makes the poor monk sad!”

Qiuzili and nishang fairy looked at each other. They wanted to go and see if there was something wrong with master Tang. Now they can’t bear to see this scene.

“Master Tang, don’t be sad. That woman is not a good thing.” Qiuzili thought for a while and said comfortingly, “she lied to you just now, just to stir up discord.”

Xu kuzheng got up blankly and looked at qiuzili blankly: “ah… It’s all lying to the poor monk?”

“Yes, that woman used to do such things.” Qiuzi nodded.

She was afraid that Xu Duan would not believe it, so she dragged the nishang fairy over: “nishang, do you think I’m right?”

Nishang fairy hesitated. Although it was not her style to speak ill of others behind her back, Qiu Zili did say the truth, so she nodded.

Upon hearing the speech, Xu que suddenly covered his heart and looked extremely distressed: “this… Was a lie to the poor monk… It turned out to be so…”

Nishang fairy looked at Xu Ke’s injured appearance, and a soft place in her heart was gently touched.

Master Tang is really a simple person

“By the way, master Tang, did you get anything just now?” Nishang fairy didn’t want to see Xu deficient continue to be sad, so she simply changed the topic.

Xu que waved his hand and said, “it’s just a little, not a lot. You can give it to you if you need it.”

Nishang fairy thought that Tao Wen stone was hard to get. Master Tang wanted to give it to us. His heart is too kind.

“Master Tang, you should be careful. Now the competition is not completely over. Be careful that someone will rob the Tao Wen stone.” The nishang fairy reminded him, and then said with certainty, “but don’t worry, master Tang, our holy moon hall will ensure your safety.”

Qiu Zili echoed, “I’ll help, too.”

After all, both of their lives were saved by Xu que. There was no reward for saving them. It was impossible to promise each other by example. We had to choose this way.

Xu que smiled, arched his hands at them and said, “thank you, two fairies.”

Hehe, you protect me?

Ben forced saint to stab you with the a finger!

After fighting with the devil, Xu’s current confidence has expanded unprecedentedly.

Joke, Lao Tze immortal emperors are pressed on the ground. How many slag immortal zuns are you afraid of?

Time passed quickly, and it was the end of the competition in the twinkling of an eye.

At that time, Feng Yuehua also came back. She stared fiercely at Xu Xu. The nausea of the local love affair had not yet completely disappeared.

Seeing this, Xu que sneered in his heart, but showed a hesitant look on his face and said, “fairy…”

“Shut up!”

“Not…”

“I don’t listen, I don’t listen, I don’t listen!”

Xu que is indignant. Women are really unreasonable!

Feng Yuehua saw that Xu Ke would not continue to speak, and put the hatred target on qiuzili and nishang fairy again.

After all, if it weren’t for these two women, I wouldn’t have encountered such disgusting things.

At this time, a thick voice sounded: “the competition is over, and the disciples put the obtained Tao grain stone into the stone pillar in front of them.”

The place where everyone is is is a platform. With a thick voice, a huge stone pillar rises.

The friars were in high spirits and went to the stone pillar one after another and threw the grain stone in their hands.

Most of them are one, two, and only a few people are three.

Feng Yuehua looked at Ding Yong: “take out all your Tao grain stones!”

Ding Yong nodded numbly and took out ten Tao grain stones from his waist.

This action immediately attracted the eyes of everyone present.

“Oh, my God! Ten Tao Wen stones! ”

“Where did this guy get so many Tao Wen stones?”

“People are more popular than people. I’ve gone through a lot of hardships to get one. Others only get five!”

“I remember that Ding Yong has a magic weapon. He can take things from space. I think he did it with that magic weapon!”

“Tut… It’s really enviable!” Feng Yuehua took eight of them in his hand and took five from his waist. The total was thirteen. The friars around looked red. Thirteen Tao grain stones… You know, no friars who participated in the Tianmen competition in the past came to this chaotic forest and took out more than ten Tao grain stones. So far, the highest record is only seven! At present, Feng Yuehua has directly broken the record and become a new record maker! She put 13 Tao Wen stones in the box, took the box and went to nishang fairy. She smiled darkly and said, “Ling nishang, I have 13 Tao Wen stones. How many did you get?” The nishang fairy shook her fist and didn’t speak. She used to have a Tao Wen stone, but later, because she fell into the abyss, even that Tao Wen stone was lost. Qiuzili couldn’t see it anymore: “what’s the strength of fengyuehua? If it weren’t for Ding Yong, you could get so many grain stones? ” Hehe, if you have the ability, you can find a Taoist Companion to get you the Tao grain stone? ” Feng Yuehua became more and more proud when she heard the speech. “It seems that I won this time. You will call me elder martial sister in the future.” The autumn purple leaves and the neon fairy’s face are stiff. According to the rules, the first place in the Tianmen competition will be the first of all disciples. No matter which disciples in the immortal region see this person, they should respect this person as a senior brother or sister. At the thought of calling senior sister fengyuehua, qiuzili suddenly felt that she was not very good. Just then, Xu que suddenly asked, “are there many thirteen?” Hum, do you have three? ” Feng Huayue sneered. She now hates Xu Que and wants to step on the other side into the earth and never be reborn. Xu Wei took out a huge wooden box from his arms, put it in front of the people, and said faintly, “I have 300 pieces, monk.”

chapters.title: Chapter 1862
chapters.body:
Chapter 1862

Chapter 1862

C.1862

Xu’s voice was not loud, but it was like a deep-water bomb. It fell into the pond and directly blew up the whole pond!

Dozens of eyes looked at Xu Xu, full of incredible eyes.

Three hundred!

Are you kidding?

The monks present are estimated to be less than 300!

“Is the monk crazy? Dare you say such words? ”

“Three hundred, who has such a great skill to collect?”

“No way, the monk is definitely lying!”

Countless voices of doubt poured in, just as the tide would drown.

However, Xu que just stood there with a faint smile. He was as quiet as holding the abyss, just like an ancient Buddha statue, filled with a calm and peaceful atmosphere.

Pretend to force, what you want is this indifference!

There are people from other immortal regions here. Long Aotian didn’t take the initiative this time, but gathered around Murong Yunhai and whispered, “do you think this guy’s story is true?”

“I don’t know if it’s true, but I think someone is going to be unlucky.” Murong Yunhai said faintly.

He was well aware of the infinite evil interest hidden under the good face of Tang Sanzang.

If Feng Yuehua dares to tease him like this, he won’t end well.

In the face of people’s doubts, Xu Xu didn’t say anything to refute.

But nishang fairy and qiuzili looked at each other and shook their heads.

“Master Tang’s mind is still too simple.” The nishang fairy sighed and whispered.

“What’s more, after putting in the stone column, how many Tao Wen stones can be calculated at once, and the wooden box will be exposed as soon as it is put in.” Autumn purple leaves the deep voice.

They both thought that Tang Sanzang was trying to help them out, so they chose to tell such a bad lie.

After the initial panic, Feng Yuehua calmed down and looked at Xu que with a sneer.

“No way, you must be lying!” She vowed, “no one can get 300 Tao Wen stones in the chaotic forest! Not even thirty! ”

When they heard the speech, they nodded in agreement.

After all, Tao Wen stone is not only difficult to find, but also more difficult to pick.

If you are careless, you will fall into the turbulent flow of time. At that time, you really can’t survive or die.

Xu que shrugged his shoulders, folded his hands and said, “Amitabha, monks don’t lie.”

Then he put the wooden box into the stone column.

Buzz!

At the moment he put it in, the stone pillar suddenly vibrated, followed by a blue light rising into the sky, and a line of golden numbers appeared on the stone pillar.

After a crazy beating, it was completely fixed on the number of 300.

Not much, not much, just three hundred.

Everyone was stunned and their faces twitched wildly. They couldn’t believe what they saw.

“God… There are really 300?”

“Who is this monk? Why did he get so many Tao grain stones?”

“Is there an artifact on him? Ordinary immortal tools can’t pick so many grain stones at all, but they can’t feel the smell of artifact on him… ”

“No, the point is, is there such a person in the holy Moon Temple?” Someone talked about the key.

They had never heard of such a figure in the holy Moon Temple before.

Xu put his hands together and said with a smile: “Amitabha, I’m Tang Sanzang of the fried heavenly sect. Now I belong to the non staff of the holy moon hall. If you are interested in the fried heavenly sect, you’re welcome to join me at any time.”

It would be a lot of fun if we could get all these disciples into the heaven bombing gang.

But obviously, although Xu Ke showed his ability beyond ordinary people, these friars from the immortal region have their own power. Naturally, they will not choose to join the fried heaven Gang because of his word.

Feng Yuehua looked at the number and couldn’t return to his mind for a long time.

“Amitabha, the benefactor seems to be out of his mind?” Xu que asked with a smile.

Feng Yuehua’s body was shocked and her expression gradually became ferocious: “no, it’s impossible… You must have cheated. No one can get so many Tao Wen stones!”

“Hey, you can’t talk nonsense. Everyone is unfamiliar. Be careful that I sue you for slander.” Xu que made a fuss and said, “do you see? She slanders the poor monk!”

Although the other monks in the immortal region didn’t say anything, they looked at Xiang Feng Yuehua with some contempt and ridicule.

It’s customary for everyone to hang around in private. It’s nothing.

You have the advantage to ridicule others, and everyone doesn’t care.

But the problem is that now the facts are in front of us. If we still refuse to admit it, it will be a little ugly.

“Come on, nishang fairy, you don’t have the Tao Wen stone yet. Take the Tao Wen stone here.” Xu que waved to Ling nishang and said with a smile. Nishang fairy hesitated and whispered, “master Tang, this grain stone is not only used to pass the competition. When she finally leaves, the grain stone will be returned to the owner with practical benefits.” Well… I’ll get you some more. ” Xu que suggested. After all, although the exit is open, about a day will be reserved for those monks who enter far away. When the monks around heard the speech, they were in high spirits and looked at Xu Ke one after another Well… Master Tang, can you still find the Tao grain stone? ” Someone asked cautiously, “can you find one for us, too?” They don’t expect to become the best in the competition by relying on Xu vacancy, but no one wants to give up the benefits of leaving so easily. This is why most of the disciples who are not qualified, but still want to take part in the competition, generally think. Xu que put on a embarrassed expression: “this… Can be done at that time, but it takes a lot of effort from the poor monk, I’m afraid…” the friar waved his big hand and said with pride: “don’t worry, master, I can help you with anything you need. Of course, it won’t let the master work in vain…” he said, and took out a natural treasure, Put it in Xu Que’s hand. Xu que accepted it without changing his face. He thought highly of this person in his heart. Unexpectedly, he was still a visionary Lord. Ben forced saint to watch you! Seeing this, other monks also came together one after another and offered all kinds of benefits to try to get Xu vacancy to help idiot! You are all idiots! ” Feng Yuehua, like a crazy woman, screamed, “the dead monk is lying to you!” oh Really? ” Xu que smiled and put the Daowen ancestral stone into the stone pillar. Just now, he tested the efficacy of the stone pillar through the system, and one of them attracted his attention. Can increase the effect of Taoist pattern ancestral stone

chapters.title: Chapter 1863
chapters.body:
Chapter 1863

Chapter 1863

C.1863

Seeing that Xu que took out 300 Tao grain stones at one time, many people naturally believe that he has the ability to get more.

Of course, there are quite a number of people who think Xu Kegen didn’t have that ability.

“Joke, if Tao Wen stone is so easy to find, how can only a few people enter the central Tianmen gate over the years?”

“In my opinion, this person probably killed other disciples in the pit, so he can get so many Tao Wen stones.”

There are countless such words.

Feng Yuehua also reacted abruptly and sneered: “it must be so. How difficult it is to obtain the Taoist grain stone. We all know that the holy moon hall must have killed other disciples in the immortal domain! Be careful, these guys may have set up an array to kill all of you. ”

Boom!

The voice fell, and the earth suddenly trembled, as if some wild beast was waking up.

The friar holding the Tao grain stone in his hand turned pale and looked warily at the people in the holy moon hall.

Nishang fairy’s face was cold and said in a deep voice, “wind and moon, your ability to splash dirty water is too low.”

“Hum, how else can you explain how so many grain stones came from?” Feng Yuehua held on to this point, “even if Ji Tian, the peerless genius known as the first in xianyunzhou, couldn’t do it in Chengdu! Do you want to say that this dead monk is stronger than Ji Tiancheng? ”

The nishang fairy was speechless.

Ji Tiancheng was a peerless genius who was personally certified by the Immortal Emperor in the past five hundred years.

Even such a genius could not take more than 20 Tao Wen stones from here.

Qiu Zili heard this, and suddenly looked stunned, thinking that maybe others were much more powerful than Ji Tiancheng.

She still remembers that when Xu Dingcheng blew himself up, Fang Ling not only didn’t die, but was unharmed.

“This man’s mind is vicious. Don’t believe him, Taoist friends!” When Feng Yuehua saw that the nishang fairy couldn’t speak, he immediately cheered, “Taoist friends, take down this murderous monk, and his Taoist grain stone should belong to all of us!”

With a cry, many people suddenly showed an emotional look.

After all, the money is not exposed. Xu que took out so many Tao Wen stones at one time, which naturally attracted many people’s covet.

Xu Wei glanced around and suddenly raised his eyebrows and eyes: “Amitabha, if you want to be rough, don’t blame the poor monk for not reminding you. The poor monk will really kill you!”

Although this is a little funny, it makes many people step slightly.

Whether these Tao Wen stones were robbed by Xu que or taken by himself, they all represent his strength and should not be underestimated.

For a time, everyone hesitated, looked around, and wanted to wait for others to do it first.

Whoosh!

At this time, a blue streamer broke through the air and fell into the hands of a monk in the holy moon hall at an amazing speed.

“What?” The monk jumped back with fear. The immortal Dharma in his hand had been condensed and ready to fight at any time.

The people who were later also looked nervous. There were too many secrets in the chaotic forest that had not been discovered. Maybe this was some monster of mass destruction.

However, when the monk looked at it, he suddenly frowned and looked puzzled: “is this… Tao Wen stone?”

The rest of the people were stunned when they heard the speech. Then they ignored all the precautions and rushed up in a swarm.

“Really? Is it a grain stone? ”

“I don’t believe it. Let me see it!”

“Sleeping trough! It’s really a Taoist grain stone, and special mother flew from the sky! ”

After the monks confirmed that this was the Tao grain stone, they looked more and more excited.

It can be said that they worked hard to pick the Tao grain stone before. They may not be able to pick one by every means.

Now a stone with a grain of Tao falls from the sky. How can it make people not excited?

“No, it’s impossible! How could the Tao Wen stone fall on its own initiative? ” Feng Yuehua was shocked, “and why didn’t the turbulent flow of time affect you when this grain stone was collected?”

This remark immediately aroused the contempt of everyone.

“Feng Yuehua, you don’t know that once this grain stone is picked, the turbulence of time will disappear?” A monk glanced his mouth and said.

On the other side, someone mocked loudly: “I’m afraid she didn’t pick the road pattern stone herself. How can she know!”

These words immediately caused everyone’s laughter.

Feng Yuehua lost face at Grandma’s house this time. Even the friars who had just stood on her side left her intentionally or unintentionally.

“You must have cheated!” Feng Yuehua’s face was red and his ears were at the equator. “Otherwise, how can you let the grain stone fly? This person must be an evil devil! Everybody, let’s kill him! ”

The voice fell, and suddenly there were countless broken voices in the sky.

I saw countless blue lights, like meteors, breaking through the air!

“God… What is this?” Am I dreaming… “You’re not dreaming, I also saw…” the people were shocked. At the same time, they also stretched out their hands and tried to catch those Tao Wen stones. However, these green lights turned a corner in the air and fell straight into the hands of the people in the holy Moon Temple This… Master Tang? ” Nishang fairy looked at Xu Xu in surprise, “did you do this?” Amitabha, it’s just a little feedback. ” Xu que put his hands together and said with a smile. Mom, the effect of this Taoist pattern ancestral stone is so strong! Xu Wei originally thought that the effect of this increase was the most, that is, it could see a wider range, but he didn’t expect to be able to attract the Tao grain stone directly! Seeing the shocked look of the people around him, Xu lacked a thought, and suddenly said in a deep voice: “gentlemen, this is my secret method of frying the sky gang. As long as you join the frying the sky Gang, you can get the Tao grain stone!” Immediately someone raised his hand and chose to join. Even though Xu Weisui controlled the Tao Wen stone, he fell into the monk’s hands. The friar was overjoyed. The benefit of a Tao grain stone was enough to cover his decades of hard cultivation.
