When you arrive at xianzun, it’s very difficult to get one step closer. It’s nothing to join a fried heaven Gang after so many years of cultivation out of thin air Master Tang! I want to join! ” Master Tang, let me come and I will join! ” For a time, there were many responders. Everyone asked to join the fried heaven sect and get the grain stone. Xu Ke also responds to every request. All friars who choose to join the fried heaven sect have obtained a Tao grain stone. In the end, almost everyone in the audience had Tao Wen stone, but Feng Yuehua didn’t You, what do you mean? I just announced to join the fried sky Gang! ” Feng Yuehua shrieked. Xu que glanced at her and thought that women are fools. Offend yourself so hard and want to join the fried sky Gang? Boom! Before he could speak, he suddenly shook his position. In the distance, the towering mountains suddenly burst, and the sky was filled with smoke and dust. Then, countless cracks spread on the earth, like long snakes, spreading! Xu took a breath when he was absent! Wo ri… Didn’t you just take some grain stones? Is it necessary to make a battle to die together

chapters.title: Chapter 1864
chapters.body:
Chapter 1864

Chapter 1864

C.1864

At this time, the whole forest of chaos looks like the end of the world.

Countless trees collapsed, dust and smoke rose everywhere, a large number of birds flew in the sky, and animals in the forest fled everywhere, which is the natural response of wild animals in case of natural disasters.

Compared with the response of the beast, the monks’ emotions were more intense.

The first is the issue of exports.

When the first friar found that the exit was closed directly, he immediately panicked.

“What’s the matter, the exit is closed?” the friar bumped his head against the exit and felt his head buzzing.

They were shocked and quickly surrounded the exit. After trying, they found that it was really closed.

The light curtain, like a whirlpool, turned into a hard wall at this time, which could not be opened.

The friar who was impatient raised his hand and hit it with an immortal method. He was stunned that he didn’t even burst out of a crack.

“What now?”

The friars are stupid. Seeing that the forest of chaos is about to be destroyed, they can’t run away. Can they stay here and wait for death?

At this time, the heavy voice when entering the forest of chaos sounded again: “the forest of chaos is about to be destroyed, the exit is closed, find the eternal ancestor, continue its life, and reopen the exit.”

The voice was like a straw for everyone. At the moment of hearing it, the light of hope burst out in the eyes of the monks present.

But after listening, they all fell into a state of ignorance.

What is the eternal ancestor?

We have to save it. We can’t even find the protagonist now!

Only Xu Que’s eyes burst into a look of horror. This voice even knew the existence of the eternal ancestor!

But think about it, if it is the Immortal Emperor, scan it with divine thoughts, even if the eternal ancestor hides it no matter how deep it is, it should be found out.

In fact, what he didn’t know was that for so many years, it was only the eternal ancestor that could produce so many grain stones in the forest of chaos.

For this reason, the four immortal emperors did not take the forest of chaos, and they also found that the eternal ancestor seemed to have a tendency of exhaustion as soon as he got rid of the forest of chaos, so they kept him here all the time.

Now the eternal ancestor is suddenly going to hang up, causing the change of the forest of chaos. The exit is closed. It is clear that the whole forest of chaos will die with the eternal ancestor.

Sifang Immortal Emperor wanted to save him, but he couldn’t get away for a while. He could only hope on these disciples of the Immortal Emperor.

Xu Wei glanced around and found that most of the monks present were dazed. They basically didn’t know what the eternal ancestor was about.

There are even several obvious mental problems. I don’t know whether I got sick after I came in or before. I knelt on the ground and began to speak, as if I was praying for the mercy of the gods.

This made Xu Wei have a toothache. I thought you were immortal. Are those gods useful? Don’t you have any force in your heart?

But speaking of saving the eternal ancestor

“You, the eternal ancestor, I’ve heard a little about it.” Xu Kuang put his hands together and said, “if I can help you, I’m willing to help you.”

“It’s… Too dangerous!” nishang fairy didn’t know what Xu lacked was going to do, but subconsciously felt that it must be a great risk.

However, Xu que waved his big hand and said in a deep voice: “Amitabha, I don’t go to hell. Who goes to hell? It is my Buddhist disciple’s well deserved responsibility and obligation to save the suffering of all sentient beings!”

For a time, the eyes of people looking at Xu Xu were really the same as looking at living bodhisattvas.

Look, look! What is a true Buddhist disciple!

Be fearless in the face of danger and save the world from fire and water!

It’s so much better than those monks who have nothing to do and have something to do!

Even many monks began to doubt whether the fried heaven sect monks were the orthodox Buddhism?

When even a monk looked excited, he bowed his hands and said, “if master Tang can save us out, I Chen San will respect master Tang in my life!”

“I, Nicholas Zhao Si, would like to make meritorious service for master Tang at your house!”

“Sobbing, I will recognize master Tang as my father when I have a son!”

Xu Wei was shocked and didn’t need to recognize his godfather. I’m not that kind of person.

As soon as he said these words, the installed force value in the system rose like a rocket!

Qiuzili and Ling nishang looked at each other and were worried.

The situation in the forest of chaos is unprecedented for thousands of years. If you let master Tang go alone, I’m afraid you will be doomed.

“Master Tang, I’ll go with you.”

“Master Tang, people will go with you!”

The two said at the same time.

Xu que thought for a moment. Anyway, it didn’t take much effort. He just put the crystal core into the trunk of the eternal ancestor. As I said before, the crystal core can renew the life of Rabdosia rubescens. Now Rabdosia rubescens is the eternal ancestor. Renewing her life is equal to renewing the life of the eternal ancestor. “OK, you can keep up.” Xu que habitually explained, “this trip is dangerous. Please make more preparations.” then he saw the nishang fairy telling his younger martial brothers about the future with a heavy face. The monks in the holy moon hall looked like dying fathers. Most of the troubles of human beings come from thinking too much. Xu Xu verified this truth again. But qiuzili looked indifferent. She had no friends at all. Now it’s just that everyone lives together and has a slightly harmonious relationship. Watching Xu Ke and others go away, the disciples of the immortal regions were heavy hearted. They know that once this trip goes, several people are afraid to die. Xu Wei took the fairy and qiuzili to the boundary of the eternal ancestor along the cracks on the ground. Even after so many years, the hidden array of the eternal ancestor is still working. Looking at the huge body of the eternal ancestor in the array, qiuzili and nishang fairy were stunned. How could they have seen such a huge body! “Master Tang… Is this the eternal ancestor? How can we repair it?” murmured the nishang fairy. Then they saw Xu Xu take out a wooden box from his pocket, pour an unknown thing in the palm of his hand and press it on the body of the eternal ancestor. Then he waved to them: “let’s go, it’s done.” nishang fairy: “…” qiuzili: “…” no, we haven’t done anything yet. Is it too hasty to go like this

chapters.title: Chapter 1865
chapters.body:
Chapter 1865

Chapter 1865

C.1865

“What are you doing? Hurry up.” Xu que urged.

He wondered how he felt that the friars in the immortal region were slow in mind and what they were doing here after they were done.

If there are any moths later, I really want to go and I can’t go away.

The nishang fairy looked at the huge late autumn of the eternal ancestor and pointed to the top: “that… Master Tang, do you think this situation is normal?”

Xu que smelled the speech and looked up into the air. He found a huge black hole slowly circling in the air. It seemed that something was going to come out of it.

After careful induction, Xu que was suddenly surprised.

what the fuck!

This is magic gas!

Why can there be foreign demons here?

“Hurry, don’t delay…”

Xu Wei wants to run away. After ten thousand years, he doesn’t know the strength of foreign demons, but he won’t be too weak.

If there’s another Aruba, they really don’t want to run away.

Don’t look at yourself hanging Aruba up in a dream before. Was that your own fight? Those who hit out are pretending to be worth it!

Although it is said that you can barely beat the Immortal Emperor by using the Zhengqi seal magic Sutra, it is absolutely impossible to beat the Immortal Emperor!

On one side, nishang fairy and qiuzili have put on a combat posture.

Before they were ready, a surge of magic gas spewed out, covering most of the sky in an instant.

A dark shadow appeared from the black hole, and the powerful pressure came!

“Aruba… The devil has come to save you…”

Xu Kuang looked at the sky numbly, and his heart lay in a groove.

This time, the calf is finished. Zhente Niang has come to the realm of Immortal Emperor!

As like as two peas, the familiar spirit and the familiar magic spirit are the same.

Do all your foreign demons have the same virtue?

Most importantly, why do foreign demons suddenly appear in this place?

Xu Wei wondered very much. According to reason, human friars ten thousand years ago were many times stronger than they are now. Since they have defeated foreign demons, I think the rest of us should be about the same.

And what laoshizi Aruba is not dead?

Just then, a deafening roar sounded again.

“Hahaha! I knew my brother would never forget me! I’ve been dormant here for thousands of years and finally have a chance to see the sun again!”

Then came a stronger evil spirit. The familiar figure soared from the ground to the sky, and the body was surrounded by infinite evil spirit.

It’s Aruba.

He excitedly looked at the foreign devil in the sky and shouted excitedly, “aluji!”

“Aruba!” the evil spirit in the air responded excitedly.

“Luji!”

“Ruba!”

“What time!”

“Ba!”

Shit, you sing the counterpart double reed here and sing such uncivilized words!

Xu Wei felt that naoren was a little painful. Now he began to suspect that the foreign demons were beaten so badly not because of strength, but simply because their IQ was too low.

The neon fairy and autumn purple on one side were dignified, and the suffocating breath in the sky was clearly a force they could not resist.

They didn’t expect that they would encounter such a difficult thing if they just came to help.

“Master Tang, those two foreign demons should not have noticed us.” nishang fairy thought for a moment, “we should have time to sneak away now.”

Xu nodded. He didn’t want to match the two goods now.

If you want to face the hard Immortal Emperor, you have to go to the peak of xianzun at least.

However, as soon as he moved, it seemed that his breath was leaking. Aruba suddenly swept a pair of bright magic eyes: “who’s there?”

After seeing Xu Que’s figure clearly, Aruba was also surprised.

The dog monk is still alive?

The memory of being beaten by gunfire was still vivid, and Aruba immediately became angry from his heart.

Seeing that there was no way to avoid, Xu que had to harden his head and get up and said, “Oh, Hello, two demon gods. I’m just passing by. I’ll leave now.”

Aruba’s face was very ugly, and he said in a grim voice: “monk, I didn’t expect that you haven’t died in ten thousand years. You’re still trying to seal this demon. Today you’ll die without a burial place!”

Xu que was stunned.

Shit, what I experienced is really not a fantasy!

The foreign devil of this shit still remembers himself!

However, he was not in a hurry. He calmly carried his hands and said, “Amitabha, I didn’t expect you were not dead yet. It seems that the poor monk will act on behalf of heaven again today!”

Nishang fairy and qiuzili looked at Xu Ke in the wrong eyes. “I said, master Tang is definitely not an ordinary person.” Qiuzi narrowed slightly from her fox like eyes and felt more and more that her previous guess was correct. Master Tang is not a God. He must have something to do with the gods! That foreign devil is a strong Immortal Emperor. If he can seal an Immortal Emperor, his own strength can absolutely crush the Immortal Emperor! The nishang fairy was also shocked. She felt that the monk who followed her all the way was really mysterious! Hearing the speech, aruga immediately felt a surge of magic Qi and wanted to rush down to avenge his good brother. However, before he started, he was stopped by arudo. “Brother, what’s the matter?” Aruba wondered. Aludo’s face was dignified, and his black face was like ink: “this guy is very powerful… Don’t fight with him at will.” he was a little excited just now because he dared to come out. He forgot the move used by the dog monk in those years, and the avatar of the Buddha almost slapped himself to death. It’s been ten thousand years and I haven’t died yet. I’m bound to make further progress! Arudo looked at Xu Ke deeply. He hesitated and didn’t know whether he should do it or not. On the contrary, Xu que thought about it when he saw that arudo didn’t do it. He immediately reacted that this guy mostly remembered what he had done before, so he didn’t dare to fight down for a while. Since you are an old boy who dare not do it, it’s my turn to perform! Xu Kuang folded his hands and said with a smile, “Amitabha, the two benefactors are scattered, and the poor monk will subdue the demons and Demons today!” after saying that, Zhou Jinguang emerged and forcibly simulated the breath of the gods of the valve Zhuluo. After using too many magical powers, he barely remembered some forms and gods, but they were not the essence. Seeing this, aludo’s face changed greatly: “Damn it, this guy really hasn’t done anything!” “prepare to die, valve Zhuluo…” before Xu lacked words, his breath suddenly disappeared like dumb fire. Aludo was stunned and looked ferocious: “you old monk, your strength has indeed exhausted over the years!” at this time, a majestic and mysterious breath suddenly came from the sky, like a God in control of the world. A sun broke the clouds and shone on Xu Xu’s body. Like a god! “God, the breath of God…” arudo murmured, feeling that he might not be able to escape today

chapters.title: Chapter 1866
chapters.body:
Chapter 1866

Chapter 1866

C.1866

Xu Wei was still wondering how his strength suddenly disappeared.

Then I saw the crazy surge of divine text on the divine stone.

“Hahaha! Humble mole ant, Vulcan found you!”

“Ignorant maggot, you’re dead this time!”

“Quickly kneel down and beg for mercy. The God stone can protect your life!”

If you match the God stone with a face, it must be a small man’s expression at this time.

Xu que was also a little flustered. He looked up at the sky and was shocked.

Is it true that the God of fire came into the world?

Don’t be kidding. Can the great gods notice such a little person as me?

Qiu Zili trembled with excitement and flushed: “master Tang, he, he is really a god!”

The nishang fairy looked at the falling direction of the golden light, and her heart was an unspeakable shock.

It is said that there were gods in this world tens of thousands of years ago.

But I don’t know why. Later, these gods gradually disappeared, but there are some records in ancient books describing the earth shaking actions of those gods in those years.

And although they had not seen the gods, the breath of the gods fell at this time, and they naturally realized that this was the gods.

Coupled with some previous misunderstandings, they almost did not hesitate at all, and directly regarded Xu Xu as a God.

Aludo stared at the scene. He thought the old monk was just improving his cultivation. Unexpectedly, he has reached the realm of God!

This is unscientific!

How can there still be gods in this era? Don’t you see that there are only four immortal emperors left in xianyunzhou?

Although they were all immortal emperors who came to save people from foreign demons, it was actually because the demons in the family were almost dead. When they learned that there was still a demon emperor alive, they quickly sent someone to save the demons.

After all, now the devil emperors are living forces, one less dead.

If the devil gets together, who cares? The devil is sealed in the boundary of xianyunzhou. If he has the ability, he will run out by himself. If he doesn’t have the ability, he will die.

“Go, go, go!” arudo’s black face was scared white and urged, “get out of here and can’t stay here any more!”

Aruba didn’t dare to stay any longer. With a big hand, he directly opened the black hole when he came and turned away.

What kind of luck is it to meet a God when you come?

Seeing the two evil emperors go, the nishang fairy and qiuzili were stunned.

Their experience today feels like a dream. First, they meet the demon emperor of the legendary foreign demons, and then turn around and the gods come to the world, which is more exciting than the past few hundred years of practice.

Looking at the more and more rich golden light in the sky, the nishang fairy couldn’t help saying, “Tang… Venerable, the two demon emperors have run away!”

Look, what a great power it is to scare away the two demon emperors with one word!

However, Xu Wei just waved to them and said in a loud voice, “you go first. I have something to do.”

Nishang fairy wanted to say something, but qiuzili pulled her sleeve and made a wink, rising with the sky.

The two people came to the distance and couldn’t see Xu Ke’s figure. Qiuzi left and released her hand.

“Master Tang obviously has something to do.” qiuzili said in a deep voice, “we stay here. The spirit’s mind is unfathomable. Can you ensure our safety?”

The nishang fairy thought, “master Tang is not that kind of person… God.”

Qiuzili was stunned for a moment when she heard the certainty in her words, and then slowly said, “yes… Master Tang is really not that kind of person, but I don’t know if there will be a chance to meet in the future.”

When the golden light breaks through the clouds and shines on Xu Ke, the real God comes to the world.

This scene will remain in their minds forever!

Seeing qiuzili and the fairy in neon clothes go away, Xu Xu sat on the ground with a bitter smile and sighed.

After moving his hands and feet, he found that even a little chakra couldn’t work in his body.

He didn’t want to go just now. At all, the power in his body was directly blocked, and there was no way to go.

As for the nishang fairy and qiuzili, they are also good to themselves. The God of fire’s curse is only aimed at themselves. If they let them go, they may still have a life.

Xu Xu looked up at the sky, golden eyes, bright forever: “system, do you have a way to handle this thing?”

The system was silent for a long time before giving a reply: “Ding, the power of the gods has exceeded the ability of the current version of the system…”

“Well, you don’t have to be behind the nonsense.” Xu que waved his hand and looked bitter. “I didn’t expect that he would get a hand on it when he came to the head.”

When he was cursed by the God of fire, Xu Ke didn’t take it to heart. After so many years, he thought that the thing was a state buff. Unexpectedly, the God of fire will come to the world!

At the moment when the golden light came, the power in his body disappeared, as if evaporated by the golden light. The power of the gods is simply incomprehensible. Just then, he saw a figure climbing towards him with difficulty. Although the figure climbed very hard and rugged, it still moved in its own direction unswervingly. “Er Gouzi?” after Xu Wei saw the appearance of his figure, the whole person was surprised. “Why are you the only one? Duan Jiude?” “brother Ke, the old Wang bastard has run away! He also took away the treasure that God Zun has painstakingly collected!” Er Gouzi looked devastated. Xu Wei inquired. It turned out that they had already discovered the situation here and were ready to sneak in and see if it was good. As a result, as soon as Er Gouzi came in, he happened to meet the curse of the God of fire, and his whole body strength was directly scrapped. Xu Wei was surprised: “it’s strange that you haven’t been cursed. How can you get caught?” the system took the initiative at this time: “Ding, if you get along with the host for a long time, you will be contaminated with breath and judged as the target by the gods.” Oh, the feeling is that you stay with yourself for too long. Xu Chuxing said with a happy smile, “just in time, I won’t be lonely when I have you with me.” the two dogs beat their chest and feet on the ground, cried and howled. They can’t die yet. The magic dragons haven’t left behind yet. “System, prepare to exchange all the installed force values.” Xu que grinned and ordered the system, “whether it’s useful or not, as long as it can have a slight impact on the gods, exchange them for me.” he hasn’t reached the point of waiting to die. The curse of the gods is still a curse, but it’s not the gods who come down to earth in person. Afraid of a ball

chapters.title: Chapter 1867
chapters.body:
Chapter 1867

Chapter 1867

C.1867

Xu Kuan was stunned. He looked around and found that the eternal ancestor, who had always stood silently, suddenly twisted.

The huge vines, which have been silent for unknown years, seem to be ancient beasts from the wilderness. They suddenly wake up, driving the violent reaction of this piece of heaven and earth.

The earth disintegrated and mountains and rivers shifted. After taking root for countless years, now the whole forest of chaos is full of roots of the eternal ancestor.

Mengkun, who was still swimming in the water, felt the shock and was very surprised: “what’s the situation? This ghost place is going to be destroyed?”

Although it is a unique creature born in dreams, if the forest of chaos is destroyed, it still has to run ahead of time.

After all, I promised the little girl to protect the eternal family. I can’t guard a piece of ruins.

Just as he was thinking about where he was going, he suddenly found that there was a strong blue light under him.

A figure covered with cyan fluorescence slowly surfaced from the bottom of the water and swam to the side of mengkun.

Seeing this figure, Meng Kun’s small eyes were confused for a moment, and suddenly exclaimed, “you… How did you come out? What about the eternal ancestor when you came out? Your vitality is exhausted now. Going out once is tantamount to suicide!”

The figure raised a finger to his mouth and said with a smile, “don’t worry, master Tang has helped me solve this problem.”

Mengkun wanted to say something more. Suddenly, he was stunned. His mind dispersed and felt it carefully. He was even more surprised: “your vitality has been restored?”

“Hmm!” the figure nodded hard and then went upstream. “Master Tang needs my help now. Wait for me to come back.”

It seemed that the shadow was not affected by any resistance and floated slowly to the surface of the water.

Mengkun looked at his back disappearing on the water, and the long-standing memory suddenly poured into his mind again.

When she was just born, the girl suddenly appeared in front of her and asked if she wanted to go with her.

On the other side, Xu Xu felt the vibration of the earth and wondered.

Don’t you just put it in? How does it look like the eternal ancestor is going to destroy the sky and the earth?

Misfortunes never come singly. The golden light in the sky is more and more rich, mixed with a bright red.

This means that the curse of Vulcan is coming.

Although up to now, Xu Ke has not seen the existence of gods with his own eyes, this does not prevent him from imagining the great power of gods.

“Er Gouzi, what do you want to be if you reincarnate in the next life?” Xu said without a hitch.

He was not sure what he had done this time, and he was inevitably nervous.

Er Gouzi looked loveless: “I want to be a cornucopia and let all the treasures in the world come to me.”

“Oh, it’s really unpromising. How can a basin fit?”

“That’s right. Let’s be jubaoding and pack more.”

At this time, the breath of the gods had completely spread, and the whole heaven and earth seemed to fall into a state of stagnation.

Birds and wild animals in the distance have long been far away. The clouds in the sky stopped moving and the wind stopped.

When the first flame fell, the space became distorted.

The turbulent heat flow is pressed down in an irresistible trend, as if magma were flowing between clouds.

God stone trembled wildly, and it was very excited.

“Ignorant maggot! Humble mole ant, you are dead!”

“Lord Vulcan, your divine power is amazing!”

“Long live Lord Vulcan!”

Xu Ke was too lazy to take care of the crazy stone. He just looked at the falling heat flow in the sky silently and felt that the God of fire was true.

What a bullshit curse. It’s clear that you want to kill yourself!

What are you doing with those empty heads?

Until now, the damn God of fire didn’t even show his face, but Xu lacked the feeling of death.

“System, prepare to exchange it.” Xu que ordered, “it’s life or death.”

Many of the props selected by the system can not even be saved in the air, so they can only be used at the moment when the curse is coming.

“Ding, the system is ready at any time.”

I don’t know why, Xu lacked Leng heard a nervous smell from the voice of the system.

Hehe, you black hearted businessman, you know you’re nervous now. Why did you go early!

Boom!

At the critical moment, unparalleled green light suddenly poured out from the bottom of the earth and covered the eternal ancestor.

The next second, the eternal ancestor seems to be playing a stimulant, crazy growth!

The already towering vines expanded visibly with the naked eye and expanded several times in an instant.

chapters.title: Chapter 1868
chapters.body:
Chapter 1868

Chapter 1868

C.1868

It seems that someone is resisting his will, and the fire in the sky is more and more intense, as if half of the sky is going to burn.

Under the heavy pressure, Xu Ke felt that his body was three points heavier, and it was even difficult to move freely.

Boom!

Unexpectedly, the body of the eternal ancestor grew again, expanded several times, and covered the fire on the vines.

The face of Rabdosia rubescens was a little dignified. It seemed that it was hard for her to grow like this.

Seeing this, Xu que hurriedly said, “don’t support it, it’s a god!”

Although it is in a dream, we have been together for some time, not to mention that Rabdosia rubescens now shoulders the whole eternal family. It would be a great sin to die here.

Xu que thinks he’s not a good man, but he always has nothing to say to his friends. He entraps other people’s whole race. He can’t do such a thing just to escape from life.

However, Donglingcao waved his hand and smiled at him: “don’t worry, it was master Tang who helped us. Now it’s our turn to protect master Tang.”

The voice fell, and countless thoughts suddenly came out of her body.

“Master Tang, thank you very much.”

“Master Tang, I didn’t expect you were still alive…”

These ideas are strong or weak, but they are all eternal people who Xu lacked to contact in his dream at that time.

For a moment, Xu Xu felt as if he had returned to that dream.

In other words, he could not tell whether he had passed ten thousand years ago or in a dream.

What is mengkun’s ability?

If you don’t dream, will the eternal family become what they are today?

Xu Wei doesn’t understand. Even if there is a systematic addition, his experience in the eternal family also makes him a little confused,.

It seems that someone is in the way, the fire is more and more fierce, and the pressure between heaven and earth is more and more heavy.

However, the eternal ancestor seemed to get some help, grew more fiercely, and even attracted the attention of the fire.

In the light of the fire, I could vaguely see a human figure coming out and looking down.

“This is… Tongtian divine wood… Why is it here?”

As soon as the voice fell, I saw a sweet smile from Rabdosia rubescens, raised his hand and waved fiercely: “Guess!”

After that, the vine grew wildly and stubbornly blocked the crack.

But the next second, countless flames poured out and directly filled the whole sky, but the heavy pressure dissipated.

Donglingcao smiled helplessly with a tired face: “master Tang, I’ve tried my best, but this God is too powerful. I still can’t send him back.”

Xu Que and ER Gouzi stared at the scene, almost stupid.

At this time, hearing the words of Rabdosia rubescens, Xu lacked quickly waved his hand and said, “no, no, you are already very powerful.”

It’s so powerful that it explodes, okay!

Xu que can’t believe that the little girl who can only stand behind her in the dream can now carry the gods!

But when you think about it carefully, ten thousand years have passed. Even if a pig lives now, it should be cultivated into an Immortal Emperor.

It is not surprising that the eternal family has extraordinary talent and can carry the gods.

“Master Tang, you go first. The exit here has been closed.” with a wave of Donglingcao’s hand, it directly broke a dark space crack. “I’ll take you away.”

Xu Ke was stunned: “can others go out?”

“Don’t worry, I’ve let them out before, so I’ve closed this place.” Donglingcao said. “If the exit is not closed, the power of the gods will overflow, and no one can live.”

The power of the gods is so terrible that Xu Ke can still support it now.

If someone from the same level came over, he would have been crushed to the bone and couldn’t move.

Xu Wei wanted to say something, but he felt a force wrapped around his waist and directly threw himself into the crack of space.

Before the field of vision became completely dark, Xu Xu saw the smiling face of Rabdosia rubescens as bright as spring.

It has crossed ten thousand years and reappeared in front of us again.

Into the darkness.

The entrance to the forest of chaos.

A group of people gathered at the platform and looked at each other.

“Do you… Feel it?” a monk looked around blankly.

Although he didn’t say it clearly, everyone around him knew what he was asking.

The breath of the gods!

Strong enough for everyone to resist, God!

Just now, when the breath leaked out, people even had no fear in their hearts, no fear, but subconsciously surrendered to worship.

After a long silence, someone got up silently and said, “this may be the great power of the gods.”

This time, witnessing the power of the gods is enough to make any arrogant friar lose confidence. If they were oppressed by strength, maybe they wouldn’t be so depressed, but after careful thinking, they were shocked to find that they actually surrendered from the bottom of their heart! Long Aotian and Murong Yunhai shrunk aside and whispered. “What shit gods? I’ll ride on them one day.” “why didn’t you say such nonsense just now?” Murong Yunhai sniffed. Longao Tianli was straight and strong: “I was on my knees at that time! Where can I remember this!” suddenly, someone exclaimed, “the nishang fairy is coming out!” Murong Yunhai was inspired and hurriedly looked at the direction of the exit. A white and a purple figure floated out, just like a relegated immortal. However, when they were close, they noticed that they were covered with dust and seemed very embarrassed. “Nishang fairy, are you…” nishang fairy looked at qiuzili and found that the other party had no blocking attitude. Then she said, “we met the gods.” the people were shocked. You can still retreat when you meet a God. You are worthy of being the eldest martial sister of Yongzhen Xianyu! Qiuzili added faintly: “the God is master Tang.” the people were shocked again, and suddenly reacted that something was wrong. You said that master Tang was a good man. We recognized him, but it was a bit exaggerated to say that he was a God… Seeing the reaction of the people, Qiu Zili shrugged at the neon fairy, then walked aside and looked at the sky. When the gods came into the world, even the outside world was affected, and the sky became strange. Her eyes were full of curiosity. Tang Sanzang… Where will you go next? At this time, Xu que was standing on a busy street, looking around at a loss. A female nun who was wearing very revealing clothes came to Xu Wei and said in a charming voice, “Taoist friend, I have a secret script here. I don’t know if you are interested.” “go away.” Xu Wei waved his hand. The nun continued, “the name of the script is ice and fire… Double heaven…” “Hey, I’m not sleepy when you say this!”… br>

chapters.title: Chapter 1869
chapters.body:
Chapter 1869

Chapter 1869

C.1869

Coming out of the space crack, Xu que came to the street.

Fortunately, the place where he came out was relatively hidden, so no one noticed the way he came out.

However, even if they are seen, it doesn’t matter. Monks who can crack through space can’t easily provoke them by thinking with their toenails.

Looking at a large number of immortal zuns in xianyunzhou, and even half step Immortal Emperor, who dares to walk through the crack of space?

You know, the space crack is said to be full of sharp and unparalleled vigorous wind. Even if xianzun goes in, he can’t come out intact.

“See? That guy came out of a crack in space.”

“Another peerless fierce man…”

“Look, look, don’t look.”

Not people gathered in the street and whispered.

Xu Wei looked at the nun in front of him and said curiously, “aren’t you afraid of me?”

When he came out, he had recovered his original appearance, so there was no need to pretend to be a monk now.

The nun smiled shyly and said modestly, “Taoist friend, you are joking. You can come out of the crack in the space. How can you be embarrassed by a little woman like me.”

“Hahaha, you’re right!” Xu que took the nun to drill into the alley several times, suddenly took out a purple gold black stick and said coldly, “rob, raise your hand and stand against the wall!”

Nun:

Are you a sick man who cheated people into robbing in the roadway?

The nun forced a smile and said, “Taoist friend, don’t make such a joke…”

“Who’s kidding you? Where is this place and what’s valuable on you? Hand it all over!” Xu lacked an expressionless face. “Otherwise, I would have forced the saint to let you try the taste of ice and fire!”

The nun was still trembling and afraid. When she heard this, she suddenly blushed, stood up to Xu Kuan, and the waves surged in front of her chest: “come on, let me try! Don’t pity me!”

Xu que: “??”

A moment later, Xu Duan, who was holding the map, straightened his skirt and walked out of the roadway with a comfortable face, leaving the nun who was half burned and half frozen.

Hum, is it so easy to experience the holy double heaven of ice and fire?

But that’s good. At least now I know where I am.

Xu Wei glanced at the map in his hand and looked a little strange.

There is a line of small characters in the upper right corner of the map, which is called Yuanxian domain.

Unexpectedly, I went directly through the space crack and reached the territory of chengyuanxian domain.

You know, the distance between Yongzhen immortal domain and magic cloud immortal domain is calculated by tens of millions of miles.

Although Qiuzi came so fast from those guys at that time, it actually used the transmission array already built.

It would take at least a month for them to fly by themselves.

As for the space crossing by tearing open with bare hands, it is possible in Tianzhou and Dizhou, but xianyunzhou is close to Tiandao and has perfect rules, which is basically impossible.

Standing on the street, Xu lacked a feeling of being at a loss for a while.

He has never been to Cheng Yuanxian domain. He doesn’t even have an acquaintance. Now he doesn’t know what to do for a while and a half.

After thinking about it, he plunged into the nearby restaurant.

Throughout the major martial arts fantasy films, when you don’t know what to do, as long as you stay in the restaurant, the trouble will naturally come to you.

Xu que casually found a corner and ordered a pot of wine and a dish of peanuts while eating and drinking.

The first floor is the lobby, where the three religions and nine schools gather, and most of the monks’ accomplishments are maintained above and below the fairy king.

It has to be said that relying on the powerful timing and geographical advantages of Xianyun Island, the average cultivation level of monks here is higher than one grade.

“Did you hear that there was an accident in this Tianmen competition!” a friar said to his companion.

Xu Shideng was an inspiration. He didn’t expect to hear the news he wanted as soon as he came in.

“I’ve also heard that it seems that there are foreign demons killing in it, and even the first disciples in our immortal region fall into it!” the Friar’s companion nodded, “it seems that the winner this time should have been a monk in Yongzhen immortal region.”

“Monk? Are there any monks in Yongzhen immortal region?”

As they talked, they turned to another topic.

Xu Ke was in a hurry. Why are you so inconsiderate? The chat is over!

But seeing that the two people didn’t seem to have more information, Xu Kuang was wondering whether to go and ask, and suddenly heard a news that refreshed his spirit.

“By the way, it seems that the chosen one has come to our Chengyuan immortal domain!” the friar looked excited. “It is said that the person chosen by Taiyi Tianshi this time is a female friar named Shangguan Wanrong, with extremely strong strength!”

“Really?” his companion seemed to be very interested in Shangguan Wanrong. “It is said that if you can form a Taoist companion with the chosen person, you can transcend heaven and earth and become an eternal existence!”

“Of course it’s true. Don’t you see that outside the eternal night hall, they have begun to spend a lot of money looking for information related to the chosen one?” it seems that because the information behind them is more confidential, their voices gradually decreased. On the contrary, Xu lacked some doubts in his heart. Shangguan Wanrong unexpectedly came here, which surprised him. It seems that the woman has been looking for a way to dissolve her relationship with herself. Is there a clue in chengyuanxian domain? After thinking about it, he got up and walked towards the two friars. “You two, I’m very interested in the news of the chosen one. I don’t know if I can talk to Taoist friends?” Xu que asked with a smile. The friar glanced at Xu and said angrily, “stay where it’s cool. Don’t hinder us from talking about business.” a moment later. Two monks sat on the side of the road with bruises and bruises, telling them all the news they knew. “I know so much…” the friar wanted to cry without tears. Why are people so unreasonable now? They catch a good meal after saying a word! Is there any reason? After hearing this, Xu Wei patted him on the shoulder with a smile: “be polite next time, okay?” “I see!” they nodded again and again. Xu Ke feels comfortable physically and mentally, and feels that he has made another contribution to the construction of a civilized society in xianyunzhou. According to the monk, the Yongye temple is the official force of the Chengyuan immortal domain, and its status is similar to that of the holy Moon Temple in the Yongzhen immortal domain. Now, in order to find the chosen person, Yongye hall is wantonly looking for relevant clues. Xu que asked the direction and went directly to the gate of the Yongye hall. At this time, there was a long dragon outside the door, crowded and lively. Xu Kuang came forward and said with a sharp stab, “let’s all let’s go. I’m the Taoist partner of the chosen one!” a friar beside him was suddenly happy and turned his head and said, “coincidentally, brother, you’re also the Taoist partner of the chosen one?” Xu Kuang frowned: “what do you mean?” the friar pointed to the team in front and said with a smile: “see, there are all the Taoist partners of the chosen one in front.” “I’m genuine, different from those fake ones.” Xu vacancy shook his head. A friar was thrown out by the bodyguard of Yongye hall. The friar struggled and shouted, “I’m the Taoist companion of Shangguan Wanrong! You can’t throw me! I’m genuine!” Xu vacancy: ”

chapters.title: Chapter 1870
chapters.body:
Chapter 1870

Chapter 1870

C.1870

Xu Wei didn’t expect that so many fake and shoddy imitations came out after the news of the chosen man came out.

What do you think these people want?

“Hey, don’t you know?” the friar who talked to Xu que at the beginning explained excitedly, “the Yongye Hall said that if anyone can find the person chosen by heaven, he can become a disciple of the Immortal Emperor. The Immortal Emperor can also preach his skills and promote his accomplishments to the peak of the immortal statue. If he is lucky, he may be able to touch the threshold of the Immortal Emperor!”

Xu Wei glanced at the other side and thought that with your virtue, he still wanted to touch the threshold of the Immortal Emperor? If you really want such a pig to be immortal emperor.

“So you all come and pretend to be Taoist companions?” Xu Xu glanced around. At least hundreds of monks gathered here.

“Otherwise? Let’s pretend to be Shangguan Wanrong?” the friar rolled his eyes. “That Shangguan Wanrong is a woman. Although we want to enter the eternal night hall, how can we pretend to be a woman?”

As soon as the words fell, they watched a friar directly cast spells on the spot, directly transformed into a woman’s body, and then swaggered to the eternal night hall.

After a while, the friar was directly beaten out by a random stick and thrown on the roadside like garbage.

“Ha, you’re right.” Xu que grinned. “There are also detection methods in the Yongye hall. It’s impossible to go in disguised as Shangguan Wanrong.”

Xu que was stunned: “what are you doing?”

“I observed carefully just now. The failure of the brother in front was purely due to poor makeup.” the friar put on makeup and said confidently, “I studied women’s makeup in those years. It’s definitely better than him! I can definitely get in!”

Xu Wei was shocked at that time. Didn’t he say he was an iron man? Give in so soon?

Without paying attention to these two goods, Xu que quietly withdrew from the long queue.

At present, so many people are gathered here. Even if they used to be here, they have no way to prove that they are the Taoist partners of Shangguan Wanrong.

He was still thinking, sneaking into the eternal night hall and looking for a chance to see if he could send it directly back to the holy moon hall.

Now I’m the first in the Tianmen competition. Well, when I return to the holy Moon Temple, I’m not popular or spicy. I have to give myself up.

You still need to hang out in the remote area of chengyuanxian?

He thought that there should be other places to go back besides the eternal night hall, so he checked it on the map.

After looking for it for a long time, I was surprised to find that there was no transmission array at the West Tianmen gate of this shit?

This is the West Tianmen gate, the main city of Chengyuan immortal region. It should extend in all directions, but there is not even a transmission array!

Xu que didn’t believe in evil. He looked over and over on the map. In the end, the map was about to turn rotten. He was stunned that he couldn’t find a transmission array.

“Special, what country place!” Xu Xu almost threw up. What’s the situation in this damn place?

At this time, the communication jade suddenly moved.

Xu que takes out the jade and finds that Er Gouzi is sending a message to him.

“God calls me, God calls me.” Er Gouzi said in a thief’s voice, “brother, where do you think I am now?”

“I don’t know where you are. Fart quickly!” Xu que said angrily. “I’m on fire now. This ghost chengyuanxian domain doesn’t even have a transmission array. Tianzhou is better than here!”

The second dog was surprised and said, “brother short, are you in Chengyuan immortal field?”

“Are you there, too?”

“Yes, I’ll give you an address. Come here quickly!”

A moment later, Xu que rushed to the place where Er Gouzi was located, which was impressively outside a small sect.

As soon as he landed on the ground, he saw two dogs poking around outside the sect and saw himself waving his claws: “brother short, this way!”

Xu que walked over and was shocked to find that Duan Jiude was also there: “why is your special mother here?”

Duan Jiude gently stroked his long beard and said with a smile, “I have my own magic. I can’t say it, I can’t say it.”

“Oh, really?” Xu Mian took out the black stick without expression and put it on Duan Jiude’s neck.

Duan Jiude smiled twice and quickly explained, “in fact, the Deputy guild leader and I have set up a transmission array on each other, which can transmit anyone to the other side.”

“Cow force.” Xu que said in surprise, “then you hurry to send me back to the Yongzhen immortal region. I’m still in a hurry to go to the central Tianmen.”

Duan Jiude and ER Gouzi looked at each other, then he coughed twice and said, “brother lack, that’s what’s going on. Didn’t I just say that we can send any of us to each other.”

“Well, yes, what’s the problem?” Xu lacked a way.

Duan Jiude stood up and said, “then the question is, who of the three of us is in Xianyu, Yongzhen?”

Xu que: “…” forget it, you shouldn’t expect these two idiots. Xu Kuang sighed and pointed to the tiny mountain gate nearby: “what are you doing here? Are you going to attack the mountain gate?” “it’s not brother Kuang. You don’t know that there are nine turn soul returning flowers in this sect!” the two dogs looked excited, “Didn’t you say that xiaorou may have lost her memory before? The nine turn soul returning flower can trace its origin. No matter what means those immortal emperors use, they can trace back their memory!” Xu que was stunned and felt like a storm in his heart. Although he had been trying to find xiaorou, there was always a shadow in his mind. What if xiaorou didn’t remember herself? You know, since those immortal emperors wanted to use xiaorou to clear her memory, they would not leave anything missing. Even if they found xiaorou by themselves Soft, but is xiaorou, who has lost her memory, really the one she used to be? But now, the problem has been solved! Xu que was overjoyed: “what are you waiting for? Go and grab the jiuzhuan soul flower now, and let’s kill the central Tianmen to save xiaorou immediately!” however, er Gouzi pinched at this time: “Well… Brother Duan, actually, it’s also because of this…” seeing this, Xu Duan suddenly felt an ominous premonition in his heart: “you won’t eat the jiuzhuan soul flower?” “how possible!” the second dog immediately denied, “It’s just that the leader of this sect has tied his spirit to the jiuzhuan soul returning flower, and people are spending, so we may have to outwit him… Our God has communicated with him. As long as we can help him continue the sect, he will give us the jiuzhuan soul returning flower.”

chapters.title: Chapter 1871
chapters.body:
Chapter 1871

Chapter 1871

C.1871

Hearing Er Gouzi’s words, Xu que was relieved.

It’s a big deal to continue the sect.

What Ben Jisheng is good at is saving the dead, healing the wounded and saving the common people. Can’t a mere sect continue?

“Go, go in with Ben Jisheng and have a good talk with the leader about how to continue his sect!” Xu que waved his big hand and the three stepped into the mountain gate.

Behind the mountain gate, there is a mountain peak about tens of feet. It can be regarded as a high mountain on earth, but in the eyes of Xu Xu, it is no different from a small mound.

Er Gouzi told Xu que that this sect is called cangyun sect. There are no more than 30 people in the whole sect. In addition to the leader, there are two elders under the banner. The disciples are divided into core disciples, inner disciples and outer disciples.

Xu que grinned: “it’s not too troublesome for a sect with less than 30 people to be so fancy.”

“Their leader has the highest cultivation and should be the peak of the fairy king at present,” Duan Jiude said.

Xu Xu can’t help shaking his head. Listen, is there a worse sect than this?

The leader is just at the peak of the fairy king. If you pull any disciple out of the holy Moon Temple, you can beat the leader on the ground.

It’s better to say that I’m helping the poor than to help him continue his sect.

The three came to the foot of the mountain, and someone had come down to meet them.

I saw a young man wearing the headmaster’s robe, floating down in front of the three, bowed deeply, arched his hands and said, “predecessors, please accept the younger generation’s worship.”

Xu que waved his hand and said, “you’re welcome. Are you leader cangyun?”

“It’s the younger generation.” the young man smiled bitterly. “I think the elder must have known the younger generation’s needs. It’s not that the younger generation wants to threaten the elder. It’s really forced by helplessness, so I made this bad decision. We don’t have any valuable treasures. Only this nine turn soul flower is the only thing that can be traded. I hope the elder won’t dislike it.”

He made it clear that he didn’t mean to ask Xu Ke for help, but the two sides made a deal.

Xu que appreciated the other party’s attitude and nodded: “don’t worry, you cangyun sect can’t be destroyed with me.”

Not only can it not be destroyed, he also wants to make cangyun sect the largest sect in Chengyuan immortal domain!

“Thank you, sir. I’m Cang Jingkong. Thank you very much!” the young man was excited when he saw Xu Xu Xu’s promise.

However, the next second, he saw Xu’s face become strange, with the same dull look of two dogs.

“Ben shenzun first stated that he really didn’t know his name before today…” Er Gouzi followed Xu Xu to the earth before, and naturally knew the meaning of the name.

Xu que looked at each other deeply and said after a long time, “your name… Who gave it to you?”

“Ah… It was taken by my father in those years, but what’s the problem?” Cang Jingkong was a little frightened and didn’t know what taboo he had committed.

Xu Kui shook his head: “no problem. This is a good name. It was once a taboo of a very great elder. It is the so-called” who is the peak in the world? When you see cangjing, it will become empty. I hope you can achieve higher achievements in the future. ”

Hearing these words, cangjingkong felt as if there were thunder in his heart.

Who is the peak of women in the world? When you see the cangjing, it will become empty!

What a domineering poem!

The elder is worthy of being an elder. When he exports, he is such a magnificent poem!

I just don’t know what this woman is?

“Tell me, how can your sect continue to exist?” Xu Xu came to the sect hall and sat down in a comfortable position.

“Report back to the elder, because the failure of Chengyuan immortal Kingdom after the Tianmen competition led to the anger of the Immortal Emperor, so we should vigorously rectify the sects in the immortal kingdom.” Cang Jingkong said in a deep voice, “our sect is weak, so unfortunately it is valued by other sects. They want to directly annex our sect…”

“Very good, this should be a benign development for you.” Xu Xu said casually.

To tell the truth, if it weren’t for jiuzhuan soul returning flower, Xu que wanted to persuade Mr. cangjing to surrender directly.

A small sect with less than 30 people has nothing to insist on

However, Cang Jingkong said in a righteous way: “impossible! Cangyun sect is the foundation of its ancestors and must not be easily taken away by others?”

“So what do you mean?”

“Well… At least I have to struggle…”

Well, you know your feelings.

Xu Wei was suddenly curious: “you cangyun sect has no natural materials and land treasures, and no famous mountains and rivers. Why would people think of annexing you?”

Xu Ke has never experienced the annexation of sects, but there are interest needs.

Either to centralize power or to compete for treasures, but there is Yongye hall in Chengyuan immortal domain. Even if you toss the following sects, you can’t compare with the Yongye hall directly managed by the Immortal Emperor.

Cang Jingkong looked sad and sighed: “to tell you the truth, the younger generation once had a childhood sweetheart named yun’er. We grew up together. When we were young, we were in love and decided to entrust each other for life…” Xu Xu was stunned. What are you doing? I asked about your sect. How did you tell me your adolescent love story? I only heard cangjing’s empty words turn and filled with righteous indignation: “Later, the damned leader of the Lieyang sect even connived at his son’s power and forced Yuner to become his Taoist companion. If Yuner refused, he would kill me. However, Yuner had to agree. Unexpectedly, this man put Yuner under house arrest and took this opportunity to completely annex our cangyun sect! It’s shameless!” Xu Wei nodded slightly. He understood that his feelings are still a vulgar and bitter drama. After carefully understanding for a while, he suddenly felt that the cangjingkong seemed to be more like the protagonist than himself. He was a young genius, but he was hated for taking his wife. He was determined to be angry and strong. At a critical moment, he suddenly met the golden finger of Ben Jisheng… Isn’t this a general protagonist template? It seems that he found someone to love Tell, Cang Jingkong couldn’t stop when he said it. He said it for more than an hour. “Sorry, you guys, it’s the younger generation’s gaffe.” Cang Jingkong said with some disappointment, “in fact, I also know that it’s difficult to get back Yuner. Even with the help of several predecessors, the opportunity is slim. The leader of the Lieyang sect is the existence of the half step Immortal Emperor…” “well, it’s really dangerous.” Xu nodded, “because they are going to die soon.” Cang Jingkong: “……” did you miss what you said?…

chapters.title: Chapter 1872
chapters.body:
Chapter 1872

Chapter 1872

C.1872

Cang Jingkong is the current leader of cangyun sect.

The life of cultivation in the past hundred years can be described as lacking in excellence and rarity.

I didn’t meet the fallen cliff and was passed on by the elder. Without the help of the grandpa in the ring, some just practiced hard and won the appreciation of the former leader, and then took over the position of leader.

According to the normal life process, he should have become a Taoist couple with his childhood sweetheart Yuner after becoming the leader, and then lived a life of living together and flying together as a couple of gods and immortals. Until Shouyuan ran out, they hugged each other and were buried into a pile of dead bones.

But unfortunately, the second year after he became the leader, he was oppressed by the hot sun sect and fell into a crisis of life and death.

Fortunately, however, he met Er Gouzi and elder Duan Jiude, who claimed to be the deputy leader of the fried sky Gang, and then ushered in Xu que, the leader of the fried sky gang.

After seeing the powerful strength of several people, he decided to exchange jiuzhuan soul returning flower for each other’s help.

Many years later, cangjingkong reviewed his life and found that on this day, he stood at the fork of his life and made a decision to change his life.

However, at that time, he only thought it was an ordinary choice.

“Since the elder is so confident, the younger generation can rest assured.” Cang Jingkong wiped his sweat and said with a smile.

He saw the strange abilities of Er Gouzi and Duan Jiude. Although it was hasty to turn to this young man who looked younger than himself, he was really forced to have no choice

The Lieyang gate can be regarded as a hegemonic force in this area. The surrounding small sects dare not lend a helping hand no matter how many relationships they have on weekdays.

Even if Xu Xu is a liar, Cang Jingkong can only bite his teeth and step into the scam.

“Yes, you have a good eye.” Xu Wei patted him on the shoulder and said with a smile, “why don’t you join our fried Tiangang? What smelly fish and rotten shrimp are in the Lieyang gate? It’s not worth drying in front of millions of our fried Tiangang!”

Cang Jingkong’s breath stagnated, and he was shocked to hear that millions of gang members.

But then he reacts, isn’t this young man bragging?

There are only a few big sects with names in the Chengyuan immortal region. Where suddenly came out a fried heaven sect with millions of gang members?

Thinking of this, cangjingkong’s eyes suddenly became strange.

Isn’t this guy a liar?

It’s said that a group of friars recently claimed to be the sect elders of millions of guild members. Is it possible that they are with this person?

Cang Jingkong shook his head and said, “it’s impossible. All the transmission arrays in the West Tianmen City are controlled by the Yongye hall. We all need the unified management of the Yongye hall if we want to leave. It’s a felony to leave the Xianyu without permission.”

Xu Ke was speechless for a while. What the hell is going on in Cheng Yuanxian domain? You don’t have to be so serious about self-locking?

Seeing Xu Que’s bad complexion, Cang Jingkong hesitated and said, “in fact, this was not the case in the early years. It seems that this rule has begun since the latest disciples were elected.”

“Is there no other way except to listen to the arrangement of the eternal night hall?” Xu Xu asked.

Cang Jingkong said with a smile: “yes, sir, you destroyed the eternal night hall, or you became the Principal Disciple of the eternal night hall. In this way, you can arrange when to use the transmission array, but I’m afraid only crazy people can use this method, ha ha…”

Smiling, his voice gradually sank down, because he saw that his missing eyes suddenly lit up.

The bright eyes were full of excitement and desire.

“That elder… I’m just kidding…” Cang Jingkong felt as if he had said something terrible, “you don’t have to take it to heart…”

Before he finished, Xu que slapped him on the shoulder, his eyes full of appreciation: “good, old man! I didn’t expect your way of thinking to be so pioneering. I’m very optimistic about you!”

Cang Jingkong’s words directly opened a new door to Xu vacancy.

There is an old saying that if we can’t solve the problem, we should solve the problem.

Since you can’t directly use the transmission array, don’t ask the Yongye hall for help. It’s beautiful to directly replace the Yongye hall and make the transmission array in your own hands?

Cang Jingkong couldn’t think of it. He was just a casual remark, which actually reminded Xu que of the things that others would call madmen when they heard it.

The top and bottom of cangyun sect are only about thirty people. It’s not enough to do chores in a big sect, but Xu vacancy has made his mind on these people.

Is there any way to successfully control the eternal night hall through these people?

While he was thinking, a loud cry full of ridicule burst out.

“Cang Jingkong! Have you considered it? I’ll give you an answer today!”

Cang Jingkong’s face suddenly looked ugly: “the people of the Lieyang gate came to the door! Let’s go in and avoid it with me first…” according to his idea, although several predecessors seem to have good strength, after all, there are too few people, so we still need to think long against the Lieyang gate. Now Mao rashly appears in front of the people at the burning sun gate, which is undoubtedly a surprise. Xu Duan patted his thigh: “come on! I’ll help you solve the problem now!” after saying that, he shook his body directly. Under the frightened gaze of cangjingkong, he suddenly came to the gate of cangyun sect. At this time, a monk in bright orange was shouting with disdain. The burning sun pattern embroidered with gold thread on his robe shows his identity. “Cang Jingkong, don’t be shameless. You want to compete with my young master. You don’t think about whether you are qualified… Who am I going to you? Burp!” the friar shouted half way, and a figure suddenly appeared in front of him, which made him burp. Xu que stood in front of him and asked with a smile, “are you a disciple of the Lieyang sect?” “no, that’s right, what do you want? I warn you ha, if you dare to fight me, my young master will not let you go!” the friar was frightened by Xu Que’s body method and stuck his neck and forced a hard airway. Xu nodded: “just in time. Go back and inform your little Lord. In a quarter of an hour, I will come to the door and kill your Sun Gate and ask him to wash his neck and wait for death!” cangjingkong, who had just arrived at the door, felt his life was dark. It’s over… The helper I finally found is still a brain problem… God is going to kill me

chapters.title: Chapter 1873
chapters.body:
Chapter 1873

Chapter 1873

C.1873

The friar of the Lieyang gate is used to being domineering in the Xitian gate. Suddenly, he met Xu Xu, who was so arrogant that his arrogance became weaker.

“You, how dare you treat me like this? Do you know who I am?” the friar of the Lieyang gate forced a hard airway.

Xu que was immediately happy: “Oh, you don’t seem to know your situation. Close the door and let the two dogs go!”

The voice fell, and the gate of cangyun sect closed with a bang.

“Hahaha! My God is here!”

Before the friar of lieyangmen could react, he heard a burst of crazy laughter.

I saw a big dog with an arrogant look falling from the sky and sitting on one of the monks.

“Bold!”

“What a monster! How dare you attack our friar?”

“Die!”

The friars around were surprised and used their immortal methods to blast Er Gouzi.

Because the Terran friars have a huge sphere of influence and the blessing of heaven, the Terran friars practice fast.

Monsters have practiced for thousands of years, which is a fairyland.

The Terran friars are different. Those who are a little more talented directly come out of the immortal realm, which is still the kind of super power.

This leads to the extremely low status of monsters in xianyunzhou. They are hanged everywhere. The friars of the Lieyang sect hardly pay attention to the two dogs.

Seeing this scene, cangjingkong couldn’t help worrying: “senior, the friars of the Lieyang gate are strong. Why don’t you let the younger generation support you.”

From the moment he decided to seek Xu Que’s help, he decided to completely break with the friars of the Lieyang gate.

Hearing Cang Jingkong’s request, Xu que waved his hand: “it’s all right. This guy can handle it. Tell me first about the situation of the burning sun gate.”

After saying that, he turned and walked towards the main hall of cangyun sect, ignoring the scene of chicken flying and dog jumping behind him.

Cang Jingkong was stunned when he heard the speech, and looked at the direction of Er Gouzi. Finally, out of trust in his predecessors, he chose to keep up with Xu que.

Although the area of cangyun sect is small, although the sparrow is small, it has all the five internal organs. What a sect needs is complete here.

Along the way, Xu Ke had only one comment in his heart.

Miserable

The whole clan gate is so many people, even the houses on the mountain are not full. Looking at the whole clan gate, it looks like it is dead.

If it weren’t for seeing several monks flying through the air occasionally, Xu que would doubt whether Cang Jingkong was the only one left in the whole cangyun sect.

Standing on the top of the mountain, bathed in the oncoming breeze, Xu Ke rarely felt a burst of relaxation.

I don’t know when to start. I’ve been fighting. From one place to another, I hardly have time to rest.

“Just in time, let’s take the sun gate for recreation.” Xu Kui took a deep breath and looked at the cangjingkong behind him. “Are your materials ready?”

Cangjingkong had been waiting for a long time. Seeing Xu Xu’s words, he hurried forward and said, “ready, all in this jade slip.”

Xu nodded, took the jade slips and read the contents with the spirit.

A moment later, he put down the jade slips. All the information about the sun gate was in his mind.

The sect of the member immortal region is divided into three grades. Both the Lieyang sect and the cangyun sect are three grades. However, the leader of the Lieyang sect has a slightly higher cultivation, so he always beats the cangyun sect.

But the crest of the gang faction of the Cang Yun faction was very awesome, so they had been carrying it for a long time, and reluctantly kept themselves from being swallowed up.

But it’s a pity that the last leader was a parallel. He died directly at sunrise, so he had to let cangjingkong take over temporarily.

In the materials related to the Lieyang sect, their leader is xianzun’s later cultivation, not even the peak period.

However, compared with the cangyun sect, the biggest advantage of the Lieyang sect is that they have their own business in the West Tianmen City.

Zongmen also want to do business. Otherwise, such a big zongmen would have collapsed long ago.

The reason why cangyun sect lost all of its sect’s business was that it couldn’t even send out the elders’ offerings. Therefore, they all left the sect and lost a lot of disciples.

So it caused the situation that Xu Kuan saw now. Looking at the whole sect door, he couldn’t even find No. 100 people.

At the beginning, there were more than so many people in Taiyi sect!

“Ah Cang… Or you’d better dissolve directly.” Xu Wei considered his language and decided to tell the truth, “how about I go back and find a good place for Feng Shui and give you the whole sect again?”

Cang Jingkong trembled all over: “but, can Yuner still be in the hands of the burning sun door…”

“It’s just a woman. Why should a man have no wife!” Xu que waved his big hand and said manly.

Cang Jingkong was about to cry: “no, not to mention that cangyun sect is the foundation of its ancestors, and there must be no loss…” Gee, it’s really troublesome. “Xu que teased him for a few words and stopped, otherwise the head of this sect would really cry. He found that there were many factors that led to the decline of cangyun school. But the main reason is that cangjingkong does not have the ability to become the Lord of religion. In other words, he doesn’t deserve to be called the patriarch at all. Which family is crying on its own initiative? What a shame! Even if I help him recapture Yuner and finish the Lieyang gate, if cangjingkong still has this virtue, sooner or later a second and a third Lieyang gate will emerge. The immortal world has always been brave to compete for the first, especially in Xianyun island. Except for the bald heads in the Buddha area, almost all monks are competing. Because you don’t fight, you fall behind. Falling behind people on the road of cultivating immortals is almost equivalent to being sentenced to death. Xu que looks at cangjingkong. Although this guy is weak, his qualification is unexpectedly good, even one point worse than that of Hongyan. If you can polish your temper, it is still very useful. Thinking of this, Fang Ling suddenly made a sinister arc at the corners of her mouth. “Eternal night hall, prepare for your destruction!” cangjingkong saw this scene. He didn’t know why. Suddenly he felt a cold behind him. He always felt as if he had made a decision that he shouldn’t do. They left the top of the mountain. At this time, ergouzi just finished repairing the friar of the Lieyang gate. Two dogs were riding on a Friar’s head and said, “drive! Run faster for the God!” the friar who was riding was humiliated. It was a great shame that he was treated as a mount by a dog! Xu que picked up the two dogs, leaned over and said to the monk, “young man, now I’ll give you a chance to get rich. Do you want to think about it?”… br>

chapters.title: Chapter 1874
chapters.body:
Chapter 1874

Chapter 1874

C.1874

About an hour later, the friar of Lieyang gate left cangyun sect in a panic. Before leaving, he yelled at cangyun sect and put down his cruel words.

A dog chased and killed without saying a word, killing chickens and dogs all the way. The friar of the Lieyang gate was killed and injured seriously, so he escaped back to the Lieyang gate.

“Young Lord, that evil dog is too arrogant!”

Inside the burning sun gate, a monk knelt on the ground and wept bitterly at Er Gouzi’s crime.

Sitting at the top of the table was a young man, dressed in royal clothes, with a pale complexion. Although his eyebrows were pretty, he felt a gloomy feeling.

On his side were several beautiful nuns, whose clothes were extremely exposed and full of temptation.

After hearing the report from the monk under the door, the young man was furious and slapped the nun on the thigh: “bastard! How dare a cangyun sect be so arrogant?”

The battered nun’s face shook, but she didn’t dare to show the slightest look.

He is a fierce young leader of the burning sun sect. He is usually grumpy and violent. If he annoys the other party a little, he will lead to painful devastation.

In the face of the fierce anger, the monk who came to report was frightened, but his eyes were cruel, lowered his head and said in a trembling voice: “this man is still very arrogant. Let you go to the Baiyu building in the city for a while at noon today and say that he wants to teach you a lesson face to face!”

“What? Come and serve me. I’m going to make cangyun sect disappear in the West Tianmen gate today!”

You should know that although the Lieyang gate is only the third grade gate, among the third grade gates like the sand of the Ganges River, they are all the top ones. It only takes a little time to promote the second grade gate.

As for the yipinzong gate, there has always been only one over the years, that is the eternal night hall.

Therefore, as long as it can become the second grade sect gate, it will naturally stand at the top of the West Tianmen City. After all, there are only four second grade sect gates in the whole west Tianmen City.

In the face of such provocation, how can he bear it?

The little Lord ordered that the whole Lieyang gate moved. Soon, a team of luxurious lineups left the Lieyang gate and went to the Baiyu building in the city.

The monks along the way saw the car driving at the Lieyang gate and avoided it one after another.

“Look, the black sheep has gone out again.”

“Tut, I don’t know which female monk has fallen down with blood mold this time and will be liked by him again.”

“Hurry up. This guy is moody. His father is about to reach the peak of xianzun. We can’t afford it.”

In fact, Xu que doesn’t understand why a immortal Zun can show off in the West Tianmen City in the middle stage.

Logically speaking, xianyunzhou should not be a place where immortals walk everywhere. Are there as many immortals as dogs?

But in fact, this is his misunderstanding of the actual power of xianyunzhou.

Compared with Tianzhou and other places, the biggest advantage of xianyunzhou is that there are four Supreme Xiandi sitting here.

And the top power of each sect is much higher than that of the friars in Tianzhou.

Including the monk xianzun Xianwang who invaded Xianyun island before, in fact, all the major forces in Xianyun Island sent troops together, so we can come up with so many monks.

In fact, their middle strength is not much higher.

After all, even in an era when the whole people are well-off, some people are too poor to eat. No matter where they are, there is a division of classes.

In the Lieyang gate, not only the patriarch is about to reach the peak of xianzun, but also several elders of xianzun territory, which can be regarded as a great force.

Therefore, in the West Tianmen City, few monks are willing to provoke the Lieyang gate.

In the twinkling of an eye, the party arrived at the Baiyu building.

The friar at the door had long heard of the evil deeds of the sun gate. The weak ones avoided it early. The strong ones didn’t want to stick this shit plaster and chose to leave.

So when I walked into the Baiyun Building, there were only a few people sitting in the whole building.

Although liehua had a bad character, he still carefully sent someone to explore the surrounding situation. After confirming that there was no ambush, he went in.

“Cang Jingkong, unexpectedly, you can still find a helper?” liehua sat down next to Xu vacancy and looked at Xu vacancy with a grim smile. “Taoist friend, do you want to help this guy out?”

Xu que glanced at him and suddenly said, “Amitabha… No, it’s easy to say. I’m sorry, boundless God. I’m proficient in fortune telling. I’m afraid there will be a disaster of blood in the near future.”

As soon as he heard this, he laughed again and again. He got up and stood in the middle of the gate with open arms: “joke! My Lieyang gate is like the middle of the sun now. My father is the highest friar of xianzun right away. There are xianzun elders in the gate. Looking at the whole xitianmen City, who can be the enemy of my Lieyang gate.”

He suddenly approached Xu Que and said gloomily, “and you still want to threaten the young master?”

“Stay away from me. You’re too ugly. I’m going to vomit.” Xu lacked an expressionless face. He came here today to find fault. Naturally, he came as arrogant as he was. According to his idea, when liehua heard this, he should start immediately. However, I didn’t expect that liehua was like being struck by lightning: “you, you say I’m ugly?” then he suddenly reacted and said in a harsh voice: “no way! I’m the most handsome friar in the West Tianmen City! No one is more handsome than me!” Xu Xu Xu was surprised at that time. Is this guy shameless or self-conscious? It’s good to have this face. Do you mean to say you’re the most handsome? The sky looks better than you! “Boundless God, you should have self-knowledge.” Xu said, “I thought you were just in poor health, but I didn’t expect you to have a bad brain!” “hum, arrogance, cherish your next time.” he sneered and waved behind him, “elder Chen, let these people stay forever today.” An old man in a gray shirt came out in response, and the smell of cultivation in the middle period of xianzun was undoubtedly revealed. Seeing this, Cang Jingkong immediately panicked: “senior, let’s run away quickly! This man is the execution elder of the Lieyang gate, with profound cultivation and strong combat power!” “hum, want to go?” elder Chen’s eyes flashed a bloody brilliance, “it’s too late!” he was like a ghost. He suddenly came behind Xu Wei, raised his hand and pressed it, but pressed it empty. Elder Chen was stunned and looked around. He found Xu que standing behind Li Hua and slapped him on the ground.

chapters.title: Chapter 1875
chapters.body:
Chapter 1875

Chapter 1875

C.1875

“Bastard! Let go of my young master!” elder Chen flew into a rage when he saw this scene.

He was a strong man in the middle of the great immortal respect. Unexpectedly, someone took his young master directly in front of him. Where did he put his face?

Xu lacked a grip on the back neck of the fierce, directly lifted him up and said with a smile, “if you let me let go, I’ll let go. Don’t I have no face?”

With Xu’s current strength, the whole chengyuanxian domain can almost walk sideways.

In the middle of a Fairy Statue, one hand sent it away. It’s natural to have no scruples when doing things.

The whole person was stunned. He had never been treated like this since he became the little Lord.

After a moment’s stagnation, he suddenly flew into a rage and roared at the top of his voice, “elder Chen! Kill him for me! Do it now. I want him to be broken into pieces!”

Elder Chen hesitated.

His little Lord is held in his hand. If he is careless, he will die immediately.

If you do it yourself and annoy this person, you will be the one who will carry the pot if something happens to the young Lord.

Thinking of this, elder Chen took a deep breath and reluctantly pulled out a smile: “young man, it’s the so-called valuing peace. Don’t fight and kill everything. We can sit down and have a good talk if we have any requirements.”

Xu que was happy at once. The elder was quite able to make trouble.

I know that in any case, he will carry the pot in the end, so I simply won’t resist.

“You’re very discerning. You’re much better than your little master.” Xu Ke seemed to be carrying a cat. He shook his hand with the strong chemical. Chen Changlao was terrified. He was afraid that one of his little masters would be cut off by accident.

Liehua felt insulted. His eyes were red. He stuck his neck and shouted, “elder Chen, don’t you understand? I told you to kill him. I’ll bear it if something happened! I really don’t believe he dares to kill me!”

Elder Chen was so anxious that sweat came out and scolded in his heart.

Fool, I’m saving you!

People are not afraid of you if their strength is clear. If you dare to shout like this, you are really afraid that you will die fast enough, aren’t you?

Seeing that elder Chen didn’t move, liehua became more angry and shouted: “dare you resist? Be careful that my father came and killed you! Now listen to my command and kill this guy immediately…”

Before he could say his last words, he heard a “click”, and Xu que had broken his neck.

Immediately, a black-and-white flame poured out of Xu Que’s palm, turned into a black-and-white unicorn, and swallowed the fierce corpse into his mouth.

“Ah! Help! Kill me… It’s too painful.”

The fierce and shrill cry came from Qilin’s mouth, and then sank down at a fast speed, and disappeared in the twinkling of an eye.

All souls perish and disappear.

Elder Chen felt cold when he saw it. Did this man kill him so lightly? Or even the soul will not let go of that!

“It’s so noisy.” Xu Xu Xu clapped his palm and wrote lightly, “old man, where is the Lord of the burning sun gate?”

Elder Chen was stunned, and his eyes looked at Xu Ke more frightened.

“Cough… Well, this Taoist friend, the leader of the Lieyang gate, lietian dome, is the peak of the immortal.” elder Chen chose to sell the Lieyang gate without hesitation. “If you go rashly, I’m afraid your life will be in danger. Why don’t we go back and make a good plan, and then attack the Lieyang gate?”

Now even the young Lord has been killed, but he is fine. With the strong character of the sky, he will never escape death.

Rather than being tortured to death by the fierce sky, it’s better to take refuge in the young man in front of you.

Judging from his killing action just now, his cultivation is definitely higher than himself, and he dares to kill so fearlessly in the sun gate. There must be an extremely strong force behind this guy.

After all, the strong sky is also the cultivation of xianzun’s peak. It’s only one step away from becoming a half step Immortal Emperor. Friars at this level can be said to have stood at the peak of Xianyun island.

They are the combat effectiveness of the first echelon.
