As for the half step Immortal Emperor, most of those old things went to find places to practice in seclusion. They only thought about how to break through to the realm of the Immortal Emperor, and basically wouldn’t care about these things.

Elder Chen, who has lived in xianyunzhou for many years, said that only those who can understand the situation can continue to live.

Fang Ling nodded with satisfaction. The other party’s performance won his heart. He had to have such a lively guy in his next plan.

After all, the most important thing for me now is to find a way to improve my accomplishments. In the situation of xianzun, ordinary tricks have been of no great use.

“Yes, since you are positive, it’s up to you to treat me to see the fierce sky.” Xu Xu said.

Elder Chen immediately looked like a dead father. He thought that I had beeped with you for so long just to persuade you not to go now. As a result, you wanted me to take you?

Seeing that Chen Chang didn’t speak, Xu que immediately narrowed his eyes: “don’t you want to?” elder Chen tangled again and again and said ruthlessly, “OK, I’ll take you! But I hope Taoist friends can protect me next. After all, I’m an old bone and can’t stand several tosses.” “it’s my traditional virtue to respect the old and love the young.” Xu que smiled, “As long as you do well, I’ll be the hall leader of fried heaven sect.” Xu Wei is so proficient in drawing big cakes that he doesn’t even hesitate to bring them. Anyway, up to now, there are less than ten core members of the fried sky sect plus himself, so he doesn’t want to say what he wants to say. On the contrary, elder Chen has begun to think that the fried sky sect should be the force behind the young friar. He behaves so perversely. I think it must be extremely powerful. On thinking about it As soon as he could enter a powerful force and become a giant, elder Chen couldn’t help feeling excited. He felt that the bright road of life was ahead. But he forgot a key question. Since the bombers were so famous, why hadn’t he heard of it before? On the way to the zongmen hall, elder Chen was denouncing the evil deeds of the fierce sky, He was called a man of great evil. He was amazed when he heard Xu que. He thought that the old man’s ability to splash dirty water was really first-class! He could even make up the crime of molesting grandma. It seemed that he was really determined to stand on his side. In the twinkling of an eye, they came to the front of the hall, and elder Chen’s voice suddenly dropped: “Zhang Daoyou, the front is the closed place in the fierce sky on weekdays.” Oh yes, Xu Que’s current identity is Zhang Sanfeng, the preacher elder of the fried sky sect!…

chapters.title: Chapter 1876
chapters.body:
Chapter 1876

Chapter 1876

C.1876

Until this time, elder Chen was still trying to persuade: “elder Zhang, what the fierce sky is best at is the fire magic. No one can defeat the sky and the earth with one hand. With this move, he directly flattened a Sanpin sect with infinite power. Taoist friends, why don’t we go back and make a long-term plan?”

Xu Wei waved his hand, took a deep breath and said, “strong sky! Your mother asked you to come out for dinner!”

When he roared, he had taken chakra with him. The voice echoed in the whole scorching sun gate like a god falling thunder, which had not dispersed for a long time.

Every friar who heard it was full of fog and looked confused. Several people took the friars around them and whispered.

“Did you hear the voice?”

“Yes, isn’t the fierce sky our Lord?”

“Yes, but the patriarch died hundreds of years ago? Isn’t it a ghost?”

“Eh… Don’t scare me. I’m timid!”

For a moment, the eyes of the whole Lieyang gate turned to the main hall on the main peak, trying to see what their chief Pope had done.

After Xu Wei shouted this, there was a moment of silence in the hall, and a startling noise broke out suddenly.

Boom!

A fiery figure directly broke through the roof of the hall, suspended in the air and looked down at the people.

The person’s body was surrounded by a beating fire, like flowing magma splashing, dropping a mass of fire at will, which melted the top of the hall into a big pit.

“Come, come! This is the strong sky!” elder Chen’s voice trembled. Obviously, the strong sky left a strong psychological shadow on him.

Facing such a powerful monk, Xu lacked face and was not afraid. He stepped forward and said in a deep voice, “are you the fierce sky?”

“That’s me! Did you humiliate me here?!” lie Tianqiong looked down at Xu Fei, and even burst out fire in his mouth when he spoke.

Xu que was stunned when he heard the speech: “how can you say I’m insulting you? I’m a local slang to express my respect for you.”

Where does slang look like this?

But he could feel the breath of Xu Ke, and he was also wary of it in his heart.

Seeing that this person is not old enough to have the cultivation of xianzun in the middle period, he is even afraid that he can step into the peak of xianzun and become the same existence as himself in one step. Naturally, it can not be underestimated.

Therefore, he didn’t get angry for the first time, but said in a deep voice: “I see… I don’t know what you’re doing here?”

Xu que touched his chin and thought for a while. He suddenly raised his head and said in distress, “in fact, I came to inform you that your son was killed by me.”

“My son was killed by you?” the fierce sky was stunned. The first reaction was not to believe it. “Taoist friends, don’t make such a joke.”

He didn’t believe it for a reason. After all, how could there be such an idiot in the world who killed someone else’s son and stabbed it in front of his father?

Then he saw that Xu que took out his backhand, directly took out a body and threw it on the ground. He looked up at himself and said, “look, isn’t this your son?”

After being swallowed by Qilin, the fierce soul has disappeared, but the body has not been seriously damaged.

Therefore, Xu que took it with him and fished it out of the storage space until this time.

Seeing this scene, the strong sky was stunned for a moment, then trembled, red eyes, and an angry voice spread all over the sky: “bastard! You dare to kill my son! I’m going to break you into pieces today, hang your soul in the cave of the Soul Eater, and suffer the pain of being bitten by your soul!”

The fire on his body surged up and suddenly turned into a sea of fire covering the sky. Even the white clouds were burned everywhere he went.

Even standing on the ground, you can feel the fierce heat!

Elder Chen was already sweating. He didn’t know whether it was hot or scared. He even said in a voice: “be careful, Taoist friends. This is the unique skill of the fierce sky to melt the sky and the earth. At the beginning, he burned a strong man in the same realm alive!”

Inside the burning sun gate, the monks who saw this scene were stunned and looked for places to take refuge.

They are too aware of their patriarch’s temper. When this move is made, it is clear that they have moved the real fire. They want the person who provokes him to die without burial!

The movement here also attracted the attention of most friars in the West Tianmen City. The big three grade sect gates and even the powerful friars in the two grade sect gate showed their bodies and looked in the direction of the Lieyang gate.

“That’s interesting. The old devil has such a big fire? Is he green?”

“Hahaha, it’s possible! The old devil was so arrogant that he wanted to be promoted to the second grade sect some time ago!”

“Yes, we’d better wear two more green hats to eliminate our hatred!”

In the middle of the West Tianmen City, in a luxurious Pavilion, two monks are sitting opposite each other.

The nun sitting on the left is an old acquaintance of Fang Ling and the wind and moon of Cheng Yuanxian domain.

Opposite him was a young man with a white face like jade. He gently shook a jade fan in his hand and smiled softly: “it seems that the strong sky is not very popular in the West Tianmen.” “the old lust ghost wanted to pursue me.” Feng Yuehua looked at the young man like water and said softly, “Ji Hua, you promised to support me in this selection of the principal disciples.” while talking, the delicate hands covered the young man’s right hand on the table and gently rubbed his fingertips. The young man called Ji Hua resisted the idea of grasping each other’s jade hands and playing between his palms: “Don’t worry, since I promised you, I will help you do it. It’s just to get the support of the whole friars in Chengyuan immortal domain. It’s easy to do it.” After all, as a descendant of the Ji family, it’s easy to do all this. All this comes from Ji Tiancheng, the gifted friar who was born in the sky and the glorious ancestor of the Ji family! When she heard the other party’s answer, Feng Yuehua smiled more brightly, but there was a deep dislike in her eyes. If she didn’t need to rely on the other party’s strength, she would be happy I don’t want to have anything to do with this kind of guy at all. These male friars are just greedy for their own bodies. They even look at themselves with disgusting eyes. The only person in the world who cares about himself is Xu Dingcheng. Thinking of this, Feng Yuehua’s heart suddenly rises a fierce hatred. Xu Dingcheng is dead and died in the hands of the thief monk! She turns her head and looks out of the window, br>

chapters.title: Chapter 1877
chapters.body:
Chapter 1877

Chapter 1877

C.1877

Inside the burning sun gate, the flames are towering.

After a period of brewing, the whole sky has completely turned into a sea of fire, and all the monks in the sect have found a place to take refuge.

On the mountain peak, those spirit trees that have been cultivated by Reiki for thousands of years have been unable to bear the heat wave and burned into coke.

Even elder Chen felt that he could not support himself, driving Xianyuan to put a barrier around him to resist the heat wave.

Even so, he still felt hot all over, as if he was going to be skinned by the sun.

“Taoist friend, do you let him… What are you wearing in your eyes?” elder Chen just turned his head to persuade Xu que, and suddenly saw a pair of black glasses on his eyes.

Xu que smelled the speech, pointed to his eyes and said, “Oh, this is the high-quality special Sunglasses produced by fried tianbang. Do you need them?”

“OK?” elder Chen saw that Xu Ke had almost no response to the heat wave. He thought it was a magic weapon and couldn’t help but rejoice.

“Chenghui 200000 spirit stone.”

After repeated entanglement, elder Chen still reluctantly bought sunglasses.

After all, under the erosion of this heat, if you look directly at the sea of fire, your eyes may be irreversibly damaged.

When he put on his sunglasses, he found that the whole world was dark, and the seemingly fierce sea of fire in the sky was a little dim, no longer as dazzling as just now.

“What a good thing!” elder Chen praised him. He even felt that the burning heat on his body had been reduced by a few points.

“Right,” Xu said. “We should believe that we have the fried tianbang. We don’t need to worry about such a small role in front of us.”

Then he snapped his fingers to the side: “two dogs, send the chicken wings.”

At the foot of the mountain, there was a sound of footsteps, followed by an excited cry: “brother lack! The God has found their treasure house! There are still a lot of good things in it!”

Xu Xu’s movement suddenly gave a meal, and his face was a little ugly.

I made a mistake. I patronized the clothes and forgot to search the treasure house!

Elder Chen’s heart jumped when he heard that the treasure house had been searched, but he was relieved to think that he had betrayed the sun gate now.

It’s just that I talk about the style of the treasure house. I always feel a little familiar

“What’s the matter with you?” Xu que asked, noticing that elder Chen had a strange expression.

Elder Chen thought for a moment and said with a smile: “Nothing, just Taoist friend, your coming companion reminds me of the wicked dog group who was on the side of the disaster in the West Tianmen gate. Their favorite thing at that time was to search people’s treasure houses in various sects, which made the whole west Tianmen gate angry and resentful. These guys are too slippery. Let alone catch them, few people have seen their real bodies

“Listen to you, you seem to have met?” Xu Ke said strangely.

Elder Chen showed a proud look on his face: “I’m not talented. I’ve been lucky to see wicked dogs stealing treasure houses. I’m one of the few witnesses.”

Just at this time, two dogs hurried over with a large plate of chicken wings, wearing sunglasses on their faces.

As soon as elder Chen saw Er Gouzi, he immediately said happily, “Hey, yes, the dog in the wicked dog looks very much like your partner.”

As soon as he saw the blazing sea of fire above his head, he shouted excitedly, “lying in the trough! With such a strong fire, isn’t the roasted chicken wings cooked quickly?”

“Do you know how to eat!” Xu lacked a painful heart disease first. “I asked you to sort out the data of the sun gate. Have you sorted it out?”

It’s not a trivial matter to push down the Yongye hall. At least we should collect enough data to plan how to do it.

The second dog son hurriedly said, “of course, I remember. All the materials in the burning sun door are in the stomach of our God.”

Elder Chen heard the speech and said, “the wicked dog also likes to swallow the collected treasures into his stomach.”

With these words, he was suddenly silent for a moment, and his face was strange.

“In fact, you are the dog, aren’t you?” elder Chen suddenly said.

The second dog looked at him and said, “you’ve been shouting the title of the combination of God Zun just now. What’s the matter?”

Elder Chen was shocked. It turned out that this is really the dog!

No wonder I’m familiar with the name of fried tianbang. Before, the wicked dog group has always claimed that they belong to the powerful combination of fried tianbang!

After a while, the strong aroma began to emanate from the roasted chicken wings.

Elder Chen’s nose stirred twice and was immediately hooked by the aroma.

“It’s delicious… It’s delicious… How can there be such delicious food at the end of the day?” elder Chen flashed and went directly to the grill and looked at Xu lack eagerly. “Taoist friend, can you let me taste a roast chicken wing?”

Although he has long been divorced from the need of appetite, the pursuit of delicious food has been firmly engraved in the genes of every human friar, or in the depths of the soul. Elder Chen is one of the best. He is best at tasting delicious food, so he can’t resist the temptation of roast chicken wings! Xu que fanned with one hand and didn’t lift his head. “Fried chicken wings with tianbang, Chenghui 20000 spirit stones.” “20000 spirit stones…” elder Chen hesitated. He didn’t think he couldn’t take it out, but he just thought it was not cost-effective to buy a string of roast chicken wings with 20000 spirit stones. Two dogs immediately yelled: “twenty thousand spirit stones still want to eat the chicken wings baked by God? It’s a dream, a fantasy, a fantasy! At least two hundred thousand!” two hundred thousand! You might as well grab it! Elder Chen didn’t wait for Xu Kuang to speak. He took out 20000 spirit stones and stuffed them into Xu Kuang’s hand. He took a bunch of chicken wings and ran away: “20000, buy it and leave it. Don’t regret it!” Xu Kuang couldn’t laugh or cry. He put the spirit stone into the storage ring and looked at Er Gouzi: “your cultural level has improved recently. You can even say idioms.” “hum, I respect God and am rich in learning, but I didn’t like to show it before.” The second dog looked very proud and said, “what are you going to do with the old man in the sky, brother Qian?” “don’t worry, greedy for him first. You put the grill here. Ah, yes, fan the fragrance in the sky.” the strong sky was in a state of readiness at this time. The pain of losing his son made him use of this move, I wish I could melt the enemy who killed my son into ashes on the spot. However, at this time, a strange aroma penetrated into the tip of his nose and immediately awakened him from his ready state. What’s that? It smells so good! He suddenly opened his eyes, saw the situation below, and directly gushed out an old blood. These bastards roasted chicken wings under their own fire! It’s so deceptive

chapters.title: Chapter 1878
chapters.body:
Chapter 1878

Chapter 1878

C.1878

Seeing this scene, the fierce sky could no longer control his anger. His hands formed all kinds of mysterious printing formulas in the air, and the sea of fire suddenly fell.

“Humble mole ants, today you will die without a place to bury!”

Boom!

The scorching sea of fire is like a real ocean, blocking out the sky and the sun, falling towards Xu Que and others.

Two dogs immediately screamed, “my roast chicken wings! They’re all burnt! They’re all burnt!”

Elder Chen also panicked: “Taoist friends, hurry up and prepare for the battle! It’s not so easy to melt heaven and earth!”

Xu Wei then threw Er Gouzi behind him, got up and stretched: “Hoo… It’s just a sea of fire. What’s difficult to deal with.”

Your own flame is a fusion of countless different fires. It’s just a sea of ordinary fire. What can you do for yourself?

Just when he was ready to take action, a fierce fire suddenly gushed out of Xu Ke, turned into a small flame, floating in the air and flying violently up and down.

“Eh, what is this?” Xu was stunned. There was no such flame on him.

Xu Wei felt angry from the young flame.

It is the anger of the superior when he is offended by the inferior.

“Ding, detect the anger of the God of fire. Ordinary flames dare to show off their power in front of the gods. The will from the God of fire will automatically fight back, so that ordinary people can understand what is the real flame!”

Xu que was shocked: “the God of fire will help me?”

“Ding, the counterattack is not the initiative of the God of fire, but the passive reaction of the will attached to the God of fire’s curse. The God of fire does not allow the people cursed by himself to die under the inferior flame.”

Xu Wei suddenly realized that this is the persistence of the legendary “you can only kill me, and no one else can kill”.

I didn’t expect that the God of fire is still such a guy with style. It’s really impressive.

Thinking of this, he suddenly stopped, stood in place and quietly looked at the huge sea of fire in the air.

When elder Chen first saw him start to move, he was already relieved. At this time, he suddenly stopped. Instead, he was scared crazy by a small flame Fei Shangqiu.

“Taoist friend! Don’t joke at this time! If this move falls, we will really die without a place to bury!” elder Chen said in fear.

He has seen with his own eyes how the fierce sky sky used this move to melt the opponent in the same realm into slag.

Seeing this scene, the fierce sky immediately laughed wildly and said, “stupid! It seems that you have been frightened by this seat, and unexpectedly expect such a small flame to defeat this seat! When this seat melts you into slag, it will tell you how stupid this behavior is!”

Xu Kui shook his head, suddenly lit a cigarette, took a sip, and then exhaled. The light smoke brushed the black lens, looking indifferent and mature.

He said faintly, “this kind of small scene doesn’t even need me to do it myself. It only needs a snap of my fingers.”

Elder Chen is numb. He thinks you really can play

However, Xu kuzhen raised his right hand in front of him and gently hit a snap of his fingers.

The sound of snapping fingers was not big, even only elder Chen standing beside him could hear it.

But after such a snap, the small flame that rushed into the sea of fire suddenly burst into matchless light, and then a gust of wind came out of the flame and swept the whole sky in an instant.

Then, the strong sky found that the sea of fire was out of control.

No matter how hard he tried and urged with his mind, the whole sea of fire was not within the scope of his perception, as if it was not his own move at all.

“This, how is this possible?” even in the middle of the sea of fire, he didn’t sweat. At this time, a drop of sweat finally fell on his forehead.

The fierce wind wrapped the whole sky and completely wrapped the sea of fire in it.

Then, like the essence, these winds began to shrink wildly, and the whole sea of fire also narrowed slowly. From the initial sky blocking out the sun, it gradually turned into the size of a lake, then into a small pond, and finally condensed into the size of water droplets.

Then, only a “Bo” sound was heard, and the water droplets condensed by the flame melted into the small flame, just like a stream into the river and sea.

The whole process took only a few breathing times.

Elder Chen felt like a dream. It was clear that the terrible force was in front of him, but it disappeared in an instant.

If Xu Duan beside him and the roast chicken wings in the distance were not reminding himself that everything he had just experienced was true, I was afraid he would feel that he was really living in a dream.

Besides him, the most shocking thing was the fierce sky.

At this time, he was stupid on the spot, staring at the empty sky, trying to find a trace of evidence that the sea of fire once existed.

No,

I can’t find anything.

You know, the sea of fire of his move does not come out of thin air, but needs to collect flames from all parties, continuously smelt them, and then call out to kill the enemy in battle. In order to condense the sea of fire, he almost searched the whole Xianyun island. He didn’t know how many dangers he had experienced, so he collected enough powerful flames to condense the sea of fire. It was by this sea of fire that he took the position of the leader of the Lieyang sect. Relying on this sea of fire, he led the Lieyang gate to become the leader of the third grade sect, and saw that he was about to lead the whole sect to become the second grade sect, completing the unprecedented glory of the Lieyang gate. As long as he can complete all this, his name will be praised by countless people of the Lieyang gate. In the future, people will remember his name of the lietian sky for thousands of years. It was he who led zongmen to a new height! But now, everything is gone. The second grade sect has been famous for thousands of years, and even lost the sea of fire. He can’t break through to the half step Immortal Emperor. He spent half his life in the sea of fire, which is equivalent to a small half of him. Without the sea of fire, it’s good to maintain the peak cultivation of xianzun. “This… How is this possible?” the fierce sky was silent for a long time and spit out this sentence with difficulty. The little flame seemed dissatisfied with the sea of fire. It staggered back to Xu Xu, and “Bo” integrated into his eyebrows and disappeared without a trace. Xu Xu sensed it for a moment and determined that the little flame was a pure will thing. Then he put down his heart, looked at strong Tianqiong and said with a light smile: “it seems that Lord lie is very dissatisfied with me for killing your son. He unexpectedly welcomed me with such a large sea of fire?” strong Tianqiong looked at Xu Xu Xu silently and trembled. A moment later, he blushed and suddenly roared, “that damn villain, I’ve long wanted to kill my family! I’m very grateful that Taoist friends have removed a heart disease for me!” elder Chen shook his body and almost fell to the ground, sighing sincerely in his heart. How else can I say that people are the patriarch… They can’t catch up with their ability to drive the wind

chapters.title: Chapter 1879
chapters.body:
Chapter 1879

Chapter 1879

C.1879

In the West Tianmen City, a group of monks closely watched the movement of the Lieyang gate.

After all, except for the few second grade sect doors, the Lieyang gate is the top existence in the third grade sect door.

It can make the fierce sky like a great enemy, and even the great kill move has been released, which shows how dangerous the enemy facing the fierce sun gate is at this time.

“Hey, the old guy has accepted the move.” a friar suddenly said.

All the people looked up and found that the sea of fire that originally blocked the sky and the sun had disappeared at this time.

The sky has recovered from its previous situation again, as if nothing had happened.

“It seems that the guy who came to the door to provoke has lost his bones.” a friar smiled.

When others heard the speech, they suddenly reacted and echoed.

“Yes, it seems that the cultivation of the old man in the fierce sky has taken another step.”

“I don’t know who is so bold to challenge the old ghost.”

“Let’s go. Let’s go. It’s over.”

A friar doubted: “the old ghost just turned off like this? I remember someone came to the door to provoke me last time. The old ghost made a world shaking noise…”

“It’s harmful. When people get old, their temper will always get better.” someone replied, “maybe he’s making tea in the door now.”

At this time, the strong sky sat in front of a wooden table, looking serious and like a great enemy.

On the wooden table, there is a set of fire jade tea set, which, if put on the market, is worth at least hundreds of thousands of spirit stones.

Immediately, he suddenly got up, his eyes splashed, took up the tea cup, served it over his head, and said in a high voice, “please drink tea!”

Sitting on the throne of the patriarch, cangjingkong felt that his world outlook was about to collapse when he saw this scene.

What happened? Who am I? Where am I?

A quarter of an hour ago, he was still worried about the future development of cangyun sect.

A quarter of an hour later, he was already sitting on the throne of the leader of the Lieyang gate and accepting the tea offered by the former leader.

All this came off guard, so that he only felt that life was like a dream at this moment.

“Master, this…” he turned to Xu Xu, eager to get a truth.

Xu que sat aside, holding a cup of tea in his hand, waved his hand and said, “what time is three, drink tea first!”

“Er… What did you say?”

“I told you to drink tea first and stop talking nonsense.”

On hearing the speech, lie Tianqiong hurriedly squeezed out a smiling face and said with a flattering smile: “elder Zhang, you don’t know. Some time ago, Xu Dingcheng, a contemporary principal disciple, went to the Tianmen competition and unfortunately died prematurely. Therefore, Yongye hall hereby issued a notice to conduct a large-scale selection in Chengyuan immortal region to select the latest principal disciple.”

“Are you so free to choose the principal disciples of Chengyuan immortal realm?” Xu que was stunned. He felt that this immortal realm seemed different from other immortal realms.

Although I have only been in Yongzhen immortal realm, I have heard about the other two immortal realms.

No matter which immortal region chooses disciples, they always choose the best from the best. Ordinary monks are not qualified to enter the ranks of disciples.

How did you get to Chengyuan immortal realm? It seems that as long as you are a monk, you can participate in the selection of principal disciples.

“Well, this should start with emperor Cheng Yuanxian.” lie Tianqiong, like an encyclopedia, began to explain to Xu que, “before emperor Cheng Yuanxian became Emperor Xian, he was also just an ordinary monk. Later, by chance, he participated in a competition, unexpectedly defeated all the disciples of Emperor Xian at that time and shocked the whole immortal domain.”

“Because of his appearance, the Immortal Emperor at that time believed that the disciples selected by merit were not necessarily the best friars. Therefore, the position of principal disciples was established above the disciples, and anyone could participate through selection. Although the principal disciples did not have much real power, their status was above all the disciples, and they nominally had the right to order the disciples.”

As soon as Xu Ke heard this, he noticed the disadvantages: “shit! With such an outrageous management method, you chengyuanxian domain didn’t have civil strife?”

“Er… In fact, there have been civil strife several times before, but the way to select the principal disciples at that time was through force selection. Therefore, most of the disciples who can become the principal disciples are those with excellent cultivation. Therefore, even if someone finds fault, the principal disciples can suppress them.” lie Tianqiong explained.

Xu que suddenly realized, and then fell into meditation.

According to this, the best way to enter the eternal night temple is to participate in the selection of the principal disciples.

Then the problem comes

Before that, er Gouzi and Duan Jiude had already ruined the reputation of the fried Tiangang by committing crimes in Yuanxian domain. Now the people in Yuanxian domain hate the fried Tiangang.

“Shit, it’s all your fault!” Xu Weiyue thought angrily. “You two can’t accomplish anything more than defeat!” Er Gouzi said righteously: “brother Wei, you can’t say that. All our actions in Chengyuan immortal region are to carry forward the reputation of the fried sky gang and promote the arrival of the fried sky gang in advance.” “Oh, really?” Xu Weiyue sneered, Seizing Er Gouzi’s neck, he turned his head and flew over a city. Er Gouzi seemed to notice something, and his face suddenly changed: “brother Kuang, what do you want to do?” Xu Kuang ignored him, took a deep breath and shouted, “fried Tiangang Er Gouzi is here, who dares to fight!” the voice fell, and the whole west Tianmen City burst open. Countless powerful breath suddenly burst out, and Taoist cloud pillars gushed from everywhere and directly into the sky. That was the breath spilled out under the anger of powerful friars. “Shit! The dead dog dares to appear!” “don’t stop me. I’m going to break the dead dog to pieces today!” “Taoist friend, wait a minute, let me cut it with the first knife!” “I’m going to cut the last knife. The dead dog stole all our family treasure house. Today I need to peel and cramp the dog and hang it outside the family door for thousands of days!” lie in the trough! Xu Wei was surprised. What the hell did the dead dog do? You offended the whole friars in xitianmen city! “Brother short! Brother short! Come on, these guys are crazy!” the two dogs wriggled with their teeth and claws open and their faces were frightened. Xu que threw the two dogs away and suddenly disappeared into the sky. Run, two dogs! Watching countless powerful spells emerge one after another in the city, Xu que sends out sincere blessings…..

chapters.title: Chapter 1880
chapters.body:
Chapter 1880

Chapter 1880

C.1880

In the next few days, Xu que made an unexpected discovery by consulting the classics of the Lieyang gate.

It turned out that the principal disciples of Chengyuan immortal domain can also enter the central Tianmen.

After receiving this news, Xu Xu Xu immediately called everyone of the Lieyang sect – or cangyun sect.

After Xu que took care of the leader of the Lieyang sect, lietian dome, lightly, the two sects reached an intention of cooperation through friendly consultation.

There are deficiencies as coordination, and there is no obstacle to the integration of the two sects.

In a moment, a group of monks gathered in the main hall.

Xu weiduan sat on the first seat and said in a deep voice: “everyone, you can get together here. I think you all have a common goal and pursuit. Elder lie Tianqiong, your dream is to lead the Lieyang gate to become a second-class sect, right?”

The fierce sky was still distracted. At this time, he was suddenly named and quickly raised his head: “ah… Yes, it is.”

Up to now, he has not recovered from the blow of the commander of the scorching sun gate.

What I did before was just a subconscious reaction to save my life.

Until now, he suddenly realized that the scorching sun door was gone.

Before he said anything, Xu que looked at cangjingkong again and said in a deep voice, “elder Cang, your dream is to carry forward cangyun sect, right?”

A few days ago, after a brief experience of the sect leader, Cang Jingkong was demoted and became the elder of the new sect cangyang sect – the name comes from the combination of cangyun sect and Lieyang sect.

Hearing Xu Que’s question, Cang Jingkong nodded and said, “yes, this is the wish of the younger generation in this life.”

The strong sky showed its teeth and despised it.

Dog leg!

It’s a disgrace to the xitianmen city that the once dignified patriarch should be so subservient to a young man!

“Lord, if we are attached to this man’s name, what’s the difference between being a dog?” the friar next to us saw it and whispered, “as long as you say, Lord, we will lead the whole friar immediately and turn against this damn guy!”

Because the number of cangyun sect is too small, most of the monks in cangyang sect are those who once belonged to the Lieyang sect.

The strong sky dome closed his eyes and meditated for a while, and said in a deep voice: “OK, listen to my orders in a moment. Then we will do it together, and we can seriously hurt this person!”

He figured out that the reason why he had failed before must be that the incident happened suddenly, plus what sinister means the boy used.

This time, as long as you are more careful, you can definitely win it!

I will never be a dog!

“Fierce sky elder!” Xu Ke’s voice suddenly sounded.

The fierce sky suddenly returned to God, and his face was gloomy and said, “I don’t know what the Lord has to say?”

Hum, boy, this is your last chance to command this seat.

As he thought, he began to run Xianyuan and accumulate strength in his body.

At the same time, he issued a secret signal to command the friars who once belonged to the Lieyang gate to prepare the array. At that time, he will take this son with a sudden blow.

Xu que suddenly didn’t check it. Lang Sheng said, “now the director of our sect has ordered you to be the main person in charge of the plan for the main disciples, responsible for collecting the data of the candidates…”

With a cold hum from the strong sky, the immortal yuan burst all over, and the brilliance flowed along the floor. It was the power of each monk.

Xu Xu continued, “but it’s difficult. I give you a bottle of Holy Spirit pill to help you break through!”

Boom!

The fierce sky was swaying. He didn’t control his power for a while, and immediately activated the array.

Countless streamers surged up and golden lines flowed in the air, forming a huge array in an instant.

All the monks present, except the one who presided over the array, felt a surge of pressure suddenly coming.

Only Xu Que and lie Tianqiong stood inside as if nothing had happened.

The fierce sky dome will not be affected because it is the person in charge of the array.

Xu Ke doesn’t think this array has anything at all. His actual combat power has already reached the half step Immortal Emperor. This array is dead and can suppress the peak of immortal Zun.

“What’s this?” Xu que teased the immortal cloud that formed the array and frowned.

The strong sky seemed unheard of. He looked at the pill floating in the air and couldn’t return to his mind for a long time.

That’s Holy Spirit Dan!

It is said that it can directly make xianzun break through the peak of xianzun in the middle stage, and there will be no realm of vanity!

I searched for several years and couldn’t find such a bottle of pills.

Unexpectedly, I put it in front of myself now!

He looked at the pill, and then looked at Xu que, who seemed to have nothing happened. He directly pulled the pill back, with a warm smile on his face: “Lord, this array is a celebration array I set up because I feel the power and greatness of the Lord.”

“Oh, really? What’s the effect?” Xu Ke said strangely. “This array can set off fireworks!” with a wave of his big hand, the fierce sky directly drove Xianyuan and detonated the whole array. At the moment when the array exploded, he forcibly controlled the violent power of Xianyuan and led it to the sky. Bang! In an instant, the array burst, and countless immortal elements ran wildly in the air, tearing the clouds and the void. Under the interweaving of various forces, they even formed a beautiful picture, just like bright fireworks. “Poof!” one friar spurted blood first, and the other friars spurted blood three times in a row. These friars are in charge of the array. When the array is broken, they are naturally deeply hurt. They stared at their patriarch in disbelief. Lord, are you crazy? What are you doing? Lie Tianqiong stared at the sky with a smile and said: “gentlemen, in fact, the patriarch thought about it and found that it’s not bad to be a dog.” friars: “…” the ups and downs of life made these young friars unbearable for a time, and several friars immediately passed out in a coma. Xu que frowned and said, “these young people… Why are they so weak? You should practice well when you go back.” lie Tianqiong arched his hands and said, “the patriarch said yes.” at this time, he had completely given up the idea of rebellion. The array has no effect on others, and he has got the Holy Spirit Dan to break through the realm. Is it necessary to rebel? As for being a dog or something, hum, a group of young people don’t know the benefits of being a dog leg! In the West Tianmen City, the friars of other forces feel whether there is something wrong with the fierce sky these days. A few days ago, I suddenly set fire to the sky. Today, I suddenly set off fireworks in the door? “Is the strong sky crazy?” “I don’t know… Maybe there is something happy…” “I think it may be Alzheimer’s disease…” for a time, the news about the leader of Lieyang sect, strong sky, unfortunately suffering from Alzheimer’s disease spread all over the West Tianmen City…….

chapters.title: Chapter 1881
chapters.body:
Chapter 1881

Chapter 1881

C.1881

The next day, the whole cangyang gate began to act.

In the past, although the Lieyang gate was the top of the Sanpin sect, it was only a Sanpin sect after all. The competition of the main disciples had nothing to do with them.

But now with Xu Ke, the level of the whole sect suddenly rose to a big step.

With the support of Er Gouzi’s treasure, Xu Weihua’s treasure is simply heinous. As long as there is a clue, he will give a treasure of high value.

Two dogs almost beat their chests and feet, cried bitterly, and even wanted to run several times, but they were finally caught by Xu vacancy.

After a whole day’s collection, the monks returned to the sun gate and reported the news.

Xu Ke is not stingy. As long as the news is true, they can get rich rewards.

It’s not your own baby anyway. It doesn’t hurt to spend other people’s money.

Every friar came out of the gate of the main hall with a happy face.

Only two dogs’ cries and howls, mixed with them, appear to be particularly disharmonious.

The selection of principal disciples is divided into three aspects. The first priority is strength, which naturally goes without saying.

But the second important thing is the popularity?

Xu Ke was stupid when he saw this one.

According to data, the popularity of monks participating in the selection accounted for 40% of the final results.

This is ridiculous, okay!

What’s the difference between this and the draft?

As for the last aspect, it is assessed by the envoys sent by the central Tianmen.

It is said that these envoys are the personal guards of the Immortal Emperor. They are impartial and merciless. In those years, someone tried to bribe the envoys, but they were killed on the spot.

However, these are small problems. Xu que doesn’t believe that there are so many impartial and selfless people in the world.

If so, xianyunzhou would not have invaded Tianzhou and tried to destroy it.

As long as you are human, you must have desire.

But these are all later words. Now the top priority is to become the real principal disciple.

Only in this way can you enter the central Tianmen gate.

As for what shit ship, it has nothing to do with yourself.

“Well, in that case, the first thing we should do now should be clear to everyone.”

Hearing this, several people in the main hall looked up at Xu vacancy and waited for his next words.

In the past few days, Xu Ke has completely conquered the two former patriarchs of fierce sky and cangjingkong by showing his amazing strength and strategy.

Now they have firmly followed Xu Que’s lead and won’t have the slightest disobedience.

Fierce sky boldly put forward a guess: “are we going to show our strength?”

Cang Jingkong frowned and thought for a long time before he said, “we should make friends with other forces and let them vote for us?”

Xu que couldn’t help sighing. From their answers, we can see their respective temperament.

Lie Tianqiong was once the top sect leader in the Sanpin sect. It can be said that he suppressed the same sect. Therefore, in the face of things, his first reaction was to suppress them strongly.

Cangjingkong was used to being weak, but he didn’t have the ability to solve problems, so his first reaction was to find someone to help.

“You’re both wrong.” Xu Wei shook his head. “What we have to do now is to eliminate dissidents.”

discriminate against those who hold different views?

Cangjingkong and fierce sky looked at each other, and some didn’t understand Xu Ke’s meaning.

Xu Wei patiently explained, “you see, this is the case now. How many monks have participated in the selection?”

Cang Jingkong held down a jade slip and felt it for a while. His face trembled: “it should be… 13972 now. This number is still increasing.”

“That’s right. The position of Principal Disciple is so tempting that most monks don’t force them to count. No matter what cattle, ghosts, snakes and gods will find a way to intervene.” Xu vacancy said, “in order to avoid accidents, we must first eliminate those miscellaneous fish.”

The fierce sky was stunned, and his face showed evil spirit: “the patriarch’s meaning is… Kill them all?”

“I don’t mean you, Lao lie. You’re so old. Don’t shout to fight and kill at any time.” Xu Wei felt the hard work of leading the team. “If they want to participate in the selection of principal disciples, they always have to sign up? Wouldn’t it be good if we stopped them on the way to sign up?”

The fierce sky hesitated for a moment and wondered: “there’s no problem with human hands… But I’m afraid we can’t stop it. After all, mass destruction is strictly prohibited on the day of registration, so the methods used before can’t be used anymore…”

Xu Ke was stunned: “what methods did you use before?”

“Well, mass destruction magic can wash the ground, or arrange to kill the array to trap all the people, whether they live or die…” Xu Wei was numb and thought you were still a terrorist organization! No wonder it was a killing move to destroy the sky and the earth at that time, which has a historical heritage. “Now is a peaceful society. If we want to gain popularity, we can’t kill people.” Xu que called two people and taught them, “listen to me and do it on the day of registration according to the method I said.” the three people whispered in the main hall for a long time. Ergouzi and Duan Jiude listened and sighed. “Brother Kuang is really wicked…” “tut Tut, I don’t know which unlucky reminder will be intercepted at that time.” in the twinkling of an eye, three days have passed, and soon it’s the day of registration. On this day, the whole xitianmen city was restless, and countless monks came from all directions. They are not only from the West Tianmen City, but also the friars of the Chengyuan immortal region. The identity of the principal disciple is too tempting. You can not only enter the central Tianmen, but also order the disciples. In other words, when the Immortal Emperor does not lower the boundary, the whole immortal domain is under the control of the principal disciples. This makes a large number of monks flock to it. Even those with poor strength want to participate in it in order to expect some benefits. Ding is one of them. As a monk in a remote place, Ding Fang is a child of a rich Xiuxian family in the place where he was born, but he is still in the countryside. In his heart, only the West Tianmen City is the place where many monks should come. Therefore, after hearing about the selection of the main disciples, he made a quick decision, took his possessions and went all the way here. Walking on the street, he sighed about the luxury of xitianmen City, and his heart was full of longing for the future. Turning a corner, Ding Fang suddenly stopped and looked at the monk in front of him. “Taoist friend, what advice do you have?” Ding Fang arched his hands cautiously. The monk was silent for a moment and suddenly said, “are you wearing pants?” Ding Fang: “?”… br>

chapters.title: Chapter 1882
chapters.body:
Chapter 1882

Chapter 1882

C.1882

Rao shiding Fang made great efforts to do a lot of research on the West Tianmen City. He felt confused in the face of this sudden problem.

Why does this person ask such questions as soon as he comes up?

Is this a strange local custom?

But the problem is, this custom is too fucking open!

Even if we are all monks and pure men, it will make people feel embarrassed if we blurt out this question!

Ding Fang stared at the monk in front of him. The other side was tall and burly. The breath on his body showed the cultivation accomplishments of the other side’s immortal realm, which he could not resist now.

His talent is not good enough. Up to now, he is only cultivating his accomplishments in the middle of the fairy king.

It is precisely because of this that I will try my best to come to xitianmen city.

Even if you can’t compete for the position of principal disciple, you can also seek some benefits and strive for further progress.

To this end, he specially formulated a package of strengthening plan, with vigorous ambition and wants to become a top strong person.

The first step of the package strengthening plan was a setback in the eyes of the people.

Ding Fang was confused and murmured, “when I was in my hometown, I heard that the monks outside had all kinds of strange hobbies. Is it your excellency that this is the legendary… Fool?”

The breath on the burly friar suddenly sank, as if this sentence had stabbed him in the pain.

Ding Fang was stunned and suddenly slapped himself in the face.

The other side is a monk in xianzun territory. Even if he has any quirks, wouldn’t he beat others in the face if he said it in public?

“Please atone for your sins, sir. I’m from a remote place. I don’t know the customs here. Please forgive me.” Ding Fang quickly bowed his hands and apologized, and then asked carefully, “is it… People don’t wear underwear here?”

The burly Friar’s face was already a little slow. When he heard the questions behind him, his face turned black into charcoal, and his breath began to become disordered, as if in an unstable mood.

Ding Fang was stunned. Is it difficult for him to have another problem?

How do you feel that this elder seems to be in a worse mood?

Could it be that the friars in the West Tianmen City are extremely unstable?

Tut, the outside world is really too difficult

Fortunately, however, it seems that the elder doesn’t seem to have to quarrel with himself immediately.

The burly friar took two deep breaths and said in a deep voice, “answer my question.”

Ding Fang didn’t dare to talk any more, so he had to say, “er… Actually, the younger generation didn’t wear it.”

As soon as the voice fell, he saw the shadow of the fist magnifying rapidly in his field of vision. Then he lost consciousness when he was dark, leaving only the whisper of the burly monk in his ear.

“Let you not wear underwear!”

When he woke up again, it was an hour later.

Ding Fang is a fool. Do friars in xitianmen city have such a quirk?

Just because you don’t wear underwear, you have to be beaten?

What the hell is this!

After this lesson, Ding Fang felt that he had a deeper understanding of xitianmen and ran back to change into his underwear.

Immediately, he set out again and prepared to go to the eternal night hall to sign up

As soon as I went out, I turned around and saw the strong monk standing in front of me and asked faintly, “are you wearing underwear?”

Ding Fang sneered and thought that he would not be fooled for the second time!

He straightened his chest and said confidently, “wear it!”

“What color are you wearing?”

“Black.”

Just after answering, Ding Fang only felt that he was black in front of his eyes. In his ear, he only heard the friar muttering, “let you wear black…”

Half an hour later, he woke up again and felt that he was going crazy.

The friar of West Tianmen City is crazy, isn’t he?

What’s wrong with wearing black underwear?

People don’t like black yet, do they?!

After thinking in place for a while, Ding Fang flashed a cruel color at the bottom of his eyes, ran to a ready-made clothing store and directly bought a set of underwear of all colors.

After expelling a lot of money, he embarked on the road to the eternal night hall again with colorful underwear.

The burly friar appeared in front of him again: “are you wearing underwear?”

“Yes!”

“What color?”

Ding Fang didn’t answer. He directly took out a cloth bag from the storage ring and threw it on the ground. He said loudly, “there are all colors here. I can change whatever color you like, senior!”

The burly friar was silent for a long time, and suddenly asked, “are you wearing underwear?”

Ding Fang’s heart suddenly raised an ominous premonition: “wear it, wear it…”

Bang!

The huge fist directly hit his forehead and stunned him in an instant. Before he fainted completely, he heard the burly friar muttering again: “let you wear underwear…” Ding Fang was completely crazy. You can’t wear it or not. What do you want me to do! The friars in xitianmen city are too abnormal! Mom, I want to go home! When he woke up again, without saying a word, he took his luggage and went straight away from xitianmen city. In this life, I will never come to xitianmen city again! This is Ding Fang’s last thought before leaving. The same situation happened in every corner of xitianmen city. Countless young friars who came with dreams, after experiencing the painful beating of society, deeply realized what it was better to be at home. So they embarked on the journey home with a broken dream heart. Inside the fierce sun gate, the fierce sky and the sky report today’s results to Xu Xu. “According to the data reported by all parties, a total of about 10000 monks were intercepted today, and the results were gratifying!” lie Tianqiong said excitedly. Reasonably speaking, there should not be so many people in the Lieyang gate, but Xu que asked the lietian dome to offer a reward to the city in the name of the cangyang gate. As long as you intercept a monk, you can get the reward of cangyang gate. Most of the monks participating in the selection are not very high. There are many monks in xitianmen who have no intention to participate in the selection. Naturally, they are happy to complete this task. Ergouzi was wailing: “my God’s baby! I’m sorry for you! It’s all my God’s fault that I didn’t protect you well!” Xu Ke slapped him on the head: “don’t howl, get ready to work.” ergouzi looked gloomy: “no! My God wants to mourn for those lost babies!” “We’re going to run the traditional business, but you won’t?” Xu que said with a smile. When Er Gouzi heard the speech, he directly aroused his spirits, turned over from the ground and said excitedly: “go, go, or we’ll be gone after we go!” aside, cangjingkong and lie Tianqiong looked at each other and didn’t understand what the old business was. Duan Jiude explained leisurely: “br>

chapters.title: Chapter 1883
chapters.body:
Chapter 1883

Chapter 1883

C.1883

Outside the Yongye hall, there is an antique building, hundreds of meters high, which can be called a landmark.

The whole building is magnificent, with blue tiles, Zhu Zhu, carved beams and painted buildings, full of artistic temperament.

On the front door of the building, there are several big characters – Qiongyu Pavilion!

This is the registration office set up in the eternal night hall. Monks who are willing to participate in the selection of main disciples can sign up here and temporarily live in Qiongyu Pavilion.

Today, Qiongyu Pavilion welcomes three uninvited guests.

A man was wearing a Taoist robe, with a sword eyebrow and starry eyes. His face was as white as jade, holding a handle to brush the dust. He looked vaguely detached.

On his side, there was a husky with extraordinary spirit. His hair was smooth. He knew that he ate well at a glance.

Impressively, Xu Xu and ER Gouzi!

As for Duan Jiude, he is responsible for dispatching in cangyang gate.

After all, there are still many fish that have escaped the net. They need to catch all the low-level friars and drive them out of xitianmen city.

“Awesome, is the Yongye hall so rich?” Xu que looked up at the building and sighed. “Can a temporary Inn be built so luxurious?”

Just then, a mockery full of disdain suddenly came from behind the three.

“A group of Hicks, this Qiongyu Pavilion is also where you can come?”

Xu Que and ER Gouzi looked at each other and smiled knowingly.

There’s a fool on it!

When they looked back, they saw several monks in luxurious clothes looking at them with a joking face.

One of them played with the exquisite jade pendant in his hand, with a delicate look on his face, and said sarcastically: “hillbilly, you want to participate in the selection of principal disciples, and you don’t even know Qiongyu pavilion? This is the place where the West Tianmen gate is used to receive the first disciples of major forces in the Chengyuan immortal region. If you come from the countryside, you’d better go back where you come from. Don’t get in the way of people here.”

“Brother short, do you want to do it?” the two dogs who turned into husky shook their tails and whispered.

Xu Weiwei waved his hand indescribably: “don’t panic. First find out who there are here. I don’t want to run again.”

The registration time is only two days. He doesn’t want to waste too much time looking for someone.

Two dogs smell the speech and agree.

One person and one dog directly crossed the two people and prepared to enter the building directly.

At this time, several people laughed wildly.

“It’s boring, a bunch of counsellors.”

“Hey, I thought I could have some seed. I didn’t expect that they didn’t dare to do it.”

“It’s all right. Someone will sign up later. Then we’ll break his hands and feet and throw him out. This kind of person from the countryside is not qualified to compete with us.”

“Don’t worry, I’ll bear any problems. My father is Zhang Erhe. There’s absolutely no problem.”

Xu Wei suddenly stopped, turned his head and looked at each other strangely, stunned and said, “what did you just say?”

The man holding the jade pendant was stunned and immediately shouted, “my father Zhang Erhe! What’s the problem?”

“Say it again.”

“My father Zhang Erhe!”

“Hit me!” Xu que scolded and waved his fist directly, “fuck Zhang Erhe! You dare to be so arrogant by your father’s stuff!”

Bang!

With a loud bang, the man was knocked down by a fist.

Xu que took advantage of the situation and kicked the man directly on the door.

Everyone present was stunned.

Including the ridiculed monk, no one expected that this young man who looked rustic and even took a dog would suddenly attack.

The most frightening thing is that the speed power and the smell on his body all show the cultivation of each other’s immortal realm.

At the moment when Xu lacked started, his state was revealed. Everyone around him felt it and was surprised.

This young man has a fairy realm?

How old is he!

Xu Wei looked at the man and said, “Why are you so weak? Do you want to compete with the principal disciples for this virtue?”

In fact, what he didn’t know was that the average cultivation level of friars in xianyunzhou was not as high as he thought.

When invading Tianzhou, xianyunzhou was slaughtered by a group of top friars. Later, he and ergouzi and others made a group around xianyunzhou.

If someone has made statistics, it will be found that since Er Gouzi and Xu que came to xianyunzhou, the death, injury and activity of the top monks in xianyunzhou have decreased significantly.

All this is just a combination of immoral dogs on Xianyun island.

Unfortunately, no one has such foresight, so xianyunzhou is bound to usher in this turmoil.

Xu Ke has no idea about his behavior. Anyway, he was trying to find fault this time. The reason why things were calmed down just now was for fear of accidentally startling some experts. It’s not easy to deal with it at that time. As a result, I didn’t expect that this guy was a second ancestor who depended on his father. Why don’t you hang people up and hammer them? “You, who are you?” Zhang Sanhe, the son of Zhang Erhe, sat down in the corner, his eyes frightened. He didn’t think that this guy who looked like a hick would be the existence of xianzun territory. You know, although xianyunzhou has abundant aura and numerous natural materials and earth treasures, it is almost the legendary evil geniuses who can reach xianzun before the age of 100. When a monk cultivates to a certain extent, he can solidify his appearance. Although Xu Ke’s age can’t be seen from his appearance, Qiongyu pavilion has a prohibition and is not allowed to enter under the age of 200. In other words, Xu Ke must exist under the age of 200! He has lived more than 150 years, but he is just the peak of the fairy king! A proud son of heaven like Xu Ke, it’s too late to please others. Did he offend others? At the thought of this, Zhang Erhe’s face turned gray and his heart was very uneasy. I just want to see the world. Did I really get into trouble with the heirs of any great power? However, Xu Ke smiled faintly and said, “I’ll fry Tian Gang Zhang Sanfeng.” fried Tian Gang? Zhang Sanfeng? The onlookers were stunned. Suddenly, someone burst out and said with red eyes, “your special mother is the man of the fried heaven Gang! Hand over the dog, or I’ll kill you!” the other monks also got up and rushed in the direction of Xu lack. “Lying in the trough!” Xu que was surprised and ran away. “Er Gouzi, did you kill their whole family?” Er Gouzi refused to accept his way as he ran: “the God knows them, but he just dug their ancestors’ graves. Is it necessary?” Xu que turned his eyes directly. How could someone make such an understatement of digging someone else’s ancestral grave

chapters.title: Chapter 1884
chapters.body:
Chapter 1884

Chapter 1884

C.1884

At Xu’s current speed, these so-called talents were directly dumped by him.

“No, you’re so hateful!” Xu Wei thought carefully and felt that he couldn’t take Er Gouzi with him.

This guy did a lot of things in xitianmen city. He took it with him. Before he had time to find someone else’s trouble, he came to the door first.

Two dogs immediately refused to accept: “I respect my beauty. Those guys are jealous that my God is more handsome than them, so they are so slandered!”

“Bullshit!” Xu Qia didn’t want to hear his explanation at all. “There’s another way. You can turn me into another species.”

Two dogs smelled the speech and said in righteous words: “it’s impossible! Even if the God is dead, jumping down from here can’t become another species!”

“Ten strings of roast chicken wings.”

“Deal!”

In Qiongyu Pavilion, demons and geniuses from all major forces are gathering together to guess the situation of this selection.

The commotion caused by Er Gouzi and others soon subsided.

The pursuers gave up their plans to continue their pursuit just a short distance away.

An extraordinary, natural and unrestrained young man appeared in the sight of everyone.

Everyone who saw the young monk was amazed.

A monk said in a daze, “how handsome…”

On the roadside, a pair of Taoist partners who were quarrelling even stopped quarrelling and stared at the young man.

The young man approached, looked at the monk who came out, smiled and said, “gentlemen, look at your look so flustered, is it that something big has happened?”

The friar who was questioned was stunned. His face suddenly turned red and murmured, “this Taoist friend, you are so handsome…”

The young man smiled and said, “I’ve heard this sentence many times, so why are you blocking here?”

The friar suddenly woke up and turned around. He hurriedly said, “Oh, oh, just now there was a villain who fled from here. We are chasing him. Do you see a dog and a young friar passing by?”

“No.” the boy shook his head regretfully and smiled, “if I see it, I will catch it.”

The friar was stunned and suddenly woke up for a long time.

Shit, I’m also a man, blushing fart!

When he looked back, he found that the boy had drifted away.

Just when he felt sorry, he suddenly heard an inexplicable sound behind him.

“Slightly!”

At the end of the street, an unknown white object was running frantically towards this side.

“What the hell?”

Before the monk could react, he only heard a “bah”, and felt his face wet.

He wiped his face hard, leaned close to the tip of his nose and smelled, and suddenly turned pale.

“This thing, spit on me!”

The friar was furious and ran after the unidentified white object directly.

I saw this thing running rampant and unscrupulous on the street. It can be said to be extremely arrogant.

Every monk he passed by couldn’t escape the bad luck of spitting.

After a while, an extremely spectacular scene appeared on the street.

The white unidentified object ran ahead, and countless monks followed closely and shouted abuse.

“Brothers, this thing spits on me!”

“You were vomited, too? I was vomited, too!”

“Catch him! You must kill him!”

The crowd swaggered through the market and made the whole west Tianmen City jump.

“Taoist friends in front, get away, this fierce beast will spit!” a monk shouted behind him.

The boy turned around with a simple smile on his face and stretched out his hand.

The white unidentified object suddenly stopped. In the stunned gaze of the people, it skillfully fell next to the boy, without the posture of spitting while running.

“Don’t panic, everyone. This animal is my pet.” the young man said faintly, “Grass Mud Horse!”

Friars:

Well, how can you swear?

Don’t think you’re handsome and don’t beat you!

“Oh, I’m sorry. I’m not scolding you.” when the young man saw that the people looked wrong, he suddenly woke up and waved his hand again and again. “It’s the name of this beast. It’s called grass mud horse.”

Seeing the people’s suspicious look, the young man slightly jawed his head and immediately began to show it in public.

“Grass Mud Horse, sit down.”

“Grass Mud Horse, stand up.”

“Grass Mud Horse, bow to all Taoist friends.”

Let me take you there.” before the teenager promised, another female monk rushed out: “Taoist friend, let me come. A large number of female monks in the cult are peerless and have comforted a large number of single monks with their own strength. They can be called female Bodhisattvas among monks. Taoist friends are mine!” a group of female Xius are gorgeous and graceful, and they can see whether the men around them envy them. “Superficial!” a male Xius scolded. “Yes, we can’t appreciate the connotation of us at all!” “it’s superficial!” In a corner where people didn’t notice, the boy and Grass Mud Horse slipped out in embarrassment. “Mom.” the boy wiped his sweat, “these people are too crazy to get out.” Grass Mud Horse looked up proudly: “that’s because the God is so popular that these foolish monks flock to.” “fart!” the boy sniffed, “It’s clearly the handsome man who forced the saint, okay?” “bullshit! Because the God is cute!” “forced the saint to be handsome!” “cute!” “handsome!” before they arrived at Yuqiong Pavilion, they began to fight. A moment later, the boy sat on the ground, waved his hand and said, “shit, don’t come, it’s important to do business.” “exactly, we have to save the world.” br>

chapters.title: Chapter 1885
chapters.body:
Chapter 1885

Chapter 1885

C.1885

The young man and the grass mud horse were formed by Xu Ke and ER Gouzi.

Before camouflage, Xu que didn’t expect that the friars in Cheng Yuanxian domain would be so enthusiastic, but he delayed a lot of time.

A man and a grass mud horse came to Qiongyu Pavilion. As soon as they were ready to go in, they were stopped.

“The running card? Is there any such thing as examination qualification certificate here?” Xu Ke was stunned.

“Sorry, the selection of principal disciples is very strict this time. Only when their strength reaches a certain level can they be qualified to participate.” the maid smiled and explained softly, “so every monk who comes to Qiongyu Pavilion needs to take the test.”

“Test ah, easy to say.” Xu Ke said he understood and began to roll his sleeves.

The maid was slightly stunned and looked confused: “Taoist friend, what are you doing with rolling up your sleeves?”

Fang Ling looked up and said blankly, “don’t you want to fight with people? Otherwise, how can you test your strength?”

“Well, don’t be so troublesome.” the maid couldn’t help laughing and said softly, “Taoist friends, please follow me.”

“Oh, I thought I was going to fight.” Xu Wei shook his head regretfully, followed the maid and went to the depths of Qiongyu Pavilion.

Under the guidance of the maid, Xu que walked into Qiongyu Pavilion and went to the passage behind the lobby.

As he walked, he observed the situation around him.

The lobby of Qiongyu Pavilion is carved with dragons and painted with phoenixes. It is antique and fragrant. You can feel an elegance just walking in it.

Men and women in twos and threes sit at the table, or discuss in a low voice, or look at Xu vacancy with their eyes.

These people are monks who come to participate in the selection of principal disciples. When they see competitors entering here, they will subconsciously look at it more.

“Take the liberty to ask, why do I think some friars don’t seem to have a very high level?” Xu Xu withdrew his eyes and said curiously.

Didn’t you say to filter?

Why did he just see the friar in Jinxian realm?

“Taoist friends are joking. Those who can participate in the selection must have their own unique places.” the maid kept smiling while leading the way. “Maybe they are not high, but they have some unique skills and can also participate in the selection.”

“Really? What skills does that person have?” Xu que pointed to the golden immortal realm friar he saw earlier.

The maid looked at it and suddenly said, “this monk has the ability to enlarge a certain part.”

Fang Ling smelled the speech, looked strange and said, “isn’t this the natural ability of every man?”

“Oh, really?” the maid was surprised, “Taoist friend, where can you make it bigger?”

“Er…” Fang Ling thought for a while and said, “you’d better tell me where he can grow up first.”

“Although these are the secrets of the contestants,” the maid paused and blushed. “For your handsome sake, I can tell you that the friar can make his head bigger.”

Xu Wei had not had time to sigh about his handsome troubles. When he heard this, he looked more strange: “wait, which head?”

“Of course it’s the one you think,” said the maid with a smile.

Xu que was immediately shocked.

This is magic! It can be called a man’s dream ability!

Without saying a word, Xu que turned and walked towards the monk in the golden fairyland.

The great Luo Jinxian friar was still observing Xu que. At this time, he saw Xu que coming towards him and immediately took back his eyes.

However, Xu que didn’t have the slightest taboo. He sat down directly in front of him and said in a deep voice: “Taoist friend, I’m the most handsome monk and supreme treasure in history. I came here specially to see your unique skills.”

Friar Jinxian was shocked when he heard the speech.

It’s rare in the world that today’s monks still have such shameless characters!

He tidied up his thoughts and said, “this Taoist friend, my unique skill is a unique secret skill, which is easy to hide from others.”

Xu que has long been psychologically prepared. In order to obtain this unique skill, he is ready to pay the price and directly puts a fairy weapon on the table.

Friar Jinxian was quiet for a moment, suddenly showed his face and said with a smile: “Taoist friend, as soon as I see you, I feel like old friends at first sight. It’s just a unique skill. I’ll show it now!”

With that, he left his seat and came to the middle of the lobby.

Xu Xu made a gesture: “please.”

The golden immortal monk’s eyes were frozen and his body was rolling.

In an instant, his head grew several times!

“Oh!”

It was the first time that someone showed such ability in public.

Xu que looked at each other with a smile, but turned his eyes in his heart.

Shit, the feeling is that the head gets bigger… It’s a waste of my time.

While he was thinking about how to get the fairy weapon back, he suddenly saw an old man walking towards him.

The maid on one side quickly winked at Xu Kuang and bowed in awe to the old man: “see old Feng.” after that, she came to Xu Kuang and whispered, “Taoist friend, this is old Feng in charge of the test. Next, you’ll have a test with him.” Xu Kuang nodded and looked at the old man. Her face remained the same, but her heart was filled with cold. The old man’s momentum is like an abyss like a sea. Just the breath now has reached the peak of xianzun territory. If he breaks out with all his strength, he is likely to be a strong man at the level of half Immortal Emperor! The immortal realm is really unfathomable, and there is such a strong man hidden in it! Xu Wei suddenly realized that something was wrong. He had been in Yongzhen immortal domain for so long, and he rarely saw a strong man at the level of half Immortal Emperor. Why did one suddenly appear here? With Xu Dingcheng, Xu Xu generally has a strong sense of vigilance against this sudden strong person. Old Feng glanced at him, nodded lightly and said, “OK, come with me.” after saying that, he turned and walked towards the deep corridor. When Xu Weigang took a step, his spirit suddenly gave birth to a sense of vigilance. Looking back, I happened to see several monks who had no time to take back their eyes, pretending to be nothing and turning away. “These guys… Have been paying attention to Ben forced saint?” Xu que couldn’t help raising his hair and was proud. “Ben forced saint is so handsome!” they went deep all the way, turned across the corridor and came to a room. “Go in.” old Feng stood at the door and said faintly without looking at Xu que. holy crap The dead old man is too pretending! Xu que said something in his heart without expression, but he saw that old Feng suddenly looked over and hurried into the room. There were only a few candles in Nuo Da’s room. One side ran across the jade wall of the whole room and stood in the middle of the room. As soon as I walked in, the door behind me closed, and a voice of vicissitudes echoed in the room. “br>

chapters.title: Chapter 1886
chapters.body:
Chapter 1886

Chapter 1886

C.1886

“Who, who’s talking!!” Xu Que’s look was chilly. Chakra had rushed out and raised his hand and blasted on the jade wall.

Click!

The crisp sound of fragmentation sounded, and large cracks suddenly spread on the jade wall.

“Cough… It hurts…” the old man’s voice gave out a painful cry, and he was angry. “Bastard! Who let you do it!”

Xu Wei stared around warily and said seriously, “as a monk, you should listen to six directions at any time, look at all directions, and be prepared for the assassination of your enemy!”

Seeing his alert look, the old voice felt that he wanted to find a wonderful guy to come in,.

How many enemies did he have… He did it without even seeing anyone.

“Come out quickly, or don’t blame me for being rude!” Xu Xu said, and then he was ready to do it.

“Stop! Stop!” the old voice hurriedly said, “I came to help you test. The body is the jade in front of you. Don’t do it again!”

Xu Kui showed a sudden expression and scattered around chakra: “well, you said earlier.”

The old voice is disgusting in my heart. I want to say that you didn’t give me a chance!

Under the pressure of his anger, the old voice sounded again: “cough, in that case, let’s start the test…”

“Wait!”

Before he finished, he was directly interrupted by Xu vacancy.

The old man’s voice was stunned and thought there was something wrong: “what’s the matter?”

Xu Kuyi said in a righteous voice: “this forced saint is the most handsome monk and supreme treasure in history!”

“Then?” the old voice wondered, “I see you are very handsome, but the friar is about strength…”

“No, no, no, no, handsome monks will also receive some preferential treatment during practice. You can’t deny that?” Xu Xu said seriously.

He thought that the old voice would immediately refute, but after the other party pondered for a moment, he said thoughtfully: “it seems that this is the case. No wonder many female nuns always sent me spirit stones when I was young…”

what the fuck!

Xu Ke was stupid at that time. This old man is shameless than himself!

Dare you boast about being handsome when you were young in front of such a handsome face?

“Cough, master, I think when I was young, I should be handsome and handsome, but I’m not talking about it.” Xu Ke said positively, “I mean, handsome people should be respected, right?”

“Indeed.”

“Master, you only talk to me as a jade, and you don’t even show your true body. What respect is this?” Xu que shouted abruptly.

The old man’s voice was silent for a long time. Then he said slowly, “what you said seems reasonable… In that case, I’ll show my true body for once.”

When the voice fell, the whole jade wall was suddenly shocked, then it slowly lit up, and the faint white light lit up from the center, just like a fire, spreading around.

It seems that countless patterns are carved on the jade wall. The light moves along the lines and gradually fills the whole jade wall.

When all the lines are lit up, the light suddenly shrinks and collapses to the center.

An old man’s figure slowly appeared in front of the jade wall, overlooking Xu que from a commanding position.

“Now, do you feel my respect?” the old man smiled faintly, and his body was full of kindness.

Xu que stuck his waist and said, “no, you’re standing too high.”

Old man: ”

Shit, this boy has a lot to do!

After a burst of silence, the old man slowly fell to the height of deficiency.

“Not enough, you are looking down on me.” Xu Xu continued.

The old man continued to decline until he was flat with Xu.

“That’s enough respect.” Xu Ke nodded with satisfaction.

The old man saw that half of his body had sunk into the ground, and his complexion was difficult to see.

“OK, since you feel respected, let’s start the test.” the old man nodded.

Xu Xu again stretched out his hand and interrupted, “wait!”

“What do you want?” the old man couldn’t help shouting.

Xu Xu held his arms and said plausibly, “you see, this is the case. Did you ask me to test it?”

“Yes!”

“But you don’t give me any benefits. Why do you want me to test?”

“… it seems so reasonable. Wait, don’t you want to participate in the selection? Why do you want me to give you benefits?” the old man stared wide and said in disbelief.

Xu que sneered: “I’m more handsome than others. Shouldn’t I be treated differently?”

It was light and shadow condensation, but the old man still felt a burst of angina pectoris.

Are you illiterate?
