chapters.body:
Chapter 1887

Chapter 1887

C.1887

“What’s the problem? Do you think these guys are ambushing us?” the two dogs immediately looked alert.

As soon as he got up, several nuns around him screamed and shouted how lovely it was.

Two dogs despised: “superficial! Only know how to measure others by appearance!”

With that, he twisted his ass and again attracted a scream.

“Don’t be so cute. You’re not suitable for this route.” Xu que rolled his eyes. “Listen to me, just now I went to test, an old man suddenly appeared.”

He told Er Gouzi what had just happened and repeated it as it was.

“Is there any relevant memory in your memory?” Xu que looked at Er Gouzi expectantly, hoping that he could remember something.

He has some guesses about the origin of Er Gouzi, but he is not sure.

But this guy has several generations of memory, which is certain. He doesn’t know what he did to himself. Now he has incomplete memory, like a fool.

But many times, er Gouzi always has a sudden insight and recalls some key memories.

The second dog stared and thought hard for a long time. Suddenly, he said excitedly, “brother Ke, if I go down now, will the old boss give me immortal tools?”

Xu que: ”

Do you think about your feelings for so long? Are you thinking about how to get benefits?

“Don’t dream.” Xu que rolled his eyes, picked up his tea cup and thought slowly.

He thought something was wrong before. According to the information collected by the Lieyang gate, there had never been such a situation in the selection of principal disciples for so many times in the past.

Would you choose something with characteristics?

It’s just that you are handsome and have characteristics. Is it special to have a big head?

“Brother Kuang, don’t think so much. Maybe this is the selection rule this time?” the second dog preached.

Xu Ke was stunned and looked around. He found that Er Gouzi was surrounded by a group of nuns, enjoying the feeding of nuns.

“Shit, scum!”

Xu que scolded, got up and wandered around in the lobby.

After thinking about it, he found the maid who had shown him the way before.

“Little sister, have you ever heard of Yurou fairy?” Xu que opened the door to the mountain road.

Xu Kuan was stunned. He thought it should be the principal disciple who had the opportunity to enter the central Tianmen and see xiaorou.

Hum, a bunch of waste firewood, just because you want to see xiaorou?

Ben won’t give you a chance!

“Ha ha, I didn’t expect fairy Yurou to be so famous.” Xu Xu was very proud. After all, it was his woman.

The maid said, “of course, otherwise why did so many monks choose the main disciples? You know, even the famous fairy Fengqing didn’t have so many people to recruit Taoists.”

Xu Ke frowned slightly. The maid’s words made him feel a little uncomfortable: “there is no comparability between the two?”

The maid seemed to find something and looked at him with some surprise: “young master, don’t you know? This time, the principal disciples were selected to enter the central Tianmen to participate in the selection of female feather fairy Taoist partners.”

Boom!

These words were like a thunder, which exploded in Xu Ke’s mind.

Xiaorou wants to choose a Taoist companion?

“After all, Yurou fairy has a unique physique. She has won the favor of the four immortal emperors and was jointly cultivated by them. No accident, she will be the strongest in Xianyun island a few years later. Now she wants to choose Taoist partners. Naturally, countless Tianjiao demons come here to win the favor of Yurou fairy.”

The maid said, cold all over, her eyes fell on the young man in front of her, and she felt the deep chill.

Why did the young man suddenly burst out such a violent murderous spirit when he said that Yurou fairy wanted to choose a Taoist companion?

Um… As like as two peas, I must have been a fan of fairies. There were several talented young men who heard the same news.

It must be!

Thinking of this, the maid comforted softly, “Taoist friends, don’t be anxious. I think you have a chance because you have high cultivation and are really handsome.”

Xu Kui took a deep breath, pressed down his anger, and said in a deep voice, “I don’t have a chance, they all don’t have a chance!”

Joke, want to rob a sister with Ben?

It seems that you haven’t seen the power of the leader of this fried heaven sect!

It’s time for you young people to feel the fear of being dominated by this forced saint!

“It’s good for Taoist friends to have such self-confidence, but don’t underestimate the enemy. I know that even the Xu family, Murong family and Yue family sent people this time.” the maid reminded and smiled, “the three families in Chengyuan Xianyu are not so easy to deal with.”

She paused and said softly, “if you don’t dislike it, you can come to my house in case of failure.”

Xu Xu waved his hand impatiently. What are you? Can you talk to little ruby? When the maid saw that Xu Kuang was a little upset and irritable, she was about to say something more. She suddenly seemed to see something. She put a patterned smile on her face again: “Taoist friend, little girl, please think about it.” after that, she turned and left, and gave Xu Kuang a wink before she left. Xu que noticed the change of her expression, turned to look behind her and found several young men and women coming in from the door together. The accomplishments of several people are amazing. They are all the accomplishments of xianzun realm. Among them, three young men are all at the peak of xianzun territory. As for the other two women, their accomplishments are slightly weaker, only in the middle of xianzun territory. However, the men’s breath fluctuated. Xu que could feel it vaguely. One of them was half a step away from the Immortal Emperor. This combination can be said to be extremely powerful and can crush all the Tianjiao Xu has seen so far. Xu Ke frowned slightly. Just now the maid should have seen these people and chose not to talk, so they should be the so-called Xu family, Murong family and Yue family. But I just don’t know who is who… But does it matter? unimportance! He only knows one truth. These guys are here to rob xiaorou! Those who dare to rob xiaorou with themselves will die! Xu que stares at those people coldly, and his killing intention becomes stronger and stronger. At this time, a group of people outside the door had entered Qiongyu Pavilion and were walking towards the lobby. The accomplishments of these people can be said to have stood at the top of the young talents without the Immortal Emperor. br>

chapters.title: Chapter 1888
chapters.body:
Chapter 1888

Chapter 1888

C.1888

Several monks around him suddenly became vigilant and looked around.

The male friar in blue said in a deep voice, “brother Murong Tuo, is it your illusion?”

On the other side, the male friar in black shook his head and slightly turned his eyebrows: “brother Yuehua, brother Murong Tuo’s spiritual sense has always been the strongest among us. He can even predict the future through some strong hunches. I believe brother Murong Tuo will not aim at nothing.”

“Brother Xu Ye is right.” Yuehua thought for a moment and nodded slightly.

Murong Tuo, the leader, did not respond. Instead, he closed his eyes and began to capture the sense of crisis that had just passed away.

The monks who came in with him saw this and dispersed one after another. While guarding, they also kept a distance from Murong Tuo.

A mysterious feeling rose from Murong Tuo, like life, and filled the field.

Yuehua looked at Murong Tuo with admiration and said, “sometimes I really envy brother Murong’s ability. Before I meet a crisis, I can predict it in advance and avoid it.”

Xu Ye sighed: “I can’t envy you. This is the unique skill of Murong family. Even if we want to learn, I’m afraid we have to change to Murong family.”

Xu Ke frowned slightly. Since Murong Tuo closed his eyes, he had a strange feeling, as if something was peeping at him.

But when he looked around with divine thoughts, he found no one peeping into himself.

The problem can only be Murong Tuo.

All the muttering words of these guys were heard by him. Could that murongtuo really spy on the future?

“System, do you have detection function?” Xu Ke thought and asked the system in his heart.

“Ding, you can turn on this function after spending 100000 loading force values.”

Xu Ke has a black face. Shit, isn’t this black heart system taking advantage of the fire?

How much do I have to pay for opening a function?

“Forget it, open it.” Xu que hesitated for a moment and paid 100000 yuan.

Fortunately, the previous installation force has obtained a lot of installation force values. Although it is still a little far from opening the new version, it can afford 100000 installation force values.

The system was silent for a moment, and suddenly there was a burst of pleasant music.

“Ding, congratulations to the host for opening the detection function. Welcome to make persistent efforts and continue to make great efforts to consume.”

I don’t know why, Xu Ke always felt the sound of the system, which seemed to bring a touch of joy.

“OK, check it for me quickly. What the hell is this guy doing?” Xu que urged.

“Ding, starting the detection function…”

After waiting for a moment, the system suddenly said again: “if you use it once, you need to pay 10000 installation force value.”

Xu Ke was surprised at that time. This son of a bitch made secondary consumption!

“Too much!” Xu Xu was angry on the spot. “This is your second consumption, cheating consumers! I want to complain to you!”

In the face of Xu’s complaint, the system was silent for a moment and said, “Ding, since the host uses this function for the first time, in order to give back to consumers, this service is free.”

To deal with such unscrupulous businessmen, we must be indomitable and never bow to the black and evil forces!

He made up his mind to use it this time and never use it again.

If you don’t do anything, you’ll be forced to pay 100000. Who knows how to pit yourself behind this bastard system.

There is no forced value, the system response is slow, and it doesn’t sound for a long time.

“Ding, this man is using fortune fairies to try to intercept the fate fragments related to the host from the long river of destiny.”

Xu’s eyebrows were wrinkled into the shape of Sichuan. It was the first time he heard the word “destiny magic”.

But I don’t think it’s a good thing.

“Is there any way to stop the other party’s snooping?” Xu que asked.

Although I don’t know anything about this, I can still understand that the other party should be snooping on my privacy.

“Ding, if you pay 50000 outfit force value, you can make a fantasy of fate fragments and block the real fate of the host.”

Shit, I knew it!

Xu que scolded secretly in his heart and reluctantly forced the value of 100000 clothes out.

I can’t help it. I don’t have that function. I can only ask the system for help.

The system that received the forced value was surprisingly efficient. It was restored in less than five seconds: “Ding, the dreamland of destiny fragments has been successfully made and has successfully covered the fragments of destiny that can be spied by the other party.”

After confirming that there would be no problem, Xu Duan took a sip from his tea cup and looked in the direction of Murong Tuo, sneering in his heart.

This forced Saint system is added. See what you take to fight me!

On the other side, Murong Tuo is performing ancestral magic.

Murong family, as one of the top families in chengyuanxian domain, has incomparable advantages over other families.

That is, their lineal members can master a magic trick to spy on the long river of destiny. The so-called way of heaven is ruthless, humanity is impermanent, and there is a long way to cultivate immortality. It is inevitable that accidents will occur. If we can know the possible crises in the future in advance and deal with them correctly, we can have a great probability to avoid those crises and forge ahead on the road of cultivating immortality. Relying on this magic, Murong family ranked among the top families and became a powerful family pursued by monks from all over the world. Murong Tuo is the direct family child of this generation. He mastered the magic of fate, which is the most accurate prediction among his peers. The application of this kind of magic depends on the soul. The stronger the power of the soul, the stronger the spiritual consciousness, and the clearer the observed future destiny. The reason why Murong Tuo can stand out is that his spiritual power is naturally several times stronger than people. The predicted content is also clearer when using the magic of fate. But today, he felt as if he had encountered a Waterloo in his life. At the beginning, it was still good. The power of the divine soul operated, and the spiritual sense was unprecedentedly sensitive. The whole person seemed to enter an ethereal long river and extract fragments related to the killing intention. But looking at it, he found something wrong. “Strange… Why am I with a man?” Murong Tuo closed his eyes and watched the fragments of the long river of fate predicted by himself with his soul. The pictures passed like meteors. In one picture, I hugged and kissed with a handsome young man! Murong Tuo was so shocked that he couldn’t believe what he saw. What’s going on here? Is it difficult to give yourself that you will like men in the future?! Under strong stimulation, Murong Tuo suddenly separated from the mysterious state. As soon as I woke up, I looked at Xu Xu’s eyes. This person is the boy in the picture! Murong Tuo subconsciously thought of the pictures in the fragments. He was ashamed and angry, and suddenly a red glow flew up on his face. Xu que, who is full of murderous spirit and staring at each other, is also stunned. Why is this guy blushing? Is it difficult to be seen as shy by yourself

chapters.body:
Chapter 1889

Chapter 1889

C.1889

“Brother Murong, what’s the matter?” the friars around also found the inexplicable reaction of their friends and asked with concern.

“No, nothing…” Murong Tuo quickly lowered his head and dared not let people see his expression.

Seeing this, the party continued to walk inside.

Several people were born in famous families and had a noble temperament. They didn’t pay attention to others except friars with the same status as them.

The friars in the lobby also understood this truth, so when they saw this group coming, they gave way one after another.

“System, what is the fate fragment fantasy you just created?” Xu Xu asked in his heart, “how do you feel that this guy is a little wrong?”

This time, the system was silent for a long time, which seemed to be hard to say.

“System?” Xu Ke asked again, frowning slightly.

The system said faintly: “… You don’t want to know.”

Just at this time, several people were coming to Xu area. Murong Tuo couldn’t help looking at Xu Ke more.

He was sure that the boy was the one he saw in the long river of fate.

Murong Tuo subconsciously slowed down and stopped beside Xu Ke.

If such a thing will happen in the future, it is still necessary to know who the other party is in advance.

He considered his words and said with an arched hand, “Taoist friend, I think you are dignified, not ordinary people. Dare you ask your name?”

Seeing a friend’s inquiry, several friars nearby also stopped and looked at Xu Que and Murong Tuo.

Xu que was also a little surprised. What did the man notice? Why did you suddenly find out about me?

But he still bowed his hands calmly, showed a perfect smile and said, “I’m the supreme treasure of the tianbang. I don’t know your name?”

As he spoke, he conveniently planted a sound insulation array around him to avoid being heard by other monks.

Er Gouzi has caused too much influence, but it is impossible for him to give up the name of the fried Tiangang. He can only find a way to straighten out the reputation of the fried Tiangang.

Murong Tuo looked at each other’s smile and his eyes gradually blurred.

I have to say, he is really handsome

If it’s with such a handsome boy, it doesn’t seem so difficult to accept?

Xu Ye was quite curious and asked, “brother Murong, what picture did you see just now? Did someone want to ambush us?”

“No, it’s not me. It’s impossible!” Murong Tuo was thinking. He was suddenly asked, and suddenly screamed like a cat with its tail trampled on.

He suddenly woke up and was shocked.

Gan! What are you thinking?

Are you accepting reality?

I am a pure man! How can you be with a man!

“I’m Murong Tuo!” he straightened his expression and said solemnly, “I want to know what the Taoist friends have to do with my Murong family? Why do I have a fetter with my Murong family?”

He must find out why this happened.

Before, I clearly felt the killing intention. What I intercepted was also the picture related to the killing intention in the long river of fate, but why did it appear that I kissed the teenager?

Several friars nearby smelled the speech and looked at Xu vacancy and became bad.

As members of top families, each of them will have a secret method. If an outsider attacks and kills them, the assailant will be bound by their family.

As long as you are a member of the family, you can feel this fetter.

Since Murong Tuo asked such a question, it means that most of this person has attacked and killed the Murong family.

But they didn’t expect that Xu Kehui and Murong’s family were fettered simply because the system made a false fate fragment of two people kissing!

Xu Wei was stunned when he heard this. He thought it was mostly because of the problem of the fate fragment.

What is the fate fragment of the system?

Why did this guy not divert his attention, but stare directly at himself?

“Well, I’m from the mountains. I don’t understand what you mean.” Xu Wei coughed and began to pretend to be crazy.

Anyway, with the system in hand, this guy can’t see through anything.

Murong Tuo frowned when he heard the speech: “or… Did Taoist friends meet any strange people before? Maybe it’s my predecessors of Murong family.”

“Well, that’s true. I met an old beggar on the roadside before. He was really poor, so I gave him a steamed bread.” Xu Xu said deliberately.

“Beggar?” Murong Tuo immediately fell into meditation.

On the contrary, the faces of several other monks changed greatly.

Among them, Xu Ye angrily scolded: “bastard! How dare you humiliate brother Murong!”

Just now, Murong Tuo asked Xu que if he had met a strange person. Turning around, Xu que said he had met an old beggar. Didn’t he say that the elder of Murong family was a beggar? Murong family is a top family. How can there be beggars? Xu Ye’s fierce drink immediately attracted the attention of other monks in the lobby, and everyone looked here one after another. Most of the monks who could come to the selection had a great family background and recognized the identity of Murong Tuo and his party at a glance. At this time, seeing Xu Ye yelling at the young monk, many faces showed an expression of schadenfreude. “There’s a good play to see. The young man actually provoked the Xu family.” “not only, look who’s around him, Murong family and Yue family.” “this guy is dead. The three families are linked together. Provoking one family is tantamount to provoking three families. It’s a pity that such a handsome guy.” the people immediately talked and looked at Xu Ke with interest, Want to see what happens to him in the end. Murong Tuo was the most calm one, frowning and thinking carefully. An old beggar, Murong family should have no such predecessors… Wait! His eyes suddenly lit up and thought of a man! At that time, there was a master of the Murong family who was extremely cultivated. After half a step of the Immortal Emperor’s cultivation, he said he was going out to understand the avenue, so he left his family and went on a trip. It is said that someone has seen this elder. It seems that he is just a beggar! Murong Tuo suddenly became frightened. The elder’s temper is very strange. If someone violates his arrangement, even his peers will not be merciful! In other words, the boy was arranged by his predecessors. If you force yourself to change, you are disobedient to your predecessors! No wonder I feel killing! Xu ye turned to Murong Tuo and said, “brother Murong, how do you deal with this man who insults your family?” Murong Tuo pondered for a moment, suddenly took Xu Duan’s hand and said in a deep voice: “Taoist friend, you and I are like old friends at first sight. How about becoming a brother with a different surname?” they said: “…” Xu Duan: ”

chapters.title: Chapter 1890
chapters.body:
Chapter 1890

Chapter 1890

C.1890

Xu Xu didn’t speak and calmly looked at the man in front of him.

The eyes are sincere, the words are firm, and the mood is full. It doesn’t seem to be lying.

So… Does this guy really want to be a brother of his own?

He’s crazy!

Xu ye and others also stared at Murong Tuo in disbelief, feeling that they didn’t know this friend for many years.

See the ghost, others insult you, and you want to become a brother with a different surname?

Are you out of your mind?

Not only them, but also the monks around them stared at Murong Tuo with a ghost expression.

Most of those present are the favored children of major forces. On weekdays, the circle of friends is similar, and there are many intersections with top families.

In their mind, the children of top families should have been arrogant and disdainful to communicate with ordinary people.

On weekdays, even if I met some friars of several top families, they never looked good when facing people from other families. Big guys have long been used to it.

As a monk of the top Murong family, Murong Tuo should slap Xu Que in the face and crush him into powder with a powerful immortal method.

What’s the matter with the ghost look of “you don’t become a brother with a different surname, and I’ll die here”?

Xu Ke now began to feel that there was something wrong with the man’s brain and was speechless in his heart.

The so-called person who doesn’t fight a smiling face has made up his mind to clean up the other party. As a result, he has such a warm attitude that he can’t do well if he wants to do it.

What a ghost

“Whose family did you say you are?” Xu que frowned and said in a deep voice.

Murong Tuo thought he had a chance and his eyes lit up: “I’m a friar of Murong family. I’m definitely worthy of Taoist friends!”

He has figured out that it is impossible to disobey the arrangement of his family predecessors, but there is still a chance to make some turnaround arrangements.

In order not to let the picture of hugging and kissing be realized, I can communicate with each other.

You can’t let your brother kiss, can you?

Murong Tuo thought his move was wonderful!

The next second, he saw Xu Wei’s disdain, waved his hand and said, “I haven’t heard of any shit Murong family.”

Murong Tuo: ”

When Xu ye heard the speech, he sneered: “sure enough, he is a countryman. He doesn’t even know the Murong family. What qualification does he have to be a heterosexual brother with brother Murong?”

Yuehua stared at Xu que coldly and said in a deep voice, “this man humiliated brother Murong, which is tantamount to humiliating us. We should teach him a lesson.”

The others nodded deeply, as if this kind of thing was just a small thing.

However, for the friars of their top families, it is really no big deal to clean up the little friars whose statements are not obvious.

Even if they kill Xu Wei today, no one will come to trouble them.

The female nun who came in with them suddenly warned, “fighting is strictly prohibited in Qiongyu Pavilion. Take him out.”

Yuehua nodded and, together with Xu ye, surrounded Xu Que in the center and looked at each other jokingly.

Obviously, murongtuo is in a leading position among them and is very important.

Otherwise, these guys won’t say a few words because of Xu lack, so they will help murongtuo teach him a lesson.

Xu Wei looked around. Except Yuehua and Xu ye, the other female accomplishments were only in the middle of xianzun.

This kind of goods can hammer the other party to death with one punch.

As for Yu Yuehua and Xu ye, they are nothing in his eyes.

These two guys are between the later stage of xianzun realm and the peak of xianzun realm. Xu Ke can hammer the four people on the ground even if he doesn’t use Zhengqi to seal the magic Sutra.

It’s Murong Tuo

Xu que glanced at each other and hesitated.

He could see that the guy had no hostility to himself since he used the Rausch’s fortune fairy.

Trying to figure out how to make friends with yourself is really evil.

I don’t know what fate picture the whole system shows to the other party, so that the other party will actually react like this.

“Forget it, don’t clean up this guy first.” Xu Wei thought for a while and thought he’d better clean up some nosy young people first.

After all, Murong Tuo didn’t plan to attack himself. He seemed to speak very well. If he could have the opportunity to draw the other party to the fried sky Gang, it would be equivalent to adding another strong general to the fried sky gang. Wouldn’t it be happy?

“What do you want to do? Four dozen and one, aren’t you bullying honest people?” Xu que put on a look of weakness.

Although on the surface, he is indeed at a disadvantage.

But fighting doesn’t mean that anyone with more people can win. Sometimes the party with fewer people may be able to support a group of people just because of him.

Xu Ke’s reaction immediately aroused the disdain of the monks around him. “This guy is really good…” Gee, I thought he was so kind. It turned out to be just a look. “” it’s boring. It seems that this man will die today. “They thought there was a good play. Unexpectedly, they shook their heads and ridiculed and lost the planet. Xu Ke was timid and said timidly, “if I offend you… I’ll go now.” he couldn’t do it here. He was blacklisted again. He had to change his identity. It’s troublesome. Lead out, clean up, make up an excuse and come back. I’m a genius! Xu Wei smiled in his heart and ran to the door of Qiongyu Pavilion. Yuehua and others looked at each other and gave a sneer at the corners of their mouth. It happened that fighting was strictly forbidden in Qiongyu Pavilion. This guy ran out, which was just suitable for them. However, when Xu kugang ran to the door, a middle-aged friar at the peak of xianzun territory burst in. His face was gloomy and said, “who is the fried heaven Gang? Stand up for me! Dare to move my son and don’t want to live?” Yuehua frowned: “did that boy say he was the fried heaven Gang just now?” although his voice was small, it spread all over the lobby. Shua! There was a sudden silence in the lobby. The next second, everyone’s eyes gathered on Xu Xu. Is this guy from the bombers, too? With two dogs? In an instant, almost all the monks stood up and surrounded Xu que. Xu Ke was also stupid. He didn’t expect that he had made great efforts to hide the name of the fried heaven Gang, but he was exposed. Shit, it’s a waste of effort! At that time, Xu Wei felt a fit of anger. He kicked the middle-aged monk on his chest and shouted: “I’m the most respected treasure of the fried Tiangang. Who has any opinion? Come and fight with me! Today, I’m going to be the largest gang in the West Tianmen City!”…

chapters.title: Chapter 1891
chapters.body:
Chapter 1891

Chapter 1891

C.1891

Zhang Erhe is stupid.

Murong Tuo is also stupid.

Xu ye and Yuehua couldn’t close their mouths.

The other monks in the lobby were directly shocked into a mess.

Who would have thought that this handsome and gentle teenager would turn into a mob in the next second.

This strong contrast is like you failed to pursue the goddess for many years. Out of frustration, you went to the big sword to relax and ordered an 81 night technician. It was your goddess who came in.

People can’t help waking up. This guy has been pretending to be pure before!

What a shame!

After Zhang Erhe was kicked to the ground, the whole person was stupid.

He was the leader of the West Tianmen City guard. He was a great power at the peak of xianzun. Even the friars in the Yongye hall had to be polite. He was kicked down directly?

For a moment, a raging anger surged up in my heart!

“Give it to me! Kill this boy!” Zhang Erhe was furious and roared loudly.

He must cut the boy to pieces today. Even if it is frustrating, it can’t dispel his hatred.

Xu ye and others also came back, their eyes were burning with anger, and their hearts were full of the shame of being deceived.

“Bastard, how dare you deceive us!”

“I don’t know heaven and earth. No matter who you are today, you will die!”

“If you dare to offend brother Murong, today is your death date!”

Several people looked gloomy and cold, and their killing opportunities were exposed in their eyes.

“Hum, a bunch of shit demon geniuses, just you garbage, still want to be the Taoist partners of Yurou fairies?” Xu Ke, with one hand on his waist and a proud face, “with all due respect, I don’t mean one of you, but everyone here is happy!”

This time, the whole Qiongyu Pavilion suddenly burst into a pot. Although the other evil geniuses had no hatred against Xu Xu, they also saw such an arrogant person for the first time.

For a time, everyone focused on Xu Xu.

“That’s interesting. How dare this guy be so arrogant in the middle of xianzun territory?”

“Is it hard to be a disciple of some rich family?”

“But fighting is forbidden in Qiongyu Pavilion. The boy is probably just talking hard.”

“I also think so. You didn’t see him standing outside the building and kicking even his first foot.”

The geniuses talked and expected what would happen next.

“Brother Murong, just leave it to us.” Xu Ye hugged his fist. “I must let this boy understand what the pain of life is better than death!”

“But…”

Yuehua also said, “brother Murong, I don’t know why you proposed to become a heterosexual brother with each other, but this son is so rude that he is not qualified to associate with you.”

Murong Tuo dodged in his eyes and hesitated in his heart.

He also doubted whether it was really related to the elder in his family.

Although fortune fairies have hardly made mistakes, they are not proficient enough to master them. Occasionally, they make mistakes and see some pieces of fate that will not happen at all.

Maybe I made a mistake this time?

He thought for a moment, took out a piece of communication jade and communicated with his father to ask the whereabouts of the elder in the family.

After a while, a dignified voice came from the other end of the jade: “absurd! How can my eldest son of Murong family have… That kind of relationship with a country man! Kill him, and I will bear the blame if the elder comes down at that time!”

Murong Tuo was assured by his father. His expression suddenly relaxed, and his eyes became indifferent to Fang Ling.

“Then thank brother Xu and brother Yue. This son can’t stay!”

After saying that, he walked towards the upper layer of Qiongyu Pavilion, and his steps became brisk.

If it wasn’t for facing his predecessors, how could he look at Xu Ke differently?

Now even the last level of concern is gone, and Xu’s life and death has nothing to do with him.

Murong Tuo walked up the stairs to the top floor.

Compared with the crowded lobby, there are only a few monks here. These people are the elites of Chengyuan immortal region, with prominent family background and strong strength. They are the leaders of the young generation of Tianjiao.

“Brother Murong, it seems that there is a lot of movement below?” a young monk looked at Murong Tuo with a smile.

Murong Tuo glanced at him and said coldly, “Ji Hua, don’t provoke me unless you want to fight with me.”

Ji Hua’s face suddenly became gloomy: “Murong Tuo, do you think you are the eldest son of the Murong family? As far as I know, the details of your Murong family are about to fail?”

If the crisis of life and death comes, these details will be born immediately to suppress all incoming enemies.

“Then you can try.” Murong Tuo said coldly, “there is no need for the family to be born. I can suppress you alone.” “really? Come on!” Ji Hua patted the table and stood up. Two people tit for tat, for a time, the scene of swords and swords, Xianyuan tumbling. “You guys, we are all the favourites of heaven. There is no need to argue because of a few quarrels.” at this time, Feng Yuehua stood up and dissuaded several people with a soft smile. As the first disciple of the eternal night hall, her words weighed heavily. As soon as she appeared, they stopped arguing. “It’s just a country man. You don’t need to be angry about it. Kill it.” Feng Yuehua glanced downstairs and looked away. After Xu Dingcheng’s death, now she has mastered the whole Yongye hall and doesn’t need to consider too many things at all. She would rather kill the wrong than let go. For the next opportunity, she would not allow anyone to affect the selection of principal disciples. What’s more, standing behind her is not only the eternal night hall, but also the whole Ji family! “You guys, the selection of the principal disciples this time is nominally to select the principal disciples of xitianmen City, but actually everyone should have heard the news.” Feng Yuehua said in a deep voice, “those who become the principal disciples will have the opportunity to become the Taoist partners of Yurou fairy.” just hearing the name, people’s breath is one of the reasons. That is the saint of the whole xianyunzhou, the supreme existence cultivated by the four immortal emperors. Moreover, if you can become a Taoist couple of saints, you will get the method of becoming an Immortal Emperor taught by the Immortal Emperor. In other words, maybe one of you will become the fifth Immortal Emperor of Xianyun island! Even these proud children who have enjoyed all the luxury in the world can’t help but be moved by it. Boom! Just as she was about to say something, she suddenly heard an amazing noise downstairs. Several people’s faces suddenly changed. They all went to the edge of the terrace and looked down. They were suddenly shocked. The boy has gone crazy

chapters.body:
Chapter 1892

Chapter 1892

C.1892

I saw the boy named zhizunbao rampaging among the crowd without any weapons and bare hands.

Boom!

One blow out, when even a immortal monk flew upside down, hit the beam, fell heavily to the ground, and spewed blood.

Seeing this, Zhang Erhe turned pale.

He saw clearly that the friar who had just been beaten away was only one step away from the peak of xianzun!

I can’t even stop a punch!

What kind of cultivation is this boy?

Seeing this, a monk angrily scolded, “bastard! This is Qiongyu Pavilion. Dare you kill people here?”

Xu Wusi was not afraid. He clenched his fists and kicked the friar who wanted to sneak attack after flying. He said with pride: “I killed you losers! I’ve endured you for a long time. A bunch of garbage are still willing to pretend to be forced in front of Ben Jisheng. I don’t know the greatness of heaven and earth!”

On the other side, a group of women were ready to help, but they were dragged by two dogs.

“Sobbing, fairy sister, the grass is so scared!” the two dogs squeezed out a pitiful look and shrank into the arms of a beautiful woman.

Seeing this, the female nun felt great sympathy in her heart. She quickly hugged Er Gouzi and gently comforted him: “I’m not afraid. These murderers don’t live long. Someone will come out to deal with him in a moment!”

Xu Wei almost spit out when he saw this scene.

Er Gouzi, you are so shameless!

However, the nun’s words reminded Xu que.

Qiongyu Pavilion is strictly forbidden to fight in the pavilion. After so much trouble, the other party should come soon.

Just as he was thinking like this, a strong and unparalleled breath suddenly gushed out of Qiongyu Pavilion.

“Presumptuous! Those who dare to fight in Qiongyu Pavilion will be killed without amnesty!”

An old man suddenly appeared in the void, raised his palms, and the indescribable pressure suddenly came, which directly suppressed all the tianarrogants present on the spot.

The infinite breath of death comes in the hearts of all.

“It’s over, old sun himself!”

“Fortunately, I didn’t do it just now, otherwise I would be dead now.”

“Old sun is strong and unparalleled in cultivation. Looking at the West Tianmen City, only one palm can fight it!”

Everyone talked and looked at the old man with fear.

Sun Lao’s eyes were cold and raised his hand. Zhang Erhe didn’t even say anything, so he directly exploded into a blood light.

Xu Ke’s eyebrows jumped. He felt an indescribable oppressive force from the old man.

This is the power of Tiandi Avenue… The old guy is about to break through to the Immortal Emperor!

Half step Immortal Emperor has mastered the existence of the avenue and is climbing on the avenue.

If you can completely control a road, you can successfully break through to the Immortal Emperor.

“It’s your turn.” old sun glanced and fell on Xu vacancy. He raised his hand and wanted to hold it.

“Wait a minute!” Xu que suddenly roared and said in righteous words, “I still have something to say!”

Old sun frowned slightly and loosened his palm slightly: “and listen to what you have to say.”

Xu que smiled coldly and directly pinched out a divine action escape talisman: “old man, you said you were pretending to be NIMA. I’m not only going to kill people here today, but also killing all these bullshit Tianjiao! Even if you can kill one me, I’ll blow up millions of people of tianbang Gang and tens of thousands of others, I’ll stand up and kill you, old Bangzi!”

The people who thought Xu lacked would beg for mercy were dumbfounded.

My God, is this guy crazy?

Sun Lao is right in front of you. How dare you be so arrogant?

“Presumptuous!”

Old sun snorted heavily, his immortal yuan rolled, and the killing machine suddenly swept away!

Unfortunately, the figure escape sign in Xu Que’s hand has taken effect.

Shua!

With a flash of white light, Xu que disappeared from the public in an instant, as if he had never appeared.

“Bang!”

The immortal yuan swept away like a sea wave and all hit the door panel.

Several people who had started earlier stood at the door and were preparing to escape. They directly met the attack and suddenly turned into fly ash and dispersed in the air.

Here is the strength of sun Lao!

The rest of the monks in the lobby are really fierce.

On the one hand, he was shocked by sun Lao’s strength.

Those people were all friars in the middle of xianzun, but they didn’t even have the power to resist, and they directly turned into fly ash.

On the other hand, he was shocked that Xu que could escape from sun Lao’s men.

Even when sun Lao saw this scene, he couldn’t help looking stunned. He was quite surprised by the other party’s means.

After a short silence, old Sun said coldly, “if anyone dares to fight in Yunmeng Pavilion again, this will be the end!”

Say it and leave! When the people saw that sun Lao left, the atmosphere suddenly became active and began to talk one after another. “This boy is awesome! He can run here?” “he’s from the fried sky Gang? But I heard that the fried sky Gang is not a group of cheating guys?” “maybe it’s just the wicked dogs in the fried sky gang who are so shameless. Didn’t you hear him say that the fried sky gang has millions of gang members?” “Bullshit! It’s all in the immortal friar. Can you be more rational? Millions of guild members, count them to see if there are millions of guild members in the West Tianmen City?” on the terrace, several peerless Tianjiao saw this scene and fell into silence. A series of footsteps sounded, and Xu Ye and Yuehua came out of the stairs with messy hair and some embarrassment. “Sorry, brother Murong, let the boy run away.” Yuehua looked ashamed and regretted, “it’s our negligence.” “it doesn’t matter.” Murong Tuo frowned, “we underestimated him. He is very powerful and can’t be underestimated.” Outside the West Tianmen City, Xu wufei quickly ran away and almost turned into a flying rainbow. In the twinkling of an eye, he crossed dozens of miles. It was exciting to run away when he pretended to be forced! After running to the huge West Tianmen City, Xu wufei was relieved to see no one came after him. It seems that the old man has a good temper. He was provoked face to face and didn’t come out. Xu wufei thought about it and left the store A human skin mask was taken out of the ring, and a joking arc was raised at the corner of his mouth: “as a man, how can one be enough? At least seven times!” In Qiongyu Pavilion, the death of Zhang Erhe made the guard furious. But their leader died like this! There was no body left! Naturally, these people did not dare to avenge sun Lao and could not find Xu que, so they had to look at Er Gouzi. After all, this is the monster brought by the boy. I think we should know some news. “What kind of animal are you?” br>

Xitianmen city can’t go back. Xu que pondered for a moment. After thinking for a while, he felt that he couldn’t go in as fried tianbang again.

The old ghost’s strength is very strong, and he ran out by his own strength.

Especially when the other party is on the verge of Immortal Emperor and begins to control the avenue, the divine action symbol may become invalid.

“We have to find another way.”

Xu que thought for a moment and suddenly remembered one thing.

Before, the eternal night hall was looking for the Taoist partners of the chosen people. Logically, in this case, the best identity should be this!

As for ER Gouzi… Let him mix in.

After all, it’s very useful to have a spy who successfully broke into the enemy at the critical moment.

Most of the time, er Gouzi’s mind is still very easy to use.

At this time, er Gouzi, who was highly expected by Xu Duan, was immersed in the gentle countryside of female monks.

“Grass, come and eat this.” a nun picked up a dessert and handed it to ER Gouzi.

The second dog opened his mouth, took the dessert and nodded with satisfaction: “good, good, the dessert given by the fairy sister is delicious.”

“The mouth is sweet!” the nun touched his head and her eyes were full of love.
