“When you reach this level of cultivation, you should not be moved by your heart or by foreign things,” said a man who cut the skin. “Just like me, I have never been bothered by Taoist partners, because I have never had Taoist partners.”

The man on one side looked strange: “wait, when we reach our level of cultivation, the Taoist partners should have been selected long ago. Haven’t you ever been a Taoist partner, Taoist friend?”

The monk who spoke was stunned: “do you all have Taoist companions?”

Several male practitioners looked at each other, nodded tacitly, and then looked at each other with sympathetic eyes.

I’m so old that I don’t even have a Taoist companion. It’s really compassionate

At this time, outside Qiongyu Pavilion, a man and a woman were welcomed again.

The man is about seventeen or eighteen years old. He looks handsome and has a kind smile on his face at any time.

The woman’s face was cold, and her eyes were full of silence, as if everyone around owed her millions of spirit stones.

“Welcome to Qiongyu Pavilion, two… Wait, ah! Yes, you are…” after the maid saw the woman’s look, she was stunned and suddenly exclaimed, “you are Shangguan Wanrong!”

This exclamation immediately attracted the attention of all the monks in the lobby.

It can be said that the matter of looking for the chosen people and their Taoist partners before the eternal night hall was full of wind and rain. During this period, I don’t know how many monks tried to fake, but they were all driven out.

At this time, Shangguan Wanrong suddenly appeared here, which undoubtedly means that a heavy bomb was thrown into the water.

“What, Xuanyuan Wanrong is here?”

“Get out of the way and let me see what this chosen person looks like!”

“Don’t squeeze! What’s good about a monk, a bunch of Hicks!”

In the lobby, Shangguan Wanrong and her Taoist partners sat there, calmly welcoming the crowd.

The monks had never seen the real chosen man before. They suddenly saw him at this time. Naturally, they were curious.

Not far away, er Gouzi, who turned into grass mud horse, seemed to notice something. He suddenly raised his head and looked excited.

The man sitting next to Shangguan Wanrong seemed to inadvertently tilt his head and showed a warning look at Er Gouzi.

Two dogs whined and fell down again.

“What’s the matter, grass?” the nun on one side felt pity for her.

The second dog shook his head: “it’s all right. If only sister fairy could hug me.”

Upon hearing the speech, the nun quickly hugged Er Gouzi in her arms.

The two dogs looked comfortable and enjoyed the soft curve.

Xu Kuan, who pretended to be a Xuanyuan Wanrong Taoist companion, scolded the shameless dog in his heart. He even used his lovely appearance to confuse the female monk. It’s a shame for the fried heaven Gang!

Murong Tuo and others also came to the lobby to find out.

“Remember the invasion of Tianzhou before?” Murong Tuo stood on the stairs and whispered, “at that time, the elders of the family observed fate with the magic of fate and found that the person chosen that day was closely related to entering the divine realm.”

The others were stunned. Most of them had heard the rumor. It was said that Tianzhou was a big ship that could lead to the divine domain.

But when it comes to true and false, it is estimated that few people dare to be sure.

After all, after all these years, the divine domain has not even appeared,

In the lobby, Xuanyuan Wanrong wore a hat and a thin veil to cover her face. On her side was a young man with a beautiful face, hugging and smiling at the people greeting around.

“Yes, yes, I am the Taoist companion of Xuanyuan Wanrong.”

“Sign ten thousand spirit stones, take a group photo as a souvenir of one hundred thousand spirit stones, and make one million physical contacts!” “don’t squeeze, line up, come one by one.” Murong Tuo was stunned at this scene and felt a little incredible. Is this the virtue of Xuanyuan Wanrong’s Taoist companion? While everyone was talking, sun appeared. “If you want to participate in the selection of the principal disciples, please follow me to test the realm.” Sun said kindly, ecstatic. I didn’t expect that they could wait for the chosen one to go with them! Then the next plan will come naturally! However, Xu que arched his hands and said, “I’m sorry. I came here to tell you that I’m the main disciple. You can leave.” the voice fell, and there was a dead silence in the lobby. A moment later, old sun reluctantly said, “little friend, this kind of joke is not easy to open…” “I’m not kidding. In my eyes, all the people present are happy!” Xu lacked was extremely arrogant. He had no patience to make any penetration. Isn’t that the principal disciple? If you beat down all the people who participated in the selection, aren’t you the main disciple? WOW! The whole Qiongyu Pavilion burst into flames. “It’s arrogant! Even if you’re a Taoist companion of the chosen one, can you beat so many of us?” “joke, you dare to talk nonsense in the middle of the immortal territory.” “Taoist friends, come together and deal with him severely!” the crowd was angry. Old sun looked pale and vaguely felt that the development of things was out of his control. Murong Tuo’s face sank and stepped forward: “Taoist friend, you don’t pay attention to others when you say these words…” before his voice fell, he saw a huge fist coming face-to-face. Bang! br>

chapters.title: Chapter 1894
chapters.body:
Chapter 1894

Chapter 1894

C.1894

Suddenly, the whole Qiongyu Pavilion became chaotic.

Countless immortal Dharma lights flickered in it, and the powerful power flowed, which made Qiongyu Pavilion tremble.

Although Qiongyu pavilion has a powerful Dharma array to protect the pavilion, it is not one person who makes moves now, but hundreds of people who make moves at the same time. Even the Dharma array of Qiongyu Pavilion can’t stand it!

Sun Lao’s face was pale. I never expected that the situation would develop like this!

So many friars in xianzun territory shot together, and he, the semi emperor, rushed in rashly. He was afraid that he would be beaten into a pile of mud.

Moreover, because he did not completely control a road, even with the power of the road, he could not suppress so many monks.

“You guys, don’t fight again!” he thought. Since he couldn’t suppress it forcibly, he had to try oral persuasion.

Murong Tuo’s hands were folded, and a mysterious seal condensed out, suspended in mid air, and suppressed Xu Kuang severely.

The powerful power fills the whole space, and the powerful peak cultivation of xianzun realm is undoubtedly revealed.

“Weak, weak!”

Xu Wei laughed, clenched his right fist and pretended to be burning wildly.

King’s fist!

He suddenly punched out, and the whole world seemed to tremble for a moment.

Since he was promoted to the middle stage of xianzun territory, the power of his forced King fist will increase exponentially. I don’t know how many times it is better than the first time!

Powerful chakara poured out of Xu Que’s body and turned into a bright golden dragon, circling around him.

In the whole lobby, as if the space began to twist, countless cracks could be seen emerging in the void.

When this force is suppressed to the limit, it suddenly erupts!

Boom!

The Golden Dragon made a deafening roar and went straight to Murong Tuo, with strands of black cracks emerging along the way.

The mighty seal had hardly any effect and was directly blown to pieces.

Murong Tuo was stunned: “this, how is this possible?”

He quickly changed his hand to make a defensive mark.

However, Jinlong roared and swallowed Murong Tuo directly.

Boom!

A mushroom cloud suddenly exploded, covering the whole sky.

When the smoke dispersed, a big hole had been broken in the roof of Qiongyu Pavilion, and most of the buildings were turned into ruins.

At this moment, sun Lao, a semi imperial strongman, deeply felt a touch of helplessness.

Among the ruins, Xuanyuan Wanrong and Xu weiduan sat in them, their clothes and clothes were spotless, and they looked ready.

Around, a large number of monks emerged from the ruins, their faces dark, like refugees on the roadside.

People looked at the ruins around them and were at a loss.

Who am I? Where am I? What happened?

“Ladies and gentlemen, now you should be able to clearly understand my strength.” Xu que said faintly, “so there should be no problem for me to be the principal disciple.”

The monks present wanted to object, but they were cold at the thought of the punch just now.

Sun Lao was also embarrassed by the punch and his hair was scattered.

He stared at Xu Kuan fiercely and said in a harsh voice, “little beast… You dare to destroy this seat. It’s very bad. This seat wants you to die!”

“Old ghost, you want to touch porcelain, don’t you?” Xu Wusi was not afraid. He got up and was ready to cast the righteous seal magic Sutra.

At this time, a plume of black gas suddenly gushed out of the dead friars and gathered towards sun Lao.

Xu que frowned and suddenly widened his eyes: “this is magic gas! How can these friars have magic gas?”

I saw sun laoao standing in the air, black Qi like a big snake gathered in his body, and a supernatural shadow was emerging behind him.

Foreign demons!

“Boy, I wanted to take my time according to the plan. I didn’t expect you to be so arrogant and destroy our plan. Don’t blame me!”

His eyes showed ferocity, his right hand held high in front of him, turned into a ferocious claw, and an indescribable smell of terror suddenly filled the air.

The living monks suddenly screamed.

“What’s the situation? My accomplishments are being absorbed!”

“God, what is this black gas?”

“Damn it! I can’t stop it!”

I saw the black gas gushing out of these friars, and I could clearly feel that the black gas contained the accomplishments of these friars.

Their strength of hundreds of years of hard training was sent into sun Lao’s body with this black gas.

Even Xu que felt that there was a black gas rolling in his body, trying to take away his strength.

“What is it?”

Xu missed a thought, chakra moved, and directly decomposed and absorbed the black gas. Chakra is a combination of the three forces of Buddha, devil and fairy. It’s just a magic spirit. It can’t turn over any waves at all. Old sun seemed to feel something wrong. He glanced at Xu Kuang and wondered, “strange, you seem to have some skills to suppress the evil spirit of this seat?” he couldn’t feel the evil spirit in Xu Kuang’s body. He just thought that the other party had suppressed the evil spirit. “So you are a foreign evil.” Xu que stared at each other and frowned, “so the fundamental purpose of the so-called realm test is to inject your evil spirit into our body?” “you are very smart.” with one move, old sun suddenly flew out of the ruins and stood on his side. He made a formula with his hands, and complex magic patterns appeared in the air and printed on the jade wall. Jade Bi suddenly trembled, then turned into powder, and an old man’s virtual shadow appeared in the air. “Oh, it’s you, boy.” the old man looked at Xu Ke and seemed to recognize him. He rolled his eyes. “It’s this little bastard who blackmailed this immortal weapon.” old sun shook his head and said, “it’s all right. Anyway, all his things will belong to us next.” then he opened his arms and said excitedly: “When we integrate the accomplishments of these geniuses, we will enter the central Tianmen gate and ambush the Immortal Emperor to kill them. Then we will be the leader of the demon family in Xianyun island!” the monks around us were surprised to hear this. These foreign demons are making such calculations! Unfortunately, they have no chance to stop them. “Boy, contribute your accomplishments as well.” old sun made a move with one hand and used a surging suction. A moment later, he looked at Xu que, who was unmoved. He was stunned for a moment. Why didn’t he respond? Xu que smiled at him and stretched out his right hand: “your moves are very easy to use, but now they belong to me.”

chapters.title: Chapter 1895
chapters.body:
Chapter 1895

Chapter 1895

C.1895

There was an extremely strange scene on the field.

At this time, sun Lao had absorbed the accomplishments of all the monks present. In terms of pure strength, he had surpassed the Immortal Emperor. I don’t know how many times.

But in the face of Xu que, he was stunned and couldn’t exert any strength.

On the contrary, the evil Qi on him was still pouring into Xu lacked’s body.

“It turned out that the purpose of testing the realm before was to plant the magic core into these people’s bodies.” Xu Duan stretched out his index finger and a wisp of magic gas beat at his fingertips. “As long as you like, you can rely on the magic core to devour all the other party’s accomplishments at any time.”

In short, after the realm test, all monks became old sun’s pigs.

When you want to kill a pig is just a thought.

Unfortunately, the chakra on Xu Que’s body is a brand-new power formed by the integration of three powers of immortal, demon and Buddha, which is far beyond the pure magic Qi.

The evil spirit that tried to absorb his cultivation was immediately suppressed and immediately integrated into chakra.

The monks around him were already shocked.

They never expected that this time the selection of principal disciples would be a conspiracy.

But what shocked them more was that this disgusting guy had the ability to suppress the evil spirit!

“This is the power of foreign demons…”

“Doesn’t it mean that foreign demons have long been suppressed outside the sky? Why do we appear here?”

“Damn it! I know. It must be that Cheng Yuanxian domain and foreign demons have colluded together!”

The people present were not stupid. They thought of this after contacting the news before and after.

At this time, a suppressed crazy laughter echoed over the eternal night hall.

She was dressed in a long white dress, spotless, and her exquisite face was full of pride. She looked down at the people like a God.

Murong Tuo lay in the ruins, his eyes suddenly widened, and said unbelievably, “Feng Yuehua, what’s going on?”

The visitor is the saint of the eternal night hall, the wind and the moon!

She glanced at Murong Tuo faintly and said with a light smile, “didn’t the childe say it clearly just now? I thought the childe of Murong family would be a little smarter.”

Murong Tuo roared: “bastard! Collude with foreign demons!”

He subconsciously raised his hand and ran Xianyuan to beat down Feng Yuehua.

“Well…”

The next second, Murong Tuo fell directly to the ground, his face turned pale, and bursts of weakness gushed out of his body.

The wind and moon Hua Leng snorted and raised the corners of his mouth: “cultivation is completely absorbed. Do you still want to do it? Fool!”

After that, she looked at Xu Duan and her eyes were full of curiosity: “I didn’t expect that the Taoist couple of the chosen one should have this ability. It’s really beyond my expectation.”

“You’re welcome. In fact, I have many advantages. You don’t know. You can find a room to experience it when you have time.” Xu que shrugged, “but the wind friend is out now. Isn’t he chatting with me?”

“Of course.” Feng Yuehua slowly fell on the side of old sun and said in a deep voice, “Taoist friends have advanced cultivation. It’s better to join us and create a great cause together!”

“Join you?” Xu que picked his eyebrow and joked, “just a group of the old, weak, sick and disabled, what qualifications do you have to create a great cause?”

“Boy, don’t think that if you can suppress my evil spirit, you can be arrogant!” old sun looked bad and threatened.

Feng Yuehua waved his hand: “don’t be angry, Taoist friend. Now the Immortal Emperor is closed to the central Tianmen. There is no Immortal Emperor on this Xianyun island. This is a great opportunity. As long as we destroy these friars, we can rule the whole Xianyun island!”

Xu que was stunned.

This woman is out of her mind.

Even if the Immortal Emperor is not in xianyunzhou, no cat or dog can rule.

What’s more, even if all these friars are dead, those old monsters hidden in the family are bound to appear and avenge their future generations.

It seems that after seeing through Xu Ke’s idea, Feng Yuehua said meaningfully: “now that we have absorbed the cultivation of these talents, we will become the strongest friars in Xianyun Island, infinitely close to the Immortal Emperor, not to mention… Do we really think we have no backhand?”

Boom!

The voice fell, and suddenly there was a loud noise in the sky.

In the sky, dark clouds covered and thunder rolled, as if something extremely terrible was about to happen.

In the distance, I could vaguely hear countless cries, which came with the sharp wind.

Murong Tuo suddenly turned pale and murmured, “father’s breath has disappeared…”

Feng Yuehua laughed: “that’s right! The famous family in Chengyuan immortal field has long been planted with a magic core by us. If we start it overnight, those powerful monks will become our nourishment!”

Snap!

A flash of lightning across the sky reflected the palpitating Madness on Feng Yuehua’s face. Xu que can clearly feel that countless powerful breath in the Chengyuan immortal domain is rapidly disappearing, and vigorous cultivation achievements in the world are breaking through the air and will flow into the bodies of Feng Yuehua. Once they are absorbed, they will become the most powerful friars in this immortal region, even in the whole Xianyun continent. Maybe even surpass the Immortal Emperor! However, Xu Ke is still curious about one question: “how can you guarantee that the Immortal Emperor will not come out to suppress you?” even if these guys can compare with the Immortal Emperor, if they really want to fight, they must be the Immortal Emperor who can’t fight all the battles. Feng Yuehua looked ferocious and said with a laugh: “when we absorb our strength, we will naturally destroy the channel to the central Tianmen, block the whole central Tianmen and exile them into the void. Those immortal emperors won’t come back for hundreds of millions of years!” Xu lacked smelled his words and his face changed greatly. Exile to the central Tianmen gate? It’s not bad. I can find xiaorou soon. How can I make you a crazy woman bad! At this time, there was a strong magic Qi in the sky, which was about to merge into the wind moon body. She opened her arms and laughed wildly, “come on! Let me be the strongest friar!” boom! After the deafening roar, the magic Qi directly covered the whole area. Feng Yuehua felt something was wrong when she was in it. “Strange… Why didn’t my strength grow?” she looked down and found that those magic Qi didn’t flow into her body, but surrounded Xu’s body and constantly merged into her body. What happened? Feng Yuehua is stupid. Why was the evil spirit summoned by himself absorbed by that guy? Xu que smiled faintly, carried his hands and said in a deep voice: “unexpectedly, even foreign demons think I am the right one!”… br>

chapters.title: Chapter 1896
chapters.body:
Chapter 1896

Chapter 1896

C.1896

Dark clouds pressed the city, and strong forces poured in one after another. They should have fallen into the hands of Feng Yuehua, but they all ran to XuKe.

Feeling the surging cultivation in his body, Xu Ke felt the feeling of eating and supporting for the first time.

These forces are so large that they almost bring together the essence of the life of the powerful monks of the Yuan emperor, which is enough to lift an ordinary man directly to the peak of Xian Zun.

“System! Give me balance quickly, install Force Value and deduct directly!” Xu que roared in his heart.

The power is mixed with a lot of evil spirit. If he doesn’t rely on the system and only depends on his current cultivation, it’s estimated that he will be directly transformed into an extraterritorial evil spirit in a short time. I’m afraid it won’t be so easy to transform back at that time.

At this time, Feng Yuehua was completely stupid.

She worked hard and conscientiously, and all her accomplishments were taken away by this guy!

The Chinese cabbage was arched by pigs?

Who can stand this!

“Bastard! Give me back my accomplishments!”

Feng Yuehua’s eyes and canthus were about to crack. His body flashed and directly turned into a ghostly figure and rushed to Xu que.

“Hey, hey! Calm down first. If I do it, I may kill you!” Xu que quickly discouraged him.

Feng Yuehua sneered: “joke! It’s impossible to start when absorbing magic Qi. At least Xianyuan is disordered, at worst it’s sudden death. You’re dead!”

The monks around suddenly looked sad.

“It’s over… If this Taoist friend is defeated, we can’t escape death.”

“No, you can’t wait to die!”

“Even if we don’t have accomplishments, we should block for our Taoist friends!”

In order not to be caught, the monks who were still alive struggled to get up and tried to help Xu vacancy block the downwind Yuehua.

Although all their accomplishments have been absorbed, there are still some immortal yuan left in the meridians, which can barely be used.

“Mole ants!”

Feng Yuehua’s eyes were cold, and he didn’t even give them a glimmer of eyes.

But as soon as their breath shook, these friars were directly blown out, and they couldn’t even resist one or two.

Murong Tuo was among them, but after all, he was a once gifted Friar and barely resisted a breath.

The next second, it still flew out.

People’s hearts are full of despair. They are really like ants now. They can’t play any role at all.

Murong Tuo’s red eyes looked at Xu Xu’s direction: “Taoist friend! Get away! You are the last hope now!”

However, Xu Wei just carried his hands, looked calmly ahead and said calmly, “Alas… Why don’t you listen to my advice?”

In front of him, Feng Yuehua’s body was full of black gas and almost turned into a ferocious and terrible evil devil.

“Die!”

The huge magic Qi instantly converged into a huge palm, wrapped in unparalleled power, and suddenly pressed down!

Xu Ke calmly stood in place, slowly raised his right hand and flicked it gently.

Chakara burst out, and the huge palm was dispersed in an instant, and even the black clouds in the sky were cleaned up.

In the sky, a ray of sunshine fell from the clouds, and Xu que stood in the light, peerless and independent.

Feng Yuehua was shocked.

The monks around were also surprised.

Was it just a snap of the finger that destroyed the terrible offensive?

Is this still human?

After the shock, Feng Yuehua returned to her senses and distorted her face: “no, no… this is all my strength. Give it back to me…”

Bang!

Before he finished, Xu que raised his hand, the clouds rolled and turned into a huge palm, patting Feng Yuehua into powder.

After all this, he took out his ears and disdained to say, “it’s really noisy.”

At this time, almost all the forces had been integrated into his body. Xu lacked only felt that he was stronger than ever before, and the cultivation realm was directly pushed to the peak of xianzun realm.

If it weren’t for the fact that he hasn’t fully mastered the avenue, I’m afraid the realm will directly break through to the Immortal Emperor, and he is still the most powerful Immortal Emperor!

After all, the power of powerful monks in the whole Chengyuan immortal domain gathered in his body at this time. Even if the Immortal Emperor came personally, it was impossible to compete with these people.

“It’s time to find xiaorou.” Xu que said faintly, stepped out and directly entered the Yongye hall.

He felt that in the hall, there was a place emitting an abnormal smell of space, that was the entrance to the central Tianmen.

On the ruins of Qiongyu Pavilion, the monks looked at each other and were particularly at a loss.

A life and death crisis was thus resolved by others.

Behind the Yongye hall, there is an empty hall.

In the center of the hall, the space is twisted into a vortex, surrounded by broken void cracks, and you can vaguely feel the powerful breath from it.

This is the entrance to the central Tianmen gate, which was jointly set up by the four immortal emperors. Unless their accomplishments surpass them, they can enter only by holding their keepsake. However, Xu que stood in front of the vortex and did not see any action. The whole vortex shook directly and suddenly emitted soft light. His strength has reached an unimaginable level, and this restriction can’t stop him at all. Xu que thought for a moment. He first sent out dozens of messages and told Jiang Hongyan and others that they were going to enter the central Tianmen gate. Then he raised his hand and caught Er Gouzi directly. “Let’s go and pick up xiaorou with me.” Xu Kushen said. Er Gouzi said excitedly, “Chong Chong Chong! Short of brother’s power, let’s rob the treasure house of Guangxian emperor!” Xu Ke: “…” he took a deep breath and stepped into the vortex. After a brief dizziness, a luxurious heavenly palace appeared in front of us. The whole heavenly palace has five floors, which are integrated like white jade, emitting a long fluorescence. Xu Wei never thought that there was only one heavenly palace in the central heavenly gate! “Brother Kuang, I feel a strong breath, otherwise we’d better withdraw first.” Er Gouzi habitually prepared to run, “the guys here seem to be very powerful…” Xu Kuang smiled confidently: “I can’t say anything else. Now I’ll beat one of these immortal emperors!” absorbed the accomplishments of many strong ones, Xu Xu’s self-confidence has expanded to a peak at this time! Whoosh! As soon as the voice fell, a figure appeared in front of Xu Xu. The visitor was a middle-aged man, dressed in royal clothes, with a purple and gold crown on his head, sword eyebrows and stars. At a glance, he looked like a God. “Who are you?” the middle-aged man frowned. “Why did you enter here through the channel set by the emperor?” the emperor? Cheng Yuanxian emperor? Xu que grinned and arched his hands and said, “Your Excellency is emperor Cheng Yuanxian. I’m the husband of fairy Yurou. I’ve come to take her home on purpose.”… br>

chapters.title: Chapter 1897
chapters.body:
Chapter 1897

Chapter 1897

C.1897

Emperor Cheng Yuanxian was a little confused.

He felt that a strong man had entered the central Tianmen gate, so he came out to check it out.

As a result, as soon as Xu came up, he said he was Yurou’s husband and wanted to come to her home.

This suddenly made emperor Cheng Yuanxian a little unable.

Seeing that the other party didn’t speak, Xu que simply restored his face to its original appearance.

Emperor Cheng Yuanxian stared at him for a long time and suddenly thought of something: “are you Xu que?”

He was surprised that the man Yurou never forgot, a mole ant in a small world, has now grown into such a strong man?

Xu que catches a glimpse of emperor Cheng Yuanxian’s eyes becoming a little gloomy, but he smiles in his heart.

Sure enough!

This guy will know his existence. He must have searched xiaorou’s memory.

Otherwise, no one would have chased him before.

“Since his majesty Xiandi knows my name, he should also know my relationship with xiaorou.” Xu que said with a smile, “let xiaorou go with me. This is the end of everything.”

Emperor Cheng Yuanxian shook his head and said faintly, “it’s impossible. You don’t know what Yurou’s existence represents. She is not only our only hope to go to the divine domain.”

“So we just can’t talk about it?”

“You should understand that xianyunzhou will be destroyed sooner or later. Only Yurou can lead us to open the Tianzhou ship and go to the divine domain.” emperor Chengyuan said calmly, “when we go to the divine domain, we will be the new gods. At that time, we will naturally return xiaorou to you.”

Xu Xu was silent for a moment and suddenly said, “what will happen to xiaorou?”

Emperor Cheng Yuanxian said expressionless, “when you open the ship, she will consume all the power of the divine soul. We will let her invest in reincarnation. At that time, you can find her reincarnation.”

After reincarnation, all memories will be consumed.

Those memories between them will disappear in the long river of time.

Is this reincarnation still xiaorou?

Xu Xu suddenly laughed for no reason.

Emperor Cheng Yuanxian frowned slightly: “for the sake of your relationship with Yurou, I have told you the reason. Now leave quickly. Don’t bother here.”

“Get out!”

Xu Wei suddenly became angry and roared, “you son of a bitch. I wanted to tell you well before. Since you are so arrogant, don’t blame me for making you!”

What bullshit? Looking at my relationship with xiaorou, it’s clearly afraid of my power!

Since you won’t let xiaorou come back, don’t blame me for bullying!

After saying that, his figure flashed, he came to Emperor Cheng Yuanxian in an instant, and his fist with unparalleled power was suddenly waved out.

Emperor Cheng Yuanxian took his time, raised his arm, and the surrounding space suddenly changed.

There seemed to be countless mirrors between them, and the whole space was folded.

Xu Ke’s fist fell and hit directly in the air. His powerful power surged wildly, but it was only limited to three feet in front of him.

“Your strength is very strong.” emperor Cheng Yuanxian said indifferently, “but without controlling the avenue, you and I are not at the same level after all. Don’t do meaningless things.”

Xu Ke retracted his arm and looked at the distorted space in front of him.

Just now he felt that his fist fell directly into the space, and there was no real feeling at all.

“Brother Ke, this boy controls the space Avenue!” Er Gouzi once again gave full play to his knowledge that he didn’t know where he came from. “You can’t hit him like this!”

“You dog is a little knowledgeable.” emperor Cheng Yuanxian said faintly, “go back. You can’t hit me.”

Space Avenue can control space. Ordinary magic has no way to hit each other through the distorted space.

“Hehe, do you think I will retreat?”

Xu que grinned and suddenly punched again, and the majestic chakra directly turned into a wild dragon.

Seeing this, Emperor Cheng Yuanxian waved with one hand: “I said, you can’t hit…”

Snap!

Suddenly, a broken glass sounded.

I saw that the Dragon directly broke through the space that had been stacked thousands of layers between the two. With an unstoppable momentum, it blew straight on emperor Cheng Yuanxian.

The whole space was instantly blasted out of a huge black hole, broken space debris overflowed, and the other party’s figure had disappeared.

The next second, Emperor Cheng Yuanxian appeared next to the black hole and looked at Xu Xu in shock: “how can your power be so strong?”

He just used the power of space Avenue!

The reason why the Immortal Emperor surpasses ordinary friars is that they can master the power of the road. Ordinary friars are completely weak chickens without fighting back in front of him.

With the power of space, ordinary friars can be sealed in space.

But he didn’t expect that Xu Ke could smash the space directly!

What kind of power is this special! Monster! Xu que grinned and waved his fist again: “a group of old immortals have never seen the world. Today I’ll show you the power of my tianbang Gang!” boom! Boom! Boom! The powerful force is like an indestructible siege chariot, bombarding the space fiercely again and again. Every time emperor Cheng Yuanxian deployed his space defense, without exception, it was blown to pieces and had no resistance. He doesn’t understand why Xu’s strength is so strong. Isn’t this guy xianzun peak? Where did the xianzun peak come from? During this period, he also tried to fight the fierce with physical strength. As a result, half of his body was almost broken. As long as he continued to resist with the force of space. “This guy seems to be a little useless.” Xu que narrowed his eyes and kept his fist waving posture. He thought, “is it difficult to hide his clumsiness?” in fact, as an old Immortal Emperor, Cheng Yuanxian has experienced many battles and should not be such a weak chicken. But as soon as Xu Ke came up, he used the most fierce fighting method. His fist broke the space, so that Cheng Yuanxian emperor was caught off guard and couldn’t even use any profound magic. After reluctantly performing a few magic tricks, they were directly smashed and didn’t even splash any water before they had time to exert their effects. Hearing Xu Xu’s murmur, Emperor Cheng Yuanxian didn’t come up at one breath and almost fainted directly. Who is it? You have to make fun of yourself! If you have the ability to give me time to prepare, I will definitely beat you so that my mother doesn’t know you! The Immortal Emperor is also a human being. Being ridiculed will make people cry. Emperor Cheng Yuanxian had no choice but to take Xu Ke and suddenly withdrew. Without saying a word, Xu que ran after him with his fist, and several fists directly hit emperor Cheng Yuanxian. Bang! Emperor Cheng Yuanxian had no defense. He was blown to pieces and turned into a handful of blood rain. It was Xu Que’s turn to be stunned: “that’s it? The Immortal Emperor wasn’t very powerful…” the next second, a figure suddenly condensed a few feet away, his hands folded together, and a mysterious mystery rose into the sky. Xu Ke frowned slightly and wanted to kill each other. However, before he did anything, three powerful and unparalleled breath burst out in the heavenly palace

chapters.title: Chapter 1898
chapters.body:
Chapter 1898

Chapter 1898

C.1898

Boom!

The power of thousands of immortal gods and hundreds of half step immortal emperors was absorbed by Xu que.

At this time, the power he can play is comparable to the half step God.

Facing this force, Emperor Cheng Yuanxian had almost no way to deal with it.

He was the weakest of the four immortal emperors. If he didn’t control the space Avenue, he might not have been able to promote the Immortal Emperor that year.

At the last moment of Becoming Immortal Emperor, you need to pass the examination of heaven and earth. Only by passing the examination can you become immortal emperor.

This is why there are so many half step immortal emperors, but there are only four of them.

All the other monks who want to be promoted to Immortal Emperor are dead.

At this time, Emperor Cheng Yuanxian felt the powerlessness of dealing with the assessment again. As a last resort, he had to ask for the help of several other immortal emperors.

Bang!

With three surging forces pouring out, the void was torn in an instant.

The terrible weather is bound to suppress the surrounding area out of breath.

The three figures seemed to cross the river of time, tear the void, and appear in front of Xu Xu in the blink of an eye.

“Cheng Yuan, how could you be beaten like this?”

One of them suddenly opened his mouth. It was Yongzhen Immortal Emperor.

He sneered, “when I asked you to practice hard, you were going to do something wrong.”

The other two immortal emperors also agreed and smiled. Yongzhen is the strongest Immortal Emperor among them. There is a faint meaning of the first of the four immortal emperors in it.

When he finished teasing the Immortal Emperor of Yuan Dynasty, he looked at Xu Que and was stunned. After a long time, he suddenly smiled and said, “it’s you. I said who has such great ability to beat Cheng Yuan for help.”

They’ve met before, more than once.

The last time Xu que cracked the other party’s humanoid lightning, there was a touch of divine thought of Yongzhen Immortal Emperor in the humanoid lightning at that time.

Several other immortal emperors could not do such a thing, only Yongzhen did it.

“Thank you for your advice.” Xu Kuang arched his hand and said, “today I’m here only for one person. Give me xiaorou, and I’ll leave immediately.”

Yongzhen’s eyes can’t stop appreciating: “if you can be promoted to Immortal Emperor, you will be the strongest Immortal Emperor in history, but you are still too young. I don’t want to kill you. Go back.”

When he was angry, he saw his own shadow in Xu Duan’s body.

Xu Ke was silent for a moment and put on a posture: “elder, I have offended you.”

All four were stunned.

A friar at the top of the immortal realm wants to fight against the four immortal emperors!

This kind of thing is unprecedented. No one will believe it!

“It seems that you won’t give up until you fail.” Yongzhen Immortal Emperor still kept smiling. “Your strength has far exceeded the peak of xianzun, even stronger than the four of us. It would be a pity to die here.”

“If you can’t save xiaorou, what if you die here?” Xu Kushen said.

“Ha ha, good!” Yongzhen Immortal Emperor grinned and a look of excitement appeared at the bottom of his eyes. “Then I’ll give you a chance. The four of us will work together to use the strongest move. If you can break it, it means you are better than the four of us and have the ability to kill us! Xiaorou will give it to you then!”

Cheng Yuanxian wanted to talk, but he was stopped by magic cloud immortal.

“What are you doing?” emperor Cheng Yuanxian said angrily.

The magic cloud Immortal Emperor’s face was dignified: “this guy’s strength is at least dozens of times that of us. You can’t fight normally. If you hadn’t just died because you are the Immortal Emperor, Yongzhen is creating opportunities for us!”

Emperor Cheng Yuanxian was stunned and suddenly reacted.

This competition seems fair, but in fact it is beneficial to the four of them.

The most powerful place of the Immortal Emperor is the control of the avenue. If they do their best, they can defeat each other without confrontation with Xu Wei.

Hearing this condition, Xu Xu was silent for a moment. He knew that the other party was scheming, but he had to accept it.

These people may not be able to beat themselves, but they can’t kill each other.

If they are determined to stop people, they can’t save xiaorou anyway.

“In that case…” Xu Wei suddenly raised his head and grinned. “What do you say is what? How old are you?”

When the voice fell, an extremely strong breath suddenly surged up on him, his hair turned white slowly, and golden lightning twinkled in his eyes.

Zhengqi seal magic Sutra!

At the moment of his transformation, the space around him began to shake, and strands of cracks emerged. The breath of transformation alone broke the space in the heavenly palace!

Feeling the breath of each other, their faces changed greatly.

“This! How can there be such a powerful force in this world?” emperor Cheng Yuanxian felt as if he had just returned to the practice world and met a great Luo Jinxian.

That kind of strong and unmatched power can’t be resisted by yourself! With Xu Ke’s strength now, Emperor Cheng Yuanxian can’t be his opponent at all. “Magic cloud, you go up together.” Yongzhen Immortal Emperor looked dignified and ordered. The Immortal Emperor has the dignity of the Immortal Emperor. Two to one is the limit they can accept. But even so, several people’s faces are still difficult to see the extreme. The powerful power surged wildly, the space was full of dark cracks, and the world trembled. Boom! The next second, the space crashed and the boundless white background turned into nothingness. At this time, countless monks on Xianyun island had already felt the vibration in the central Tianmen and were amazed. “The central Tianmen gate hasn’t moved for many years. Why did it suddenly appear in the change?” “do you think the immortal emperors had an accident?” “hell, look, the space collapsed!” a monk pointed to the air and shouted in shock. At this moment, the monks in xianyunzhou witnessed a shocking scene. The sky of Xianyun island is like a huge piece of glass, and countless cracks spread on it. The crack was almost infinitely exaggerated and spread to the end of the field of vision. The sky was fragmented, like a grand snow fall, but the snow was at the cost of the fragmentation of the whole sky. Under the snow, a magnificent heavenly palace appears in front of you. The heavenly palace is pure white and traceless, like a white jade palace naturally generated between heaven and earth. Above the palace, there are five figures, each of which exudes a strong momentum. Any monk who sees these figures is afraid, which is a sense of fear from the gap in the level of power. “God… It’s four immortal emperors.” the friars were shocked. They recognized the identities of the four immortal emperors at a glance. Someone is confronting the Immortal Emperor! A sound of ecstasy suddenly burst out: “that’s brother lack! It’s brother lack!” the people looked sideways and found that it was the dog in the notorious combination of immoral dogs on Xianyun island. According to it, the one who confronts the four immortal emperors above is the legendary leader of the fried heaven gang and the head of the immoral dog – Xu que

chapters.title: Chapter 1899
chapters.body:
Chapter 1899

Chapter 1899

C.1899

Xu Ke has completely changed at this time.

His white hair was scattered behind him, and his eyes glittered with golden and black lightning. Around his body, he was overflowing with the majestic power of immortal yuan, just like the gods and demons who came to the world in ancient times. At a glance, it made life have an irresistible mind.

If only from the perspective of momentum, if these friars don’t know the four immortal emperors, I’m afraid they will think Xu Weicai is the real Immortal Emperor.

“See the ghost, unexpectedly someone will challenge the Immortal Emperor?”

“I’ve seen it before. Later, the man seems to be dead and all the gods and souls are gone.”

“The power of the Immortal Emperor can’t be challenged by ordinary friars!”

The monks talked about it one after another, although Xu lacked showed much more power than they imagined.

But people don’t think Xu lacks the strength to challenge the Immortal Emperor.

You know, for thousands of years, I don’t know how many amazing monks have been stopped outside the threshold of the Immortal Emperor.

Among them, those who try to cross this threshold and challenge the Immortal Emperor are the demons of genius. Only the top elite friars can do this.

But the four immortal emperors are like four mountains, pressing high on everyone’s head.

Every monk who goes to challenge will eventually end up dead.

Even the genius of the Ji family was also insidious in this.

So when they saw the match between several people, they couldn’t help shaking their heads.

“Unfortunately, another genius is about to fall.”

“The road of the Immortal Emperor is so difficult. Although he is a little immoral, he still has a bright future. Why should he do such an irrational thing?”

In Cheng Yuanxian domain, Jiang Hongyan and others also saw this scene, and their hearts immediately tightened.

Although Xu Ke had almost never been defeated before, the power of the Immortal Emperor had completely exceeded their understanding.

That is not a gap that can be smoothed simply by virtue of strong power.

Several people stared at the trembling figure, silently lowered their heads, and there was only one idea in their hearts.

Xu Xu… We must succeed.

Xu Ke, the protagonist of this historical war, stood proudly in the air at this time, feeling the power in his body, and a radian was raised at the corners of his mouth.

“From now on, I has the final say, who will approve of it and who will oppose it?” he said lightly.

Several immortal emperors’ faces were dignified, their bodies were filled with immortal clouds, and the atmosphere was filled with tension.

Even if Xu que just stood there without any action, he could make several immortal emperors have enough vigilance.

“You are too arrogant. The power of Immortal Emperor is not what you can understand.” Yongzhen Immortal Emperor is still trying to make peace. “As long as you are willing to retreat, we can guarantee that we won’t hurt Yurou’s slightest bit, and it will be returned to you immediately after the matter is over.”

“This should be said by me.” Xu que stepped forward and stared at each other coldly. “Hand over xiaorou and I’ll spare you!”

“Arrogance! Do you really think you can beat two?” emperor Cheng Yuanxian couldn’t help but roared.

Xu que raised a finger and shook it slightly.

Emperor Cheng Yuanxian was stunned, and then sneered: “even if you beg for mercy now, it’s too late…”

“No, I mean, I’m going to hit all of you!” Xu Kuang said, “with all due respect, everyone here is happy!”

WOW!

The friars on Xianyun Island immediately burst into flames.

This man is so arrogant that he provokes the Immortal Emperor in public!

The Immortal Emperor Chengyuan was so angry that he closed his hands and the immortal yuan rolled.

“Jue Tian Yin!”

A huge gold seal stuck out of the cloud.

The gold seal is as big as half of the West Tianmen City. The appearance is full of mysterious gold patterns. The powerful and unparalleled pressure directly makes the friars below unable to stand up. They can only stoop and look at the scene in shock.

“God… It’s Jue Tian Yin! The famous stunt of emperor Cheng Yuanxian!”

“It is said that Cheng Yuanxian killed dozens of people in the same territory with this move before he became immortal emperor. They are all evil geniuses!”

“This guy is dead today. No one can stop the Immortal Emperor’s full hand.”

Facing the imposing golden seal, Xu que looked up at the sky and suddenly smiled.

The smile was full of disdain.

“That’s it?”

He took a deep breath and punched hard.

The combination of Zhengqi seal magic Sutra and forced King fist made his fist burst out with unparalleled power.

Chakra rushed out with a fist, like a river pouring down, pounding on the golden seal.

Boom!

Everyone was shocked.

Just seeing this golden seal, they can’t resist. Can Xu Ke shake it?

“It’s terrible…”

“Who the hell is this guy?”

“The leader of the fried heaven Gang is so terrible!” the standoff did not last long. Under the shocked eyes of the people, a crack suddenly appeared on the gold seal. The crack spread rapidly, and soon the whole gold seal was like a fragile glass product, “click” and completely cracked! “Poof!” emperor Cheng Yuanxian spewed a mouthful of blood directly, and the whole man flew upside down and hit the wall of the heavenly palace! Boom! The heavenly palace seemed to be hit by a meteorite and shook violently. The friars on Xianyun Island were stunned and looked at this scene, feeling that their world outlook was broken in an instant. Emperor Cheng Yuanxian… Was defeated by one move! Before they could return to their senses, they saw Xu Ke’s body flash. In a flash, they came to Emperor Cheng Yuanxian and raised their fists high. “Send you to the West!” the violent air rushed away, and the surface of the heavenly palace was directly blasted out of a pit, which was full of bloody stumps. The monks’ brains are blank, and there is a dead silence on Xianyun island. You can smell the dropping of needles! Emperor Cheng Yuanxian was killed! This scene is sensational to the extreme. Any monk could not believe this scene, but it happened to appear in front of them. Xu Wei looked at his fist, frowned and said, “why did you fall down before I did my best?” as soon as the voice fell, the flesh and blood in the pit suddenly began to dissipate and turned into brilliance. After a few moments, the figure of emperor Cheng Yuanxian appeared again in front of everyone. Xu que immediately frowned: “Why are you alive again? Can’t the Immortal Emperor kill me?” the newly resurrected Immortal Emperor Cheng Yuan snorted coldly and said with a gloomy face: “ignorant, you don’t know the secret of the immortal kingdom until you come to the immortal kingdom. You can’t kill me…” boom! Before the words fell, Xu que came forward directly and hit Cheng Yuanxian emperor with a hard punch, directly smashing him again. As before, Emperor Cheng Yuanxian resurrected and said in a fierce voice, “don’t you understand? The Immortal Emperor can’t kill…” boom! “Don’t dream…” boom! “You don’t understand the emperor’s words…” boom! “NIMA…” boom! When people saw this scene, they were filled with thunder

chapters.title: Chapter 1900
chapters.body:
Chapter 1900

Chapter 1900

C.1900

Immortal Emperor was once synonymous with power.

There are only four immortal emperors on the whole Xianyun island. They have ruled the world for a long time. Every friar is eager to be their general existence.

It can be said that the Immortal Emperor is the dream of monks.

But today, the dream is broken.

“God… This guy killed the Immortal Emperor!” a friar could hardly believe his eyes and murmured.

Under the gaze of all the monks in xianyunzhou, Cheng Yuanxian emperor was beaten into blood foam again and again and condensed again, but he was broken again before he could speak.

The monks only felt that their world outlook was broken again and again.

“What are you doing?” Yongzhen finally couldn’t help it. “Magic cloud, hurry to save Cheng Yuan!”

The magic cloud Immortal Emperor suddenly reacted, and his body suddenly turned into thousands, just like stars in the sky, and suddenly stood in front of Xu Wei.

Bang!

With one blow, the thousand incarnations of the magic cloud Immortal Emperor suddenly broke more than half, but it blocked Xu Ke’s punch.

“Illusion?” Xu Mei frowned and looked down at his fist.

When the fist fell just now, I could obviously feel something strange. The broken parts seemed to be all true.

Under the protection of magic cloud Immortal Emperor, Emperor Chengyuan finally recovered without being broken directly.

The magic cloud Immortal Emperor stood with his hands on his back, and thousands of avatars spoke in unison: “break into the fairy palace without permission and die.”

The endless power came out with his mouth, and the whole fairy palace area was roaring. It was hard to bear the power of the sound when everyone bent down.

When you reach the realm of Immortal Emperor, even your words and deeds contain great prestige.

“This is the thousand magic incarnation of the magic cloud Immortal Emperor!”

“It is said that the magic cloud Immortal Emperor understands one of the magic ways. Ten of these thousands of incarnations are fake bodies similar to his cultivation, but they also have the combat power of the real body, which is extremely terrible!”

“Isn’t that equivalent to one person hitting ten? How can this be beaten?”

“The boy is dead! He can’t beat the magic cloud immortal!”

To everyone’s surprise, after magic cloud came on stage, Emperor Cheng Yuanxian didn’t step down, but stood side by side with magic cloud emperor.

Everyone was surprised.

The two immortal emperors are going to fight at the same time!

Is this guy so powerful?

However, Xu Ke smiled faintly in the face of this scene, and his face showed a cold look: “it’s just separation. Do you really think you can do anything for me?”

After saying that, he raised his hand and suddenly differentiated into a figure behind him.

The magic cloud Immortal Emperor was stunned and sneered: “just a separate body…”

Shua!

Suddenly, countless separate bodies suddenly differentiated from Xu Ke and covered the whole sky in an instant!

Hiss!

Emperor Cheng Yuanxian took a breath of air-conditioning and stared at the split in front of him, which was ten times his own!

What the hell is this?

As like as two peas, Xu Que could feel the breath of these bodies clearly.

In other words, these individuals have the same combat effectiveness as Xu Xu!

How is that possible?

“It’s impossible!” the magic cloud Immortal Emperor roared with red eyes. “This skill is a magic power that we realized after mastering one of the magic ways. How can you master it?”

“It’s not separation. Our guild leader can summon tens of thousands of people!” Xu que waved his big hand and said plausibly, “I’ll blow up millions of guild members of tianbang. Everyone can be separated. I don’t know how you can become the Immortal Emperor!”

He looked at the magic cloud Immortal Emperor and sneered in his heart.

I don’t know, but would it be nice if the system had one?

“Don’t talk nonsense to him, kill him!” emperor Cheng Yuanxian shouted and rushed up again.

Are you kidding? So many people have fighting power?

Is it true that the emperor has been practicing for so many years for nothing?

At the moment he rushed up, countless split bodies punched together!

Boom!

Cheng Yuanxian emperor was directly blasted into powder, and even the separation of magic cloud Immortal Emperor was broken again.

The strong wind swept the sky on Xianyun Island, the white clouds broke up, and the clear blue reflected the whole sky.

The people in xianyunzhou were dumbfounded when they saw this scene.

What the hell is this fighting power!

Two immortal emperors were directly beaten and collapsed!

Will there really be such monks in this world?

Everyone couldn’t believe their eyes, but the situation really appeared in front of them.

The immortal emperors are also stupid.

The combat effectiveness shown by Xu que has completely exceeded their imagination.

“Hell, how did this guy practice?” mujiuxian emperor looked at Xu Ke, who was slowly recovering his separation, with a blank brain.

Yongzhen Immortal Emperor was no longer relaxed and said in a deep voice: “don’t be in a daze. Let’s go together. If we don’t solve this boy today, we will never rule xianyunzhou again.”

He didn’t prepare to play one by one, but chose to play four directly!

Mujiu was even more surprised: “where does this put our dignity?”

“Now you still want dignity?” Yongzhen looked at him coldly. “If you don’t kill him today, there will never be peace in xianyunzhou!”

Although they master the avenue, they can’t kill them unless they erase the avenue.

But the problem is that now these people can’t beat Xu deficiency!

One fist on the other side can blow up the Immortal Emperor, which is the power of Taoist respect!

But he is clearly just the peak of xianzun!

Yongzhen wants to know these things clearly. He only knows that these people must kill Xu que.

Boom!

In an instant, the four majestic breath broke out, and the whole Xianyun Island suddenly surged, and the earth trembled, as if something extremely terrible appeared between the heaven and the earth.

The four people were surrounded by mysterious lines. At a glance, they only felt dizzy.

That is the repression from the avenue. Ordinary friars can’t stop the repression from friars at another level.

People in xianyunzhou were shocked when they saw this scene.

“Oh, my God… The four immortal emperors should join hands against the enemy?”

“It’s terrible. No one has ever forced the Immortal Emperor to this point!”

“This heaven bombing Gang is so terrible!”

Er Gouzi was running around in the crowd at this time. When he didn’t see anyone, he proudly 1 straightened his chest: “see? The one in the sky is the elder brother of our God! If you know what to do, you should quickly hand over your baby!”

Xu Xu’s face gradually became dignified in the face of the cooperation of the four immortal emperors.

“Have you joined hands? In that case, I can’t keep my hands!”

After that, his breath suddenly pulled up again, the hair behind his head gradually turned golden, and the lightning at the bottom of his eyes was like a sea of thunder!

Three stages of Qi sealing magic Sutra!

“Stop talking nonsense! The boy will work hard!”

At this time, the Immortal Emperor Yongzhen roared, and the immortal yuan immediately circulated around him. Mysterious forces surged up, and the whole space seemed to stagnate.

The other three immortal emperors immediately reacted and shot at the same time.

The mysterious Tao patterns began to flow rapidly, and an indescribable force suddenly began to flow, condensing into a huge disc behind the four people.

“Open!”

The four discs began to rotate, but after a few seconds, they turned into a curtain of light.

When the disc rotates to an extreme, it seems to fall into a state of stillness.

Boom!

That is, at this moment, the four light pillars hit out and fell on Xu que.

For a moment, everything seemed to be at rest.

Xu Xu stands in it. He just feels that everything seems to have stopped, and even his thinking has stopped working.

He watched Yongzhen Immortal Emperor stop and tried to attack himself with magic, but there was no effect.

After a while, Yongzhen came forward and said something.

A dark space crack appeared beside him. Yongzhen looked at him and said with some regret: “unfortunately, if you become the Immortal Emperor, we may not have to find a way to rob Tianzhou.”

After that, with one palm, Xu que was directly photographed into the crack.

After all this, the four immortal emperors disappeared and re entered the heavenly palace.

After Xu que entered the crack, he came to a dark space and floated slowly.

The time flow of emptiness is slower than that of the outside world. I don’t know how much. If he can’t find a way out, he will float here for thousands of years until he meets the crack of nothingness accidentally opened.

However, when he was stationary, the system was still running on its own.

If someone can see his body, he will find that three different colors of breath are slowly circling, forming a star like vortex.

This vortex obviously only exists in the Dantian, but it seems to contain infinite mysteries.

On the other side, on Xianyun Island, four immortal emperors stood with their hands down.

Their magic power can banish people to another interface.

There is only endless void and eternal darkness. Although the flow of time is very slow, it is very stable.

Unless we surpass the Immortal Emperor in the understanding of the avenue, it is impossible to break the interface.

Time goes by like this bit by bit.

I don’t know how long after that, Xu que suddenly woke up with a pleasant voice.

“Ding, after all the forces are balanced, the host has automatically understood the mystery of the ultimate power, mastered the secret of heaven, and promoted to Immortal Emperor.”

Boom!

In the endless darkness, a palpitating breath suddenly broke out, and the whole space was shaking.

Xu que stands in the dark, with black hair flying behind his head and cold eyes, just like ancient gods and demons.

His body is haunted with three lights of black, white and gold. These lights flow slowly and finally merge into a silvery white luster.

“Is this the power of the Immortal Emperor?”

Xu Ke slowly clenched his fist and felt the indescribable power in his body. With a wave, a space crack appeared in front of him.

He stepped out and came to the heaven palace in an instant.

The four immortal emperors felt the breath and rushed out again. They were all numb when they saw Xu que.

What happened?

Haven’t they joined hands to use the immortal method to exile this guy?

Why did he come back?

“No, this guy has been promoted!” Yong Zhen shouted in disbelief. “He has become the Immortal Emperor!”

Xu que grinned: “yes, I have become the Immortal Emperor.”

The four people suddenly felt a great crisis. Before that, Xu que was just a immortal realm. No matter how powerful he was, he couldn’t kill them.

But now Xu Ke can take time to erase a road as long as he is willing.

If the avenue disappears, they immortal emperors will also die!

“Wait, we can discuss…” emperor Cheng Yuanxian hurried.

Boom!

Xu Wei directly raised his hand and punched out, and all the spaces were shocked. The whole heavenly palace only lasted for a short moment, and then turned into fly ash.

The four immortal emperors were completely unable to resist this force and were instantly blasted into powder.

When they recovered again, they saw Xu Weizheng looking at them with a smile.

“Well recovered, Ben Jisheng likes you guys who can’t fight to death.” Xu lacked a flamboyant radian on the corner of his mouth and laughed, “just take you to try the power that our sect leader just realized!”

Yongzhen Immortal Emperor turned pale and said in horror, “this is the power of heaven!”

The other three immortal emperors were shocked. When they reached their level of cultivation, the Tao of heaven was no longer a mysterious existence.

Even Yongzhen can rely on the power of the way of heaven to place his divine thoughts in the disaster of heaven.

But this kind of magic power that directly uses the power of heaven is unheard of!

In the light column, a huge millstone fell slowly with heavy prestige.

Boom!

In an instant, several immortal emperors only felt an unmatched force acting on themselves.

This force is strong and irresistible.

The millstone began to turn, and several immortal emperors became more and more frightened.

“The road in my body is being wiped out!” Cheng Yuan exclaimed first.

The other three were the same, and the shock in their hearts could not even be described in words.

The avenue is obliterated, which means they will be killed!

As the leader of the four, Yongzhen made a quick decision, raised his hand and said, “stop! We’ll return Yurou to you!”

In the face of life and death, he didn’t care about Tianzhou ships and the flow of the divine domain. Protecting his life was the most important thing.

With that, he waved his big hand directly, and a light flew out of the fairy palace and hovered in front of Xu que.

It was a round ball of light in which Xiao Rou was sleeping.

Xu Xu finally stopped and stared at Xiao Rou with his head down.

After several breaths, he looked up at the four immortal emperors.

“Xu Xiandi, since you have stepped into the realm of Immortal Emperor, you should know our difficulties. Now Yurou has returned to you. We don’t need to fight again!” Yongzhen Immortal Emperor shouted in a deep voice, but his voice trembled.

In any case, he didn’t expect that Xu que was directly promoted to Immortal Emperor’s realm in front of them.

The key is the immortal empire of this goods. It’s so terrible!

At the peak of xianzun realm, they can be hanged to fight. Now Xiandi realm almost killed them alive.

Nima, that’s ridiculous!

“Xu Xiandi, stop! If our Avenue is destroyed, the whole immortal cultivation world will be faulted…” seeing Xu Duan’s murderous eyes, Emperor Cheng Yuanxian hurriedly advised.

“Shut up!”

Xu que suddenly shouted in a indifferent voice, “do you think I care about the continuous breaking of the cultivation world? It’s not nice to say, even if I kill you, the sky will collapse and the cultivation world will be destroyed, and I will kill you.”

“…” the four immortal emperors suddenly changed their faces and their pupils contracted sharply, like a great enemy.

They have no doubt that Xu’s remark is false.

This goods can really do such a thing!

However, the next moment, Xu que laughed.

“Hahaha…” his laughter ran directly through the world and spread everywhere.

“Immortal Emperor?”

He opened his mouth, full of ridicule and banter, “go to your mother’s Immortal Emperor!”

After that, Xu Ke stepped in and disappeared directly into the space with Yurou.

Just before it dissipated, his voice still echoed between heaven and earth.

“From now on, I will control xianyunzhou.”

Xu que chose not to kill the four immortals. First, he has been promoted to the realm of immortals and has enough strength to destroy the avenue, so let alone the four immortals. Even if the emperor appears, he can still kill him.

In other words, he has taken care of the lives of these four people.

Hold it tight!

Another reason is the most important.

The Immortal Emperor is really difficult to cultivate. In the future, he will certainly go to the divine domain. Without the combat power of four immortal emperors, even if he is strong, he will be very hard.

Therefore, the four immortal emperors, Xu Ke, have reserved a position for them – “hard work”!

At the same time, with Xu’s departure, the light column on the field also dispersed.

The four immortal emperors finally got up and looked at each other. For a moment, they didn’t know how to react.

“We just let him take people away?” a fairy emperor was unwilling.

Yongzhen Immortal Emperor sighed and said: “his strength has exceeded us too much. He just wanted to kill us and can do it at any time.”

Several people looked at each other. Although they were unwilling, they could only reluctantly admit this fact.

They can’t stop Xu Ke at all.

As for the people in xianyunzhou, they did not know what language to express their shock at this time.

Against the four immortal emperors with the power of one person.

He is really a model in the friar world!

A long time later, there was a saying in Xianyun island.

Friars of our generation should learn from Xu Ke!

Hundreds of years later.

A sound runs through the number boundary.

“According to the edict of Xu Tiandi of the fried heaven Gang, monks above the immortal Zun’s territory, gather at Tianzhou quickly. Since the Tianzhou has set sail, our journey is a big star… Bah, no, it’s the divine domain! Duan Jiude, Ganni Niang, how did you write it? I almost misspelled it… Oh, I wiped it and forgot to turn off the wheat…”

With the sound of two dogs falling in several circles.

The whole immortal cultivation world was boiling and in an uproar.

Xuanhuangzhou, Dizhou, Tianzhou, xianyunzhou, etc. countless monks were shocked!

Hundreds of years ago, after Xu Tiandi defeated the four immortal emperors with one enemy and four, the four immortal emperors were completely depressed, and the four Tianmen forces fell overnight, replaced by the fried tianbang!

Unexpectedly, only a few hundred years ago, the fried tianbang was ready to open Tianzhou and go to the divine domain.

The divine realm is the place where the gods live in groups.

Does it really exist?

Where the layout of the four immortal emperors could not be reached for so many years, did Xu Tiandi do it hundreds of years later?

Some doubt, some are upset, and some are excited and surprised.

Once the divine realm is opened, great changes will take place in the immortal world.

It is said that once the door of the divine realm is opened, the rules of heaven and earth in the cultivation world will be more perfect and the aura will be more abundant. At that time, everyone’s cultivation road will be more smooth and simple.

All of a sudden, countless xianzun strongmen who had been dormant for a long time, even Xianwang strongmen, couldn’t help but rush to Tianzhou.

In just a few days, the whole Tianzhou was overcrowded, and all the fairy kings and the strong ones gathered together.

Four immortal emperors also came.

Over the years, they lived very carefully and dared not provoke Xu vacancy or the bombers.

But now, they think it’s worth it.

The humiliation and unwillingness of that year were nothing at all.

Because now, they finally wait for this day, the day to go to the divine domain!

Looking at the Tianzhou full of immortal statues and immortal kings, the four immortal emperors were filled with emotion.

Even the four heavenly gates under their door never gathered so many immortal statues!

This situation is almost unprecedented!

“The fairy king is not as good as the dog, and the Fairy Statue walks all over the ground” is very appropriate in today’s Tianzhou!

Boom!

At this time, the sky suddenly burst into a loud noise.

Everyone in Tianzhou looked up.

A large void suddenly twisted, and then the golden light shone, just like a golden sun, exploding in the air.

Then, a black haired man came out lazily.

His eyes narrowed slightly, some listless, like he didn’t wake up.

However, there were more than a dozen women behind him, each of whom was brilliant. They were not fairies, but they were more attractive than fairies.

For a moment, a bold guess welled up in many people’s hearts.

That man is not like he didn’t wake up, but more like his body was taken out… Cough, no, no, how can we secretly figure out Xu Tiandi like this.

“En?” almost at the same time, Xu Ke’s hazy sleeping eyes suddenly opened and fell directly on a large black crowd below. “Fart your mother. Don’t think I can’t hear the little tug you secretly think in your heart. I’m not hollowed out. I think it’s boring to go to the divine domain, okay?” Xu’s angry scolding spread all over the world in an instant. The crowd was immediately terrified and hurriedly bowed down and shouted “Xu Tiandi calm down”! The four immortal emperors watched, but they could not help laughing and almost laughed. This Xu Tiandi… “You four owe to clean up, don’t you?” suddenly, Xu Duan’s eyes swept to the four people: “have you cooked the foot washing water you were told to cook a few days ago?” “well, well! Xu Tiandi rest assured that all the medicinal materials are ready and have already been boiled!” Yongzhen Xiandi replied hurriedly. But everyone present was stunned. Immortal Emperor? Boiled foot wash? “OK, that’s no nonsense!” Xu que waved his big hand and shouted, “Er Gouzi, move Taiyi Tianshi out.” “Ben shenzun moves a chicken, and this kind of thing still needs the active hand of Ben shenzun?” Er Gouzi rushed out from the rear and yelled. Then he looked at the four immortal emperors and said fiercely, “what are you four doing in a daze? It’s my God’s words that don’t work well, or are you floating? Come and move Taiyi Tianshi!” “yes!” the four immortal emperors pulled out the corners of their mouths and flew forward immediately. According to the ancient books, Tianzhou is the heavenly boat leading to the divine domain, Taiyi Tianshi is the key, and the chosen person is the helmsman of the heavenly boat. Now everything is ready. Taiyi Tianshi is placed into the Tianzhou center. The two chosen people, Xu Tiandi and Xuanyuan Wanrong Xiandi, have all arrived! Yes, every time I think of this, the four immortal emperors moan in their hearts. Even if Xu que becomes the Immortal Emperor. It’s only a few hundred years. Xuanyuan Wanrong, Jiang Hongyan and xiaorou have also stepped into the realm of Immortal Emperor. This makes them depressed, so far, it is difficult to accept this fact. And looking at the momentum revealed by Xu que, it is clear that he is infinitely close to the Taoist emperor. They even speculated that the goods might have been in the realm of Dao emperor, but they were deliberately hiding the realm. But guess belongs to guess. They dare not say or ask Soon, everything was ready. Xu Xu didn’t say much to everyone. He stepped out and came to the center of Tianzhou, in parallel with Xuanyuan Wanrong. The two looked at each other.
